  114 |     }

  120 |         // Clean up the partially initialized object

    1 | #ifndef ASSET_DNA_MQH_

    8 | #include "CommonStructs.mqh" // Luôn include để đảm bảo sự độc lập
    9 | 
   10 | // class CTradeHistoryOptimizer; // Đã có trong CommonStructs.mqh qua EAContext
   11 | 
   12 | 
   13 | // BẮT ĐẦU NAMESPACE
   14 | namespace ApexPullback {
   15 | 
   16 | 
   17 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   18 | //| Hàm chuyển đổi ENUM_STRATEGY_ID sang ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY      |
   19 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   20 | ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY ConvertStrategyIDToTradingStrategy(ENUM_STRATEGY_ID strategyId) {
   21 |     switch(strategyId) {
   22 |         case STRATEGY_ID_PULLBACK:          return STRATEGY_PULLBACK_TREND;
   23 |         case STRATEGY_ID_MEAN_REVERSION:    return STRATEGY_MEAN_REVERSION;
   24 |         case STRATEGY_ID_BREAKOUT:          return STRATEGY_MOMENTUM_BREAKOUT;
   25 |         case STRATEGY_ID_SHALLOW_PULLBACK:  return STRATEGY_SHALLOW_PULLBACK; // Hoặc một giá trị phù hợp khác trong ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY
   26 |         case STRATEGY_ID_RANGE_TRADING:     return STRATEGY_RANGE_TRADING;    // Hoặc một giá trị phù hợp khác
   27 |         // Thêm các case khác nếu cần
   28 |         default:                            return STRATEGY_UNDEFINED;
   29 |     }
   30 | }
   31 | 
   32 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   33 | //| Cấu trúc lưu trữ một giao dịch đơn lẻ                             |
   34 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   35 | class TradeRecord : public CObject {
   36 | public:
   37 |     long ticket;                // Số ticket của giao dịch
   38 |     datetime timeOpen;          // Thời gian mở lệnh
   39 |     datetime timeClose;         // Thời gian đóng lệnh
   40 |     ENUM_POSITION_TYPE type;    // Loại lệnh (buy/sell)
   41 |     double volume;              // Khối lượng giao dịch
   42 |     double priceOpen;           // Giá mở lệnh
   43 |     double priceClose;          // Giá đóng lệnh
   44 |     double profit;              // Lợi nhuận
   45 |     string symbol;              // Symbol giao dịch
   46 |     long magicNumber;           // Magic number
   47 |     string comment;             // Comment của lệnh
   48 |     ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY scenario; // Kịch bản/chiến lược được sử dụng
   49 | 
   50 |     //--- Constructor
   51 |     TradeRecord() {
   52 |         Clear();
   53 |     }
   54 | 
   55 |     //--- Method to clear data
   56 |     void Clear() {
   57 |         ticket = 0;
   58 |         timeOpen = 0;
   59 |         timeClose = 0;
   60 |         type = (ENUM_POSITION_TYPE)-1; // Invalid type
   61 |         volume = 0.0;
   62 |         priceOpen = 0.0;
   63 |         priceClose = 0.0;
   64 |         profit = 0.0;
   65 |         symbol = "";
   66 |         magicNumber = 0;
   67 |         comment = "";
   68 |         scenario = STRATEGY_UNDEFINED;
   69 |     }
   70 | };
   71 | 
   72 | //--- Strategy Performance Struct
   73 | struct StrategyPerformance {
   74 |     ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY strategy;
   75 |     int totalTrades;
   76 |     int winningTrades;
   77 |     double avgWinRate;   // Phần trăm
   78 |     double profitFactor;
   79 |     double expectancy;   // Kỳ vọng (có thể tính bằng R hoặc tiền tệ)
   80 |     double sharpeRatio;  // Tỷ lệ Sharpe
   81 |     // Thêm các chỉ số khác nếu cần: Max Drawdown, Avg Win/Loss Ratio
   82 | 
   83 |     void Clear() {
   84 |         strategy = STRATEGY_UNDEFINED;
   85 |         totalTrades = 0;
   86 |         winningTrades = 0;
   87 |         avgWinRate = 0.0;
   88 |         profitFactor = 0.0;
   89 |         expectancy = 0.0;
   90 |         sharpeRatio = 0.0;
   91 |     }
   92 | };
   93 | 
   94 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   95 | //| Lớp CAssetDNA - Phân tích và quản lý DNA của tài sản             |
   96 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   97 | class CAssetDNA : public CObject {
   98 | private:
   99 |     ApexPullback::EAContext* m_context;             // Pointer to the central EAContext
  100 |     CTradeHistoryOptimizer* m_optimizer;        // Pointer to the trade history optimizer
  101 |     string m_symbol;                            // Symbol being analyzed
  102 |     ENUM_TIMEFRAMES m_timeframe;                // Main timeframe for analysis
  103 | 
  104 |     // Lưu trữ lịch sử giao dịch và hiệu suất
  105 |     CArrayObj* m_tradeHistory;                    // Mảng lưu trữ lịch sử giao dịch (TradeRecord objects)
  106 |     StrategyPerformance m_strategyStats[];          // Thống kê hiệu suất theo chiến lược
  107 | 
  108 |     // Các đặc tính tĩnh của tài sản
  109 |     ApexPullback::AssetProfileData m_assetProfile; // Thông tin cơ bản về tài sản
  110 |     
  111 |     // Các biến phân tích
  112 |     double m_volatilityScore;       // Điểm biến động
  113 |     double m_trendScore;            // Điểm xu hướng
  114 |     double m_momentumScore;         // Điểm động lượng
  115 |     double m_regimeScore;           // Điểm chế độ thị trường
  116 |     
  117 |     // --- Cross-Validation và Anti-Overfitting Structures ---
  118 |     struct CrossValidationResult {
  119 |         double avgWinRate;           // Win rate trung bình từ CV
  120 |         double avgProfitFactor;      // Profit factor trung bình từ CV
  121 |         double avgExpectancy;        // Expectancy trung bình từ CV
  122 |         double winRateVariance;      // Phương sai của win rate
  123 |         double profitFactorVariance; // Phương sai của profit factor
  124 |         double expectancyVariance;   // Phương sai của expectancy
  125 |         int validFolds;              // Số fold hợp lệ
  126 |         double stabilityIndex;       // Chỉ số ổn định (0-1)
  127 |         
  128 |         void Clear() {
  129 |             avgWinRate = 0.0;
  130 |             avgProfitFactor = 0.0;
  131 |             avgExpectancy = 0.0;
  132 |             winRateVariance = 0.0;
  133 |             profitFactorVariance = 0.0;
  134 |             expectancyVariance = 0.0;
  135 |             validFolds = 0;
  136 |             stabilityIndex = 0.0;
  137 |         }
  138 |     };
  139 |     
  140 | public:
  141 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  142 | //| Constructor                                                        |
  143 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  144 | CAssetDNA::CAssetDNA() : m_context(NULL), m_optimizer(NULL), m_tradeHistory(NULL) {
  145 |     // Constructor mặc định, không thực hiện logic phức tạp.
  146 |     // Việc khởi tạo sẽ được thực hiện trong hàm Initialize.
  147 | }
  148 |     
  149 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  150 | //| Destructor                                                         |
  151 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  152 | ~CAssetDNA() {
  153 |     if(m_context && m_context->pLogger != NULL) { // Check if logger exists before using it
  154 |         // m_context->pLogger->LogInfo("Destroying CAssetDNA for " + m_symbol); // Logging can be added if needed
  155 |     }
  156 |     // Safely delete the dynamic array
  157 |     if(m_tradeHistory != NULL)
  158 |     {
  159 |         delete m_tradeHistory;
  160 |         m_tradeHistory = NULL;
  161 |     }
  162 | }
  163 | 
  164 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  165 | //| Initialize                                                       |
  166 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  167 | bool CAssetDNA::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  168 |     m_context = context; // Lưu con trỏ context
  169 | 
  170 |     if(CheckPointer(m_context) == POINTER_INVALID || CheckPointer(m_context->pLogger) == POINTER_INVALID) {
  171 |         printf("CAssetDNA::Initialize - Context hoặc Logger không hợp lệ.");
  172 |         return false;
  173 |     }
  174 | 
  175 |     // Cấp phát bộ nhớ ở đây thay vì trong constructor
  176 |     if(CheckPointer(m_tradeHistory) == POINTER_INVALID) {
  177 |         m_tradeHistory = new CArrayObj();
  178 |         if(CheckPointer(m_tradeHistory) == POINTER_INVALID) {
  179 |             m_context->pLogger->LogError("Không thể cấp phát bộ nhớ cho m_tradeHistory", __FUNCTION__);
  180 |             return false;
  181 |         }
  182 |         m_tradeHistory->SetFreeObjects(true);
  183 |     }
  184 | 
  185 |     if(CheckPointer(m_context->pSymbolInfo) != POINTER_INVALID) m_symbol = m_context->pSymbolInfo->Symbol();
  186 |     if(CheckPointer(m_context->pTimeManager) != POINTER_INVALID) m_timeframe = m_context->pTimeManager->GetMainTimeframe();
  187 | 
  188 |     if(CheckPointer(m_context->pTradeHistoryOptimizer) != POINTER_INVALID) {
  189 |        m_optimizer = m_context->pTradeHistoryOptimizer;
  190 |     } else {
  191 |         m_context->pLogger->LogWarning("TradeHistoryOptimizer là NULL trong CAssetDNA::Initialize. Một số tính năng có thể không hoạt động.", __FUNCTION__);
  192 |     }
  193 | 
  194 |     int numStrategies = (int)STRATEGY_COUNT; // Sử dụng enum count
  195 |     ArrayResize(m_strategyStats, numStrategies);
  196 |     for(int i = 0; i < numStrategies; i++) {
  197 |         m_strategyStats[i].Clear();
  198 |         m_strategyStats[i].strategy = (ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY)i;
  199 |     }
  200 | 
  201 |     m_context->pLogger->LogInfo("CAssetDNA đã được khởi tạo cho " + m_symbol, __FUNCTION__);
  202 |     return true;
  203 | }
  204 |     
  205 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  206 | //| Thực hiện phân tích toàn diện                                      |
  207 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  208 | bool FullAnalysis() {
  209 |     if(!m_context || m_context->pLogger == NULL) return false;
  210 |     
  211 |     m_context->pLogger->LogDebug("Starting full AssetDNA analysis for " + m_symbol);
  212 |     
  213 |     AnalyzeAssetCharacteristics();
  214 |     LoadTradeHistory();
  215 |     AnalyzeStrategyPerformance();
  216 |     PrintAnalysisSummary(); // Gọi hàm in tóm tắt
  217 |     
  218 |     m_context->pLogger->LogDebug("Phân tích toàn diện AssetDNA hoàn tất");
  219 |     return true;
  220 | }
  221 |     
  222 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  223 |     //| Phân tích đặc tính cơ bản của tài sản                            |
  224 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  225 |     void AnalyzeAssetCharacteristics() {
  226 |         // Phân tích biến động
  227 |         double atr = m_context->IndicatorUtils->GetATR(14);
  228 |         double atrPercent = (atr / SymbolInfoDouble(m_symbol, SYMBOL_BID)) * 100;
  229 |         
  230 |         // Phân tích xu hướng
  231 |         m_context->IndicatorUtils->RegisterMA(20);
  232 |         m_context->IndicatorUtils->RegisterMA(50);
  233 |         m_context->IndicatorUtils->RegisterMA(200);
  234 |         
  235 |         double ema20 = m_context->IndicatorUtils->GetMA(20);
  236 |         double ema50 = m_context->IndicatorUtils->GetMA(50);
  237 |         double ema200 = m_context->IndicatorUtils->GetMA(200);
  238 |         
  239 |         // Phân tích động lượng
  240 |         double rsi = m_context->IndicatorUtils->GetRSI();
  241 |         double macd = m_context->IndicatorUtils->GetMACDMain();
  242 |         
  243 | m_volatilityScore = CalculateVolatilityScore(atrPercent);
  244 | m_trendScore = CalculateTrendScore(ema20, ema50, ema200);
  245 | m_momentumScore = CalculateMomentumScore(rsi, macd);
  246 |         m_regimeScore = (m_trendScore + m_momentumScore) / 2;
  247 |         
  248 |         // Cập nhật thông tin vào profile
  249 |         m_assetProfile.averageATR = atr;
  250 |         m_assetProfile.yearlyVolatility = atrPercent * sqrt(252);
  251 |         m_assetProfile.isStrongTrending = (m_trendScore > 0.7);
  252 |         m_assetProfile.isMeanReverting = (m_regimeScore < 0.3);
  253 |     }
  254 |     
  255 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  256 |     //| Tải và phân tích lịch sử giao dịch                               |
  257 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  258 |     void LoadTradeHistory() {
  259 |         if(m_context->pLogger == NULL) return;
  260 |         m_context->pLogger->LogInfo("AssetDNA: Loading trade history...");
  261 |         
  262 |         m_tradeHistory->Clear(); // Use -> for pointer
  263 | 
  264 |         if(!HistorySelect(0, TimeCurrent())) {
  265 |             if(m_context->pLogger != NULL) m_context->pLogger->LogError("AssetDNA: HistorySelect failed. Error: " + IntegerToString(GetLastError()));
  266 |             return;
  267 |         }
  268 | 
  269 |         ulong ticket;
  270 |         long totalDeals = HistoryDealsTotal();
  271 |         if(m_context->pLogger != NULL) m_context->pLogger->LogInfo("AssetDNA: Total deals in history: " + IntegerToString(totalDeals));
  272 | 
  273 |         for(long i = 0; i < totalDeals; i++) {
  274 |             ticket = HistoryDealGetTicket(i);
  275 |             if(ticket > 0) {
  276 |                 long dealMagic = HistoryDealGetInteger(ticket, DEAL_MAGIC);
  277 |                 string dealSymbol = HistoryDealGetString(ticket, DEAL_SYMBOL);
  278 |                 long dealEntry = HistoryDealGetInteger(ticket, DEAL_ENTRY);
  279 |                 
  280 |                 if ((dealEntry == DEAL_ENTRY_OUT || dealEntry == DEAL_ENTRY_INOUT) && 
  281 |                     (dealMagic == m_context->pMagicNumber || (dealMagic >= EA_MAGIC_NUMBER_BASE && dealMagic < EA_MAGIC_NUMBER_BASE + 1000)) &&
  282 |                     dealSymbol == m_symbol) {
  283 |                     
  284 |                     TradeRecord* trade = new TradeRecord();
  285 |                     if(trade == NULL) continue;
  286 | 
  287 |                     trade->ticket = ticket;
  288 |                     trade->timeClose = (datetime)HistoryDealGetInteger(ticket, DEAL_TIME);
  289 |                     trade->priceClose = HistoryDealGetDouble(ticket, DEAL_PRICE);
  290 |                     trade->volume = HistoryDealGetDouble(ticket, DEAL_VOLUME);
  291 |                     trade->profit = HistoryDealGetDouble(ticket, DEAL_PROFIT);
  292 |                     trade->symbol = dealSymbol;
  293 |                     trade->magicNumber = dealMagic;
  294 |                     trade->comment = HistoryDealGetString(ticket, DEAL_COMMENT);
  295 | 
  296 |                     long position_id = HistoryDealGetInteger(ticket, DEAL_POSITION_ID);
  297 |                     if(position_id > 0) {
  298 |                         if(HistorySelectByPosition(position_id)) {
  299 |                             ulong open_deal_ticket = HistoryDealGetTicket(0);
  300 |                             if(open_deal_ticket > 0) {
  301 |                                 trade->timeOpen = (datetime)HistoryDealGetInteger(open_deal_ticket, DEAL_TIME);
  302 |                                 trade->priceOpen = HistoryDealGetDouble(open_deal_ticket, DEAL_PRICE);
  303 |                                 trade->type = (ENUM_POSITION_TYPE)HistoryDealGetInteger(open_deal_ticket, DEAL_TYPE);
  304 |                             }
  305 |                         }
  306 |                     }
  307 | 
  308 |                     ENUM_STRATEGY_ID decodedStrategyId = DecodeStrategyFromMagic((int)dealMagic);
  309 |                     trade->scenario = ConvertStrategyIDToTradingStrategy(decodedStrategyId);
  310 | 
  311 |                     m_tradeHistory->Add(trade); // Use -> for pointer
  312 |                 }
  313 |             }
  314 |         }
  315 |         if(m_context->pLogger != NULL) m_context->pLogger->LogInfo("AssetDNA: Loaded " + IntegerToString(m_tradeHistory->Total()) + " relevant trade records for " + m_symbol);
  316 |     }
  317 | 
  318 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  319 |     //| Các hàm tính điểm (Helper functions)                             |
  320 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  321 |     double CalculateVolatilityScore(double atrPercent) {
  322 |         return MathHelper::Normalize(atrPercent, 0.1, 2.0);
  323 |     }
  324 | 
  325 |     double CalculateTrendScore(double ema20, double ema50, double ema200) {
  326 |         if (ema20 > ema50 && ema50 > ema200) return 1.0;
  327 |         if (ema20 < ema50 && ema50 < ema200) return 0.0;
  328 |         return 0.5;
  329 |     }
  330 | 
  331 |     double CalculateMomentumScore(double rsi, double macd) {
  332 |         double rsiScore = MathHelper::Normalize(rsi, 30, 70);
  333 |         return rsiScore;
  334 |     }
  335 | 
  336 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  337 |     //| Phân tích hiệu suất các chiến lược                               |
  338 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  339 | void AnalyzeStrategyPerformance() {
  340 |     if (m_context->pLogger != NULL && m_context->EnableMethodLogging) {
  341 |         m_context->pLogger->LogDebug("AssetDNA: Starting strategy performance analysis...");
  342 |     }
  343 | 
  344 |     for (int i = 0; i < ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY_COUNT; i++) {
  345 |         m_strategyStats[i].Clear();
  346 |         m_strategyStats[i].strategy = (ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY)i;
  347 |     }
  348 | 
  349 |     if (m_tradeHistory->Total() == 0) { // Use -> for pointer
  350 |         if (m_context->pLogger != NULL && m_context->EnableMethodLogging) {
  351 |             m_context->pLogger->LogDebug("AssetDNA: No trade history found to analyze.");
  352 |         }
  353 |         return;
  354 |     }
  355 | 
  356 |     double weighted_total_profit[ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY_COUNT];
  357 |     double weighted_total_loss[ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY_COUNT];
  358 |     double weighted_wins[ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY_COUNT];
  359 |     double weighted_losses[ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY_COUNT];
  360 |     double weighted_total_trades[ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY_COUNT];
  361 |     
  362 |     for(int i = 0; i < ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY_COUNT; i++) {
  363 |         weighted_total_profit[i] = 0.0;
  364 |         weighted_total_loss[i] = 0.0;
  365 |         weighted_wins[i] = 0.0;
  366 |         weighted_losses[i] = 0.0;
  367 |         weighted_total_trades[i] = 0.0;
  368 |     }
  369 | 
  370 |     datetime cutoffTime = 0;
  371 |     if (m_context->pHistoryAnalysisMonths > 0) {
  372 |         cutoffTime = TimeCurrent() - ((long)m_context->pHistoryAnalysisMonths * 30 * 24 * 3600);
  373 |     }
  374 | 
  375 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_tradeHistory->Total(); i++) { // Use -> for pointer
  376 |         TradeRecord* trade = (TradeRecord*)m_tradeHistory->At(i); // Use -> for pointer
  377 |         if (trade == NULL) continue;
  378 | 
  379 |         if (cutoffTime > 0 && trade->timeOpen < cutoffTime) continue;
  380 | 
  381 |         int strategyIdx = (int)trade->scenario;
  382 |         if (strategyIdx < 0 || strategyIdx >= ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY_COUNT) {
  383 |             if (m_context->pLogger != NULL) m_context->pLogger->LogWarning(StringFormat("AssetDNA: Invalid strategy index %d for trade #%d", strategyIdx, trade->ticket));
  384 |             continue;
  385 |         }
  386 | 
  387 |         double decayWeight = CalculateTradeDecayWeight(trade->timeOpen);
  388 |         
  389 |         m_strategyStats[strategyIdx].totalTrades++;
  390 |         weighted_total_trades[strategyIdx] += decayWeight;
  391 | 
  392 |         if (trade->profit > 0) {
  393 |             weighted_total_profit[strategyIdx] += trade->profit * decayWeight;
  394 |             weighted_wins[strategyIdx] += decayWeight;
  395 |         } else {
  396 |             weighted_total_loss[strategyIdx] += fabs(trade->profit) * decayWeight;
  397 |             weighted_losses[strategyIdx] += decayWeight;
  398 |         }
  399 |     }
  400 | 
  401 |     for (int i = 0; i < ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY_COUNT; i++) {
  402 |         if (weighted_total_trades[i] > 0.01) {
  403 |             
  404 |             m_strategyStats[i].avgWinRate = (weighted_wins[i] / weighted_total_trades[i]) * 100.0;
  405 |             
  406 |             if (weighted_total_loss[i] > 0) {
  407 |                 m_strategyStats[i].profitFactor = weighted_total_profit[i] / weighted_total_loss[i];
  408 |             } else if (weighted_total_profit[i] > 0) {
  409 |                 m_strategyStats[i].profitFactor = 999.0; // Convention for infinite profit factor
  410 |             } else {
  411 |                 m_strategyStats[i].profitFactor = 0.0;
  412 |             }
  413 | 
  414 |             m_strategyStats[i].expectancy = (weighted_total_profit[i] - weighted_total_loss[i]) / weighted_total_trades[i];
  415 | 
  416 |             if (m_context->pLogger != NULL && m_context->EnableStrategyPerformanceLogging) {
  417 |                 m_context->pLogger->LogDebug(StringFormat("AssetDNA: Strategy '%s' Performance - Trades: %d, W/W-Rate: %.2f, W/PF: %.2f, W/Exp: %.2f",
  418 |                     EnumToString((ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY)i),
  419 |                     m_strategyStats[i].totalTrades,
  420 |                     m_strategyStats[i].avgWinRate,
  421 |                     m_strategyStats[i].profitFactor,
  422 |                     m_strategyStats[i].expectancy));
  423 |             }
  424 |         }
  425 |     }
  426 | }
  427 | 
  428 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  429 |     //| In tóm tắt phân tích ra log                                      |
  430 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  431 |     void PrintAnalysisSummary() {
  432 |         if(m_context->pLogger == NULL || !m_context->EnableDNAPrinting) return;
  433 |         
  434 |         m_context->pLogger->LogInfo("--- Asset DNA Summary for " + m_symbol + " ---");
  435 |         m_context->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Volatility Score: %.2f (ATR: %.5f, ATR%%: %.2f%%)", 
  436 |                                     m_volatilityScore, 
  437 |                                     m_assetProfile.averageATR, 
  438 |                                     (m_assetProfile.averageATR / SymbolInfoDouble(m_symbol, SYMBOL_BID)) * 100));
  439 |         m_context->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Trend Score: %.2f (Trending: %s)", m_trendScore, m_assetProfile.isStrongTrending ? "Yes" : "No"));
  440 |         m_context->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Momentum Score: %.2f", m_momentumScore));
  441 |         m_context->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Market Regime Score: %.2f (Mean Reverting: %s)", m_regimeScore, m_assetProfile.isMeanReverting ? "Yes" : "No"));
  442 |         m_context->pLogger->LogInfo("--------------------------------------------------");
  443 |     }
  444 | 
  445 | 
  446 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  447 |     //| Tính trọng số giảm dần theo thời gian cho giao dịch               |
  448 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  449 |     double CalculateTradeDecayWeight(datetime tradeTime) {
  450 |         if (m_context->pDecayHalfLifeDays <= 0) {
  451 |             return 1.0; // No decay if not configured
  452 |         }
  453 | 
  454 |         long ageInSeconds = TimeCurrent() - tradeTime;
  455 |         double ageInDays = (double)ageInSeconds / (24.0 * 3600.0);
  456 | 
  457 |         // Exponential decay formula: weight = 2^(-age / half_life)
  458 |         double halfLife = m_context->pDecayHalfLifeDays;
  459 |         double weight = pow(2.0, -ageInDays / halfLife);
  460 | 
  461 |         return weight;
  462 |     }
  463 | 
  464 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  465 |     //| Giải mã chiến lược từ Magic Number                               |
  466 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  467 |     ENUM_STRATEGY_ID DecodeStrategyFromMagic(int magic) {
  468 |         if (magic >= EA_MAGIC_NUMBER_BASE && magic < EA_MAGIC_NUMBER_BASE + 1000) {
  469 |             int strategyPart = (magic - EA_MAGIC_NUMBER_BASE) % 100;
  470 |             return (ENUM_STRATEGY_ID)strategyPart;
  471 |         }
  472 |         return STRATEGY_ID_UNDEFINED;
  473 |     }
  474 | 
  475 | }; // END CLASS CAssetDNA
  476 | 
  477 | } // END NAMESPACE ApexPullback
  478 | 
  479 | 
  480 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  481 |     //| Lấy chiến lược tối ưu dựa trên phân tích                        |
  482 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  483 |     ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY GetOptimalStrategy(const MarketProfileDataStruct& currentProfile) {
  484 |         if(m_context->Logger != NULL) {
  485 |             m_context->Logger->LogDebug("AssetDNA: Determining optimal strategy...");
  486 |         }
  487 | 
  488 |         double highestScore = -1.0;
  489 |         ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY bestStrategy = STRATEGY_UNDEFINED;
  490 | 
  491 |         // Iterate through all defined strategies
  492 |         for (int i = 0; i < ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY_COUNT; i++) {
  493 |             ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY currentStrategy = (ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY)i;
  494 |             if (currentStrategy == STRATEGY_UNDEFINED) continue;
  495 | 
  496 |             double marketSuitability = CalculateMarketSuitability(currentStrategy, currentProfile);
  497 |             double pastPerformance = GetPastPerformanceScore(currentStrategy);
  498 | 
  499 |             // Combine scores with weighting
  500 |             double finalScore = (marketSuitability * m_context->MarketSuitabilityWeight) + (pastPerformance * m_context->PastPerformanceWeight);
  501 | 
  502 |             if (m_context->Logger != NULL && m_context->EnableDetailedScoreLogging) {
  503 |                 m_context->Logger->LogDebug(StringFormat("AssetDNA: Strategy '%s' - Market: %.3f, Perf: %.3f, Final: %.3f",
  504 |                     EnumToString(currentStrategy), marketSuitability, pastPerformance, finalScore));
  505 |             }
  506 | 
  507 |             if (finalScore > highestScore) {
  508 |                 highestScore = finalScore;
  509 |                 bestStrategy = currentStrategy;
  510 |             }
  511 |         }
  512 | 
  513 |         if (m_context->Logger != NULL) {
  514 |             m_context->Logger->LogInfo(StringFormat("AssetDNA: Optimal strategy selected: %s (Score: %.3f)", EnumToString(bestStrategy), highestScore));
  515 |         }
  516 | 
  517 |         return bestStrategy;
  518 |     }
  519 | 
  520 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  521 |     //| Tính toán sự phù hợp của thị trường hiện tại cho một chiến lược  |
  522 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  523 |     double CalculateMarketSuitability(ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY strategy, const MarketProfileDataStruct& profile) {
  524 |         double score = 0.0;
  525 |         switch (strategy) {
  526 |             case STRATEGY_PULLBACK_TREND:
  527 |                 score = profile.TrendStrength * 0.5 + profile.MomentumScore * 0.3 + (1.0 - profile.VolatilityScore) * 0.2;
  528 |                 break;
  529 |             case STRATEGY_MOMENTUM_BREAKOUT:
  530 |                 score = profile.VolatilityScore * 0.5 + profile.MomentumScore * 0.4 + profile.VolumeScore * 0.1;
  531 |                 break;
  532 |             case STRATEGY_MEAN_REVERSION:
  533 |                 score = (1.0 - profile.TrendStrength) * 0.6 + profile.RSIReversionSignal * 0.4;
  534 |                 break;
  535 |             case STRATEGY_SHALLOW_PULLBACK:
  536 |                  score = profile.TrendStrength * 0.6 + profile.MomentumScore * 0.4;
  537 |                  break;
  538 |             case STRATEGY_RANGE_TRADING:
  539 |                  score = (1.0 - profile.TrendStrength) * 0.7 + (1.0 - profile.VolatilityScore) * 0.3;
  540 |                  break;
  541 |         }
  542 |         return MathMax(0.0, MathMin(1.0, score)); // Normalize to 0-1
  543 |     }
  544 | 
  545 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  546 |     //| Lấy điểm hiệu suất trong quá khứ của một chiến lược              |
  547 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  548 |     double GetPastPerformanceScore(ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY strategy) {
  549 |         const StrategyPerformance* perf = GetStrategyPerformance(strategy);
  550 |         if (perf == NULL || perf->totalTrades < m_context->MinTradesForPerformance) {
  551 |             return m_context->DefaultPerformanceScore; // Return a neutral default score
  552 |         }
  553 | 
  554 |         // Perform cross-validation to get robust metrics
  555 |         CrossValidationResult cvResult = PerformEnhancedCrossValidation(strategy, perf);
  556 | 
  557 |         if (cvResult.validFolds > 0) {
  558 |             // Regularization: Shrink metrics towards the mean if data is sparse
  559 |             double tradeCountFactor = 1.0 - exp(-(double)perf->totalTrades / 50.0); // Factor approaches 1 as trades increase
  560 |             double adjustedWinRate = (cvResult.avgWinRate * tradeCountFactor) + (50.0 * (1.0 - tradeCountFactor));
  561 |             double adjustedProfitFactor = (cvResult.avgProfitFactor * tradeCountFactor) + (1.0 * (1.0 - tradeCountFactor));
  562 |             double adjustedExpectancy = (cvResult.avgExpectancy * tradeCountFactor) + (0.0 * (1.0 - tradeCountFactor));
  563 | 
  564 |             double score = 0.0;
  565 |             double winRateScore = 0.0, profitFactorScore = 0.0, expectancyScore = 0.0, stabilityScore = 0.0;
  566 | 
  567 |             if(adjustedWinRate >= 60.0) winRateScore = 0.3;
  568 |             else if(adjustedWinRate >= 50.0) winRateScore = 0.2;
  569 |             else if(adjustedWinRate >= 40.0) winRateScore = 0.1;
  570 |             else if(adjustedWinRate >= 25.0) winRateScore = 0.05;
  571 |             
  572 |             if(adjustedProfitFactor >= 1.8) profitFactorScore = 0.3;
  573 |             else if(adjustedProfitFactor >= 1.4) profitFactorScore = 0.25;
  574 |             else if(adjustedProfitFactor >= 1.15) profitFactorScore = 0.15;
  575 |             else if(adjustedProfitFactor >= 1.0) profitFactorScore = 0.05;
  576 |             
  577 |             if(adjustedExpectancy >= 0.15) expectancyScore = 0.2;
  578 |             else if(adjustedExpectancy >= 0.08) expectancyScore = 0.15;
  579 |             else if(adjustedExpectancy >= 0.03) expectancyScore = 0.1;
  580 |             else if(adjustedExpectancy >= 0.0) expectancyScore = 0.05;
  581 |             
  582 |             stabilityScore = CalculateStabilityScore(cvResult);
  583 |             
  584 |             score = winRateScore + profitFactorScore + expectancyScore + stabilityScore;
  585 |             
  586 |             double overfittingPenalty = CalculateOverfittingPenalty(cvResult);
  587 |             score = MathMax(0.0, score - overfittingPenalty);
  588 |             
  589 |             if(m_context->Logger && m_context->EnableStrategyPerformanceLogging) {
  590 |                 m_context->Logger->LogDebug(StringFormat("AssetDNA: %s Performance (CV) - WR: %.1f%% (%.1f%%), PF: %.2f (%.2f), Exp: %.3f (%.3f), Stability: %.3f, Trades: %d",
  591 |                                  EnumToString(strategy), adjustedWinRate, perf->avgWinRate, adjustedProfitFactor, perf->profitFactor, 
  592 |                                  adjustedExpectancy, perf->expectancy, stabilityScore, perf->totalTrades));
  593 |             }
  594 |             
  595 |             if(m_context->Logger && m_context->EnableDetailedScoreLogging) {
  596 |                 m_context->Logger->LogDebug(StringFormat("AssetDNA: %s Score Breakdown - WR: %.3f, PF: %.3f, Exp: %.3f, Stability: %.3f, Penalty: %.3f, Total: %.3f",
  597 |                                  EnumToString(strategy), winRateScore, profitFactorScore, expectancyScore, 
  598 |                                  stabilityScore, overfittingPenalty, score));
  599 |             }
  600 |         } else {
  601 |             if(m_context->Logger && m_context->EnableColdStartLogging) {
  602 |                 m_context->Logger->LogWarning(StringFormat("AssetDNA: %s - Không đủ dữ liệu lịch sử (Trades: %d < %d). Sử dụng điểm mặc định: %.3f",
  603 |                                    EnumToString(strategy), perf ? perf->totalTrades : 0, 
  604 |                                    m_context->MinTradesForPerformance, m_context->DefaultPerformanceScore));
  605 |             }
  606 |         }
  607 |         
  608 |         return MathMax(0.0, MathMin(1.0, score));
  609 |     }
  610 | 
  611 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  612 |     //| Tính toán chỉ số ổn định từ kết quả Cross-Validation             |
  613 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  614 |     double CalculateStabilityScore(const CrossValidationResult& cvResult) {
  615 |         if (cvResult.validFolds == 0) return 0.0;
  616 | 
  617 |         // Normalize variances before combining them
  618 |         // Lower variance is better. We want a score where 1 is best (zero variance).
  619 |         double normalizedWinRateVariance = 1.0 - MathMin(1.0, cvResult.winRateVariance / 100.0); // e.g., 10% std dev (100 variance) is bad
  620 |         double normalizedProfitFactorVariance = 1.0 - MathMin(1.0, cvResult.profitFactorVariance / 1.0); // e.g., 1.0 std dev is bad
  621 |         double normalizedExpectancyVariance = 1.0 - MathMin(1.0, cvResult.expectancyVariance / 0.25); // e.g., 0.5R std dev is bad
  622 | 
  623 |         // Combine the normalized stability scores
  624 |         double stabilityIndex = (normalizedWinRateVariance + normalizedProfitFactorVariance + normalizedExpectancyVariance) / 3.0;
  625 | 
  626 |         return MathMax(0.0, MathMin(1.0, stabilityIndex));
  627 |     }
  628 | 
  629 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  630 |     //| Tính toán hình phạt cho Overfitting                              |
  631 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  632 |     double CalculateOverfittingPenalty(const CrossValidationResult& cvResult) {
  633 |         if (cvResult.validFolds == 0) return 0.0;
  634 | 
  635 |         // A simple penalty based on the variance of the profit factor
  636 |         double penalty = cvResult.profitFactorVariance * 0.2; // Higher variance = higher penalty
  637 |         return MathMin(0.5, penalty); // Cap the penalty
  638 |     }
  639 | 
  640 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  641 |     //| Thực hiện Cross-Validation nâng cao                             |
  642 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  643 |     CrossValidationResult PerformEnhancedCrossValidation(ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY strategy, const StrategyPerformance* perf, int folds = 5) {
  644 |         CrossValidationResult result;
  645 |         result.Clear();
  646 |         
  647 |         if(perf == NULL || perf->totalTrades < 10) {
  648 |             return result;
  649 |         }
  650 |         
  651 |         if (m_tradeHistory == NULL) return result;
  652 | 
  653 |         CArrayObj tradesForStrategy;
  654 |         for(int i = 0; i < m_tradeHistory->Total(); i++) {
  655 |             TradeRecord* trade = (TradeRecord*)m_tradeHistory->At(i);
  656 |             if(trade != NULL && trade->scenario == strategy) {
  657 |                 tradesForStrategy.Add(trade);
  658 |             }
  659 |         }
  660 |         
  661 |         if(tradesForStrategy.Total() < 10) {
  662 |             return result;
  663 |         }
  664 |         
  665 |         double winRates[];
  666 |         double profitFactors[];
  667 |         double expectancies[];
  668 |         ArrayResize(winRates, folds);
  669 |         ArrayResize(profitFactors, folds);
  670 |         ArrayResize(expectancies, folds);
  671 |         
  672 |         int tradesPerFold = tradesForStrategy.Total() / folds;
  673 |         int validFolds = 0;
  674 |         
  675 |         for(int fold = 0; fold < folds; fold++) {
  676 |             int startIdx = fold * tradesPerFold;
  677 |             int endIdx = (fold == folds - 1) ? tradesForStrategy.Total() - 1 : (fold + 1) * tradesPerFold - 1;
  678 |             
  679 |             if(endIdx - startIdx < 5) continue;
  680 |             
  681 |             int wins = 0;
  682 |             double totalProfit = 0.0;
  683 |             double totalLoss = 0.0;
  684 |             int totalTradesInFold = endIdx - startIdx + 1;
  685 |             
  686 |             for(int i = startIdx; i <= endIdx; i++) {
  687 |                 TradeRecord* trade = (TradeRecord*)tradesForStrategy.At(i);
  688 |                 if(trade != NULL) {
  689 |                     if(trade->profit > 0) {
  690 |                         wins++;
  691 |                         totalProfit += trade->profit;
  692 |                     } else {
  693 |                         totalLoss += MathAbs(trade->profit);
  694 |                     }
  695 |                 }
  696 |             }
  697 |             
  698 |             winRates[validFolds] = (double)wins / totalTradesInFold * 100.0;
  699 |             profitFactors[validFolds] = (totalLoss > 0) ? totalProfit / totalLoss : (totalProfit > 0 ? 999.0 : 0.0);
  700 |             expectancies[validFolds] = (totalProfit - totalLoss) / totalTradesInFold;
  701 |             validFolds++;
  702 |         }
  703 |         
  704 |         if(validFolds == 0) {
  705 |             return result;
  706 |         }
  707 |         
  708 |         result.validFolds = validFolds;
  709 |         
  710 |         for(int i = 0; i < validFolds; i++) {
  711 |             result.avgWinRate += winRates[i];
  712 |             result.avgProfitFactor += profitFactors[i];
  713 |             result.avgExpectancy += expectancies[i];
  714 |         }
  715 |         result.avgWinRate /= validFolds;
  716 |         result.avgProfitFactor /= validFolds;
  717 |         result.avgExpectancy /= validFolds;
  718 |         
  719 |         for(int i = 0; i < validFolds; i++) {
  720 |             double wrDiff = winRates[i] - result.avgWinRate;
  721 |             double pfDiff = profitFactors[i] - result.avgProfitFactor;
  722 |             double expDiff = expectancies[i] - result.avgExpectancy;
  723 |             
  724 |             result.winRateVariance += wrDiff * wrDiff;
  725 |             result.profitFactorVariance += pfDiff * pfDiff;
  726 |             result.expectancyVariance += expDiff * expDiff;
  727 |         }
  728 |         result.winRateVariance /= validFolds;
  729 |         result.profitFactorVariance /= validFolds;
  730 |         result.expectancyVariance /= validFolds;
  731 |         
  732 |         result.stabilityIndex = CalculateStabilityScore(result);
  733 |         
  734 |         return result;
  735 |     }
  736 | 
  737 | }; // END CLASS CAssetDNA
  738 | 
  739 | } // end namespace ApexPullback
  740 | 
  741 | #endif // ASSETDNA_MQH_
================================================================================

  106 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  107 | //| Initialize                                                       |
  108 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  109 | bool CBrokerHealthMonitor::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  110 |     m_context = context;
  111 |     m_context = context;
  112 |     if(CheckPointer(m_context) == POINTER_INVALID || CheckPointer(m_context->pLogger) == POINTER_INVALID || CheckPointer(m_context->pSymbolInfo) == POINTER_INVALID) {
  113 |         printf("BrokerHealthMonitor::Initialize - Context, Logger hoặc SymbolInfo không hợp lệ.");
  114 |         return false;
  115 |     }
  116 | 
  117 |     if (!m_context->Inputs.BHM_Enabled) {
  118 |         m_context->pLogger->LogInfo("BrokerHealthMonitor is disabled by input parameters.", __FUNCTION__);
  119 |         return true; // Initialize successfully, but will be inactive
  120 |     }
  121 | 
  122 |     // Load settings from context
  123 |     m_MaxHistorySize = m_context->Inputs.BHM_HistorySize;
  124 |     m_AlertCooldownMinutes = m_context->Inputs.BHM_AlertCooldownMinutes;
  125 | 
  126 |     // Initialize metrics
  127 |     Reset();
  128 | 
  129 |     // Resize and initialize history arrays
  130 |     ArrayResize(m_HealthHistory, m_MaxHistorySize);
  131 |     ArrayInitialize(m_HealthHistory, 100.0);
  132 |     ArrayResize(m_SlippageHistory, m_MaxHistorySize);
  133 |     ArrayInitialize(m_SlippageHistory, 0.0);
  134 |     ArrayResize(m_LatencyHistory, m_MaxHistorySize);
  135 |     ArrayInitialize(m_LatencyHistory, 0.0);
  136 |     m_HistorySize = 0;
  137 | 
  138 | 
  139 |     m_context->pLogger->LogInfo("BrokerHealthMonitor đã được khởi tạo thành công", __FUNCTION__);
  140 |     return true;
  141 | }
  142 |     
  143 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  144 | //| Set Custom Thresholds                                           |
  145 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  146 | void CBrokerHealthMonitor::OnTradeTransaction(const MqlTradeTransaction& trans, const MqlTradeRequest& request, const MqlTradeResult& result)
  147 | {
  148 |     if (!m_context || !m_context->Inputs.BHM_Enabled) return;
  149 | 
  150 |     // Chỉ xử lý các giao dịch đã hoàn thành
  151 |     if (trans.type != TRADE_TRANSACTION_DEAL_ADD) return;
  152 | 
  153 |     // Bỏ qua các giao dịch không phải của EA này
  154 |     if (trans.comment != m_context->Inputs.OrderComment) return;
  155 | 
  156 |     // Tính toán độ trễ thực thi
  157 |     double executionTimeMs = (trans.time_msc - request.time_msc);
  158 | 
  159 |     // Tính toán trượt giá
  160 |     double slippagePips = 0;
  161 |     if (request.price != 0 && result.price != 0) {
  162 |         if (request.action == TRADE_ACTION_DEAL) { // Market orders
  163 |             if (request.type == ORDER_TYPE_BUY) { // Buy
  164 |                 slippagePips = (result.price - request.price) / m_context->pSymbolInfo->GetPipSize();
  165 |             } else if (request.type == ORDER_TYPE_SELL) { // Sell
  166 |                 slippagePips = (request.price - result.price) / m_context->pSymbolInfo->GetPipSize();
  167 |             }
  168 |         }
  169 |     }
  170 | 
  171 |     UpdateWithNewDataPoint(slippagePips, executionTimeMs);
  172 | }
  173 |     
  174 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  175 | //| Calculate Slippage Score                                         |
  176 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  177 | double CBrokerHealthMonitor::CalculateSlippageScore() {
  178 |     if (m_HistorySize == 0 || !m_context) return 100.0; // Perfect score if no data
  179 | 
  180 |     double totalSlippage = 0;
  181 |     int count = 0;
  182 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_HistorySize; i++) {
  183 |         totalSlippage += m_SlippageHistory[i];
  184 |         count++;
  185 |     }
  186 |     double averageSlippage = (count > 0) ? totalSlippage / count : 0.0;
  187 | 
  188 |     // Score calculation: 100 is perfect (0 slippage). 
  189 |     // Score decreases as slippage increases. Drops sharply after warning threshold.
  190 |     double warningPips = m_context->Inputs.BHM_SlippageWarningPips;
  191 |     if (averageSlippage <= 0) return 100.0; // Positive slippage is good
  192 |     if (averageSlippage > warningPips * 2) return 0.0; // Very high slippage
  193 | 
  194 |     double score = 100.0 * (1.0 - (averageSlippage / (warningPips * 2.0)));
  195 |     return MathMax(0.0, MathMin(100.0, score));
  196 | }
  197 |     
  198 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  199 | //| Calculate Latency Score                                          |
  200 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  201 | double CBrokerHealthMonitor::CalculateLatencyScore() {
  202 |     if (m_HistorySize == 0 || !m_context) return 100.0;
  203 | 
  204 |     double totalLatency = 0;
  205 |     int count = 0;
  206 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_HistorySize; i++) {
  207 |         totalLatency += m_LatencyHistory[i];
  208 |         count++;
  209 |     }
  210 |     double averageLatency = (count > 0) ? totalLatency / count : 0.0;
  211 | 
  212 |     double warningMs = m_context->Inputs.BHM_LatencyWarningMs;
  213 |     if (averageLatency <= 50) return 100.0; // Excellent latency
  214 |     if (averageLatency > warningMs * 2) return 0.0; // Very high latency
  215 | 
  216 |     double score = 100.0 * (1.0 - ((averageLatency - 50) / (warningMs * 2.0 - 50)));
  217 |     return MathMax(0.0, MathMin(100.0, score));
  218 | }
  219 |     
  220 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  221 | //| Calculate Requote Score                                          |
  222 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  223 | double CBrokerHealthMonitor::CalculateRequoteScore() {
  224 |     // V14.0 - Placeholder. Requires tracking requote events from TradeManager.
  225 |     // For now, assume no requotes.
  226 |     return 100.0;
  227 | }
  228 |     
  229 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  230 | //| Calculate Success Rate Score                                     |
  231 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  232 | double CBrokerHealthMonitor::CalculateSuccessRateScore() {
  233 |     // V14.0 - Placeholder. Requires tracking failed order events from TradeManager.
  234 |     // For now, assume all trades are successful.
  235 |     return 100.0;
  236 | }
  237 |     
  238 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  239 |     //| Update Metrics                                                   |
  240 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  241 |     void CBrokerHealthMonitor::UpdateMetrics() {
  242 |         // Store previous metrics for comparison
  243 |         m_PreviousMetrics = m_CurrentMetrics;
  244 |         
  245 |         // Calculate individual component scores
  246 |         m_CurrentMetrics.SlippageScore = CalculateSlippageScore();
  247 |         m_CurrentMetrics.LatencyScore = CalculateLatencyScore();
  248 |         m_CurrentMetrics.RequoteScore = CalculateRequoteScore();
  249 |         m_CurrentMetrics.SuccessRateScore = CalculateSuccessRateScore();
  250 |         
  251 |         // Calculate overall health score
  252 |         m_CurrentMetrics.HealthScore = CalculateOverallHealthScore();
  253 |         
  254 |         // Determine health status
  255 |         m_CurrentMetrics.HealthStatus = DetermineHealthStatus(m_CurrentMetrics.HealthScore);
  256 |         
  257 |         // Update historical data and trends
  258 |         UpdateHealthHistory(m_CurrentMetrics.HealthScore);
  259 |         UpdateTrendAnalysis();
  260 |         
  261 |         if (m_context != NULL && m_context->pLogger != NULL && m_context->Inputs.LogLevel >= LOG_LEVEL_DEBUG) {
  262 |             m_context->pLogger->LogDebug(StringFormat("Health metrics updated: Score=%.2f, Status=%s", 
  263 |                                             m_CurrentMetrics.HealthScore, 
  264 |                                             GetHealthStatusString(m_CurrentMetrics.HealthStatus)), __FUNCTION__);
  265 |         }
  266 |     }
  267 |     
  268 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  269 |     //| Calculate Overall Health Score                                   |
  270 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  271 |     double CBrokerHealthMonitor::CalculateOverallHealthScore() {
  272 |         // Weighted average of component scores
  273 |         double slippageWeight = 0.3;
  274 |         double latencyWeight = 0.25;
  275 |         double requoteWeight = 0.25;
  276 |         double successRateWeight = 0.2;
  277 |         
  278 |         double totalScore = (m_CurrentMetrics.SlippageScore * slippageWeight) +
  279 |                             (m_CurrentMetrics.LatencyScore * latencyWeight) +
  280 |                             (m_CurrentMetrics.RequoteScore * requoteWeight) +
  281 |                             (m_CurrentMetrics.SuccessRateScore * successRateWeight);
  282 |         
  283 |         return totalScore;
  284 |     }
  285 |     
  286 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  287 |     //| Update Health History                                            |
  288 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  289 |     void CBrokerHealthMonitor::UpdateHealthHistory(double healthScore) {
  290 |         if (m_HistorySize < m_MaxHistorySize) {
  291 |             m_HealthHistory[m_HistorySize] = healthScore;
  292 |             m_HistorySize++;
  293 |         } else {
  294 |             // Shift history to the left
  295 |             for (int i = 0; i < m_MaxHistorySize - 1; i++) {
  296 |                 m_HealthHistory[i] = m_HealthHistory[i+1];
  297 |             }
  298 |             m_HealthHistory[m_MaxHistorySize - 1] = healthScore;
  299 |         }
  300 |     }
  301 |     
  302 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  303 |     //| Update Trend Analysis                                            |
  304 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  305 |     void CBrokerHealthMonitor::UpdateTrendAnalysis() {
  306 |         if (m_HistorySize < 2) {
  307 |             m_CurrentMetrics.HealthTrend = 0.0;
  308 |             return;
  309 |         }
  310 |         
  311 |         // Simple linear trend: (last value - first value) / number of periods
  312 |         // A more sophisticated method like linear regression could be used here.
  313 |         double sumX = 0, sumY = 0, sumXY = 0, sumX2 = 0;
  314 |         int n = MathMin(m_HistorySize, 20); // Use last 20 data points for trend
  315 |         
  316 |         for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
  317 |             int index = m_HistorySize - n + i;
  318 |             sumX += i;
  319 |             sumY += m_HealthHistory[index];
  320 |             sumXY += i * m_HealthHistory[index];
  321 |             sumX2 += i * i;
  322 |         }
  323 |         
  324 |         double denominator = n * sumX2 - sumX * sumX;
  325 |         if (denominator != 0) {
  326 |             m_CurrentMetrics.HealthTrend = (n * sumXY - sumX * sumY) / denominator;
  327 |         } else {
  328 |             m_CurrentMetrics.HealthTrend = 0.0;
  329 |         }
  330 |     }
  331 |     
  332 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  333 |     //| Update With New Data Point (Called by TradeManager)              |
  334 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  335 |     void CBrokerHealthMonitor::UpdateWithNewDataPoint(double slippagePips, double executionTimeMs) {
  336 |     if (!m_context || !m_context->Inputs.BHM_Enabled) return;
  337 | 
  338 |     if (m_HistorySize < m_MaxHistorySize) {
  339 |         m_SlippageHistory[m_HistorySize] = slippagePips;
  340 |         m_LatencyHistory[m_HistorySize] = executionTimeMs;
  341 |         m_HistorySize++;
  342 |     } else {
  343 |         // Shift history to the left
  344 |         for (int i = 0; i < m_MaxHistorySize - 1; i++) {
  345 |             m_SlippageHistory[i] = m_SlippageHistory[i+1];
  346 |             m_LatencyHistory[i] = m_LatencyHistory[i+1];
  347 |         }
  348 |         m_SlippageHistory[m_MaxHistorySize - 1] = slippagePips;
  349 |         m_LatencyHistory[m_MaxHistorySize - 1] = executionTimeMs;
  350 |     }
  351 | 
  352 |     if(m_context->pLogger != NULL) {
  353 |         m_context->pLogger->LogDebug(StringFormat("New broker data point: Slippage=%.2f pips, Latency=%.1f ms. History size: %d", slippagePips, executionTimeMs, m_HistorySize), __FUNCTION__);
  354 |     }
  355 | 
  356 |     // Recalculate all metrics with the new data point
  357 |     UpdateMetrics();
  358 | }
  359 |     
  360 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  361 |     //| Analyze Broker Health (Called periodically, e.g., OnTick)        |
  362 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  363 |     void CBrokerHealthMonitor::AnalyzeBrokerHealth() {
  364 |         // This function is now responsible for periodic analysis and reporting,
  365 |         // not for generating fake data.
  366 |         // The actual data crunching and score updates should happen when new data arrives
  367 |         // or on a less frequent timer basis.
  368 |         
  369 |         // For v14.0, we will assume metrics are updated elsewhere and just focus on alerts.
  370 |         CheckAndTriggerAlerts();
  371 |         
  372 |         // Optional: Log a summary report periodically if debugging is enabled
  373 |         static datetime lastReportTime = 0;
  374 |         if(m_context != NULL && m_context->pLogger != NULL && m_context->Inputs.LogLevel >= LOG_LEVEL_DEBUG && TimeCurrent() - lastReportTime > 300) { // Report every 5 mins
  375 |             string report;
  376 |             GenerateHealthReport(report);
  377 |             m_context->pLogger->LogDebug(report, __FUNCTION__);
  378 |             lastReportTime = TimeCurrent();
  379 |         }
  380 |     }
  381 |     
  382 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  383 |     //| Generate Health Report                                           |
  384 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  385 |     void CBrokerHealthMonitor::GenerateHealthReport(string& report) {
  386 |         report = "--- Broker Health Report ---\n";
  387 |         report += StringFormat("Overall Score: %.2f (%s)\n", m_CurrentMetrics.HealthScore, GetHealthStatusString(m_CurrentMetrics.HealthStatus));
  388 |         report += StringFormat("Score Trend: %.3f\n", m_CurrentMetrics.HealthTrend);
  389 |         report += StringFormat("Slippage Score: %.2f | Latency Score: %.2f\n", m_CurrentMetrics.SlippageScore, m_CurrentMetrics.LatencyScore);
  390 |         report += StringFormat("Requote Score: %.2f | Success Rate: %.2f\n", m_CurrentMetrics.RequoteScore, m_CurrentMetrics.SuccessRateScore);
  391 |         report += "----------------------------";
  392 |     }
  393 |     
  394 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  395 |     //| Determine Health Status from Score                               |
  396 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  397 |     ENUM_HEALTH_STATUS CBrokerHealthMonitor::DetermineHealthStatus(double healthScore) {
  398 |         if (!m_context) return HEALTH_UNKNOWN;
  399 |         if (healthScore >= m_context->Inputs.BHM_ExcellentThreshold) return HEALTH_EXCELLENT;
  400 |         if (healthScore >= m_context->Inputs.BHM_GoodThreshold) return HEALTH_GOOD;
  401 |         if (healthScore >= m_context->Inputs.BHM_WarningThreshold) return HEALTH_WARNING;
  402 |         return HEALTH_CRITICAL;
  403 |     }
  404 |     
  405 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  406 |     //| Get Health Status as a String                                    |
  407 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  408 |     string CBrokerHealthMonitor::GetHealthStatusString(ENUM_HEALTH_STATUS status) {
  409 |         switch(status) {
  410 |             case HEALTH_EXCELLENT: return "Excellent";
  411 |             case HEALTH_GOOD:      return "Good";
  412 |             case HEALTH_WARNING:   return "Warning";
  413 |             case HEALTH_CRITICAL:  return "Critical";
  414 |             default:               return "Unknown";
  415 |         }
  416 |     }
  417 |     
  418 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  419 |     //| Check and Trigger Alerts                                         |
  420 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  421 |     void CBrokerHealthMonitor::CheckAndTriggerAlerts() {
  422 |         ENUM_HEALTH_STATUS currentStatus = m_CurrentMetrics.HealthStatus;
  423 |         
  424 |         if (currentStatus <= HEALTH_WARNING && !IsAlertCooldownActive()) {
  425 |             string alertMessage = StringFormat("Broker Health Alert: Status is now %s (Score: %.2f)", 
  426 |                                                GetHealthStatusString(currentStatus), 
  427 |                                                m_CurrentMetrics.HealthScore);
  428 |             
  429 |             if (m_context != NULL && m_context->pLogger != NULL) {
  430 |                 if(currentStatus == HEALTH_WARNING)
  431 |                     m_context->pLogger->LogWarning(alertMessage, __FUNCTION__);
  432 |                 else // CRITICAL
  433 |                     m_context->pLogger->LogError(alertMessage, __FUNCTION__);
  434 |             }
  435 |             
  436 |             // Send alert to user (e.g., via mobile notification or email)
  437 |             SendNotification(alertMessage);
  438 |             
  439 |             m_LastAlertTime = TimeCurrent();
  440 |             m_LastAlertLevel = currentStatus;
  441 |         }
  442 |     }
  443 |     
  444 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  445 |     //| Is Alert Cooldown Active                                         |
  446 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  447 |     bool CBrokerHealthMonitor::IsAlertCooldownActive() {
  448 |         if (m_LastAlertTime == 0) return false;
  449 |         return (TimeCurrent() - m_LastAlertTime) < (m_AlertCooldownMinutes * 60);
  450 |     }
  451 |     
  452 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  453 |     //| Get Risk Adjustment Factor                                       |
  454 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  455 |     double CBrokerHealthMonitor::GetRiskAdjustmentFactor() {
  456 |         // This is a simple implementation. A more advanced version could use a curve.
  457 |         switch(m_CurrentMetrics.HealthStatus) {
  458 |             case HEALTH_EXCELLENT:
  459 |                 return 1.0; // No adjustment
  460 |             case HEALTH_GOOD:
  461 |                 return 0.9; // Slight reduction
  462 |             case HEALTH_WARNING:
  463 |                 return 0.7; // Moderate reduction
  464 |             case HEALTH_CRITICAL:
  465 |                 return 0.5; // Significant reduction
  466 |             default:
  467 |                 return 1.0;
  468 |         }
  469 |     }
  470 |     
  471 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  472 |     //| Should Reduce Risk                                               |
  473 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  474 |     bool CBrokerHealthMonitor::ShouldReduceRisk() {
  475 |         return (m_CurrentMetrics.HealthStatus <= HEALTH_WARNING);
  476 |     }
  477 |     
  478 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  479 |     //| Should Increase Spread                                           |
  480 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  481 |     bool CBrokerHealthMonitor::ShouldIncreaseSpread() {
  482 |         // Example logic: if slippage score is poor, assume wider spreads are needed
  483 |         if (!m_context) return false;
  484 |         return (m_CurrentMetrics.SlippageScore < m_context->Inputs.BHM_WarningThreshold);
  485 |     }
  486 |     
  487 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  488 |     //| Should Trigger Circuit Breaker                                   |
  489 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  490 |     bool CBrokerHealthMonitor::ShouldTriggerCircuitBreaker() {
  491 |         // Trigger if health is critical or has a strong negative trend
  492 |         bool isCritical = (m_CurrentMetrics.HealthStatus == HEALTH_CRITICAL);
  493 |         if (!m_context) return false;
  494 |         bool isDeterioratingFast = (m_CurrentMetrics.HealthTrend < m_context->Inputs.BHM_DeterioratingTrend);
  495 |         
  496 |         if(isCritical) {
  497 |             if(m_context != NULL && m_context->pLogger != NULL) m_context->pLogger->LogError("Circuit Breaker Condition: Broker health is CRITICAL.", __FUNCTION__);
  498 |             return true;
  499 |         }
  500 |         if(isDeterioratingFast) {
  501 |             if(m_context != NULL && m_context->pLogger != NULL) m_context->pLogger->LogWarning("Circuit Breaker Condition: Broker health is deteriorating rapidly.", __FUNCTION__);
  502 |             return true;
  503 |         }
  504 |         
  505 |         return false;
  506 |     }
  507 |     
  508 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  509 |     //| Reset                                                            |
  510 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  511 |     void CBrokerHealthMonitor::Reset() {
  512 |     if (!m_context) return;
  513 | 
  514 |     m_CurrentMetrics.HealthScore = 100.0;
  515 |     m_CurrentMetrics.HealthStatus = HEALTH_EXCELLENT;
  516 |     m_CurrentMetrics.HealthTrend = 0.0;
  517 |     m_CurrentMetrics.SlippageScore = 100.0;
  518 |     m_CurrentMetrics.LatencyScore = 100.0;
  519 |     m_CurrentMetrics.RequoteScore = 100.0;
  520 |     m_CurrentMetrics.SuccessRateScore = 100.0;
  521 |     m_PreviousMetrics = m_CurrentMetrics;
  522 | 
  523 |     ArrayInitialize(m_HealthHistory, 100.0);
  524 |     ArrayInitialize(m_SlippageHistory, 0.0);
  525 |     ArrayInitialize(m_LatencyHistory, 0.0);
  526 |     m_HistorySize = 0;
  527 | 
  528 |     m_LastAlertTime = 0;
  529 |     m_LastAlertLevel = HEALTH_EXCELLENT;
  530 | 
  531 |     if (m_context->pLogger) {
  532 |         m_context->pLogger->LogInfo("BrokerHealthMonitor has been reset.", __FUNCTION__);
  533 |     }
  534 | }
  535 |     
  536 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  537 |     //| Save Metrics to File                                             |
  538 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  539 |     void SaveMetricsToFile(const string& filename) {
  540 |         // Implementation for persistence
  541 |     }
  542 |     
  543 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  544 |     //| Load Metrics from File                                           |
  545 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  546 |     bool LoadMetricsFromFile(const string& filename) {
  547 |         // Implementation for persistence
  548 |         return true;
  549 |     }
  550 |     
  551 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  552 |     //| Generate Detailed Report                                         |
  553 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  554 |     string GenerateDetailedReport() {
  555 |         string report = "=== DETAILED BROKER HEALTH REPORT ===\n";
  556 |         report += StringFormat("Timestamp: %s\n", TimeToString(TimeCurrent(), TIME_DATE|TIME_MINUTES));
  557 |         report += StringFormat("Overall Health Score: %.2f/100\n", m_CurrentMetrics.HealthScore);
  558 |         report += StringFormat("Health Status: %s\n", GetHealthStatusString(m_CurrentMetrics.HealthStatus));
  559 |         report += StringFormat("Health Trend: %.3f\n", m_CurrentMetrics.HealthTrend);
  560 |         report += "\n--- Component Scores ---\n";
  561 |         report += StringFormat("Slippage Score: %.2f/100\n", m_CurrentMetrics.SlippageScore);
  562 |         report += StringFormat("Latency Score: %.2f/100\n", m_CurrentMetrics.LatencyScore);
  563 |         report += StringFormat("Requote Score: %.2f/100\n", m_CurrentMetrics.RequoteScore);
  564 |         report += StringFormat("Success Rate Score: %.2f/100\n", m_CurrentMetrics.SuccessRateScore);
  565 |         report += "\n--- Risk Recommendations ---\n";
  566 |         report += StringFormat("Risk Adjustment Factor: %.2f\n", GetRiskAdjustmentFactor());
  567 |         report += StringFormat("Should Reduce Risk: %s\n", ShouldReduceRisk() ? "YES" : "NO");
  568 |         report += StringFormat("Should Increase Spread: %s\n", ShouldIncreaseSpread() ? "YES" : "NO");
  569 |         report += StringFormat("Circuit Breaker Trigger: %s\n", ShouldTriggerCircuitBreaker() ? "YES" : "NO");
  570 |         report += "=====================================\n";
  571 |         return report;
  572 |     }
  573 |     
  574 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  575 |     //| Send Notification (placeholder implementation)                   |
  576 |     //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  577 |     void SendNotification(const string& message) {
  578 |         // Placeholder for notification system
  579 |         // Could integrate with mobile alerts, email, etc.
  580 |         if(m_Logger != NULL) {
  581 |             m_Logger->LogInfo("NOTIFICATION: " + message);
  582 |         }
  583 |     }
  584 | }; // End of CBrokerHealthMonitor class
  585 | 
  586 | } // namespace ApexPullback
  587 | 
  588 | #endif // BROKERHEALTHMONITOR_MQH_
