   19 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   20 | //| CCore Class                                                      |
   21 | //| The central nervous system of the Expert Advisor.                |
   22 | //| Owns the context and all functional modules.                     |
   23 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   24 | class CCore
   25 |   {
   26 | private:
   27 |    // The single, authoritative state of the EA
   28 |    EAContext             m_Context;
   29 | 
   30 |    // --- Pointers to all functional modules ---
   31 |    // Core Infrastructure
   32 |    CLogger*              m_Logger;
   33 |    CErrorHandler*        m_ErrorHandler;
   34 |    CParameterStore*      m_ParameterStore;
   35 |    CStateManager*      m_StateManager;
   36 | 
   37 |    // Market & Session Analysis
   38 |    CTimeManager*         m_TimeManager;
   39 |    CSymbolInfo*          m_SymbolInfo;
   40 |    CBrokerHealthMonitor* m_BrokerHealthMonitor;
   41 |    CSlippageMonitor*     m_SlippageMonitor;
   42 |    CAssetDNA*            m_AssetDNA;
   43 | 
   44 |    // Trading & Risk Management
   45 |    CIndicatorUtils*      m_IndicatorUtils;
   46 |    CMathHelper*          m_MathHelper;
   47 |    CSignalEngine*        m_SignalEngine;
   48 |    CRiskManager*         m_RiskManager;
   49 |    CRiskOptimizer*       m_RiskOptimizer; // Added for v14
   50 | 
   51 |    // Trade Execution & Management
   52 |    CTradeManager*        m_TradeManager;
   53 |    CPositionManager*     m_PositionManager;
   54 |    CCircuitBreaker*      m_CircuitBreaker;
   55 | 
   56 |    // Performance & UI
   57 |    CPerformanceAnalytics* m_PerformanceAnalytics;
   58 |    CDrawingUtils*        m_DrawingUtils;
   59 |    CDashboard*           m_Dashboard;
   60 | 
   61 | public:
   62 |                      CCore();
   63 |                     ~CCore();
   64 | 
   65 |    // --- Initialization & Deinitialization ---
   66 |    bool              Initialize(const SInputParameters &inputs);
   67 |    void              Deinitialize();
   68 | 
   69 |    // --- MQL5 Event Handlers ---
   70 |    void              OnTick();
   71 |    void              OnTimer();
   72 |    void              OnChartEvent(const int id, const long &lparam, const double &dparam, const string &sparam);
   73 |    void              OnTradeTransaction(const MqlTradeTransaction &trans, const MqlTradeRequest &request, const MqlTradeResult &result);
   74 | 
   75 | private:
   76 |     bool InitializeModule(void* &pModule, const string className);
   77 | 
   78 |   };
   79 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   80 | //| Constructor                                                      |
   81 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   82 | CCore::CCore() : // Initialize all pointers to NULL
   83 |    m_Logger(NULL),
   84 |    m_ErrorHandler(NULL),
   85 |    m_ParameterStore(NULL),
   86 |    m_StateManager(NULL),
   87 |    m_TimeManager(NULL),
   88 |    m_SymbolInfo(NULL),
   89 |    m_BrokerHealthMonitor(NULL),
   90 |    m_SlippageMonitor(NULL),
   91 |    m_AssetDNA(NULL),
   92 |    m_IndicatorUtils(NULL),
   93 |    m_MathHelper(NULL),
   94 |    m_SignalEngine(NULL),
   95 |    m_RiskManager(NULL),
   96 |    m_RiskOptimizer(NULL),
   97 |    m_TradeManager(NULL),
   98 |    m_PositionManager(NULL),
   99 |    m_CircuitBreaker(NULL),
  100 |    m_PerformanceAnalytics(NULL),
  101 |    m_DrawingUtils(NULL),
  102 |    m_Dashboard(NULL)
  103 |   {
  104 |   }
  105 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  106 | //| Destructor                                                       |
  107 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  108 | CCore::~CCore()
  109 |   {
  110 |    // Deinitialization is handled in the Deinitialize() method to
  111 |    // ensure a controlled shutdown sequence.
  112 |   }
  113 | 
  114 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  115 | //| Initialize                                                       |
  116 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  117 | bool CCore::Initialize(const SInputParameters &inputs)
  118 |   {
  119 |     // --- Stage 0: Critical Initialization Order ---
  120 |     // The order here is paramount. ErrorHandler and Logger must be first.
  121 | 
  122 |     // 0a. Copy user inputs into the context.
  123 |     m_Context.Inputs = inputs;
  124 |     // m_Context.pCore = this; // Tạm thời vô hiệu hóa - Cần định nghĩa pCore trong EAContext nếu muốn sử dụng
  125 | 
  126 |     // 0b. Initialize ErrorHandler. It has no dependencies.
  127 |     m_ErrorHandler = new CErrorHandler();
  128 |     if (!m_ErrorHandler || !m_ErrorHandler->Initialize(&m_Context))
  129 |     {
  130 |         // If ErrorHandler fails, we have no choice but to use Print.
  131 |         Print("CRITICAL PANIC: Failed to create or initialize CErrorHandler!");
  132 |         return false;
  133 |     }
  134 |     m_Context.pErrorHandler = m_ErrorHandler; // Assign to context immediately.
  135 | 
  136 |     // 0c. Initialize Logger. It depends on ErrorHandler.
  137 |     m_Logger = new CLogger();
  138 |     if (!m_Logger)
  139 |     {
  140 |         m_ErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_NOT_ENOUGH_MEMORY, "CCore::Initialize", "Failed to allocate memory for CLogger");
  141 |         return false;
  142 |     }
  143 |     m_Context.pLogger = m_Logger; // Assign to context before initializing it.
  144 |     if (!m_Logger->Initialize(inputs))
  145 |     {
  146 |         // The logger might have failed, but the error handler should still work.
  147 |         m_ErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_INIT_FAILED, "CCore::Initialize", "Failed to initialize CLogger");
  148 |         return false;
  149 |     }
  150 |     
  151 |      // ParameterStore
  152 |      m_ParameterStore = new CParameterStore();
  153 |      if (!m_ParameterStore || !m_ParameterStore->Initialize(m_Context))
  154 |      {
  155 |          m_Context.pErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_LOGIC_ERROR, "CCore::Initialize", "Failed to initialize ParameterStore");
  156 |          return false;
  157 |      }
  158 |      m_Context.pParameterStore = m_ParameterStore;
  159 | 
  160 |     // StateManager
  161 |     m_StateManager = new CStateManager();
  162 |     if (!m_StateManager || !m_StateManager->Initialize(m_Context))
  163 |     {
  164 |         m_Context.pErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_LOGIC_ERROR, "CCore::Initialize", "Failed to initialize StateManager");
  165 |         return false;
  166 |     }
  167 |     m_Context.pStateManager = m_StateManager;
  168 | 
  169 |     // SymbolInfo (foundational for market data)
  170 |     m_SymbolInfo = new CSymbolInfo();
  171 |     if (!m_SymbolInfo || !m_SymbolInfo->Initialize(m_Context)) { m_Context.pErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_INIT_FAILED, "CCore::Initialize - Failed to initialize SymbolInfo"); return false; }
  172 |     m_Context.pSymbolInfo = m_SymbolInfo;
  173 | 
  174 |     // TimeManager (depends on SymbolInfo)
  175 |     m_TimeManager = new CTimeManager();
  176 |     if (!m_TimeManager || !m_TimeManager->Initialize(m_Context)) { m_Context.pErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_INIT_FAILED, "CCore::Initialize - Failed to initialize TimeManager"); return false; }
  177 |     m_Context.pTimeManager = m_TimeManager;
  178 | 
  179 |     // MathHelper
  180 |     m_MathHelper = new CMathHelper();
  181 |     if (!m_MathHelper || !m_MathHelper->Initialize(&m_Context)) { m_ErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_INIT_FAILED, "CCore::Initialize", "Failed to initialize CMathHelper"); return false; }
  182 |     m_Context.pMathHelper = m_MathHelper;
  183 | 
  184 |     // BrokerHealthMonitor
  185 |     m_BrokerHealthMonitor = new CBrokerHealthMonitor();
  186 |     if (!m_BrokerHealthMonitor || !m_BrokerHealthMonitor->Initialize(m_Context)) { m_Logger->LogError("Critical Error: Failed to create or initialize CBrokerHealthMonitor"); return false; }
  187 |     m_Context.pBrokerHealthMonitor = m_BrokerHealthMonitor;
  188 | 
  189 |     // SlippageMonitor
  190 |     m_SlippageMonitor = new CSlippageMonitor();
  191 |     if (!m_SlippageMonitor || !m_SlippageMonitor->Initialize(m_Context)) { m_Logger->LogError("Critical Error: Failed to create or initialize CSlippageMonitor"); return false; }
  192 |     m_Context.pSlippageMonitor = m_SlippageMonitor;
  193 | 
  194 |     // AssetDNA
  195 |     m_AssetDNA = new CAssetDNA();
  196 |     if (!m_AssetDNA || !m_AssetDNA->Initialize(&m_Context)) { m_ErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_INIT_FAILED, "CCore::Initialize", "Failed to initialize CAssetDNA"); return false; }
  197 |     m_Context.pAssetDNA = m_AssetDNA;
  198 | 
  199 |     // IndicatorUtils
  200 |     m_IndicatorUtils = new CIndicatorUtils();
  201 |     if (!m_IndicatorUtils || !m_IndicatorUtils->Initialize(&m_Context)) { m_ErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_INIT_FAILED, "CCore::Initialize", "Failed to initialize CIndicatorUtils"); return false; }
  202 |     m_Context.pIndicatorUtils = m_IndicatorUtils;
  203 | 
  204 |     // SignalEngine
  205 |     m_SignalEngine = new CSignalEngine();
  206 |     if (!m_SignalEngine || !m_SignalEngine->Initialize(m_Context)) { m_Logger->LogError("Critical Error: Failed to create or initialize CSignalEngine"); return false; }
  207 |     m_Context.pSignalEngine = m_SignalEngine;
  208 | 
  209 |     // RiskManager
  210 |     m_RiskManager = new CRiskManager();
  211 |     if (!m_RiskManager || !m_RiskManager->Initialize(m_Context)) { m_Logger->LogError("Critical Error: Failed to create or initialize CRiskManager"); return false; }
  212 |     m_Context.pRiskManager = m_RiskManager;
  213 | 
  214 |     // RiskOptimizer (Optional Module)
  215 |     // if (m_Context.Inputs.EnableRiskOptimizer) // Tạm thời vô hiệu hóa cho đến khi CRiskOptimizer được sửa
  216 |     // {
  217 |     //     m_RiskOptimizer = new CRiskOptimizer(m_Context);
  218 |     //     if (!m_RiskOptimizer) // Check if 'new' failed
  219 |     //     {
  220 |             m_Logger->LogError("Critical Error: Failed to allocate memory for CRiskOptimizer");
  221 |             return false;
  222 |         }
  223 |         // No separate Initialize() call needed if constructor handles it all
  224 |         m_Context.pRiskOptimizer = m_RiskOptimizer;
  225 |         m_Logger->LogInfo("Risk Optimizer module enabled and initialized.");
  226 |     }
  227 | 
  228 |     // TradeManager
  229 |     m_TradeManager = new CTradeManager();
  230 |     if (!m_TradeManager || !m_TradeManager->Initialize(m_Context)) { m_Logger->LogError("Critical Error: Failed to create or initialize CTradeManager"); return false; }
  231 |     m_Context.pTradeManager = m_TradeManager;
  232 | 
  233 |     // PositionManager
  234 |     m_PositionManager = new CPositionManager();
  235 |     if (!m_PositionManager || !m_PositionManager->Initialize(m_Context)) { m_Logger->LogError("Critical Error: Failed to create or initialize CPositionManager"); return false; }
  236 |     m_Context.pPositionManager = m_PositionManager;
  237 | 
  238 |     // CircuitBreaker
  239 |     m_CircuitBreaker = new CCircuitBreaker();
  240 |     if (!m_CircuitBreaker || !m_CircuitBreaker->Initialize(m_Context)) { m_Logger->LogError("Critical Error: Failed to create or initialize CCircuitBreaker"); return false; }
  241 |     m_Context.pCircuitBreaker = m_CircuitBreaker;
  242 | 
  243 |     // PerformanceAnalytics
  244 |     m_PerformanceAnalytics = new CPerformanceAnalytics();
  245 |     if (!m_PerformanceAnalytics || !m_PerformanceAnalytics->Initialize(m_Context)) { m_Logger->LogError("Critical Error: Failed to create or initialize CPerformanceAnalytics"); return false; }
  246 |     m_Context.pPerformanceAnalytics = m_PerformanceAnalytics;
  247 | 
  248 |     // DrawingUtils
  249 |     m_DrawingUtils = new CDrawingUtils();
  250 |     if (!m_DrawingUtils || !m_DrawingUtils->Initialize(m_Context)) { m_Logger->LogError("Critical Error: Failed to create or initialize CDrawingUtils"); return false; }
  251 |     m_Context.pDrawingUtils = m_DrawingUtils;
  252 | 
  253 |     // Dashboard
  254 |     m_Dashboard = new CDashboard();
  255 |     if (!m_Dashboard || !m_Dashboard->Initialize(m_Context)) { m_Logger->LogError("Critical Error: Failed to create or initialize CDashboard"); return false; }
  256 |     m_Context.pDashboard = m_Dashboard;
  257 | 
  258 |     m_Logger->LogInfo("All modules initialized successfully.");
  259 | 
  260 |     // Final state transition to signal readiness
  261 |     m_StateManager->SetState(EA_STATE_IDLE, "Core initialization complete.");
  262 | 
  263 |     return true;
  264 |   }
  265 | 
  266 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  267 | //| Deinitialize                                                     |
  268 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  269 | void CCore::Deinitialize()
  270 |   {
  271 |     // Deinitialize in the reverse order of initialization to prevent dependency issues.
  272 |     // The logger should be one of the last to go so we can log any deinitialization errors.
  273 | 
  274 |     if(m_Logger) m_Logger->LogInfo("EA Deinitialization started.");
  275 | 
  276 |     // --- Delete modules ---
  277 |     if(m_TradeManager)       { delete m_TradeManager;       m_TradeManager = NULL;       }
  278 |     if(m_RiskManager)        { delete m_RiskManager;        m_RiskManager = NULL;        }
  279 |     if(m_SignalEngine)       { delete m_SignalEngine;       m_SignalEngine = NULL;       }
  280 |     if(m_IndicatorUtils)     { delete m_IndicatorUtils;     m_IndicatorUtils = NULL;     }
  281 |     if(m_AssetDNA)           { delete m_AssetDNA;           m_AssetDNA = NULL;           }
  282 |     if(m_SlippageMonitor)    { delete m_SlippageMonitor;    m_SlippageMonitor = NULL;    }
  283 |     if(m_BrokerHealthMonitor){ delete m_BrokerHealthMonitor;m_BrokerHealthMonitor = NULL;}
  284 |     if(m_TimeManager)        { delete m_TimeManager;        m_TimeManager = NULL;        }
  285 |     if(m_SymbolInfo)         { delete m_SymbolInfo;         m_SymbolInfo = NULL;         }
  286 |     if(m_StateManager)       { delete m_StateManager;       m_StateManager = NULL;       }
  287 |     if(m_ParameterStore)     { delete m_ParameterStore;     m_ParameterStore = NULL;     }
  288 |     if(m_MathHelper)         { delete m_MathHelper;         m_MathHelper = NULL;         }
  289 | 
  290 |     // --- Foundational modules last ---
  291 |     if(m_Logger)             { delete m_Logger;             m_Logger = NULL;             }
  292 |     if(m_ErrorHandler)       { delete m_ErrorHandler;       m_ErrorHandler = NULL;       }
  293 | 
  294 |     // Final log to terminal before EA exits
  295 |     Print("APEX Pullback EA Deinitialized successfully.");
  296 |   }
  297 | 
  298 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  299 | //| OnTick                                                           |
  300 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  301 | void CCore::OnTick()
  302 | {
  303 |     // 1. Always run time-critical tasks every tick
  304 |     if (m_TimeManager) m_TimeManager->OnTick(); // Must run first to set IsNewBarEvent flag
  305 |     if (m_SymbolInfo) m_SymbolInfo->OnTick(); // Then refresh symbol data
  306 |     if (m_BrokerHealthMonitor) m_BrokerHealthMonitor->OnTick();
  307 |     if (m_PositionManager) m_PositionManager->OnTick(); // Manages existing positions, trailing stops etc.
  308 |     if (m_Dashboard) m_Dashboard->Update(); // Update real-time data like price, P/L
  309 | 
  310 |     // 2. Check for the new bar event flag
  311 |     if (m_Context.IsNewBarEvent)
  312 |     {
  313 |         // Reset the flag immediately to prevent re-processing
  314 |         m_Context.IsNewBarEvent = false;
  315 | 
  316 |         if(m_Logger) m_Logger->LogDebug("New bar event. Running analysis modules.");
  317 | 
  318 |         // Run all logic that only needs to execute on a new bar
  319 |         // if (m_MarketProfile) m_MarketProfile->Update(); // Example
  320 |         if (m_SignalEngine) m_SignalEngine->OnTick(); // Check for new trading signals
  321 |         if (m_AssetDNA) m_AssetDNA->OnTick(); // Re-evaluate asset characteristics
  322 |         // ... call other modules that need updating per bar ...
  323 |     }
  324 | }
  325 | 
  326 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  327 | //| OnTimer                                                          |
  328 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  329 | void CCore::OnTimer()
  330 |   {
  331 |     // Delegate to relevant modules
  332 |     if(m_Dashboard) m_Dashboard->OnTimer();
  333 |   }
  334 | 
  335 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  336 | //| OnChartEvent                                                     |
  337 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  338 | void CCore::OnChartEvent(const int id, const long &lparam, const double &dparam, const string &sparam)
  339 |   {
  340 |     // Delegate to relevant modules
  341 |     if(m_Dashboard) m_Dashboard->OnChartEvent(id, lparam, dparam, sparam);
  342 |   }
  343 | 
  344 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  345 | //| OnTradeTransaction                                               |
  346 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  347 | void CCore::OnTradeTransaction(const MqlTradeTransaction &trans, const MqlTradeRequest &request, const MqlTradeResult &result)
  348 | {
  349 |     // Delegate the transaction event to the TradeManager
  350 |     if(m_TradeManager != NULL)
  351 |     {
  352 |         m_TradeManager->OnTradeTransaction(trans, request, result);
  353 |     }
  354 | 
  355 |     // Future: Could also delegate to PerformanceAnalytics or other modules if needed
  356 |     // if(m_PerformanceAnalytics != NULL)
  357 |     // {
  358 |     //     m_PerformanceAnalytics->OnTradeTransaction(trans, request, result);
  359 |     // }
  360 | }
  361 | 
  362 | } // END NAMESPACE ApexPullback
  363 | 
  364 | #endif // CORE_MQH_

   25 | // Hàm hỗ trợ để lấy chuỗi ENUM_ADAPTIVE_MODE
   26 | string GetAdaptiveModeString(ENUM_ADAPTIVE_MODE mode)
   27 | {
   28 |     switch(mode)
   29 |     {
   30 |         case MODE_MANUAL: return "Manual";
   31 |         case MODE_CONSERVATIVE: return "Conservative";
   32 |         case MODE_BALANCED: return "Balanced";
   33 |         case MODE_AGGRESSIVE: return "Aggressive";
   34 |         case MODE_LOG_ONLY: return "Log Only";
   35 |         case MODE_ADAPTIVE_TRAILING: return "Adaptive Trailing";
   36 |         case MODE_DYNAMIC_LOT: return "Dynamic Lot";
   37 |         case MODE_HYBRID: return "Hybrid";
   38 |         default: return "Unknown";
   39 |     }
   40 | }

  166 |    void              DrawMiniChart(const MiniChartData& data, int startY, int height);
  167 |    void              UpdateMiniCharts(void);
  168 | 
  169 |    // --- Formatting Helpers ---
  170 |    string            FormatMetric(double value, int digits = 2);
  171 |    string            FormatPercentage(double value);
  172 |    string            FormatCurrency(double value);
  173 |    color             GetColorByValue(double value, bool isPositiveBetter = true);
  174 | 
  175 |    // --- Private Methods ---
  176 |    void              ApplyTheme(void);
  177 |    void              InitializeColors(void);
  178 |    void              CreateComponent(ENUM_DASHBOARD_COMPONENT component);
  179 |    void              CreateBackground(void);
  180 |    void              CreateHeader(void);
  181 |    void              CreateMarketPanel(void);
  182 |    void              CreateRiskPanel(void);
  183 |    void              CreateNewsPanel(void);
  184 |    void              CreatePerformancePanel(void);

  187 |    void              CreateCloseAllButton(void);
  188 |    void              CreateRiskModeDropdown(void);
  189 |    void              CreateRiskModeDropdownOptions(void);
  190 |    void              DeleteRiskModeDropdownOptions(void);
  191 |

  193 |    void              UpdateHeader(void);
  194 |    void              UpdateMarketPanel(void);
  195 |    void              UpdateRiskPanel(void);
  196 |    void              UpdateNewsPanel(void);
  197 |    void              UpdatePerformancePanel(void);
  198 | 
  199 |    // --- Helper Methods ---
  200 |    CChartLabel*      CreateLabel(const string name, int x, int y, const string text, color clr, int font_size = 8, const string font = "Arial");
  201 |    void              DeleteObjectsByPrefix(const string prefix);
  202 |    color             GetTrendColor(ENUM_MARKET_TREND trend);
  203 |    color             GetRegimeColor(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime);
  204 |    string            GetTrendString(ENUM_MARKET_TREND trend);
  205 |    string            GetRegimeString(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime);
  206 |    string GetSessionString(ENUM_SESSION session);
  207 |    }
  208 |    else
  209 |    {
  210 |       status_text = "TRADING ACTIVE";
  211 |       status_color = m_success_color;
  212 |    }
  213 | 
  214 |    ObjectSetString(m_chart_id, status_name, OBJPROP_TEXT, status_text);
  215 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, status_name, OBJPROP_COLOR, status_color);
  216 | }

  218 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  219 | //| CreateMarketPanel                                                |
  220 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  221 | void CDashboard::CreateMarketPanel(void)
  222 | {
  223 |    int y_pos = m_dash_y + 40;
  224 |    int x_pos = m_dash_x + 10;
  225 |    int col_width = (m_width - 20) / 2;
  226 | 
  227 |    // Panel Title
  228 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "MarketTitle", x_pos, y_pos, "MARKET SENTIMENT", m_title_color, 9, "Arial Bold");
  229 |    y_pos += 20;
  230 | 
  231 |    // --- Left Column ---
  232 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "BidLabel", x_pos, y_pos, "Bid:", m_text_color);
  233 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "BidValue", x_pos + 50, y_pos, "-", m_value_color);
  234 |    y_pos += 15;
  235 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "AskLabel", x_pos, y_pos, "Ask:", m_text_color);
  236 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "AskValue", x_pos + 50, y_pos, "-", m_value_color);
  237 |    y_pos += 15;
  238 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "SpreadLabel", x_pos, y_pos, "Spread:", m_text_color);
  239 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "SpreadValue", x_pos + 50, y_pos, "-", m_value_color);
  240 | 
  241 |    // --- Right Column ---
  242 |    y_pos = m_dash_y + 60; // Reset Y for the right column
  243 |    x_pos += col_width;
  244 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "TrendLabel", x_pos, y_pos, "Trend:", m_text_color);
  245 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "TrendValue", x_pos + 50, y_pos, "-", m_value_color);
  246 |    y_pos += 15;
  247 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "RegimeLabel", x_pos, y_pos, "Regime:", m_text_color);
  248 | 
  249 | } // END NAMESPACE ApexPullback
  250 | 
  251 | #endif // DASHBOARD_MQH_
  252 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "RegimeValue", x_pos + 50, y_pos, "-", m_value_color);
  253 |    y_pos += 15;
  254 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "SessionLabel", x_pos, y_pos, "Session:", m_text_color);
  255 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "SessionValue", x_pos + 50, y_pos, "-", m_value_color);
  256 | }
  257 | 
  258 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  259 | //| UpdateMarketPanel                                                |
  260 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  261 | void CDashboard::UpdateMarketPanel(void)
  262 | {
  263 |    if(!m_context || !m_context->pMarketData) return;
  264 | 
  265 |    // Update prices and spread
  266 |    ObjectSetString(m_chart_id, m_obj_prefix + "BidValue", OBJPROP_TEXT, DoubleToString(m_context->pMarketData->CurrentBid, _Digits));
  267 |    ObjectSetString(m_chart_id, m_obj_prefix + "AskValue", OBJPROP_TEXT, DoubleToString(m_context->pMarketData->CurrentAsk, _Digits));
  268 |    ObjectSetString(m_chart_id, m_obj_prefix + "SpreadValue", OBJPROP_TEXT, IntegerToString(m_context->pMarketData->CurrentSpreadInPoints));
  269 | 
  270 |    // Update trend
  271 |    string trend_str = GetTrendString(m_context->pMarketData->PrimaryTrend);
  272 |    color trend_color = GetTrendColor(m_context->pMarketData->PrimaryTrend);
  273 |    ObjectSetString(m_chart_id, m_obj_prefix + "TrendValue", OBJPROP_TEXT, trend_str);
  274 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, m_obj_prefix + "TrendValue", OBJPROP_COLOR, trend_color);
  275 | 
  276 |    // Update regime
  277 |    string regime_str = GetRegimeString(m_context->pMarketData->CurrentRegime);
  278 |    color regime_color = GetRegimeColor(m_context->pMarketData->CurrentRegime);
  279 |    ObjectSetString(m_chart_id, m_obj_prefix + "RegimeValue", OBJPROP_TEXT, regime_str);
  280 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, m_obj_prefix + "RegimeValue", OBJPROP_COLOR, regime_color);
  281 |    
  282 |    // Update session
  283 |    string session_str = GetSessionString(m_context->pMarketData->CurrentSession);
  284 |    ObjectSetString(m_chart_id, m_obj_prefix + "SessionValue", OBJPROP_TEXT, session_str);
  285 | }
  286 | 
  287 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  288 | //| CreateRiskPanel                                                  |
  289 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  290 | void CDashboard::CreateRiskPanel(void)
  291 | {
  292 |    int y_pos = m_dash_y + 125; // Position below Market Panel
  293 |    int x_pos = m_dash_x + 10;
  294 | 
  295 |    // Panel Title
  296 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "RiskTitle", x_pos, y_pos, "RISK MANAGEMENT", m_title_color, 9, "Arial Bold");
  297 |    y_pos += 20;
  298 | 
  299 |    // Risk Mode
  300 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "RiskModeLabel", x_pos, y_pos, "Mode:", m_text_color);
  301 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "RiskModeValue", x_pos + 80, y_pos, "-", m_value_color);
  302 |    y_pos += 15;
  303 | 
  304 |    // Calculated Lot Size
  305 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "LotSizeLabel", x_pos, y_pos, "Lot Size:", m_text_color);
  306 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "LotSizeValue", x_pos + 80, y_pos, "-", m_value_color);
  307 |    y_pos += 15;
  308 | 
  309 |    // Stop Loss
  310 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "StopLossLabel", x_pos, y_pos, "Stop Loss (pips):", m_text_color);
  311 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "StopLossValue", x_pos + 80, y_pos, "-", m_value_color);
  312 | }
  313 | 
  314 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  315 | //| UpdateRiskPanel                                                  |
  316 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  317 | void CDashboard::UpdateRiskPanel(void)
  318 | {
  319 |    if(!m_context || !m_context->pRiskManager) return;
  320 | 
  321 |    // Update Risk Mode
  322 |    string mode_str = GetAdaptiveModeString(m_context->pRiskManager->GetCurrentAdaptiveMode());
  323 |    ObjectSetString(m_chart_id, m_obj_prefix + "RiskModeValue", OBJPROP_TEXT, mode_str);
  324 | 
  325 |    // Update Lot Size
  326 |    ObjectSetString(m_chart_id, m_obj_prefix + "LotSizeValue", OBJPROP_TEXT, DoubleToString(m_context->pRiskManager->GetLastCalculatedLotSize(), 2));
  327 | 
  328 |    // Update Stop Loss
  329 |    ObjectSetString(m_chart_id, m_obj_prefix + "StopLossValue", OBJPROP_TEXT, DoubleToString(m_context->pRiskManager->GetLastCalculatedSLPips(), 1));
  330 | }

  335 | void CDashboard::CreatePerformancePanel(void)
  336 | {
  337 |    int y_pos = m_dash_y + 195; // Position below Risk Panel
  338 |    int x_pos = m_dash_x + 10;

  340 | 
  341 |    // Panel Title
  342 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "PerfTitle", x_pos, y_pos, "PERFORMANCE", m_title_color, 9, "Arial Bold");
  343 |    y_pos += 20;
  344 | 
  345 |    // --- Left Column ---
  346 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "NetPLLabel", x_pos, y_pos, "Net P/L:", m_text_color);
  347 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "NetPLValue", x_pos + 70, y_pos, "$0.00", m_value_color);
  348 |    y_pos += 15;
  349 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "WinRateLabel", x_pos, y_pos, "Win Rate:", m_text_color);
  350 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "WinRateValue", x_pos + 70, y_pos, "0.0%", m_value_color);
  351 |    y_pos += 15;
  352 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "TotalTradesLabel", x_pos, y_pos, "Trades:", m_text_color);
  353 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "TotalTradesValue", x_pos + 70, y_pos, "0", m_value_color);
  354 | 
  355 |    // --- Right Column ---
  356 |    y_pos = m_dash_y + 215; // Reset Y for the right column
  357 |    x_pos += col_width;
  358 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "ProfitFactorLabel", x_pos, y_pos, "Profit Factor:", m_text_color);
  359 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "ProfitFactorValue", x_pos + 70, y_pos, "0.00", m_value_color);
  360 |    y_pos += 15;
  361 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "DrawdownLabel", x_pos, y_pos, "Drawdown:", m_text_color);
  362 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "DrawdownValue", x_pos + 70, y_pos, "0.0%", m_value_color);
  363 |    y_pos += 15;
  364 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "AvgTradeLabel", x_pos, y_pos, "Avg Trade:", m_text_color);
  365 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "AvgTradeValue", x_pos + 70, y_pos, "$0.00", m_value_color);
  366 | }
  367 | 
  368 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  369 | //| UpdatePerformancePanel                                           |
  370 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  371 | void CDashboard::UpdatePerformancePanel(void)
  372 | {
  373 |    // Net P/L
  374 |    string net_pl_str = "$" + DoubleToString(m_perf_net_pl, 2);
  375 |    color net_pl_color = (m_perf_net_pl >= 0) ? m_success_color : m_alert_color;
  376 |    ObjectSetString(m_chart_id, m_obj_prefix + "NetPLValue", OBJPROP_TEXT, net_pl_str);
  377 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, m_obj_prefix + "NetPLValue", OBJPROP_COLOR, net_pl_color);
  378 | 
  379 |    // Win Rate
  380 |    string win_rate_str = DoubleToString(m_perf_win_rate, 1) + "%";
  381 |    ObjectSetString(m_chart_id, m_obj_prefix + "WinRateValue", OBJPROP_TEXT, win_rate_str);
  382 | 
  383 |    // Total Trades
  384 |    ObjectSetString(m_chart_id, m_obj_prefix + "TotalTradesValue", OBJPROP_TEXT, IntegerToString(m_perf_total_trades));
  385 | 
  386 |    // Profit Factor
  387 |    string pf_str = DoubleToString(m_perf_profit_factor, 2);
  388 |    color pf_color = (m_perf_profit_factor >= 1.0) ? m_success_color : m_alert_color;
  389 |    ObjectSetString(m_chart_id, m_obj_prefix + "ProfitFactorValue", OBJPROP_TEXT, pf_str);
  390 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, m_obj_prefix + "ProfitFactorValue", OBJPROP_COLOR, pf_color);
  391 | 
  392 |    // Drawdown
  393 |    string dd_str = DoubleToString(m_perf_max_drawdown_pct, 1) + "%";
  394 |    ObjectSetString(m_chart_id, m_obj_prefix + "DrawdownValue", OBJPROP_TEXT, dd_str);
  395 | 
  396 |    // Avg Trade
  397 |    string avg_trade_str = "$" + DoubleToString(m_perf_avg_trade, 2);
  398 |    color avg_trade_color = (m_perf_avg_trade >= 0) ? m_success_color : m_alert_color;
  399 |    ObjectSetString(m_chart_id, m_obj_prefix + "AvgTradeValue", OBJPROP_TEXT, avg_trade_str);
  400 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, m_obj_prefix + "AvgTradeValue", OBJPROP_COLOR, avg_trade_color);
  401 | }

  403 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  404 | //| CreateInteractiveControls                                        |
  405 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  406 | void CDashboard::CreateInteractiveControls(void)
  407 | {
  408 |    int y_pos = m_dash_y + m_height - 30;
  409 |    int x_pos = m_dash_x + 10;
  410 |    int button_width = 100;
  411 |    int button_height = 20;
  412 | 
  413 |    // Pause Trading Button
  414 |    m_pause_button_id = CreateButton(m_obj_prefix + "PauseButton", x_pos, y_pos, button_width, button_height, "Pause Trading");
  415 |    x_pos += button_width + 10;
  416 | 
  417 |    // Close All Button
  418 |    m_close_all_button_id = CreateButton(m_obj_prefix + "CloseAllButton", x_pos, y_pos, button_width, button_height, "Close All Trades");
  419 |    x_pos += button_width + 10;
  420 | 
  421 |    // Risk Mode Dropdown
  422 |    int dropdown_width = 120;
  423 |    CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "RiskDropdownLabel", x_pos, y_pos + 2, "Risk:", m_text_color);
  424 |    m_risk_dropdown_id = CreateDropdown(m_obj_prefix + "RiskDropdown", x_pos + 35, y_pos, dropdown_width, button_height);
  425 |    AddDropdownItem(m_risk_dropdown_id, "Conservative");
  426 |    AddDropdownItem(m_risk_dropdown_id, "Balanced");
  427 |    AddDropdownItem(m_risk_dropdown_id, "Aggressive");
  428 |    SetDropdownValueFromEnum(m_risk_dropdown_id, m_context->RiskMode);
  429 | }

  454 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  455 | //| Helper: CreateLabel                                              |
  456 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  457 | CChartLabel* CDashboard::CreateLabel(const string name, int x, int y, const string text, color clr, int font_size=8, const string font="Arial")
  458 | {
  459 |     CChartLabel* label = new CChartLabel();
  460 |     if(CheckPointer(label) == POINTER_INVALID) return NULL;
  461 | 
  462 |     if(!label.Create(m_chart_id, name, 0, x, y))
  463 |     {
  464 |         delete label;
  465 |         return NULL;
  466 |     }
  467 | 
  468 |     label.Text(text);
  469 |     label.Color(clr);
  470 |     label.Font(font);
  471 |     label.FontSize(font_size);
  472 |     label.Anchor(ANCHOR_LEFT_UPPER);
  473 |     label.Corner(CORNER_LEFT_UPPER);
  474 |     m_chart_objects.Add(label);
  475 |     return label;
  476 | }   ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_FONTSIZE, font_size);
  477 |    ObjectSetString(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_FONT, font);
  478 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_ANCHOR, anchor);
  479 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_SELECTABLE, false);
  480 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_BACK, true);
  481 |    ArrayAdd(m_chart_objects, name);
  482 | }
  483 | 
  484 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  485 | //| Helper: CreateButton                                             |
  486 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  487 | string CDashboard::CreateButton(string name, int x, int y, int width, int height, string text)
  488 | {
  489 |    if(ObjectFind(m_chart_id, name) != -1) return name; // Already exists
  490 | 
  491 |    if(!ObjectCreate(m_chart_id, name, OBJ_BUTTON, 0, 0, 0))
  492 |    {
  493 |       m_logger.LogFormat(L_ERROR, "Failed to create button '%s'. Error %d", name, GetLastError());
  494 |       return "";
  495 |    }
  496 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_XDISTANCE, x);
  497 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_YDISTANCE, y);
  498 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_XSIZE, width);
  499 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_YSIZE, height);
  500 |    ObjectSetString(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_TEXT, text);
  501 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_BGCOLOR, m_bg_color_light);
  502 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_BORDER_COLOR, m_border_color);
  503 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_COLOR, m_text_color);
  504 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_FONTSIZE, 8);
  505 |    ObjectSetString(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_FONT, "Arial");
  506 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_STATE, false);
  507 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_BACK, false);
  508 |    ArrayAdd(m_chart_objects, name);
  509 |    return name;
  510 | }
  511 | 
  512 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  513 | //| Helper: CreateDropdown                                           |
  514 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  515 | string CDashboard::CreateDropdown(string name, int x, int y, int width, int height)
  516 | {
  517 |    if(ObjectFind(m_chart_id, name) != -1) return name; // Already exists
  518 | 
  519 |    if(!ObjectCreate(m_chart_id, name, OBJ_COMBOBOX, 0, 0, 0))
  520 |    {
  521 |       m_logger.LogFormat(L_ERROR, "Failed to create dropdown '%s'. Error %d", name, GetLastError());
  522 |       return "";
  523 |    }
  524 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_XDISTANCE, x);
  525 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_YDISTANCE, y);
  526 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_XSIZE, width);
  527 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_YSIZE, height);
  528 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_BGCOLOR, m_bg_color_light);
  529 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_BORDER_COLOR, m_border_color);
  530 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_COLOR, m_text_color);
  531 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_FONTSIZE, 8);
  532 |    ObjectSetString(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_FONT, "Arial");
  533 |    ObjectSetInteger(m_chart_id, name, OBJPROP_BACK, false);
  534 |    ArrayAdd(m_chart_objects, name);
  535 |    return name;
  536 | }
  537 | 
  538 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  539 | //| Helper: AddDropdownItem                                          |
  540 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  541 | void CDashboard::AddDropdownItem(string dropdown_name, string item_text)
  542 | {
  543 |    if(ObjectFind(m_chart_id, dropdown_name) == -1) return;
  544 |    ChartSetString(m_chart_id, CHART_OBJ_ADD, dropdown_name, item_text);
  545 | }
  546 | 
  547 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  548 | //| Helper: SetDropdownValueFromEnum                                 |
  549 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  550 | void CDashboard::SetDropdownValueFromEnum(string dropdown_name, ENUM_RISK_MODE risk_mode)
  551 | {
  552 |    if(ObjectFind(m_chart_id, dropdown_name) == -1) return;
  553 |    string mode_str = EnumToString(risk_mode);
  554 |    StringSubstr(mode_str, 5); // Remove "RISK_"
  555 |    TextCase(mode_str, TEXT_CASE_PROPER);
  556 |    ObjectSetString(m_chart_id, dropdown_name, OBJPROP_TEXT, mode_str);
  557 | }
  558 | 
  559 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  560 | //| Helper: GetTrendString                                           |
  561 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  562 | string CDashboard::GetTrendString(ENUM_MARKET_TREND trend)
  563 | {
  564 |    switch(trend)
  565 |    {
  566 |       case TREND_UP:   return "Uptrend";
  567 |       case TREND_DOWN: return "Downtrend";
  568 |       default:         return "Ranging";
  569 |    }
  570 | }
  571 | 
  572 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  573 | //| Helper: GetRegimeString                                          |
  574 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  575 | string CDashboard::GetRegimeString(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime)
  576 | {
  577 |    switch(regime)
  578 |    {
  579 |       case REGIME_TRENDING:    return "Trending";
  580 |       case REGIME_VOLATILE:    return "Volatile";
  581 |       case REGIME_REVERSION:   return "Mean Reversion";
  582 |       default:                 return "Low Volume";
  583 |    }
  584 | }
  585 | 
  586 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  587 | //| Helper: GetSessionString                                         |
  588 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  589 | string CDashboard::GetSessionString(ENUM_TRADING_SESSION session)
  590 | {
  591 |    switch(session)
  592 |    {
  593 |       case SESSION_LONDON:  return "London";
  594 |       case SESSION_NEWYORK: return "New York";
  595 |       case SESSION_ASIAN:   return "Asian";
  596 |       default:              return "Overlap/Closed";
  597 |    }
  598 | }
  599 | 
  600 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  601 | //| Helper: GetTrendColor                                            |
  602 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  603 | color CDashboard::GetTrendColor(ENUM_MARKET_TREND trend)
  604 | {
  605 |    switch(trend)
  606 |    {
  607 |       case TREND_UP:   return m_success_color;
  608 |       case TREND_DOWN: return m_alert_color;
  609 |       default:         return m_text_color;
  610 |    }
  611 | }
  612 | 
  613 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  614 | //| Helper: GetRegimeColor                                           |
  615 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  616 | color CDashboard::GetRegimeColor(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime)
  617 | {
  618 |    switch(regime)
  619 |    {
  620 |       case REGIME_TRENDING:    return C'33,150,243'; // Blue
  621 |       case REGIME_VOLATILE:    return C'255,152,0';  // Orange
  622 |       case REGIME_REVERSION:   return C'76,175,80';   // Green
  623 |       default:                 return m_text_color;
  624 |    }
  625 | }
  626 | 
  627 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  628 | //| Helper: DeleteObjectsByPrefix                                    |
  629 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  630 | void CDashboard::DeleteObjectsByPrefix(void)
  631 | {
  632 |    // A more robust way to delete objects to avoid issues with deletion during iteration
  633 |    int total = ObjectsTotal(m_chart_id, -1, -1);
  634 |    string to_delete[];
  635 |    ArrayResize(to_delete, 0);
  636 | 
  637 |    for(int i = 0; i < total; i++)
  638 |    {
  639 |       string name = ObjectName(m_chart_id, i, -1, -1);
  640 |       if(StringFind(name, m_obj_prefix) == 0)
  641 |       {
  642 |          ArrayAdd(to_delete, name);
  643 |       }
  644 |    }
  645 | 
  646 |    int delete_count = ArraySize(to_delete);
  647 |    for(int i = 0; i < delete_count; i++)
  648 |    {
  649 |       if(ObjectFind(m_chart_id, to_delete[i]) != -1)
  650 |       {
  651 |          ObjectDelete(m_chart_id, to_delete[i]);
  652 |       }
  653 |    }
  654 |    m_logger.LogFormat(L_INFO, "%d dashboard objects deleted.", delete_count);
  655 | }
  656 | 
  657 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  658 | //| Update                                                           |
  659 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  660 | void CDashboard::Update(void)
  661 | {
  662 |    if(!m_context || !m_chart_objects) return;
  663 | 
  664 |    UpdateAllComponents();
  665 |    ChartRedraw(m_chart_id);
  666 | }
  667 |    bool              m_show_news;
  668 |    bool              m_show_performance;
  669 | 
  670 |    // --- Interactive Control IDs ---
  671 |    string            m_btn_pause_id;
  672 |    string            m_btn_close_all_id;
  673 |    string            m_dd_risk_mode_id;
  674 |    string            m_dd_risk_option_conservative_id;
  675 |    string            m_dd_risk_option_balanced_id;
  676 |    string            m_dd_risk_option_aggressive_id;
  677 |    bool              m_is_risk_dropdown_open;
  678 | 
  679 |    // --- Private Methods ---
  680 |    void              ApplyTheme(void);
  681 |    void              InitializeColors(void);
  682 |    void              CreateComponent(ENUM_DASHBOARD_COMPONENT component);
  683 |    void              CreateBackground(void);
  684 |    void              CreateHeader(void);
  685 |    void              CreateMarketPanel(void);
  686 |    void              CreateRiskPanel(void);
  687 |    void              CreateNewsPanel(void);
  688 |    void              CreatePerformancePanel(void);
  689 |    void              CreateInteractiveControls(void);
  690 |    void              CreatePauseButton(void);
  691 |    void              CreateCloseAllButton(void);
  692 |    void              CreateRiskModeDropdown(void);
  693 |    void              CreateRiskModeDropdownOptions(void);
  694 |    void              DeleteRiskModeDropdownOptions(void);
  695 | 
  696 |    // --- UI Update Methods ---
  697 |    void              UpdateHeader(void);
  698 |    void              UpdateMarketPanel(void);
  699 |    void              UpdateRiskPanel(void);
  700 |    void              UpdateNewsPanel(void);
  701 |    void              UpdatePerformancePanel(void);
  702 | 
  703 |    // --- Helper Methods ---
  704 |    CChartLabel*      CreateLabel(const string name, int x, int y, const string text, color clr, int font_size = 8, const string font = "Arial");
  705 |    void              DeleteObjectsByPrefix(const string prefix);
  706 |    color             GetTrendColor(ENUM_MARKET_TREND trend);
  707 |    color             GetRegimeColor(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime);
  708 |    string            GetTrendString(ENUM_MARKET_TREND trend);
  709 |    string            GetRegimeString(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime);
  710 |    string            GetSessionString(ENUM_SESSION session);
  711 | 
  712 | public:
  713 |                      CDashboard(void);
  714 |                     ~CDashboard(void);
  715 | 
  716 |    bool              Initialize(EAContext *context, long chart_id);
  717 |    void              Deinitialize(const int reason = 0);
  718 |    void              Update(void);
  719 |    void              OnClick(const string object_name);
  720 | 
  721 |    // --- Configuration ---
  722 |    void              SetPosition(int x, int y) { m_dash_x = x; m_dash_y = y; }
  723 |    void              SetSize(int width, int height) { m_width = width; m_height = height; }
  724 |    void              SetTheme(ENUM_DASHBOARD_THEME theme) { m_theme = theme; ApplyTheme(); }
  725 |    void              ShowDetailedProfile(bool show) { m_show_detailed_profile = show; }
  726 |    void              ShowNews(bool show) { m_show_news = show; }
  727 |    void              ShowPerformance(bool show) { m_show_performance = show; }
  728 | };
  729 | 
  730 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  731 | //| Constructor
  732 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  733 | CDashboard::CDashboard(void)
  734 | {
  735 |    m_context = NULL;
  736 |    m_logger = NULL;
  737 |    m_chart_id = 0;
  738 |    m_chart_objects = new CArrayObj();
  739 | 
  740 |    m_dash_x = 20;
  741 |    m_dash_y = 20;
  742 |    m_width = 320;
  743 |    m_height = 550;
  744 |    m_theme = THEME_LIGHT;
  745 | 
  746 |    m_obj_prefix = "APEX_DASH_" + (string)m_chart_id + "_";
  747 | 
  748 |    m_show_detailed_profile = true;
  749 |    m_show_news = true;
  750 |    m_show_performance = true;
  751 |    
  752 |    m_is_risk_dropdown_open = false;
  753 | }
  754 | 
  755 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  756 | //| Destructor
  757 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  758 | CDashboard::~CDashboard(void)
  759 | {
  760 |    Deinitialize(0);
  761 |    if(CheckPointer(m_chart_objects) == POINTER_VALID)
  762 |      {
  763 |       delete m_chart_objects;
  764 |       m_chart_objects = NULL;
  765 |      }
  766 | }
  767 | 
  768 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  769 | //| Initialize
  770 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  771 | bool CDashboard::Initialize(EAContext *context, long chart_id)
  772 | {
  773 |    if(CheckPointer(context) == POINTER_INVALID) return false;
  774 |    m_context = context;
  775 |    m_logger = context->Logger;
  776 |    m_chart_id = chart_id;
  777 | 
  778 |    m_obj_prefix = "APEX_DASH_" + (string)m_chart_id + "_";
  779 | 
  780 |    m_symbol = m_context->Symbol;
  781 |    m_ea_version = m_context->EAVersion;
  782 |    m_order_comment = m_context->OrderComment;
  783 | 
  784 |    ApplyTheme();
  785 | 
  786 |    Deinitialize(0);
  787 | 
  788 |    // Create all components
  789 |    CreateBackground();
  790 |    CreateHeader();
  791 |    CreateMarketPanel();
  792 |    CreateRiskPanel();
  793 |    if(m_show_news) CreateNewsPanel();
  794 |    if(m_show_performance) CreatePerformancePanel();
  795 |    CreateInteractiveControls();
  796 | 
  797 |    Update(); // Initial data population
  798 | 
  799 |    ChartRedraw(m_chart_id);
  800 |    return true;
  801 | }
  802 | 
  803 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  804 | //| Deinitialize
  805 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  806 | void CDashboard::Deinitialize(const int reason)
  807 | {
  808 |    if(CheckPointer(m_chart_objects) != POINTER_VALID) return;
  809 | 
  810 |    // This loop correctly deletes the objects and removes them from the array
  811 |    m_chart_objects.Delete(0, m_chart_objects.Total());
  812 |    m_chart_objects.Clear();
  813 |    
  814 |    // A final cleanup just in case
  815 |    ObjectsDeleteAll(m_chart_id, m_obj_prefix);
  816 |    ChartRedraw(m_chart_id);
  817 | }
  818 | 
  819 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  820 | //| Clear (Replaced by Deinitialize)
  821 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  822 | void CDashboard::Clear() // This function is now conceptually replaced by Deinitialize
  823 | {
  824 |    Deinitialize(0);
  825 | }
  826 | 
  827 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  828 | //| Create Interactive Controls
  829 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  830 | void CDashboard::CreateInteractiveControls()
  831 | {
  832 |     // Define IDs for interactive elements
  833 |     m_btn_pause_id = m_obj_prefix + "PauseButton";
  834 |     m_btn_close_all_id = m_obj_prefix + "CloseAllButton";
  835 |     m_dd_risk_mode_id = m_obj_prefix + "RiskModeDD";
  836 |     m_dd_risk_option_conservative_id = m_obj_prefix + "RiskModeOptConservative";
  837 |     m_dd_risk_option_balanced_id = m_obj_prefix + "RiskModeOptBalanced";
  838 |     m_dd_risk_option_aggressive_id = m_obj_prefix + "RiskModeOptAggressive";
  839 |     m_is_risk_dropdown_open = false;
  840 | 
  841 |     // Create the actual controls
  842 |     CreatePauseButton();
  843 |     CreateCloseAllButton();
  844 |     CreateRiskModeDropdown();
  845 | }
  846 | 
  847 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  848 | //| Create Pause Button
  849 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  850 | void CDashboard::CreatePauseButton()
  851 | {
  852 |     int buttonX = m_dash_x + 10;
  853 |     int buttonY = m_dash_y + m_height - 40;
  854 |     int buttonWidth = 130;
  855 |     int buttonHeight = 25;
  856 | 
  857 |     bool isPaused = m_context && m_context->TradeManager ? m_context->TradeManager->IsTradingPaused() : false;
  858 | 
  859 |     CChartButton *button = new CChartButton(m_context);
  860 |     if(CheckPointer(button) == POINTER_INVALID) return;
  861 | 
  862 |     if(button.Create(m_chart_id, m_btn_pause_id, 0, buttonX, buttonY, buttonWidth, buttonHeight))
  863 |     {
  864 |         button.SetText(isPaused ? "RESUME TRADES" : "PAUSE NEW TRADES");
  865 |         button.SetColor(m_text_color);
  866 |         button.SetColorBackground(isPaused ? m_alert_color : m_success_color);
  867 |         button.SetColorBorder(m_border_color);
  868 |         button.SetFontSize(8);
  869 |         button.SetFont("Arial");
  870 |         button.State(isPaused);
  871 |         m_chart_objects.Add(button);
  872 |     }
  873 |     else
  874 |     {
  875 |         if(m_logger) m_logger->LogError("Failed to create Pause button");
  876 |         delete button;
  877 |     }
  878 | }
  879 | 
  880 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  881 | //| Create Close All Button
  882 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  883 | void CDashboard::CreateCloseAllButton()
  884 | {
  885 |     int buttonX = m_dash_x + 10 + 130 + 10;
  886 |     int buttonY = m_dash_y + m_height - 40;
  887 |     int buttonWidth = 130;
  888 |     int buttonHeight = 25;
  889 | 
  890 |     CChartButton *button = new CChartButton(m_context);
  891 |     if(CheckPointer(button) == POINTER_INVALID) return;
  892 | 
  893 |     if(button.Create(m_chart_id, m_btn_close_all_id, 0, buttonX, buttonY, buttonWidth, buttonHeight))
  894 |     {
  895 |         button.SetText("CLOSE ALL POSITIONS");
  896 |         button.SetColor(m_text_color);
  897 |         button.SetColorBackground((color)0xFFE0E0);
  898 |         button.SetColorBorder(m_alert_color);
  899 |         button.SetFontSize(8);
  900 |         button.SetFont("Arial");
  901 |         m_chart_objects.Add(button);
  902 |     }
  903 |     else
  904 |     {
  905 |         if(m_logger) m_logger->LogError("Failed to create Close All button");
  906 |         delete button;
  907 |     }
  908 | }
  909 | 
  910 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  911 | //| Create Risk Mode Dropdown
  912 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  913 | void CDashboard::CreateRiskModeDropdown()
  914 | {
  915 |     int ddX = m_dash_x + 10;
  916 |     int ddY = m_dash_y + m_height - 40 - 30;
  917 |     int ddWidth = 270;
  918 |     int ddHeight = 25;
  919 | 
  920 |     string currentRiskModeStr = "Unknown";
  921 |     if(m_context && m_context->RiskManager)
  922 |     {
  923 |         currentRiskModeStr = GetAdaptiveModeString(m_context->RiskManager->GetAdaptiveMode());
  924 |     }
  925 | 
  926 |     CChartButton *button = new CChartButton(m_context);
  927 |     if(CheckPointer(button) == POINTER_INVALID) return;
  928 | 
  929 |     if(button.Create(m_chart_id, m_dd_risk_mode_id, 0, ddX, ddY, ddWidth, ddHeight))
  930 |     {
  931 |         button.SetText("RISK MODE: " + currentRiskModeStr + " ▼");
  932 |         button.SetColor(m_text_color);
  933 |         button.SetColorBackground(m_bg_color);
  934 |         button.SetColorBorder(m_border_color);
  935 |         button.SetFontSize(8);
  936 |         button.SetFont("Arial");
  937 |         m_chart_objects.Add(button);
  938 |     }
  939 |     else
  940 |     {
  941 |         if(m_logger) m_logger->LogError("Failed to create Risk Mode dropdown");
  942 |         delete button;
  943 |     }
  944 | }
  945 | 
  946 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  947 | //| Create Risk Mode Dropdown Options
  948 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  949 | void CDashboard::CreateRiskModeDropdownOptions()
  950 | {
  951 |     if(m_is_risk_dropdown_open) return;
  952 | 
  953 |     CChartButton *main_dd = (CChartButton*)m_chart_objects.Search(m_dd_risk_mode_id);
  954 |     if(CheckPointer(main_dd) == POINTER_INVALID) return;
  955 | 
  956 |     int optionX = main_dd.X_Distance();
  957 |     int optionY = main_dd.Y_Distance() - 25; // Start above the main button
  958 |     int optionWidth = main_dd.X_Size();
  959 |     int optionHeight = 25;
  960 | 
  961 |     string options_text[] = {GetAdaptiveModeString(MODE_AGGRESSIVE), GetAdaptiveModeString(MODE_BALANCED), GetAdaptiveModeString(MODE_CONSERVATIVE)};
  962 |     string options_ids[] = {m_dd_risk_option_aggressive_id, m_dd_risk_option_balanced_id, m_dd_risk_option_conservative_id};
  963 | 
  964 |     for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(options_text); i++)
  965 |     {
  966 |         CChartButton *button = new CChartButton(m_context);
  967 |         if(CheckPointer(button) == POINTER_INVALID) continue;
  968 | 
  969 |         if(button.Create(m_chart_id, options_ids[i], 0, optionX, optionY, optionWidth, optionHeight))
  970 |         {
  971 |             button.SetText(options_text[i]);
  972 |             button.SetColorBackground(m_bg_color);
  973 |             button.SetColorBorder(m_border_color);
  974 |             button.SetFontSize(8);
  975 |             m_chart_objects.Add(button);
  976 |         }
  977 |         else
  978 |         {
  979 |             if(m_logger) m_logger->LogError("Failed to create risk mode option: " + options_text[i]);
  980 |             delete button;
  981 |         }
  982 |         optionY -= optionHeight; // Move up for the next button
  983 |     }
  984 | 
  985 |     main_dd.SetText(StringSubstr(main_dd.Text(), 0, StringLen(main_dd.Text()) - 1) + "▲");
  986 |     m_is_risk_dropdown_open = true;
  987 |     ChartRedraw(m_chart_id);
  988 | }
  989 | 
  990 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  991 | //| Delete Risk Mode Dropdown Options
  992 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  993 | void CDashboard::DeleteRiskModeDropdownOptions()
  994 | {
  995 |     if(!m_is_risk_dropdown_open) return;
  996 | 
  997 |     string ids[] = {m_dd_risk_option_conservative_id, m_dd_risk_option_balanced_id, m_dd_risk_option_aggressive_id};
  998 |     for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(ids); i++)
  999 |     {
 1000 |         for(int j = m_chart_objects.Total() - 1; j >= 0; j--)
 1001 |         {
 1002 |             CObject *obj = m_chart_objects.At(j);
 1003 |             if(CheckPointer(obj) != POINTER_INVALID && obj.Name() == ids[i])
 1004 |             {
 1005 |                 m_chart_objects.Delete(j); // This also deletes the object
 1006 |                 break; 
 1007 |             }
 1008 |         }
 1009 |     }
 1010 | 
 1011 |     CChartButton *main_dd = (CChartButton*)m_chart_objects.Search(m_dd_risk_mode_id);
 1012 |     if(CheckPointer(main_dd) != POINTER_INVALID)
 1013 |     {
 1014 |         main_dd.SetText(StringSubstr(main_dd.Text(), 0, StringLen(main_dd.Text()) - 1) + "▼");
 1015 |     }
 1016 | 
 1017 |     m_is_risk_dropdown_open = false;
 1018 |     ChartRedraw(m_chart_id);
 1019 | }
 1020 | 
 1021 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1022 | //| Handle OnClick Event
 1023 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1024 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1025 | //| Update - Main refresh function
 1026 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1027 | void CDashboard::Update(void)
 1028 | {
 1029 |     if(!m_context) return;
 1030 | 
 1031 |     // Update all visible components
 1032 |     UpdateHeader();
 1033 |     UpdateMarketPanel();
 1034 |     UpdateRiskPanel();
 1035 |     if(m_show_news) UpdateNewsPanel();
 1036 |     if(m_show_performance) UpdatePerformancePanel();
 1037 | 
 1038 |     ChartRedraw(m_chart_id);
 1039 | }
 1040 | 
 1041 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1042 | //| Create Background
 1043 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1044 | void CDashboard::CreateBackground()
 1045 | {
 1046 |     CChartRectangle *bg = new CChartRectangle(m_context);
 1047 |     if(CheckPointer(bg) == POINTER_INVALID) return;
 1048 | 
 1049 |     if(bg.Create(m_chart_id, m_obj_prefix + "Background", 0, m_dash_x, m_dash_y, m_width, m_height))
 1050 |     {
 1051 |         bg.SetColorBackground(m_bg_color);
 1052 |         bg.SetColorBorder(m_border_color);
 1053 |         bg.SetCorner(CORNER_LEFT_UPPER);
 1054 |         bg.SetStyle(STYLE_SOLID);
 1055 |         bg.SetWidth(1);
 1056 |         bg.SetSelectable(false);
 1057 |         bg.SetBack(true);
 1058 |         m_chart_objects.Add(bg);
 1059 |     }
 1060 |     else
 1061 |     {
 1062 |         if(m_logger) m_logger->LogError("Failed to create Dashboard background");
 1063 |         delete bg;
 1064 |     }
 1065 | }
 1066 | 
 1067 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1068 | //| Create Header
 1069 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1070 | void CDashboard::CreateHeader()
 1071 | {
 1072 |     int current_y = m_dash_y + 10;
 1073 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "Title", m_dash_x + 10, current_y, "APEX PULLBACK EA", m_title_color, 12, "Arial Black");
 1074 |     current_y += 20;
 1075 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "Version", m_dash_x + 10, current_y, "Version: " + m_ea_version, m_text_color, 8);
 1076 |     current_y += 15;
 1077 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "Symbol", m_dash_x + 10, current_y, "Symbol: " + m_symbol, m_text_color, 8);
 1078 |     current_y += 15;
 1079 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "Status_Label", m_dash_x + 10, current_y, "Status:", m_text_color, 8);
 1080 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "Status_Value", m_dash_x + 80, current_y, "Initializing...", m_value_color, 8);
 1081 | }
 1082 | 
 1083 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1084 | //| Update Header
 1085 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1086 | void CDashboard::UpdateHeader()
 1087 | {
 1088 |     if(!m_context || !m_context->TradeManager) return;
 1089 | 
 1090 |     string status_text = "Unknown";
 1091 |     color status_color = m_value_color;
 1092 | 
 1093 |     if(m_context->TradeManager->IsTradingPaused())
 1094 |     {
 1095 |         status_text = "TRADING PAUSED";
 1096 |         status_color = m_alert_color;
 1097 |     }
 1098 |     else
 1099 |     {
 1100 |         status_text = "ACTIVE";
 1101 |         status_color = m_success_color;
 1102 |     }
 1103 | 
 1104 |     CChartLabel *status_label = (CChartLabel*)m_chart_objects.Search(m_obj_prefix + "Status_Value");
 1105 |     if(CheckPointer(status_label) != POINTER_INVALID)
 1106 |     {
 1107 |         status_label->SetText(status_text);
 1108 |         status_label->SetColor(status_color);
 1109 |     }
 1110 | }
 1111 | 
 1112 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1113 | //| Create a Label Helper
 1114 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1115 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1116 | //| Create Market Panel
 1117 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1118 | void CDashboard::CreateMarketPanel()
 1119 | {
 1120 |     int y_start = m_dash_y + 80;
 1121 |     int x_col1 = m_dash_x + 10;
 1122 |     int x_col2 = m_dash_x + 150;
 1123 | 
 1124 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "MarketTitle", x_col1, y_start, "--- MARKET CONTEXT ---", m_title_color, 9, "Arial Bold");
 1125 |     y_start += 20;
 1126 | 
 1127 |     // Column 1
 1128 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "TrendLabel", x_col1, y_start, "Primary Trend:", m_text_color);
 1129 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "TrendValue", x_col1 + 80, y_start, "...", m_value_color);
 1130 |     y_start += 15;
 1131 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "RegimeLabel", x_col1, y_start, "Market Regime:", m_text_color);
 1132 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "RegimeValue", x_col1 + 80, y_start, "...", m_value_color);
 1133 |     y_start += 15;
 1134 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "VolatilityLabel", x_col1, y_start, "Volatility:", m_text_color);
 1135 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "VolatilityValue", x_col1 + 80, y_start, "...", m_value_color);
 1136 | 
 1137 |     // Column 2
 1138 |     y_start = m_dash_y + 80 + 20; // Reset Y for second column
 1139 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "SessionLabel", x_col2, y_start, "Session:", m_text_color);
 1140 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "SessionValue", x_col2 + 60, y_start, "...", m_value_color);
 1141 |     y_start += 15;
 1142 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "SpreadLabel", x_col2, y_start, "Spread:", m_text_color);
 1143 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "SpreadValue", x_col2 + 60, y_start, "...", m_value_color);
 1144 | }
 1145 | 
 1146 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1147 | //| Update Market Panel
 1148 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1149 | void CDashboard::UpdateMarketPanel()
 1150 | {
 1151 |     if(!m_context || !m_context->AssetDNA) return;
 1152 | 
 1153 |     // Update Trend
 1154 |     CChartLabel *trend_value = (CChartLabel*)m_chart_objects.Search(m_obj_prefix + "TrendValue");
 1155 |     if(CheckPointer(trend_value) != POINTER_INVALID)
 1156 |     {
 1157 |         ENUM_MARKET_TREND trend = m_context->AssetDNA->GetPrimaryTrend();
 1158 |         trend_value->SetText(GetTrendString(trend));
 1159 |         trend_value->SetColor(GetTrendColor(trend));
 1160 |     }
 1161 | 
 1162 |     // Update Regime
 1163 |     CChartLabel *regime_value = (CChartLabel*)m_chart_objects.Search(m_obj_prefix + "RegimeValue");
 1164 |     if(CheckPointer(regime_value) != POINTER_INVALID)
 1165 |     {
 1166 |         ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime = m_context->AssetDNA->GetMarketRegime();
 1167 |         regime_value->SetText(GetRegimeString(regime));
 1168 |         regime_value->SetColor(GetRegimeColor(regime));
 1169 |     }
 1170 |     
 1171 |     // Update Volatility
 1172 |     CChartLabel *volatility_value = (CChartLabel*)m_chart_objects.Search(m_obj_prefix + "VolatilityValue");
 1173 |     if(CheckPointer(volatility_value) != POINTER_INVALID)
 1174 |     {
 1175 |         double atr_value = m_context->AssetDNA->GetVolatilityATR();
 1176 |         volatility_value->SetText(DoubleToString(atr_value, _Digits) + " pips");
 1177 |     }
 1178 | 
 1179 |     // Update Session
 1180 |     CChartLabel *session_value = (CChartLabel*)m_chart_objects.Search(m_obj_prefix + "SessionValue");
 1181 |     if(CheckPointer(session_value) != POINTER_INVALID)
 1182 |     {
 1183 |         session_value->SetText(GetSessionString(m_context->AssetDNA->GetCurrentSession()));
 1184 |     }
 1185 | 
 1186 |     // Update Spread
 1187 |     CChartLabel *spread_value = (CChartLabel*)m_chart_objects.Search(m_obj_prefix + "SpreadValue");
 1188 |     if(CheckPointer(spread_value) != POINTER_INVALID)
 1189 |     {
 1190 |         spread_value->SetText(IntegerToString(m_context->Spread) + " pts");
 1191 |     }
 1192 | }
 1193 | 
 1194 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1195 | //| Create Risk Panel
 1196 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1197 | void CDashboard::CreateRiskPanel()
 1198 | {
 1199 |     int y_start = m_dash_y + 170;
 1200 |     int x_col1 = m_dash_x + 10;
 1201 | 
 1202 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "RiskTitle", x_col1, y_start, "--- RISK & PERFORMANCE ---", m_title_color, 9, "Arial Bold");
 1203 |     y_start += 20;
 1204 | 
 1205 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "MaxRiskLabel", x_col1, y_start, "Max Risk/Trade:", m_text_color);
 1206 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "MaxRiskValue", x_col1 + 120, y_start, "...", m_value_color);
 1207 |     y_start += 15;
 1208 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "DailyDDLabel", x_col1, y_start, "Daily Drawdown:", m_text_color);
 1209 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "DailyDDValue", x_col1 + 120, y_start, "...", m_alert_color);
 1210 |     y_start += 15;
 1211 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "NextLotLabel", x_col1, y_start, "Next Lot Size:", m_text_color);
 1212 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "NextLotValue", x_col1 + 120, y_start, "...", m_value_color);
 1213 | }

 1215 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1216 | //| Update Risk Panel
 1217 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1218 | void CDashboard::UpdateRiskPanel()
 1219 | {
 1220 |     if(!m_context || !m_context->RiskManager || !m_context->PositionManager) return;
 1221 | 
 1222 |     // Update Max Risk
 1223 |     CChartLabel *max_risk_value = (CChartLabel*)m_chart_objects.Search(m_obj_prefix + "MaxRiskValue");
 1224 |     if(CheckPointer(max_risk_value) != POINTER_INVALID)
 1225 |     {
 1226 |         max_risk_value->SetText(DoubleToString(m_context->RiskManager->GetMaxRiskPerTrade() * 100, 2) + "%");
 1227 |     }
 1228 | 
 1229 |     // Update Daily DD
 1230 |     CChartLabel *daily_dd_value = (CChartLabel*)m_chart_objects.Search(m_obj_prefix + "DailyDDValue");
 1231 |     if(CheckPointer(daily_dd_value) != POINTER_INVALID)
 1232 |     {
 1233 |         daily_dd_value->SetText(DoubleToString(m_context->RiskManager->GetCurrentDailyDrawdown() * 100, 2) + "%");
 1234 |     }
 1235 | 
 1236 |     // Update Next Lot Size
 1237 |     CChartLabel *next_lot_value = (CChartLabel*)m_chart_objects.Search(m_obj_prefix + "NextLotValue");
 1238 |     if(CheckPointer(next_lot_value) != POINTER_INVALID)
 1239 |     {
 1240 |         // This is a placeholder, as calculating the exact next lot size might be complex here.
 1241 |         // A simplified version might just show the base lot.
 1242 |         next_lot_value->SetText(DoubleToString(m_context->RiskManager->GetBaseLotSize(), 2));
 1243 |     }
 1244 | }

 1246 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1247 | //| Helper Functions for String/Color Conversion
 1248 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1249 | string CDashboard::GetTrendString(ENUM_MARKET_TREND trend)
 1250 | {
 1251 |     switch(trend)
 1252 |     {
 1253 |         case TREND_UP: return "Uptrend";
 1254 |         case TREND_DOWN: return "Downtrend";
 1255 |         default: return "Ranging";
 1256 |     }
 1257 | }
 1258 | 
 1259 | color CDashboard::GetTrendColor(ENUM_MARKET_TREND trend)
 1260 | {
 1261 |     switch(trend)
 1262 |     {
 1263 |         case TREND_UP: return clrLimeGreen;
 1264 |         case TREND_DOWN: return clrIndianRed;
 1265 |         default: return clrGoldenrod;
 1266 |     }
 1267 | }
 1268 | 
 1269 | string CDashboard::GetRegimeString(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime)
 1270 | {
 1271 |     switch(regime)
 1272 |     {
 1273 |         case REGIME_TRENDING: return "Trending";
 1274 |         case REGIME_RANGING: return "Ranging";
 1275 |         case REGIME_VOLATILE: return "Volatile";
 1276 |         default: return "Undefined";
 1277 |     }
 1278 | }
 1279 | 
 1280 | color CDashboard::GetRegimeColor(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime)
 1281 | {
 1282 |     switch(regime)
 1283 |     {
 1284 |         case REGIME_TRENDING: return clrCornflowerBlue;
 1285 |         case REGIME_RANGING: return clrOrange;
 1286 |         case REGIME_VOLATILE: return clrOrchid;
 1287 |         default: return m_value_color;
 1288 |     }
 1289 | }

 1291 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1292 | //| Create News Panel
 1293 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1294 | void CDashboard::CreateNewsPanel()
 1295 | {
 1296 |     int y_start = m_dash_y + 250;
 1297 |     int x_col1 = m_dash_x + 10;
 1298 | 
 1299 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "NewsTitle", x_col1, y_start, "--- UPCOMING NEWS ---", m_title_color, 9, "Arial Bold");
 1300 |     y_start += 20;
 1301 | 
 1302 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "NextNewsLabel", x_col1, y_start, "Next Event:", m_text_color);
 1303 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "NextNewsValue", x_col1 + 80, y_start, "N/A", m_value_color);
 1304 |     y_start += 15;
 1305 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "TimeTillLabel", x_col1, y_start, "Time Until:", m_text_color);
 1306 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "TimeTillValue", x_col1 + 80, y_start, "--:--:--", m_value_color);
 1307 | }
 1308 | 
 1309 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1310 | //| Update News Panel
 1311 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1312 | void CDashboard::UpdateNewsPanel()
 1313 | {
 1314 |     if(!m_context || !m_context->NewsFilter) return;
 1315 | 
 1316 |     NewsEvent next_event = m_context->NewsFilter->GetNextHighImpactEvent();
 1317 |     string event_name = "N/A";
 1318 |     string time_till = "--:--:--";
 1319 |     color time_color = m_value_color;
 1320 | 
 1321 |     if(next_event.timestamp > 0)
 1322 |     {
 1323 |         event_name = next_event.title;
 1324 |         long seconds_till = next_event.timestamp - TimeCurrent();
 1325 |         if(seconds_till > 0)
 1326 |         {
 1327 |             time_till = TimeToString(seconds_till, TIME_MINUTES | TIME_SECONDS);
 1328 |             if(seconds_till < 60 * 15) // Less than 15 minutes
 1329 |             {
 1330 |                 time_color = m_alert_color;
 1331 |             }
 1332 |         }
 1333 |         else
 1334 |         {
 1335 |             time_till = "Passed";
 1336 |         }
 1337 |     }
 1338 | 
 1339 |     CChartLabel *name_label = (CChartLabel*)m_chart_objects.Search(m_obj_prefix + "NextNewsValue");
 1340 |     if(CheckPointer(name_label) != POINTER_INVALID) name_label.SetText(event_name);
 1341 | 
 1342 |     CChartLabel *time_label = (CChartLabel*)m_chart_objects.Search(m_obj_prefix + "TimeTillValue");
 1343 |     if(CheckPointer(time_label) != POINTER_INVALID)
 1344 |     {
 1345 |         time_label.SetText(time_till);
 1346 |         time_label.SetColor(time_color);
 1347 |     }
 1348 | }
 1349 |

 1362 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "PnlValue", x_col1 + 120, y_start, "...", m_value_color);
 1363 |     y_start += 15;
 1364 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "WinRateLabel", x_col1, y_start, "Win Rate:", m_text_color);
 1365 |     CreateLabel(m_obj_prefix + "WinRateValue", x_col1 + 120, y_start, "...", m_value_color);

 1370 | 
 1371 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1372 | //| Update Performance Panel
 1373 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1374 | void CDashboard::UpdatePerformancePanel()
 1375 | {
 1376 |     if(!m_context || !m_context->PerformanceTracker) return;
 1377 | 
 1378 |     // Update P/L
 1379 |     CChartLabel *pnl_value = (CChartLabel*)m_chart_objects.Search(m_obj_prefix + "PnlValue");
 1380 |     if(CheckPointer(pnl_value) != POINTER_INVALID)
 1381 |     {
 1382 |         double pnl = m_context->PerformanceTracker->GetTotalNetProfit();
 1383 |         pnl_value->SetText(DoubleToString(pnl, 2));
 1384 |         pnl_value->SetColor(pnl >= 0 ? m_success_color : m_alert_color);
 1385 |     }
 1386 | 
 1387 |     // Update Win Rate
 1388 |     CChartLabel *win_rate_value = (CChartLabel*)m_chart_objects.Search(m_obj_prefix + "WinRateValue");
 1389 |     if(CheckPointer(win_rate_value) != POINTER_INVALID)
 1390 |     {
 1391 |         win_rate_value->SetText(DoubleToString(m_context->PerformanceTracker->GetWinRate() * 100, 2) + "%");
 1392 |     }
 1393 | 
 1394 |     // Update Total Trades
 1395 |     CChartLabel *trades_value = (CChartLabel*)m_chart_objects.Search(m_obj_prefix + "TradesValue");
 1396 |     if(CheckPointer(trades_value) != POINTER_INVALID)
 1397 |     {
 1398 |         trades_value->SetText(IntegerToString(m_context->PerformanceTracker->GetTotalTrades()));
 1399 |     }
 1400 | }

 1411 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1412 | //| Initialize Colors
 1413 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1414 | void CDashboard::InitializeColors()
 1415 | {
 1416 |     if(m_theme == THEME_DARK)
 1417 |     {
 1418 |         m_bg_color = (color)0xFF2E2E2E;
 1419 |         m_title_color = (color)0xFFFFFFFF;
 1420 |         m_text_color = (color)0xFFD0D0D0;
 1421 |         m_value_color = (color)0xFFFFFFFF;
 1422 |         m_border_color = (color)0xFF555555;
 1423 |     }
 1424 |     else // THEME_LIGHT
 1425 |     {
 1426 |         m_bg_color = (color)0xFFF0F0F0;
 1427 |         m_title_color = (color)0xFF000000;
 1428 |         m_text_color = (color)0xFF333333;
 1429 |         m_value_color = (color)0xFF000000;
 1430 |         m_border_color = (color)0xFFCCCCCC;
 1431 |     }
 1432 |     // Universal colors
 1433 |     m_success_color = clrSeaGreen;
 1434 |     m_alert_color = clrFirebrick;
 1435 | }

 1442 |         case SESSION_ASIAN: return "Asian";
 1443 |         case SESSION_LONDON: return "London";
 1444 |         case SESSION_NEWYORK: return "New York";
 1445 |         case SESSION_OVERLAP: return "Overlap";
 1446 |         default: return "Closed";
