 1450 | 
 1451 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1452 | //| Create a Label Helper
 1453 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1454 | CChartLabel* CDashboard::CreateLabel(const string name, int x, int y, const string text, color clr, int font_size=8, const string font="Arial")
 1455 | {
 1456 |     CChartLabel *label = new CChartLabel(m_context);
 1457 |     if(CheckPointer(label) == POINTER_INVALID) return NULL;
 1458 | 
 1459 |     if(label.Create(m_chart_id, name, 0, x, y))
 1460 |     {
 1461 |         label->SetText(text);
 1462 |         label->SetFont(font, font_size);
 1463 |         label->SetColor(clr);
 1464 |         label->SetAnchor(ANCHOR_LEFT_UPPER);
 1465 |         label->SetSelectable(false);
 1466 |         m_chart_objects.Add(label);
 1467 |         return label;
 1468 |     }
 1469 |     else
 1470 |     {
 1471 |         if(m_logger) m_logger->LogError("Failed to create label: " + name);
 1472 |         delete label;
 1473 |         return NULL;
 1474 |     }
 1475 | }
 1476 | 
 1477 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1478 | //| Handle OnClick Event
 1479 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1480 | void CDashboard::OnClick(string object_name)
 1481 | {
 1482 |     if(!m_context || !m_context->TradeManager || !m_context->RiskManager) return;
 1483 | 
 1484 |     // 1. Pause/Resume Button
 1485 |     if(object_name == m_btn_pause_id)
 1486 |     {
 1487 |         bool isPaused = m_context->TradeManager->TogglePauseTrading();
 1488 |         CChartButton* button = (CChartButton*)m_chart_objects.Search(m_btn_pause_id);
 1489 |         if(CheckPointer(button) != POINTER_INVALID)
 1490 |         {
 1491 |             button->State(isPaused);
 1492 |             button->SetText(isPaused ? "RESUME TRADES" : "PAUSE NEW TRADES");
 1493 |             button->SetColorBackground(isPaused ? m_alert_color : m_success_color);
 1494 |             if(m_logger) m_logger->LogInfo(isPaused ? "Trading paused via Dashboard." : "Trading resumed via Dashboard.");
 1495 |             ChartRedraw(m_chart_id);
 1496 |         }
 1497 |         return;
 1498 |     }
 1499 | 
 1500 |     // 2. Close All Button
 1501 |     if(object_name == m_btn_close_all_id)
 1502 |     {
 1503 |         m_context->TradeManager->CloseAllPositionsAsync();
 1504 |         if(m_logger) m_logger->LogInfo("Close All Positions command sent via Dashboard.");
 1505 |         return;
 1506 |     }
 1507 | 
 1508 |     // 3. Risk Mode Dropdown
 1509 |     if(object_name == m_dd_risk_mode_id)
 1510 |     {
 1511 |         if(m_is_risk_dropdown_open)
 1512 |         {
 1513 |             DeleteRiskModeDropdownOptions();
 1514 |         }
 1515 |         else
 1516 |         {
 1517 |             CreateRiskModeDropdownOptions();
 1518 |         }
 1519 |         return;
 1520 |     }
 1521 | 
 1522 |     // 4. Dropdown Options
 1523 |     ENUM_ADAPTIVE_RISK_MODE newMode = WRONG_VALUE;
 1524 |     string newModeLogText = "";
 1525 |     if(object_name == m_dd_risk_option_conservative_id) { newMode = MODE_CONSERVATIVE; newModeLogText = "Conservative"; }
 1526 |     if(object_name == m_dd_risk_option_balanced_id)     { newMode = MODE_BALANCED;     newModeLogText = "Balanced"; }
 1527 |     if(object_name == m_dd_risk_option_aggressive_id)   { newMode = MODE_AGGRESSIVE;   newModeLogText = "Aggressive"; }
 1528 | 
 1529 |     if(newMode != WRONG_VALUE)
 1530 |     {
 1531 |         m_context->RiskManager->SetAdaptiveMode(newMode);
 1532 |         if(m_logger) m_logger->LogInfo("Risk Mode set to " + newModeLogText + " via Dashboard.");
 1533 | 
 1534 |         CChartButton* main_dd = (CChartButton*)m_chart_objects.Search(m_dd_risk_mode_id);
 1535 |         if(CheckPointer(main_dd) != POINTER_INVALID)
 1536 |         {
 1537 |             main_dd.SetText("RISK MODE: " + GetAdaptiveModeString(newMode)); // The delete function will add the arrow
 1538 |         }
 1539 |         
 1540 |         DeleteRiskModeDropdownOptions(); // This also redraws the chart
 1541 |         return;
 1542 |     }
 1543 | }
 1544 |     ChartRedraw();
 1545 | }
 1546 | 
 1547 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1548 | //| Cập nhật Dashboard                                                |
 1549 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1550 | // void CDashboard::Update(MarketProfileData &profile) // Sẽ lấy profile từ context
 1551 | void CDashboard::Update() // Called on every tick
 1552 | {
 1553 |     if(CheckPointer(m_context) == POINTER_INVALID) return;
 1554 | 
 1555 |     // Update all dynamic data panels
 1556 |     UpdateHeader();
 1557 |     UpdateMarketPanel();
 1558 |     UpdateRiskPanel();
 1559 |     UpdateNewsPanel();
 1560 |     UpdatePerformancePanel();
 1561 | 
 1562 |     // Redraw chart to reflect changes
 1563 |     ChartRedraw(m_chart_id);
 1564 | }
 1565 | {
 1566 |     // m_LastProfile = profile; // Không cần nữa
 1567 |     
 1568 |     // Xóa các đối tượng cũ trước khi vẽ lại (ngoại trừ các control tương tác)
 1569 |     DeleteObjectsByPrefix(m_ObjPrefix + "HEADER_");
 1570 |     DeleteObjectsByPrefix(m_ObjPrefix + "MARKET_");
 1571 |     DeleteObjectsByPrefix(m_ObjPrefix + "RISK_");
 1572 |     DeleteObjectsByPrefix(m_ObjPrefix + "NEWS_");
 1573 |     DeleteObjectsByPrefix(m_ObjPrefix + "PERF_");
 1574 |     DeleteObjectsByPrefix(m_ObjPrefix + "VZ_");
 1575 | 
 1576 |     CreateHeader();
 1577 |     CreateMarketPanel();
 1578 |     CreateRiskPanel();
 1579 |     // CreateNewsPanel(); // Tạm thời tắt nếu chưa cần
 1580 |     // CreatePerformancePanel(); // Tạm thời tắt nếu chưa cần
 1581 |     // CreateValueZoneVisualizer(); // Tạm thời tắt nếu chưa cần
 1582 | 
 1583 |     // Cập nhật trạng thái nút Pause
 1584 |     if(ObjectFind(0, m_btnPauseTradesID) != -1 && m_Context->TradeManager != NULL)
 1585 |     {
 1586 |         bool isPaused = m_Context->TradeManager->IsTradingPaused();
 1587 |         ObjectSetString(0, m_btnPauseTradesID, OBJPROP_TEXT, isPaused ? "RESUME TRADES" : "PAUSE NEW TRADES");
 1588 |         ObjectSetInteger(0, m_btnPauseTradesID, OBJPROP_BGCOLOR, isPaused ? m_AlertColor : m_SuccessColor);
 1589 |         ObjectSetInteger(0, m_btnPauseTradesID, OBJPROP_STATE, isPaused);
 1590 |     }
 1591 |     
 1592 |     // Cập nhật text của dropdown Risk Mode
 1593 |     if(ObjectFind(0, m_ddRiskModeID) != -1 && m_Context->RiskManager != NULL)
 1594 |     {
 1595 |         string currentRiskModeStr = GetAdaptiveModeString(m_Context->RiskManager->GetAdaptiveMode());
 1596 |         string currentText = ObjectGetString(0, m_ddRiskModeID, OBJPROP_TEXT);
 1597 |         string arrow = m_isRiskModeDropdownOpen ? " ▲" : " ▼";
 1598 |         ObjectSetString(0, m_ddRiskModeID, OBJPROP_TEXT, "RISK MODE: " + currentRiskModeStr + arrow);
 1599 |     }
 1600 | 
 1601 |     ChartRedraw();
 1602 | }
 1603 | 
 1604 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1605 | //| Tạo Background                                                   |
 1606 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1607 | void CDashboard::CreateBackground()
 1608 | {
 1609 |     string name = m_ObjPrefix + "BG";
 1610 |     ObjectCreate(0, name, OBJ_RECTANGLE_LABEL, 0, 0, 0);
 1611 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_XDISTANCE, m_DashX);
 1612 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_YDISTANCE, m_DashY);
 1613 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_XSIZE, m_Width);
 1614 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_YSIZE, m_Height);
 1615 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_BGCOLOR, m_BackgroundColor);
 1616 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_BORDER_TYPE, BORDER_FLAT);
 1617 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_BORDER_COLOR, m_ChartBorderColor);
 1618 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_BACK, true);
 1619 | }
 1620 | 
 1621 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1622 | //| Tạo Header                                                       |
 1623 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1624 | void CDashboard::CreateHeader()
 1625 | {
 1626 |     string name = m_ObjPrefix + "HEADER_TITLE";
 1627 |     int yPos = m_DashY + 10;
 1628 |     
 1629 |     ObjectCreate(0, name, OBJ_LABEL, 0, 0, 0);
 1630 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_XDISTANCE, m_DashX + 10);
 1631 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_YDISTANCE, yPos);
 1632 |     ObjectSetString(0, name, OBJPROP_TEXT, "APEX PULLBACK EA " + m_EAVersion);
 1633 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_COLOR, m_TitleColor);
 1634 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_FONTSIZE, 12);
 1635 |     ObjectSetString(0, name, OBJPROP_FONT, "Arial Bold");
 1636 | 
 1637 |     yPos += 20;
 1638 |     name = m_ObjPrefix + "HEADER_SYMBOL";
 1639 |     ObjectCreate(0, name, OBJ_LABEL, 0, 0, 0);
 1640 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_XDISTANCE, m_DashX + 10);
 1641 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_YDISTANCE, yPos);
 1642 |     ObjectSetString(0, name, OBJPROP_TEXT, "Symbol: " + m_Symbol);
 1643 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_COLOR, m_TextColor);
 1644 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_FONTSIZE, 9);
 1645 | 
 1646 |     // Thêm đường kẻ ngang
 1647 |     yPos += 15;
 1648 |     name = m_ObjPrefix + "HEADER_SEPARATOR";
 1649 |     ObjectCreate(0, name, OBJ_RECTANGLE_LABEL, 0, 0, 0);
 1650 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_XDISTANCE, m_DashX + 5);
 1651 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_YDISTANCE, yPos);
 1652 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_XSIZE, m_Width - 10);
 1653 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_YSIZE, 1);
 1654 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_BGCOLOR, m_ChartBorderColor);
 1655 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_BORDER_TYPE, BORDER_NONE);
 1656 | }
 1657 | 
 1658 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1659 | //| Tạo Market Panel                                                 |
 1660 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1661 | void CDashboard::CreateMarketPanel()
 1662 | {
 1663 |     if (!m_Context->MarketProfile) return;
 1664 | 
 1665 |     int yPos = m_DashY + 50; // Vị trí bắt đầu của panel này
 1666 |     int xPos = m_DashX + 10;
 1667 |     int lineHeight = 15;
 1668 | 
 1669 |     string name = m_ObjPrefix + "MARKET_TITLE";
 1670 |     ObjectCreate(0, name, OBJ_LABEL, 0, 0, 0);
 1671 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_XDISTANCE, xPos);
 1672 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_YDISTANCE, yPos);
 1673 |     ObjectSetString(0, name, OBJPROP_TEXT, "MARKET PROFILE");

 1814 | {

 1824 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_YDISTANCE, yPos);
 1825 |     ObjectSetString(0, name, OBJPROP_TEXT, "RISK MANAGEMENT");

 1827 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_FONTSIZE, 10);
 1828 |     ObjectSetString(0, name, OBJPROP_FONT, "Arial Bold");
 1829 | 
 1830 |     yPos += lineHeight + 5;
 1831 | 
 1832 |     // Current Risk Mode
 1833 |     name = m_ObjPrefix + "RISK_MODE_LABEL";
 1834 |     ObjectCreate(0, name, OBJ_LABEL, 0, 0, 0);

 1836 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_YDISTANCE, yPos);
 1837 |     ObjectSetString(0, name, OBJPROP_TEXT, "Risk Mode:");

 1840 |

 1920 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_COLOR, (currentDD >= m_Context->RiskManager->GetDailyDrawdownLimit() * 0.8) ? m_AlertColor : m_ValueColor ); // Highlight if near limit
 1921 |     ObjectSetInteger(0, name, OBJPROP_FONTSIZE, 9);
 1922 |     yPos += lineHeight;
 1923 | }

 1925 | // Các hàm Get...Color/String đã có ở đầu file
 1926 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1927 | //| Lấy màu cho Trend                                                 |
 1928 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1929 | color CDashboard::GetTrendColor(ENUM_MARKET_TREND trend)
 1930 | {
 1931 |     switch(trend)
 1932 |     {
 1933 |         case TREND_UP: return (color)0x00B050; // Green
 1934 |         case TREND_DOWN: return (color)0xFF0000; // Red
 1935 |         case TREND_SIDEWAYS: return (color)0xFFC000; // Orange
 1936 |         default: return m_TextColor;
 1937 |     }
 1938 | }
 1939 | 
 1940 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1941 | //| Lấy màu cho Regime                                                |
 1942 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1943 | color CDashboard::GetRegimeColor(ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime)
 1944 | {
 1945 |     switch(regime)
 1946 |     {
 1947 |         case REGIME_TRENDING_UP: return (color)0x00B050;
 1948 |         case REGIME_TRENDING_DOWN: return (color)0xFF0000;
 1949 |         case REGIME_RANGING: return (color)0xFFC000;
 1950 |         case REGIME_VOLATILE_EXPANSION: return (color)0x7030A0; // Purple
 1951 |         case REGIME_CONSOLIDATION: return (color)0x0070C0; // Blue
 1952 |         default: return m_TextColor;
 1953 |     }
 1954 | }
 1955 | 
 1956 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1957 | //| Lấy chuỗi cho Trend                                               |
 1958 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1959 | string CDashboard::GetTrendString(ENUM_MARKET_TREND trend)
 1960 | {
 1961 |     return EnumToString(trend);
 1962 | }

 1980 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1981 | //| Xóa đối tượng theo prefix                                        |
 1982 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1983 | void CDashboard::DeleteObjectsByPrefix(string prefix)
 1984 | {
 1985 |     for(int i = ObjectsTotal(0) - 1; i >= 0; i--)
 1986 |     {
 1987 |         string objName = ObjectName(0, i);
 1988 |         if(StringFind(objName, prefix, 0) == 0)
 1989 |         {
 1990 |             ObjectDelete(0, objName);
 1991 |         }
 1992 |     }
 1993 | }

   41 |     LOG_NONE = 0,       // Không ghi log

   43 |     LOG_WARNING = 2,    // Ghi lỗi và cảnh báo
   44 |     LOG_INFO = 3,       // Ghi lỗi, cảnh báo và thông tin hoạt động (mặc định)
   45 |     LOG_DEBUG = 4,      // Ghi tất cả, bao gồm thông tin gỡ lỗi chi tiết

   51 | enum ENUM_EA_STATE {
   52 |     STATE_INIT,         // Đang khởi tạo

   54 |     STATE_PAUSED,       // Tạm dừng (do volatility, DD, tin tức...)
   55 |     STATE_REDUCED_RISK, // Đang chạy với risk thấp hơn (sau DD)
   56 |     STATE_STOPPED       // EA đã dừng hoạt động
   57 | };

   61 | //===== LOẠI SWING POINT =====
   62 | /// @brief Định nghĩa các loại swing point
   63 | enum ENUM_SWING_POINT_TYPE {
   64 |     SWING_UNKNOWN = 0,            // Chưa xác định
   65 |     SWING_HIGH = 1,               // Swing High
   66 |     SWING_LOW = 2                // Swing Low
   67 | };
   68 | 
   69 |

   79 |     LOG_OUTPUT_FILE = 1,      // Chỉ xuất ra file
   80 |     LOG_OUTPUT_CONSOLE = 2,   // Chỉ xuất ra console (Experts tab)

   82 |     LOG_OUTPUT_ALERT = 4      // Hiển thị qua Alert()
   83 | };

   97 | //===== CHẾ ĐỘ & XU HƯỚNG THỊ TRƯỜNG (HỢP NHẤT) =====
   98 | /// @brief Định nghĩa các chế độ và xu hướng thị trường chi tiết, hợp nhất từ ENUM_MARKET_TREND và ENUM_MARKET_REGIME
   99 | enum ENUM_MARKET_REGIME {
  100 |     REGIME_UNKNOWN = 0,           // Chế độ chưa xác định
  101 |     
  102 |     // Xu hướng tăng
  103 |     REGIME_BULL_TREND_STRONG,     // Xu hướng tăng mạnh
  104 |     REGIME_BULL_TREND_NORMAL,     // Xu hướng tăng bình thường
  105 |     REGIME_BULL_PULLBACK,         // Pullback trong xu hướng tăng (cơ hội BUY)
  106 |     
  107 |     // Xu hướng giảm
  108 |     REGIME_BEAR_TREND_STRONG,     // Xu hướng giảm mạnh
  109 |     REGIME_BEAR_TREND_NORMAL,     // Xu hướng giảm bình thường
  110 |     REGIME_BEAR_PULLBACK,         // Pullback trong xu hướng giảm (cơ hội SELL)
  111 |     
  112 |     // Đi ngang (Ranging)
  113 |     REGIME_RANGING_STABLE,        // Sideway ổn định, biên độ hẹp
  114 |     REGIME_RANGING_VOLATILE,      // Sideway biến động, biên độ rộng
  115 |     
  116 |     // Biến động cao (Không rõ xu hướng)
  117 |     REGIME_VOLATILE_EXPANSION,    // Biến động mở rộng (phá vỡ tiềm năng)
  118 |     REGIME_VOLATILE_CONTRACTION,  // Biến động thu hẹp (tích lũy)
  119 |     
  120 |     // Chuyển tiếp
  121 |     REGIME_TRANSITIONING          // Chế độ chuyển tiếp giữa các trạng thái
  122 | };
  123 |

  281 |     POS_STATE_PARTIAL_CLOSED,         // Đã đóng một phần
  282 |     POS_STATE_TRAILING_ACTIVE,        // Đang trong quá trình trailing stop
  283 |     POS_STATE_RISK_REDUCED,           // Đã giảm rủi ro (ví dụ: sau khi đạt TP1)
  284 |     POS_STATE_PENDING_CLOSE,          // Đang chờ điều kiện để đóng
  285 |     POS_STATE_HEDGED                  // Vị thế đang được bảo hiểm (nếu có)
  286 | };

  431 | // ENUM_TRADING_SESSION đã được hợp nhất vào ENUM_SESSION 
  432 | // Chúng ta chỉ sử dụng ENUM_SESSION để tránh xung đột
  433 | 
  434 | //===== PERFORMANCE STATUS =====
  435 | /// @brief Trạng thái hiệu suất
  436 | enum ENUM_PERFORMANCE_STATUS {
  437 |     PERFORMANCE_EXCELLENT, // Hiệu suất xuất sắc (profit factor > 2.0)
  438 |     PERFORMANCE_GOOD,      // Hiệu suất tốt (profit factor 1.5-2.0)
  439 |     PERFORMANCE_AVERAGE,   // Hiệu suất trung bình (profit factor 1.2-1.5)
  440 |     PERFORMANCE_POOR,      // Hiệu suất kém (profit factor 1.0-1.2)
  441 |     PERFORMANCE_CRITICAL   // Hiệu suất nghiêm trọng (profit factor < 1.0)
  442 | };
  443 | 
  444 | //===== MẪU HÌNH PATTERN DETECTOR =====

  446 | enum ENUM_PATTERN_TYPE {
  447 |     PATTERN_NONE = 0,              // Không có mẫu hình
  448 |     SCENARIO_FIBONACCI_PULLBACK,   // Pullback Fibonacci
  449 |     SCENARIO_BULLISH_PULLBACK,     // Pullback tăng
  450 |     SCENARIO_BEARISH_PULLBACK,     // Pullback giảm
  451 |     SCENARIO_STRONG_PULLBACK,      // Pullback mạnh
  452 |     SCENARIO_MOMENTUM_SHIFT,       // Chuyển động lượng
  453 |     SCENARIO_HARMONIC_PATTERN,     // Mẫu hình harmonic (Gartley, Butterfly, Crab)
  454 |     PATTERN_MEAN_REVERSION,        // Mẫu hình Mean Reversion cho thị trường đi ngang
  455 |     SCENARIO_CUSTOM                // Mẫu hình tùy chỉnh

📊 Thống kê: 325 dòng, 10815 ký tự, encoding: utf-8

    1 | #ifndef APEX_ERRORHANDLER_MQH_
    2 | #define APEX_ERRORHANDLER_MQH_
    3 | 
    4 | #include "CommonStructs.mqh"
    5 | 
    6 | namespace ApexPullback {
    7 | 
    8 | // Cấu trúc để lưu trữ thông tin lỗi
    9 | struct SErrorInfo {
   10 |     int         error_code;
   11 |     string      function_name;
   12 |     string      message;
   13 |     datetime    timestamp;
   14 |     ENUM_ERROR_TYPE error_type;
   15 | 
   16 |     void Clear() {
   17 |         error_code = 0;
   18 |         function_name = "";
   19 |         message = "";
   20 |         timestamp = 0;
   21 |         error_type = ERROR_TYPE_NONE;
   22 |     }
   23 | };
   24 | 
   25 | class CErrorHandler 
   26 | {
   27 | private:
   28 |     // --- State ---
   29 |     bool       m_initialized;      // Initialization flag
   30 | private:
   31 |     EAContext* m_pContext;      // Pointer to the global context
   32 |     
   33 |     // Circular buffer for errors when logger is unavailable
   34 |     static const int MAX_ERROR_BUFFER = 50;
   35 |     SErrorInfo   m_errorBuffer[MAX_ERROR_BUFFER];
   36 |     int          m_bufferIndex;     // Next write position
   37 |     int          m_errorsInBuff;    // Current number of errors in buffer
   38 | 
   39 |     // Phân loại lỗi
   40 |     ENUM_ERROR_TYPE ClassifyError(const int error_code) const;
   41 |     
   42 |     // Xử lý bộ đệm lỗi
   43 |     void BufferError(const SErrorInfo& error);
   44 |     void ProcessErrorBuffer();
   45 | 
   46 | public:
   47 |     CErrorHandler(void) : m_initialized(false), m_pContext(NULL), m_bufferIndex(0), m_errorsInBuff(0) {}
   48 |     ~CErrorHandler(void) { Deinitialize(); }
   49 | 
   50 |     bool Initialize(EAContext* pContext);
   51 |     void Deinitialize(void);
   52 |     bool IsInitialized(void) const { return m_initialized; }
   53 | 
   54 |     // Xử lý lỗi với phân loại tự động
   55 |     bool HandleError(const int error_code, const string& function_name, const string& message, bool trip_circuit_breaker = false);
   56 |     
   57 |     // Lấy thông tin lỗi cuối cùng
   58 |     bool GetLastError(SErrorInfo& error) const;
   59 |     
   60 |     // Xóa bộ đệm lỗi
   61 |     void ClearErrorBuffer();
   62 | };
   63 | 
   64 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   65 | //| Initializes the Error Handler                                    |
   66 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   67 | bool CErrorHandler::Initialize(EAContext* pContext)
   68 | {
   69 |     if (m_initialized) return true;
   70 | 
   71 |     m_pContext = pContext;
   72 |     if (m_pContext == NULL)
   73 |     {
   74 |         Print("FATAL: CErrorHandler received a NULL context during initialization.");
   75 |         return false;
   76 |     }
   77 |     
   78 |     ClearErrorBuffer();
   79 |     m_initialized = true;
   80 |     
   81 |     // Immediately process any errors that were buffered before full initialization
   82 |     ProcessErrorBuffer();
   83 |     
   84 |     return true;
   85 | }
   86 | 
   87 | // Implementation of HandleError
   88 | bool CErrorHandler::HandleError(const int error_code, const string& function_name, const string& message, bool trip_circuit_breaker = false) 
   89 | {
   90 |     // Create error info immediately
   91 |     SErrorInfo error;
   92 |     error.error_code = error_code;
   93 |     error.function_name = function_name;
   94 |     error.message = message;
   95 |     error.timestamp = TimeCurrent();
   96 |     error.error_type = ClassifyError(error_code);
   97 | 
   98 |     // Buffer the error first, regardless of initialization state.
   99 |     // This ensures no error is ever lost.
  100 |     BufferError(error);
  101 | 
  102 |     // If not fully initialized, we can't do anything else.
  103 |     if (!m_initialized || m_pContext == NULL)
  104 |     {
  105 |         PrintFormat("CRITICAL FAILURE in ErrorHandler: Handler not initialized. Error buffered. Original Error: Code[%d] in '%s'. Message: %s", error_code, function_name, message);
  106 |         return false;
  107 |     }
  108 | 
  109 |     // Now that we are initialized, try to process the buffer.
  110 |     // This will log the error we just added, and any others.
  111 |     ProcessErrorBuffer(); 
  112 | 
  113 |     // The rest of the logic depends on a valid context
  114 |     string full_message = StringFormat("Code[%d] Type[%s]: %s", 
  115 |         error_code, 
  116 |         EnumToString(error.error_type), 
  117 |         message);
  118 | 
  119 |     bool logged = true; // Assume success as it's now buffered or logged
  120 | 
  121 |     // Xử lý theo loại lỗi
  122 |     switch(error.error_type)
  123 |     {
  124 |         case ERROR_TYPE_BROKER:
  125 |             // Notify BrokerHealthMonitor if available
  126 |             if(m_pContext->pBrokerHealthMonitor != NULL)
  127 |                 m_pContext->pBrokerHealthMonitor->OnBrokerError(error_code);
  128 |             break;
  129 |             
  130 |         case ERROR_TYPE_SYSTEM:
  131 |             // Lỗi hệ thống nghiêm trọng luôn kích hoạt circuit breaker
  132 |             trip_circuit_breaker = true;
  133 |             break;
  134 |             
  135 |         case ERROR_TYPE_NETWORK:
  136 |             // Có thể thêm logic retry ở đây
  137 |             break;
  138 |     }
  139 | 
  140 |     // Kích hoạt circuit breaker nếu cần
  141 |     if (trip_circuit_breaker && m_pContext->pCircuitBreaker != NULL) 
  142 |     {
  143 |         m_pContext->pCircuitBreaker->Trip(full_message);
  144 |     }
  145 | 
  146 |     return logged;
  147 | }
  148 | 
  149 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  150 | //| Classifies an error based on its MQL5 code.                      |
  151 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  152 | ENUM_ERROR_TYPE CErrorHandler::ClassifyError(const int error_code) const
  153 | {
  154 |     // Trade Server Return Codes (https://www.mql5.com/en/docs/constants/tradingconstants/enum_trade_return_codes)
  155 |     if (error_code >= 10004 && error_code <= 10045)
  156 |     {
  157 |         switch(error_code)
  158 |         {
  159 |             // Broker/Connection Issues
  160 |             case TRADE_RETCODE_REQUOTE:
  161 |             case TRADE_RETCODE_PRICE_OFF:
  162 |             case TRADE_RETCODE_PRICE_CHANGED:
  163 |             case TRADE_RETCODE_BROKER_BUSY:
  164 |             case TRADE_RETCODE_SERVER_BUSY: // Same as TRADE_RETCODE_BROKER_BUSY
  165 |             case TRADE_RETCODE_CONNECTION:
  166 |             case TRADE_RETCODE_TIMEOUT:
  167 |                 return ERROR_TYPE_BROKER;
  168 | 
  169 |             // Logic/Parameter Errors (should be caught in development)
  170 |             case TRADE_RETCODE_INVALID_REQUEST:
  171 |             case TRADE_RETCODE_INVALID_STOPS:
  172 |             case TRADE_RETCODE_INVALID_TRADE_VOLUME:
  173 |             case TRADE_RETCODE_INVALID_PRICE:
  174 |             case TRADE_RETCODE_INVALID_EXPIRATION:
  175 |             case TRADE_RETCODE_INVALID_FILL:
  176 |             case TRADE_RETCODE_UNSUPPORTED_FILL:
  177 |                 return ERROR_TYPE_LOGIC;
  178 | 
  179 |             // Account/State Issues
  180 |             case TRADE_RETCODE_NO_MONEY:
  181 |             case TRADE_RETCODE_DISABLED:
  182 |             case TRADE_RETCODE_ACCOUNT_DISABLED:
  183 |             case TRADE_RETCODE_TRADE_DISABLED_BY_FIFO:
  184 |                 return ERROR_TYPE_ACCOUNT;
  185 | 
  186 |             // Other trade-related errors
  187 |             default:
  188 |                 return ERROR_TYPE_TRADE;
  189 |         }
  190 |     }
  191 | 
  192 |     // General MQL5 Errors (https://www.mql5.com/en/docs/constants/errorswarnings/errorcodes)
  193 |     switch(error_code)
  194 |     {
  195 |         // System Errors
  196 |         case ERR_INTERNAL_ERROR:
  197 |         case ERR_NOT_ENOUGH_MEMORY:
  198 |         case ERR_TOO_MANY_OBJECTS:
  199 |         case ERR_TOO_MANY_MODULES:
  200 |             return ERROR_TYPE_SYSTEM;
  201 | 
  202 |         // Network Errors
  203 |         case ERR_NO_CONNECTION:
  204 |         case ERR_NOT_CONNECTED:
  205 |         case ERR_NOTIFICATION_SEND_FAILED:
  206 |             return ERROR_TYPE_NETWORK;
  207 | 
  208 |         // Broker/Trade Context Errors
  209 |         case ERR_BROKER_BUSY:
  210 |         case ERR_TRADE_CONTEXT_BUSY:
  211 |             return ERROR_TYPE_BROKER;
  212 | 
  213 |         // Logic/Parameter Errors
  214 |         case ERR_INVALID_PARAMETER:
  215 |         case ERR_INVALID_FUNCTION_PARAMETER_VALUE:
  216 |         case ERR_INVALID_HANDLE:
  217 |         case ERR_INVALID_POINTER:
  218 |             return ERROR_TYPE_LOGIC;
  219 |     }
  220 | 
  221 |     return ERROR_TYPE_UNKNOWN;
  222 | }
  223 | 
  224 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  225 | //| Stores an error in the circular buffer.                          |
  226 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  227 | void CErrorHandler::BufferError(const SErrorInfo& error)
  228 | {
  229 |     m_errorBuffer[m_bufferIndex] = error;
  230 |     m_bufferIndex = (m_bufferIndex + 1) % MAX_ERROR_BUFFER;
  231 |     if (m_errorsInBuff < MAX_ERROR_BUFFER)
  232 |     {
  233 |         m_errorsInBuff++;
  234 |     }
  235 | }
  236 | 
  237 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  238 | //| Deinitializes the Error Handler                                  |
  239 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  240 | void CErrorHandler::Deinitialize(void)
  241 | {
  242 |     if(!m_initialized) return;
  243 |     
  244 |     // Attempt to process any remaining buffered errors before shutting down
  245 |     ProcessErrorBuffer();
  246 |     
  247 |     if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger && m_pContext->pLogger->IsInitialized())
  248 |     {
  249 |        m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("ErrorHandler deinitialized.", __FUNCTION__);
  250 |     }
  251 |     
  252 |     m_pContext = NULL;
  253 |     m_initialized = false;
  254 | }
  255 | 
  256 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  257 | //| Gets the last error from the buffer.                             |
  258 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  259 | bool CErrorHandler::GetLastError(SErrorInfo& error) const
  260 | {
  261 |     if (m_errorsInBuff > 0)
  262 |     {
  263 |         // Last error is at the position before the current buffer index
  264 |         int last_index = (m_bufferIndex - 1 + MAX_ERROR_BUFFER) % MAX_ERROR_BUFFER;
  265 |         error = m_errorBuffer[last_index];
  266 |         return true;
  267 |     }
  268 |     error.Clear();
  269 |     return false;
  270 | }
  271 | 
  272 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  273 | //| Clears the error buffer.                                         |
  274 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  275 | void CErrorHandler::ClearErrorBuffer()
  276 | {
  277 |     for(int i = 0; i < MAX_ERROR_BUFFER; i++)
  278 |     {
  279 |         m_errorBuffer[i].Clear();
  280 |     }
  281 |     m_bufferIndex = 0;
  282 |     m_errorsInBuff = 0;
  283 | }
  284 | 
  285 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  286 | //| Processes any errors currently in the buffer.                    |
  287 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  288 | void CErrorHandler::ProcessErrorBuffer()
  289 | {
  290 |     // Can't process if logger isn't ready or there's nothing to process.
  291 |     if (m_pContext == NULL || m_pContext->pLogger == NULL || !m_pContext->pLogger->IsInitialized() || m_errorsInBuff == 0)
  292 |         return;
  293 | 
  294 |     // To prevent re-entrancy issues, copy errors to a temp buffer and clear the main one.
  295 |     SErrorInfo tempBuffer[];
  296 |     ArrayResize(tempBuffer, m_errorsInBuff);
  297 |     int tempCount = m_errorsInBuff;
  298 | 
  299 |     int readIndex = (m_bufferIndex - m_errorsInBuff + MAX_ERROR_BUFFER) % MAX_ERROR_BUFFER;
  300 |     for(int i = 0; i < tempCount; i++)
  301 |     {
  302 |         tempBuffer[i] = m_errorBuffer[readIndex];
  303 |         readIndex = (readIndex + 1) % MAX_ERROR_BUFFER;
  304 |     }
  305 | 
  306 |     // Now clear the main buffer
  307 |     ClearErrorBuffer();
  308 | 
  309 |     // Process the temporary buffer
  310 |     m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Processing %d buffered error(s)...", tempCount), __FUNCTION__);
  311 | 
  312 |     for (int i = 0; i < tempCount; i++)
  313 |     {
  314 |         SErrorInfo& error = tempBuffer[i];
  315 |         string full_message = StringFormat("BUFFERED: Code[%d] Type[%s]: %s",
  316 |             error.error_code,
  317 |             EnumToString(error.error_type),
  318 |             error.message);
  319 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogError(full_message, error.function_name);
  320 |     }
  321 | }
  322 | 
  323 | } // namespace ApexPullback
  324 | 
  325 | #endif // ERRORHANDLER_MQH_
================================================================================

  277 |

  423 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  424 | //| Lớp quản lý giao tiếp Portfolio nâng cao                       |
  425 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  426 | class CFileCommunication {
  427 | private:
  428 |     CLogger* m_Logger;
  429 |     string m_CommunicationFolder;
  430 |     string m_LockFilePrefix;
  431 |     string m_MessageFilePrefix;
  432 |     string m_PortfolioPrefix;
  433 |     string m_HeartbeatPrefix;
  434 |     string m_EAIdentifier;
  435 |     bool m_IsMaster;
  436 |     int m_MaxRetries;
  437 |     int m_LockTimeoutMs;
  438 |     
  439 |     // Portfolio Management
  440 |     datetime m_LastHeartbeat;
  441 |     int m_HeartbeatInterval;
  442 |     bool m_IsPortfolioMode;
  443 |     string m_PortfolioId;
  444 |     
  445 |     // Message Queue Management
  446 |     PortfolioMessage m_MessageQueue[];
  447 |     int m_QueueSize;
  448 |     int m_MaxQueueSize;
  449 |     
  450 |     // Connection Monitoring
  451 |     string m_ConnectedEAs[];
  452 |     datetime m_LastSeenEAs[];
  453 |     int m_ConnectionTimeout;
  454 |     
  455 | public:
  456 |     CFileCommunication();
  457 |     ~CFileCommunication();
  458 |     
  459 |     // Initialization
  460 |     bool Initialize(CLogger* logger, string eaIdentifier, bool isMaster = false);
  461 |     bool InitializePortfolioMode(string portfolioId, int heartbeatInterval = 30);
  462 |     void Cleanup();
  463 |

  590 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  591 | //| Constructor                                                      |
  592 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  593 | CFileCommunication::CFileCommunication() {
  594 |     m_Logger = NULL;
  595 |     m_CommunicationFolder = "APEX_Communication";
  596 |     m_LockFilePrefix = "lock_";
  597 |     m_MessageFilePrefix = "msg_";
  598 |     m_EAIdentifier = "";
  599 |     m_IsMaster = false;
  600 |     m_MaxRetries = 3;
  601 |     m_LockTimeoutMs = 5000;
  602 | }
  603 | 
  604 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  605 | //| Destructor                                                       |
  606 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  607 | CFileCommunication::~CFileCommunication() {
  608 |     Cleanup();
  609 | }
  610 | 
  611 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  612 | //| Khởi tạo hệ thống giao tiếp                                     |
  613 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  614 | bool CFileCommunication::Initialize(CLogger* logger, string eaIdentifier, bool isMaster = false) {
  615 |     m_Logger = logger;
  616 |     m_EAIdentifier = eaIdentifier;
  617 |     m_IsMaster = isMaster;
  618 |     
  619 |     // Tạo thư mục giao tiếp nếu chưa có
  620 |     if (!FolderCreate(m_CommunicationFolder, FILE_COMMON)) {
  621 |         if (GetLastError() != ERR_FILE_CANNOT_OPEN) { // Folder might already exist
  622 |             if (m_Logger) {
  623 |                 m_Logger->LogError(StringFormat("Failed to create communication folder: %s, Error: %d", 
  624 |                     m_CommunicationFolder, GetLastError()));
  625 |             }
  626 |             return false;
  627 |         }
  628 |     }
  629 |     
  630 |     // Cleanup old messages on startup
  631 |     CleanupOldMessages(60);
  632 |     
  633 |     if (m_Logger) {
  634 |         m_Logger->LogInfo(StringFormat("FileCommunication initialized - EA: %s, Master: %s", 
  635 |             m_EAIdentifier, m_IsMaster ? "Yes" : "No"));
  636 |     }
  637 |     
  638 |     return true;
  639 | }
  640 | 
  641 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  642 | //| Dọn dẹp tài nguyên                                              |
  643 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  644 | void CFileCommunication::Cleanup() {
  645 |     // Release any locks held by this EA
  646 |     // Note: In practice, you might want to track which locks this EA holds
  647 |     if (m_Logger) {
  648 |         m_Logger->LogInfo("FileCommunication cleanup completed");
  649 |     }
  650 | }

  653 | //| Advanced Communication Methods Implementation                    |
  654 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  655 | 
  656 | // Send Trading Proposal (Slave -> Master)
  657 | bool CFileCommunication::SendTradingProposal(const TradingProposal& proposal) {
  658 |     CommunicationMessage message;
  659 |     message.MessageType = MSG_PROPOSAL;
  660 |     message.MessageID = GenerateMessageID();
  661 |     message.SenderID = proposal.SlaveEAID;
  662 |     message.RecipientID = "MASTER";
  663 |     message.Timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  664 |     message.Priority = proposal.UrgencyLevel;
  665 |     message.Proposal = proposal;
  666 |     message.RequiresAcknowledgment = true;
  667 |     message.ExpiryTime = proposal.ExpiryTime;
  668 |     
  669 |     return ProcessCommunicationMessage(message);
  670 | }
  671 | 
  672 | // Send Trading Decision (Master -> Slave)
  673 | bool CFileCommunication::SendTradingDecision(const TradingDecision& decision) {
  674 |     CommunicationMessage message;
  675 |     message.MessageType = MSG_DECISION;
  676 |     message.MessageID = GenerateMessageID();
  677 |     message.SenderID = "MASTER";
  678 |     message.RecipientID = decision.SlaveEAID;
  679 |     message.Timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  680 |     message.Priority = (decision.DecisionType == DECISION_REJECT) ? 5 : 3;
  681 |     message.Decision = decision;
  682 |     message.RequiresAcknowledgment = true;
  683 |     message.ExpiryTime = decision.ValidUntil;
  684 |     
  685 |     return ProcessCommunicationMessage(message);
  686 | }
  687 | 
  688 | // Send Status Update (Slave -> Master)
  689 | bool CFileCommunication::SendStatusUpdate(const StatusUpdate& status) {
  690 |     CommunicationMessage message;
  691 |     message.MessageType = MSG_STATUS_UPDATE;
  692 |     message.MessageID = GenerateMessageID();
  693 |     message.SenderID = status.SlaveEAID;
  694 |     message.RecipientID = "MASTER";
  695 |     message.Timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  696 |     message.Priority = status.IsRiskLimitExceeded ? 4 : 2;
  697 |     message.Status = status;
  698 |     message.RequiresAcknowledgment = false;
  699 |     message.ExpiryTime = TimeCurrent() + 300; // 5 minutes
  700 |     
  701 |     return ProcessCommunicationMessage(message);
  702 | }
  703 | 
  704 | // Process Communication Message
  705 | bool CFileCommunication::ProcessCommunicationMessage(const CommunicationMessage& message) {
  706 |     if (!ValidateMessage(message)) {
  707 |         return false;
  708 |     }
  709 |     
  710 |     // Serialize message to string format
  711 |     string messageData = "";
  712 |     messageData += "MessageType=" + IntegerToString((int)message.MessageType) + "|";
  713 |     messageData += "MessageID=" + message.MessageID + "|";
  714 |     messageData += "SenderID=" + message.SenderID + "|";
  715 |     messageData += "RecipientID=" + message.RecipientID + "|";
  716 |     messageData += "Timestamp=" + IntegerToString(message.Timestamp) + "|";
  717 |     messageData += "Priority=" + IntegerToString(message.Priority) + "|";
  718 |     
  719 |     // Add payload based on message type
  720 |     switch(message.MessageType) {
  721 |         case MSG_PROPOSAL:
  722 |             messageData += SerializeTradingProposal(message.Proposal);
  723 |             break;
  724 |         case MSG_DECISION:
  725 |             messageData += SerializeTradingDecision(message.Decision);
  726 |             break;
  727 |         case MSG_STATUS_UPDATE:
  728 |             messageData += SerializeStatusUpdate(message.Status);
  729 |             break;
  730 |         default:
  731 |             messageData += "AdditionalData=" + message.AdditionalData;
  732 |             break;
  733 |     }
  734 |     
  735 |     // Create filename based on message type and recipient
  736 |     string filename = m_CommunicationFolder + "\\" + message.RecipientID + "_" + 
  737 |                      IntegerToString((int)message.MessageType) + "_" + 
  738 |                      message.MessageID + ".msg";
  739 |     
  740 |     int handle = FileOpen(filename, FILE_WRITE | FILE_TXT | FILE_COMMON);
  741 |     if (handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  742 |         return false;
  743 |     }
  744 |     
  745 |     FileWriteString(handle, messageData);
  746 |     FileClose(handle);
  747 |     
  748 |     return true;
  749 | }
  750 | 
  751 | // Generate unique message ID
  752 | string CFileCommunication::GenerateMessageID() {
  753 |     static int messageCounter = 0;
  754 |     messageCounter++;
  755 |     return IntegerToString(TimeCurrent()) + "_" + IntegerToString(messageCounter);
  756 | }
  757 | 
  758 | // Validate message
  759 | bool CFileCommunication::ValidateMessage(const CommunicationMessage& message) {
  760 |     if (message.MessageType == MSG_UNKNOWN) return false;
  761 |     if (message.MessageID == "") return false;
  762 |     if (message.SenderID == "") return false;
  763 |     if (message.Timestamp <= 0) return false;
  764 |     
  765 |     return true;
  766 | }
  767 | 
  768 | // Serialize Trading Proposal
  769 | string CFileCommunication::SerializeTradingProposal(const TradingProposal& proposal) {
  770 |     string data = "";
  771 |     data += "SlaveEAID=" + proposal.SlaveEAID + "|";
  772 |     data += "Symbol=" + proposal.Symbol + "|";
  773 |     data += "OrderType=" + IntegerToString((int)proposal.OrderType) + "|";
  774 |     data += "EntryPrice=" + DoubleToString(proposal.EntryPrice, 5) + "|";
  775 |     data += "StopLoss=" + DoubleToString(proposal.StopLoss, 5) + "|";
  776 |     data += "TakeProfit=" + DoubleToString(proposal.TakeProfit, 5) + "|";
  777 |     data += "ProposedLotSize=" + DoubleToString(proposal.ProposedLotSize, 2) + "|";
  778 |     data += "SignalConfidenceScore=" + DoubleToString(proposal.SignalConfidenceScore, 3) + "|";
  779 |     data += "RiskRewardRatio=" + DoubleToString(proposal.RiskRewardRatio, 2) + "|";
  780 |     data += "MarketRegime=" + IntegerToString((int)proposal.MarketRegime) + "|";
  781 |     data += "ProposedStrategy=" + IntegerToString((int)proposal.ProposedStrategy) + "|";
  782 |     data += "SignalReason=" + proposal.SignalReason + "|";
  783 |     data += "UrgencyLevel=" + IntegerToString(proposal.UrgencyLevel);
  784 |     
  785 |     return data;
  786 | }
  787 | 
  788 | // Serialize Trading Decision
  789 | string CFileCommunication::SerializeTradingDecision(const TradingDecision& decision) {
  790 |     string data = "";
  791 |     data += "ProposalID=" + decision.ProposalID + "|";
  792 |     data += "SlaveEAID=" + decision.SlaveEAID + "|";
  793 |     data += "DecisionType=" + IntegerToString((int)decision.DecisionType) + "|";
  794 |     data += "FinalLotSize=" + DoubleToString(decision.FinalLotSize, 2) + "|";
  795 |     data += "AllocatedRiskPercent=" + DoubleToString(decision.AllocatedRiskPercent, 2) + "|";
  796 |     data += "RiskAdjustmentFactor=" + DoubleToString(decision.RiskAdjustmentFactor, 2) + "|";
  797 |     
  798 |     if (decision.DecisionType == DECISION_REJECT) {
  799 |         data += "RejectionReason=" + IntegerToString((int)decision.RejectionReason) + "|";
  800 |         data += "RejectionDetails=" + decision.RejectionDetails + "|";
  801 |     }
  802 |     
  803 |     data += "SpecialInstructions=" + decision.SpecialInstructions;
  804 |     
  805 |     return data;
  806 | }
  807 | 
  808 | // Serialize Status Update
  809 | string CFileCommunication::SerializeStatusUpdate(const StatusUpdate& status) {
  810 |     string data = "";
  811 |     data += "SlaveEAID=" + status.SlaveEAID + "|";
  812 |     data += "Symbol=" + status.Symbol + "|";
  813 |     data += "CurrentEquity=" + DoubleToString(status.CurrentEquity, 2) + "|";
  814 |     data += "CurrentDrawdown=" + DoubleToString(status.CurrentDrawdown, 2) + "|";
  815 |     data += "DailyPnL=" + DoubleToString(status.DailyPnL, 2) + "|";
  816 |     data += "OpenPositions=" + IntegerToString(status.OpenPositions) + "|";
  817 |     data += "TotalExposure=" + DoubleToString(status.TotalExposure, 2) + "|";
  818 |     data += "CurrentRiskPercent=" + DoubleToString(status.CurrentRiskPercent, 2) + "|";
  819 |     data += "IsRiskLimitExceeded=" + (status.IsRiskLimitExceeded ? "true" : "false") + "|";
  820 |     data += "IsEmergencyStopActive=" + (status.IsEmergencyStopActive ? "true" : "false") + "|";
  821 |     data += "IsEAHealthy=" + (status.IsEAHealthy ? "true" : "false") + "|";
  822 |     data += "LastError=" + status.LastError;
  823 |     
  824 |     return data;
  825 |  }
  826 |  
  827 |  // Send Emergency Stop
  828 |  bool CFileCommunication::SendEmergencyStop(const string& targetSlaveId, const string& reason) {
  829 |      CommunicationMessage message;
  830 |      message.MessageType = MSG_EMERGENCY_STOP;
  831 |      message.MessageID = GenerateMessageID();
  832 |      message.SenderID = "MASTER";
  833 |      message.RecipientID = targetSlaveId;
  834 |      message.Timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  835 |      message.Priority = 5; // Highest priority
  836 |      message.AdditionalData = "Reason=" + reason;
  837 |      message.RequiresAcknowledgment = true;
  838 |      message.ExpiryTime = TimeCurrent() + 60; // 1 minute
  839 |      
  840 |      return ProcessCommunicationMessage(message);
  841 |  }
  842 |  
  843 |  // Send Heartbeat
  844 |  bool CFileCommunication::SendHeartbeat(const string& targetId) {
  845 |      CommunicationMessage message;
  846 |      message.MessageType = MSG_HEARTBEAT;
  847 |      message.MessageID = GenerateMessageID();
  848 |      message.SenderID = m_EAInstanceId;
  849 |      message.RecipientID = targetId;
  850 |      message.Timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  851 |      message.Priority = 1; // Low priority
  852 |      message.RequiresAcknowledgment = false;
  853 |      message.ExpiryTime = TimeCurrent() + 30; // 30 seconds
  854 |      
  855 |      return ProcessCommunicationMessage(message);
  856 |  }
  857 |  
  858 |  // Receive Communication Messages
  859 |  bool CFileCommunication::ReceiveCommunicationMessages(CommunicationMessage& messages[]) {
  860 |      ArrayResize(messages, 0);
  861 |      
  862 |      string searchPattern = m_CommunicationFolder + "\\" + m_EAInstanceId + "_*.msg";
  863 |      string filename;
  864 |      long searchHandle = FileFindFirst(searchPattern, filename);
  865 |      
  866 |      if (searchHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  867 |          return false;
  868 |      }
  869 |      
  870 |      do {
  871 |          string fullPath = m_CommunicationFolder + "\\" + filename;
  872 |          int handle = FileOpen(fullPath, FILE_READ | FILE_TXT | FILE_COMMON);
  873 |          
  874 |          if (handle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  875 |              string messageData = FileReadString(handle);
  876 |              FileClose(handle);
  877 |              
  878 |              CommunicationMessage message;
  879 |              if (ParseCommunicationMessage(messageData, message)) {
  880 |                  int size = ArraySize(messages);
  881 |                  ArrayResize(messages, size + 1);
  882 |                  messages[size] = message;
  883 |              }
  884 |              
  885 |              // Delete processed message file
  886 |              FileDelete(fullPath, FILE_COMMON);
  887 |          }
  888 |      } while (FileFindNext(searchHandle, filename));
  889 |      
  890 |      FileFindClose(searchHandle);
  891 |      
  892 |      return ArraySize(messages) > 0;
  893 |  }
  894 |  
  895 |  // Parse Communication Message
  896 |  bool CFileCommunication::ParseCommunicationMessage(const string& messageData, CommunicationMessage& message) {
  897 |      string parts[];
  898 |      int count = StringSplit(messageData, '|', parts);
  899 |      
  900 |      if (count < 6) return false;
  901 |      
  902 |      // Parse header
  903 |      for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  904 |          string keyValue[];
  905 |          if (StringSplit(parts[i], '=', keyValue) == 2) {
  906 |              string key = keyValue[0];
  907 |              string value = keyValue[1];
  908 |              
  909 |              if (key == "MessageType") {
  910 |                  message.MessageType = (ENUM_MESSAGE_TYPE)StringToInteger(value);
  911 |              } else if (key == "MessageID") {
  912 |                  message.MessageID = value;
  913 |              } else if (key == "SenderID") {
  914 |                  message.SenderID = value;
  915 |              } else if (key == "RecipientID") {
  916 |                  message.RecipientID = value;
  917 |              } else if (key == "Timestamp") {
  918 |                  message.Timestamp = (datetime)StringToInteger(value);
  919 |              } else if (key == "Priority") {
  920 |                  message.Priority = StringToInteger(value);
  921 |              }
  922 |          }
  923 |      }
  924 |      
  925 |      return true;
  926 |  }
  927 |  
  928 |  //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  929 |  //| Legacy Message Operations (Backward Compatibility)              |
  930 |  //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  931 | 
  932 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  933 | //| Gửi message                                                      |
  934 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  935 | bool CFileCommunication::SendMessage(const MasterSlaveMessage& message) {
  936 |     string filename = GenerateMessageFilename();
  937 |     string lockFilename = GenerateLockFilename(filename);
  938 |     
  939 |     // Tạo lock file
  940 |     if (!CreateLockFile(lockFilename)) {
  941 |         if (m_Logger) {
  942 |             m_Logger->LogWarning(StringFormat("Failed to create lock for message file: %s", filename));
  943 |         }
  944 |         return false;
  945 |     }
  946 |     
  947 |     bool success = false;
  948 |     
  949 |     // Ghi message vào file
  950 |     if (WriteMessageToFile(message, filename)) {
  951 |         success = true;
  952 |         LogMessage(message, "SENT");
  953 |     } else {
  954 |         if (m_Logger) {
  955 |             m_Logger->LogError(StringFormat("Failed to write message to file: %s", filename));
  956 |         }
  957 |     }
  958 |     
  959 |     // Release lock
  960 |     ReleaseLockFile(lockFilename);
  961 |     
  962 |     return success;
  963 | }
  964 | 
  965 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  966 | //| Nhận messages                                                    |
  967 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  968 | bool CFileCommunication::ReceiveMessages(MasterSlaveMessage& messages[]) {
  969 |     ArrayResize(messages, 0);
  970 |     
  971 |     string searchPattern = m_CommunicationFolder + "\\" + m_MessageFilePrefix + "*.txt";
  972 |     string filename;
  973 |     long searchHandle = FileFindFirst(searchPattern, filename, FILE_COMMON);
  974 |     
  975 |     if (searchHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  976 |         return true; // No messages found, not an error
  977 |     }
  978 |     
  979 |     do {
  980 |         string fullPath = m_CommunicationFolder + "\\" + filename;
  981 |         string lockFilename = GenerateLockFilename(fullPath);
  982 |         
  983 |         // Kiểm tra xem file có bị lock không
  984 |         if (!IsFileLocked(lockFilename)) {
  985 |             // Tạo lock để đọc
  986 |             if (CreateLockFile(lockFilename)) {
  987 |                 MasterSlaveMessage msg;
  988 |                 if (ReadMessageFromFile(msg, fullPath)) {
  989 |                     // Kiểm tra xem message có dành cho EA này không
  990 |                     if (msg.receiverEA == "ALL" || msg.receiverEA == m_EAIdentifier) {
  991 |                         // Thêm vào array
  992 |                         int newSize = ArraySize(messages) + 1;
  993 |                         ArrayResize(messages, newSize);
  994 |                         messages[newSize - 1] = msg;
  995 |                         
  996 |                         LogMessage(msg, "RECEIVED");
  997 |                     }
  998 |                     
  999 |                     // Xóa file message sau khi đọc (hoặc đánh dấu đã xử lý)
 1000 |                     FileDelete(fullPath, FILE_COMMON);
 1001 |                 }
 1002 |                 
 1003 |                 ReleaseLockFile(lockFilename);
 1004 |             }
 1005 |         }
 1006 |     } while (FileFindNext(searchHandle, filename));
 1007 |     
 1008 |     FileFindClose(searchHandle);
 1009 |     
 1010 |     return true;
 1011 | }
 1012 | 
 1013 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1014 | //| Gửi đề xuất giao dịch                                           |
 1015 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1016 | bool CFileCommunication::SendProposal(string symbol, int orderType, double lotSize, double entryPrice,
 1017 |                                       double stopLoss, double takeProfit, string reason, int priority = 5) {
 1018 |     MasterSlaveMessage msg;
 1019 |     msg.senderEA = m_EAIdentifier;
 1020 |     msg.receiverEA = "MASTER"; // Gửi đến Master EA
 1021 |     msg.messageType = "PROPOSAL";
 1022 |     msg.symbol = symbol;
 1023 |     msg.orderType = orderType;
 1024 |     msg.lotSize = lotSize;
 1025 |     msg.entryPrice = entryPrice;
 1026 |     msg.stopLoss = stopLoss;
 1027 |     msg.takeProfit = takeProfit;
 1028 |     msg.reason = reason;
 1029 |     msg.priority = priority;
 1030 |     
 1031 |     return SendMessage(msg);
 1032 | }
 1033 |

 1035 | //| Gửi phê duyệt                                                   |
 1036 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1037 | bool CFileCommunication::SendApproval(string originalSender, string symbol, string reason = "") {
 1038 |     MasterSlaveMessage msg;
 1039 |     msg.senderEA = m_EAIdentifier;
 1040 |     msg.receiverEA = originalSender;
 1041 |     msg.messageType = "APPROVAL";
 1042 |     msg.symbol = symbol;
 1043 |     msg.reason = reason;
 1044 |     
 1045 |     return SendMessage(msg);
 1046 | }

 1062 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1063 | //| Gửi trạng thái                                                  |
 1064 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1065 | bool CFileCommunication::SendStatus(string status, string details = "") {
 1066 |     MasterSlaveMessage msg;
 1067 |     msg.senderEA = m_EAIdentifier;
 1068 |     msg.receiverEA = "ALL";
 1069 |     msg.messageType = "STATUS";
 1070 |     msg.reason = status + (details != "" ? " - " + details : "");
 1071 |     
 1072 |     return SendMessage(msg);
 1073 | }
 1074 | 
 1075 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1076 | //| Tạo lock file                                                   |
 1077 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1078 | bool CFileCommunication::CreateLockFile(string filename) {
 1079 |     for (int retry = 0; retry < m_MaxRetries; retry++) {
 1080 |         int handle = FileOpen(filename, FILE_WRITE | FILE_TXT | FILE_COMMON);
 1081 |         if (handle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
 1082 |             FileWriteString(handle, StringFormat("Locked by %s at %s", m_EAIdentifier, TimeToString(TimeCurrent())));
 1083 |             FileClose(handle);
 1084 |             return true;
 1085 |         }
 1086 |         
 1087 |         Sleep(100); // Wait 100ms before retry
 1088 |     }
 1089 |     
 1090 |     return false;
 1091 | }
 1092 | 
 1093 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1094 | //| Giải phóng lock file                                            |
 1095 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1096 | bool CFileCommunication::ReleaseLockFile(string filename) {
 1097 |     return FileDelete(filename, FILE_COMMON);
 1098 | }
 1099 | 
 1100 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1101 | //| Chờ lock được giải phóng                                        |
 1102 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1103 | bool CFileCommunication::WaitForLock(string filename, int timeoutMs = 5000) {
 1104 |     datetime startTime = GetTickCount();
 1105 |     
 1106 |     while (IsFileLocked(filename)) {
 1107 |         if (GetTickCount() - startTime > timeoutMs) {
 1108 |             return false; // Timeout
 1109 |         }
 1110 |         Sleep(50);
 1111 |     }
 1112 |     
 1113 |     return true;
 1114 | }
 1115 | 
 1116 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1117 | //| Kiểm tra file có bị lock không                                  |
 1118 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1119 | bool CFileCommunication::IsFileLocked(string filename) {
 1120 |     return FileIsExist(filename, FILE_COMMON);
 1121 | }
 1122 | 
 1123 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1124 | //| Dọn dẹp messages cũ                                             |
 1125 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1126 | void CFileCommunication::CleanupOldMessages(int maxAgeMinutes = 60) {
 1127 |     string searchPattern = m_CommunicationFolder + "\\" + m_MessageFilePrefix + "*.txt";
 1128 |     string filename;
 1129 |     long searchHandle = FileFindFirst(searchPattern, filename, FILE_COMMON);
 1130 |     
 1131 |     if (searchHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
 1132 |         return;
 1133 |     }
 1134 |     
 1135 |     datetime cutoffTime = TimeCurrent() - maxAgeMinutes * 60;
 1136 |     int deletedCount = 0;
 1137 |     
 1138 |     do {
 1139 |         string fullPath = m_CommunicationFolder + "\\" + filename;
 1140 |         
 1141 |         // Lấy thời gian tạo file
 1142 |         datetime fileTime;
 1143 |         if (FileGetInteger(fullPath, FILE_CREATE_DATE, fileTime, FILE_COMMON)) {
 1144 |             if (fileTime < cutoffTime) {
 1145 |                 if (FileDelete(fullPath, FILE_COMMON)) {
 1146 |                     deletedCount++;
 1147 |                 }
 1148 |             }
 1149 |         }
 1150 |     } while (FileFindNext(searchHandle, filename));
 1151 |     
 1152 |     FileFindClose(searchHandle);
 1153 |     
 1154 |     if (deletedCount > 0 && m_Logger) {
 1155 |         m_Logger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Cleaned up %d old message files", deletedCount));
 1156 |     }
 1157 | }
 1158 | 
 1159 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1160 | //| Đếm số message đang chờ                                         |
 1161 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1162 | int CFileCommunication::GetPendingMessageCount() {
 1163 |     string searchPattern = m_CommunicationFolder + "\\" + m_MessageFilePrefix + "*.txt";
 1164 |     string filename;
 1165 |     long searchHandle = FileFindFirst(searchPattern, filename, FILE_COMMON);
 1166 |     
 1167 |     if (searchHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
 1168 |         return 0;
 1169 |     }
 1170 |     
 1171 |     int count = 0;
 1172 |     do {
 1173 |         count++;
 1174 |     } while (FileFindNext(searchHandle, filename));
 1175 |     
 1176 |     FileFindClose(searchHandle);
 1177 |     return count;
 1178 | }
 1179 | 
 1180 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1181 | //| Kiểm tra có message đang chờ không                              |
 1182 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1183 | bool CFileCommunication::HasPendingMessages() {
 1184 |     return GetPendingMessageCount() > 0;
 1185 | }

 1192 |         m_CommunicationFolder, 
 1193 |         m_MessageFilePrefix, 
 1194 |         m_EAIdentifier,

 1202 | string CFileCommunication::GenerateLockFilename(string baseFilename) {
 1203 |     return baseFilename + ".lock";
 1204 | }
 1205 | 
 1206 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1207 | //| Ghi message vào file                                            |
 1208 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1209 | bool CFileCommunication::WriteMessageToFile(const MasterSlaveMessage& message, string filename) {
 1210 |     string serialized;
 1211 |     if (!SerializeMessage(message, serialized)) {
 1212 |         return false;
 1213 |     }
 1214 |     
 1215 |     int handle = FileOpen(filename, FILE_WRITE | FILE_TXT | FILE_COMMON);
 1216 |     if (handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
 1217 |         return false;
 1218 |     }
 1219 |     
 1220 |     FileWriteString(handle, serialized);
 1221 |     FileClose(handle);
 1222 |     
 1223 |     return true;
 1224 | }
 1225 | 
 1226 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1227 | //| Đọc message từ file                                             |
 1228 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1229 | bool CFileCommunication::ReadMessageFromFile(MasterSlaveMessage& message, string filename) {
 1230 |     int handle = FileOpen(filename, FILE_READ | FILE_TXT | FILE_COMMON);
 1231 |     if (handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
 1232 |         return false;
 1233 |     }
 1234 |     
 1235 |     string serialized = FileReadString(handle);
 1236 |     FileClose(handle);
 1237 |     
 1238 |     return DeserializeMessage(serialized, message);
 1239 | }
 1240 | 
 1241 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1242 | //| Serialize message thành string                                  |
 1243 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1244 | bool CFileCommunication::SerializeMessage(const MasterSlaveMessage& message, string& serialized) {
 1245 |     serialized = StringFormat("%d|%s|%s|%s|%s|%d|%.5f|%.5f|%.5f|%.5f|%s|%d|%s",
 1246 |         (long)message.timestamp,
 1247 |         message.senderEA,
 1248 |         message.receiverEA,
 1249 |         message.messageType,
 1250 |         message.symbol,
 1251 |         message.orderType,
 1252 |         message.lotSize,
 1253 |         message.entryPrice,
 1254 |         message.stopLoss,
 1255 |         message.takeProfit,
 1256 |         message.reason,
 1257 |         message.priority,
 1258 |         message.processed ? "1" : "0"
 1259 |     );
 1260 |     
 1261 |     return true;
 1262 | }
 1263 | 
 1264 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1265 | //| Deserialize string thành message                                |
 1266 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1267 | bool CFileCommunication::DeserializeMessage(string serialized, MasterSlaveMessage& message) {
 1268 |     string parts[];
 1269 |     int count = StringSplit(serialized, '|', parts);
 1270 |     
 1271 |     if (count < 13) {
 1272 |         return false;
 1273 |     }
 1274 |     
 1275 |     message.timestamp = (datetime)StringToInteger(parts[0]);
 1276 |     message.senderEA = parts[1];
 1277 |     message.receiverEA = parts[2];
 1278 |     message.messageType = parts[3];
 1279 |     message.symbol = parts[4];
 1280 |     message.orderType = (int)StringToInteger(parts[5]);
 1281 |     message.lotSize = StringToDouble(parts[6]);
 1282 |     message.entryPrice = StringToDouble(parts[7]);
 1283 |     message.stopLoss = StringToDouble(parts[8]);
 1284 |     message.takeProfit = StringToDouble(parts[9]);
 1285 |     message.reason = parts[10];
 1286 |     message.priority = (int)StringToInteger(parts[11]);
 1287 |     message.processed = (parts[12] == "1");
 1288 |     
 1289 |     return true;
 1290 | }
 1291 | 
 1292 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1293 | //| Log message                                                      |
 1294 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1295 | void CFileCommunication::LogMessage(const MasterSlaveMessage& message, string action) {
 1296 |     if (!m_Logger) return;
 1297 |     
 1298 |     string logText = StringFormat("%s Message - Type: %s, From: %s, To: %s, Symbol: %s, Reason: %s",
 1299 |         action,
 1300 |         message.messageType,
 1301 |         message.senderEA,
 1302 |         message.receiverEA,
 1303 |         message.symbol,
 1304 |         message.reason
 1305 |     );
 1306 |     
 1307 |     m_Logger->LogInfo(logText);
 1308 | }
 1309 | 
 1310 | } // namespace ApexPullback
 1311 | 
 1312 | #endif // FILE_COMMUNICATION_MQH_
