    7 | #ifndef FILE_COMMUNICATION_JSON_MQH_
    8 | #define FILE_COMMUNICATION_JSON_MQH_
    9 | 
   10 | // === ENHANCED JSON PARSER INCLUDE ===
   11 | #include "JSONParser.mqh"
   12 | 
   13 | // Implementation cho JSON Protocol trong Master-Slave Architecture
   14 | // Theo đề xuất kỹ thuật: Sử dụng JSON format cho PROPOSAL và DECISION messages
   15 | 
   16 | namespace ApexPullback {
   17 | 
   18 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   19 | //| Send JSON Proposal Message (Slave -> Master)                    |
   20 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   21 | bool CFileCommunication::SendJSONProposal(const TradingProposal& proposal)
   22 | {
   23 |     if (!m_Logger) {
   24 |         return false;
   25 |     }
   26 |     
   27 |     // Generate unique signal ID
   28 |     string signalID = GenerateSignalID(proposal.Symbol, proposal.ProposalTime);
   29 |     
   30 |     // Serialize proposal to JSON
   31 |     string jsonData = SerializeProposalToJSON(proposal);
   32 |     
   33 |     if (jsonData == "") {
   34 |         if (m_Logger) {
   35 |             m_Logger->LogError("[JSON PROTOCOL] Failed to serialize proposal to JSON");
   36 |         }
   37 |         return false;
   38 |     }
   39 |     
   40 |     // Create filename with signal ID
   41 |     string filename = StringFormat("%s\\PROPOSAL_%s_%s.json", 
   42 |                                    m_CommunicationFolder, 
   43 |                                    m_EAIdentifier, 
   44 |                                    signalID);
   45 |     
   46 |     // Write JSON to file with lock mechanism
   47 |     string lockFile = filename + ".lock";
   48 |     
   49 |     if (!CreateLockFile(lockFile)) {
   50 |         if (m_Logger) {
   51 |             m_Logger->LogWarning("[JSON PROTOCOL] Failed to create lock for proposal file");
   52 |         }
   53 |         return false;
   54 |     }
   55 |     
   56 |     // Write JSON data to file
   57 |     int fileHandle = FileOpen(filename, FILE_WRITE | FILE_TXT | FILE_ANSI);
   58 |     if (fileHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
   59 |         ReleaseLockFile(lockFile);
   60 |         if (m_Logger) {
   61 |             m_Logger->LogError("[JSON PROTOCOL] Failed to create proposal file: " + filename);
   62 |         }
   63 |         return false;
   64 |     }
   65 |     
   66 |     FileWrite(fileHandle, jsonData);
   67 |     FileClose(fileHandle);
   68 |     
   69 |     // Release lock
   70 |     ReleaseLockFile(lockFile);
   71 |     
   72 |     if (m_Logger) {
   73 |         string logMsg = StringFormat(
   74 |             "[JSON PROTOCOL] Proposal sent - Signal: %s, Symbol: %s, Type: %s, Confidence: %.2f",
   75 |             signalID, proposal.Symbol, 
   76 |             (proposal.OrderType == ORDER_TYPE_BUY) ? "BUY" : "SELL",
   77 |             proposal.SignalConfidenceScore
   78 |         );
   79 |         m_Logger->LogInfo(logMsg);
   80 |     }
   81 |     
   82 |     return true;
   83 | }
   84 | 
   85 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   86 | //| Send JSON Decision Message (Master -> Slave)                    |
   87 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   88 | bool CFileCommunication::SendJSONDecision(const TradingDecision& decision)
   89 | {
   90 |     if (!m_Logger) {
   91 |         return false;
   92 |     }
   93 |     
   94 |     // Serialize decision to JSON
   95 |     string jsonData = SerializeDecisionToJSON(decision);
   96 |     
   97 |     if (jsonData == "") {
   98 |         if (m_Logger) {
   99 |             m_Logger->LogError("[JSON PROTOCOL] Failed to serialize decision to JSON");
  100 |         }
  101 |         return false;
  102 |     }
  103 |     
  104 |     // Create filename with proposal ID reference
  105 |     string filename = StringFormat("%s\\DECISION_%s_%s.json", 
  106 |                                    m_CommunicationFolder, 
  107 |                                    decision.SlaveEAID, 
  108 |                                    decision.ProposalID);
  109 |     
  110 |     // Write JSON to file with lock mechanism
  111 |     string lockFile = filename + ".lock";
  112 |     
  113 |     if (!CreateLockFile(lockFile)) {
  114 |         if (m_Logger) {
  115 |             m_Logger->LogWarning("[JSON PROTOCOL] Failed to create lock for decision file");
  116 |         }
  117 |         return false;
  118 |     }
  119 |     
  120 |     // Write JSON data to file
  121 |     int fileHandle = FileOpen(filename, FILE_WRITE | FILE_TXT | FILE_ANSI);
  122 |     if (fileHandle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  123 |         ReleaseLockFile(lockFile);
  124 |         if (m_Logger) {
  125 |             m_Logger->LogError("[JSON PROTOCOL] Failed to create decision file: " + filename);
  126 |         }
  127 |         return false;
  128 |     }
  129 |     
  130 |     FileWrite(fileHandle, jsonData);
  131 |     FileClose(fileHandle);
  132 |     
  133 |     // Release lock
  134 |     ReleaseLockFile(lockFile);
  135 |     
  136 |     if (m_Logger) {
  137 |         string decisionStr = "";
  138 |         switch(decision.DecisionType) {
  139 |             case DECISION_APPROVE: decisionStr = "APPROVE"; break;
  140 |             case DECISION_APPROVE_MODIFIED: decisionStr = "APPROVE_MODIFIED"; break;
  141 |             case DECISION_REJECT: decisionStr = "REJECT"; break;
  142 |             case DECISION_DEFER: decisionStr = "DEFER"; break;
  143 |             default: decisionStr = "UNKNOWN"; break;
  144 |         }
  145 |         
  146 |         string logMsg = StringFormat(
  147 |             "[JSON PROTOCOL] Decision sent - Proposal: %s, Decision: %s, Lot: %.2f",
  148 |             decision.ProposalID, decisionStr, decision.FinalLotSize
  149 |         );
  150 |         m_Logger->LogInfo(logMsg);
  151 |     }
  152 |     
  153 |     return true;
  154 | }
  155 | 
  156 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  157 | //| Serialize Trading Proposal to JSON                              |
  158 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  159 | string CFileCommunication::SerializeProposalToJSON(const TradingProposal& proposal)
  160 | {
  161 |     // Generate signal ID
  162 |     string signalID = GenerateSignalID(proposal.Symbol, proposal.ProposalTime);
  163 |     
  164 |     // Build JSON string theo format đề xuất
  165 |     string json = "{";
  166 |     json += "\"msg_type\": \"PROPOSAL\",";
  167 |     json += "\"slave_id\": \"" + proposal.SlaveEAID + "\",";
  168 |     json += "\"signal_id\": \"" + signalID + "\",";
  169 |     json += "\"symbol\": \"" + proposal.Symbol + "\",";
  170 |     json += "\"direction\": \"" + ((proposal.OrderType == ORDER_TYPE_BUY) ? "BUY" : "SELL") + "\",";
  171 |     
  172 |     // Strategy mapping
  173 |     string strategyStr = "PULLBACK_TREND";
  174 |     switch(proposal.ProposedStrategy) {
  175 |         case STRATEGY_PULLBACK_TREND: strategyStr = "PULLBACK_TREND"; break;
  176 |         case STRATEGY_BREAKOUT: strategyStr = "BREAKOUT"; break;
  177 |         case STRATEGY_REVERSAL: strategyStr = "REVERSAL"; break;
  178 |         case STRATEGY_MOMENTUM: strategyStr = "MOMENTUM"; break;
  179 |         default: strategyStr = "PULLBACK_TREND"; break;
  180 |     }
  181 |     json += "\"strategy\": \"" + strategyStr + "\",";
  182 |     
  183 |     json += StringFormat("\"confidence_score\": %.3f,", proposal.SignalConfidenceScore);
  184 |     json += StringFormat("\"entry_price\": %.5f,", proposal.EntryPrice);
  185 |     json += StringFormat("\"sl_price\": %.5f,", proposal.StopLoss);
  186 |     json += StringFormat("\"tp_price\": %.5f,", proposal.TakeProfit);
  187 |     json += StringFormat("\"proposed_lot_size\": %.2f,", proposal.ProposedLotSize);
  188 |     json += StringFormat("\"risk_reward_ratio\": %.2f,", proposal.RiskRewardRatio);
  189 |     json += StringFormat("\"expected_profit_pips\": %.1f,", proposal.ExpectedProfitPips);
  190 |     json += StringFormat("\"max_risk_pips\": %.1f,", proposal.MaxRiskPips);
  191 |     json += StringFormat("\"current_volatility\": %.5f,", proposal.CurrentVolatility);
  192 |     json += StringFormat("\"current_spread\": %.1f,", proposal.CurrentSpread);
  193 |     json += StringFormat("\"correlation_risk\": %.3f,", proposal.CorrelationRisk);
  194 |     json += StringFormat("\"urgency_level\": %d,", proposal.UrgencyLevel);
  195 |     json += "\"has_news_conflict\": " + (proposal.HasNewsConflict ? "true" : "false") + ",";
  196 |     
  197 |     // Market regime
  198 |     string regimeStr = "UNKNOWN";
  199 |     switch(proposal.MarketRegime) {
  200 |         case REGIME_TRENDING_BULL: regimeStr = "TRENDING_BULL"; break;
  201 |         case REGIME_TRENDING_BEAR: regimeStr = "TRENDING_BEAR"; break;
  202 |         case REGIME_RANGING: regimeStr = "RANGING"; break;
  203 |         case REGIME_VOLATILE: regimeStr = "VOLATILE"; break;
  204 |         case REGIME_BREAKOUT: regimeStr = "BREAKOUT"; break;
  205 |         default: regimeStr = "UNKNOWN"; break;
  206 |     }
  207 |     json += "\"market_regime\": \"" + regimeStr + "\",";
  208 |     
  209 |     json += StringFormat("\"proposal_time\": %d,", (int)proposal.ProposalTime);
  210 |     json += StringFormat("\"expiry_time\": %d,", (int)proposal.ExpiryTime);
  211 |     json += "\"signal_reason\": \"" + proposal.SignalReason + "\"";
  212 |     
  213 |     json += "}";
  214 |     
  215 |     return json;
  216 | }
  217 | 
  218 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  219 | //| Serialize Trading Decision to JSON                              |
  220 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  221 | string CFileCommunication::SerializeDecisionToJSON(const TradingDecision& decision)
  222 | {
  223 |     // Build JSON string theo format đề xuất
  224 |     string json = "{";
  225 |     json += "\"msg_type\": \"DECISION\",";
  226 |     json += "\"signal_id\": \"" + decision.ProposalID + "\",";
  227 |     
  228 |     // Decision type
  229 |     string decisionStr = "UNKNOWN";
  230 |     switch(decision.DecisionType) {
  231 |         case DECISION_APPROVE: decisionStr = "APPROVE"; break;
  232 |         case DECISION_APPROVE_MODIFIED: decisionStr = "APPROVE_MODIFIED"; break;
  233 |         case DECISION_REJECT: decisionStr = "REJECT"; break;
  234 |         case DECISION_DEFER: decisionStr = "DEFER"; break;
  235 |         default: decisionStr = "UNKNOWN"; break;
  236 |     }
  237 |     json += "\"decision\": \"" + decisionStr + "\",";
  238 |     
  239 |     if (decision.DecisionType == DECISION_APPROVE || decision.DecisionType == DECISION_APPROVE_MODIFIED) {
  240 |         json += StringFormat("\"final_lot_size\": %.2f,", decision.FinalLotSize);
  241 |         json += StringFormat("\"final_entry_price\": %.5f,", decision.FinalEntryPrice);
  242 |         json += StringFormat("\"final_sl_price\": %.5f,", decision.FinalStopLoss);
  243 |         json += StringFormat("\"final_tp_price\": %.5f,", decision.FinalTakeProfit);
  244 |         json += StringFormat("\"allocated_risk_percent\": %.2f,", decision.AllocatedRiskPercent);
  245 |         json += StringFormat("\"risk_adjustment_factor\": %.3f,", decision.RiskAdjustmentFactor);
  246 |         json += "\"reason_code\": \"APPROVED_OK\",";
  247 |     } else if (decision.DecisionType == DECISION_REJECT) {
  248 |         // Rejection reason
  249 |         string reasonCode = "UNKNOWN";
  250 |         switch(decision.RejectionReason) {
  251 |             case REJECT_HIGH_CORRELATION: reasonCode = "HIGH_CORRELATION"; break;
  252 |             case REJECT_MAX_EXPOSURE: reasonCode = "MAX_EXPOSURE_REACHED"; break;
  253 |             case REJECT_LOW_CONFIDENCE: reasonCode = "LOW_CONFIDENCE"; break;
  254 |             case REJECT_POOR_RISK_REWARD: reasonCode = "POOR_RISK_REWARD"; break;
  255 |             case REJECT_MARKET_CONDITIONS: reasonCode = "UNFAVORABLE_MARKET"; break;
  256 |             case REJECT_NEWS_EVENT: reasonCode = "NEWS_CONFLICT"; break;
  257 |             case REJECT_DRAWDOWN_LIMIT: reasonCode = "DRAWDOWN_LIMIT"; break;
  258 |             case REJECT_VOLATILITY_HIGH: reasonCode = "HIGH_VOLATILITY"; break;
  259 |             case REJECT_SPREAD_TOO_WIDE: reasonCode = "WIDE_SPREAD"; break;
  260 |             case REJECT_TIME_FILTER: reasonCode = "TIME_RESTRICTION"; break;
  261 |             default: reasonCode = "UNKNOWN"; break;
  262 |         }
  263 |         json += "\"reason_code\": \"" + reasonCode + "\",";
  264 |         json += "\"rejection_details\": \"" + decision.RejectionDetails + "\",";
  265 |     } else if (decision.DecisionType == DECISION_DEFER) {
  266 |         json += "\"reason_code\": \"DEFERRED\",";
  267 |         json += StringFormat("\"valid_until\": %d,", (int)decision.ValidUntil);
  268 |     }
  269 |     
  270 |     // Portfolio context
  271 |     json += StringFormat("\"current_portfolio_risk\": %.2f,", decision.CurrentPortfolioRisk);
  272 |     json += StringFormat("\"available_risk_capacity\": %.2f,", decision.AvailableRiskCapacity);
  273 |     json += StringFormat("\"current_position_count\": %d,", decision.CurrentPositionCount);
  274 |     json += StringFormat("\"decision_time\": %d,", (int)decision.DecisionTime);
  275 |     
  276 |     if (decision.SpecialInstructions != "") {
  277 |         json += "\"special_instructions\": \"" + decision.SpecialInstructions + "\",";
  278 |     }
  279 |     
  280 |     json += "\"require_confirmation\": " + (decision.RequireConfirmation ? "true" : "false");
  281 |     
  282 |     json += "}";
  283 |     
  284 |     return json;
  285 | }
  286 | 
  287 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  288 | //| Generate Unique Signal ID                                       |
  289 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  290 | string CFileCommunication::GenerateSignalID(const string& symbol, datetime timestamp)
  291 | {
  292 |     // Format: SYMBOL_TIMESTAMP_RANDOM
  293 |     int randomNum = MathRand() % 10000;
  294 |     string signalID = StringFormat("%s_%d_%04d", symbol, (int)timestamp, randomNum);
  295 |     return signalID;
  296 | }
  297 | 
  298 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  299 | //| Parse JSON Proposal (Master receives from Slave)                |
  300 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  301 | bool CFileCommunication::ParseJSONProposal(const string& jsonData, TradingProposal& proposal)
  302 | {
  303 |     // Enhanced JSON parsing using robust parser
  304 |     CJSONParser parser(true); // Strict mode
  305 |     
  306 |     // Validate JSON structure first
  307 |     if (!parser.ValidateJSON(jsonData)) {
  308 |         m_Logger->LogError("[JSON PROTOCOL] Invalid JSON structure: " + parser.GetLastError());
  309 |         return false;
  310 |     }
  311 |     
  312 |     // Validate message type
  313 |     string msgType;
  314 |     if (!parser.ParseString(jsonData, "msg_type", msgType) || msgType != "PROPOSAL") {
  315 |         m_Logger->LogError("[JSON PROTOCOL] Invalid or missing msg_type");
  316 |         return false;
  317 |     }
  318 |     
  319 |     // Parse required fields with error checking
  320 |     if (!parser.ParseString(jsonData, "slave_id", proposal.SlaveEAID)) {
  321 |         m_Logger->LogError("[JSON PROTOCOL] Failed to parse slave_id: " + parser.GetLastError());
  322 |         return false;
  323 |     }
  324 |     
  325 |     if (!parser.ParseString(jsonData, "symbol", proposal.Symbol)) {
  326 |         m_Logger->LogError("[JSON PROTOCOL] Failed to parse symbol: " + parser.GetLastError());
  327 |         return false;
  328 |     }
  329 |     
  330 |     string direction;
  331 |     if (!parser.ParseString(jsonData, "direction", direction)) {
  332 |         m_Logger->LogError("[JSON PROTOCOL] Failed to parse direction: " + parser.GetLastError());
  333 |         return false;
  334 |     }
  335 |     proposal.OrderType = (direction == "BUY") ? ORDER_TYPE_BUY : ORDER_TYPE_SELL;
  336 |     
  337 |     // Parse numeric fields with validation
  338 |     if (!parser.ParseDouble(jsonData, "confidence_score", proposal.SignalConfidenceScore)) {
  339 |         m_Logger->LogWarning("[JSON PROTOCOL] Failed to parse confidence_score, using default");
  340 |         proposal.SignalConfidenceScore = 0.0;
  341 |     }
  342 |     
  343 |     if (!parser.ParseDouble(jsonData, "entry_price", proposal.EntryPrice)) {
  344 |         m_Logger->LogError("[JSON PROTOCOL] Failed to parse entry_price: " + parser.GetLastError());
  345 |         return false;
  346 |     }
  347 |     
  348 |     if (!parser.ParseDouble(jsonData, "sl_price", proposal.StopLoss)) {
  349 |         m_Logger->LogWarning("[JSON PROTOCOL] Failed to parse sl_price, using 0");
  350 |         proposal.StopLoss = 0.0;
  351 |     }
  352 |     
  353 |     if (!parser.ParseDouble(jsonData, "tp_price", proposal.TakeProfit)) {
  354 |         m_Logger->LogWarning("[JSON PROTOCOL] Failed to parse tp_price, using 0");
  355 |         proposal.TakeProfit = 0.0;
  356 |     }
  357 |     
  358 |     if (!parser.ParseDouble(jsonData, "proposed_lot_size", proposal.ProposedLotSize)) {
  359 |         m_Logger->LogError("[JSON PROTOCOL] Failed to parse proposed_lot_size: " + parser.GetLastError());
  360 |         return false;
  361 |     }
  362 |     
  363 |     // Parse optional fields
  364 |     parser.ParseDouble(jsonData, "risk_reward_ratio", proposal.RiskRewardRatio);
  365 |     parser.ParseDouble(jsonData, "expected_profit_pips", proposal.ExpectedProfitPips);
  366 |     parser.ParseDouble(jsonData, "max_risk_pips", proposal.MaxRiskPips);
  367 |     parser.ParseDouble(jsonData, "current_volatility", proposal.CurrentVolatility);
  368 |     parser.ParseDouble(jsonData, "current_spread", proposal.CurrentSpread);
  369 |     parser.ParseDouble(jsonData, "correlation_risk", proposal.CorrelationRisk);
  370 |     parser.ParseInt(jsonData, "urgency_level", proposal.UrgencyLevel);
  371 |     parser.ParseBool(jsonData, "has_news_conflict", proposal.HasNewsConflict);
  372 |     parser.ParseString(jsonData, "signal_reason", proposal.SignalReason);
  373 |     parser.ParseDateTime(jsonData, "proposal_time", proposal.ProposalTime);
  374 |     parser.ParseDateTime(jsonData, "expiry_time", proposal.ExpiryTime);
  375 |     
  376 |     return true;
  377 | }
  378 | 
  379 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  380 | //| Parse JSON Decision (Slave receives from Master)                |
  381 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  382 | bool CFileCommunication::ParseJSONDecision(const string& jsonData, TradingDecision& decision)
  383 | {
  384 |     // Enhanced JSON parsing using robust parser
  385 |     CJSONParser parser(true); // Strict mode
  386 |     
  387 |     // Validate JSON structure first
  388 |     if (!parser.ValidateJSON(jsonData)) {
  389 |         m_Logger->LogError("[JSON PROTOCOL] Invalid JSON structure: " + parser.GetLastError());
  390 |         return false;
  391 |     }
  392 |     
  393 |     // Validate message type
  394 |     string msgType;
  395 |     if (!parser.ParseString(jsonData, "msg_type", msgType) || msgType != "DECISION") {
  396 |         m_Logger->LogError("[JSON PROTOCOL] Invalid or missing msg_type");
  397 |         return false;
  398 |     }
  399 |     
  400 |     // Parse required fields
  401 |     if (!parser.ParseString(jsonData, "signal_id", decision.ProposalID)) {
  402 |         m_Logger->LogError("[JSON PROTOCOL] Failed to parse signal_id: " + parser.GetLastError());
  403 |         return false;
  404 |     }
  405 |     
  406 |     string decisionStr;
  407 |     if (!parser.ParseString(jsonData, "decision", decisionStr)) {
  408 |         m_Logger->LogError("[JSON PROTOCOL] Failed to parse decision: " + parser.GetLastError());
  409 |         return false;
  410 |     }
  411 |     
  412 |     // Map decision string to enum
  413 |     if (decisionStr == "APPROVE") {
  414 |         decision.DecisionType = DECISION_APPROVE;
  415 |     } else if (decisionStr == "APPROVE_MODIFIED") {
  416 |         decision.DecisionType = DECISION_APPROVE_MODIFIED;
  417 |     } else if (decisionStr == "REJECT") {
  418 |         decision.DecisionType = DECISION_REJECT;
  419 |     } else if (decisionStr == "DEFER") {
  420 |         decision.DecisionType = DECISION_DEFER;
  421 |     } else {
  422 |         m_Logger->LogWarning("[JSON PROTOCOL] Unknown decision type: " + decisionStr + ", defaulting to REJECT");
  423 |         decision.DecisionType = DECISION_REJECT;
  424 |     }
  425 |     
  426 |     // Parse numeric fields with validation
  427 |     if (!parser.ParseDouble(jsonData, "final_lot_size", decision.FinalLotSize)) {
  428 |         m_Logger->LogWarning("[JSON PROTOCOL] Failed to parse final_lot_size, using 0");
  429 |         decision.FinalLotSize = 0.0;
  430 |     }
  431 |     
  432 |     parser.ParseDouble(jsonData, "final_entry_price", decision.FinalEntryPrice);
  433 |     parser.ParseDouble(jsonData, "final_sl_price", decision.FinalStopLoss);
  434 |     parser.ParseDouble(jsonData, "final_tp_price", decision.FinalTakeProfit);
  435 |     parser.ParseDouble(jsonData, "allocated_risk_percent", decision.AllocatedRiskPercent);
  436 |     parser.ParseDouble(jsonData, "risk_adjustment_factor", decision.RiskAdjustmentFactor);
  437 |     
  438 |     // Portfolio info
  439 |     parser.ParseDouble(jsonData, "current_portfolio_risk", decision.CurrentPortfolioRisk);
  440 |     parser.ParseDouble(jsonData, "available_risk_capacity", decision.AvailableRiskCapacity);
  441 |     parser.ParseInt(jsonData, "current_position_count", decision.CurrentPositionCount);
  442 |     parser.ParseDateTime(jsonData, "decision_time", decision.DecisionTime);
  443 |     
  444 |     parser.ParseBool(jsonData, "require_confirmation", decision.RequireConfirmation);
  445 |     parser.ParseString(jsonData, "special_instructions", decision.SpecialInstructions);
  446 |     
  447 |     return true;
  448 | }
  449 | 
  450 | // Legacy helper functions removed - now using enhanced CJSONParser class
  451 | // These functions have been replaced by the robust JSON parsing methods
  452 | // in the CJSONParser class for better error handling and validation
  453 | 
  454 | } // End namespace ApexPullback
  455 | 
  456 | #endif // FILE_COMMUNICATION_JSON_MQH_

📊 Thống kê: 158 dòng, 5330 ký tự, encoding: utf-8

    1 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    2 | //|                                               FunctionStack.mqh |
    3 | //|      APEX Pullback EA v14.0 - Hệ thống theo dõi ngăn xếp hàm      |
    4 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    5 | 
    6 | #ifndef FUNCTION_STACK_MQH_
    7 | #define FUNCTION_STACK_MQH_
    8 | 
    9 | #include <Arrays\ArrayString.mqh>
   10 | #include "CommonStructs.mqh"
   11 | 
   12 | // BẮT ĐẦU NAMESPACE
   13 | namespace ApexPullback {
   14 | 
   15 | // Các hằng số cho FunctionStack
   16 | #define MAX_STACK_DEPTH      50    // Giới hạn độ sâu tối đa của stack
   17 | #define STACK_WARNING_LEVEL  45    // Mức cảnh báo khi stack gần đạt giới hạn
   18 | 
   19 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   20 | //| Lớp CFunctionStack - Mô phỏng Stack Trace để gỡ lỗi             |
   21 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   22 | class CFunctionStack {
   23 | private:
   24 |    EAContext*     m_context;   // Pointer to the central context
   25 |    CArrayString*  m_stack;
   26 |    int            m_max_size;
   27 |    bool           m_is_initialized;
   28 | 
   29 | public:
   30 |    // Constructor and Destructor
   31 |    CFunctionStack(); 
   32 |    ~CFunctionStack();
   33 | 
   34 |    // Initialization
   35 |    bool Initialize(EAContext* pContext, int max_size = MAX_STACK_DEPTH);
   36 | 
   37 |    // Phương thức chính
   38 |    void  Push(const string function_name);
   39 |    void  Pop();
   40 |    void  Clear();
   41 |    string GetTraceAsString(const string separator = " -> ") const;
   42 |    int   GetSize() const;
   43 | };
   44 | 
   45 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   46 | //| Constructor
   47 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   48 | CFunctionStack::CFunctionStack() {
   49 |    m_context = NULL;
   50 |    m_stack = NULL;
   51 |    m_max_size = MAX_STACK_DEPTH;
   52 |    m_is_initialized = false;
   53 | }
   54 | 
   55 | bool CFunctionStack::Initialize(EAContext* pContext, int max_size = MAX_STACK_DEPTH) {
   56 |     if (!pContext) {
   57 |         Print("CRITICAL: Invalid context passed to FunctionStack::Initialize");
   58 |         return false;
   59 |     }
   60 |     
   61 |     m_context = pContext;
   62 |     m_max_size = max_size;
   63 |     
   64 |     m_stack = new CArrayString();
   65 |     if (CheckPointer(m_stack) == POINTER_INVALID) {
   66 |         // Logger might not be fully available yet, but we can try.
   67 |         if(m_context->pLogger != NULL) m_context->pLogger->LogError("Failed to allocate memory for Function Stack.");
   68 |         else Print("CRITICAL: Failed to allocate memory for Function Stack.");
   69 |         return false;
   70 |     }
   71 |     m_is_initialized = true;
   72 |     return true;
   73 | }
   74 | 
   75 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   76 | //| Destructor
   77 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   78 | CFunctionStack::~CFunctionStack() {
   79 |    if(CheckPointer(m_stack) == POINTER_DYNAMIC) {
   80 |       delete m_stack;
   81 |    }
   82 | }
   83 | 
   84 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   85 | //| Thêm một hàm vào đỉnh của ngăn xếp
   86 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   87 | void CFunctionStack::Push(const string function_name) {
   88 |    if(!m_is_initialized || CheckPointer(m_stack) == POINTER_INVALID)
   89 |       return;
   90 | 
   91 |    int current_size = m_stack->Total();
   92 | 
   93 |    // Kiểm tra và cảnh báo khi gần đạt giới hạn
   94 |    if(current_size >= STACK_WARNING_LEVEL && current_size < m_max_size) {
   95 |       if(m_context && m_context->pLogger != NULL) {
   96 |          m_context->pLogger->LogWarning(StringFormat("Stack depth warning: %d/%d functions",
   97 |                                    current_size, m_max_size));
   98 |       }
   99 |    }
  100 | 
  101 |    // Kiểm tra giới hạn stack
  102 |    if(current_size >= m_max_size) {
  103 |       if(m_context && m_context->pLogger != NULL) {
  104 |          m_context->pLogger->LogError(StringFormat("Stack overflow prevented! Depth: %d/%d. Trace: %s",
  105 |                                  current_size, m_max_size, GetTraceAsString()));
  106 |       }
  107 | 
  108 | 
  109 |       return; // Ngăn chặn tràn stack
  110 |    }
  111 | 
  112 |    m_stack->Add(function_name);
  113 | }
  114 | 
  115 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  116 | //| Xóa một hàm khỏi đỉnh của ngăn xếp
  117 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  118 | void CFunctionStack::Pop() {
  119 |    if(CheckPointer(m_stack) == POINTER_INVALID || m_stack->Total() == 0)
  120 |       return;
  121 |    m_stack->Delete(m_stack->Total() - 1);
  122 | }
  123 | 
  124 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  125 | //| Xóa toàn bộ ngăn xếp
  126 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  127 | void CFunctionStack::Clear() {
  128 |    if(CheckPointer(m_stack) == POINTER_INVALID)
  129 |       return;
  130 |    m_stack->Clear();
  131 | }
  132 | 
  133 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  134 | //| Lấy toàn bộ dấu vết ngăn xếp dưới dạng một chuỗi
  135 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  136 | string CFunctionStack::GetTraceAsString(const string separator = " -> ") const {
  137 |    if(CheckPointer(m_stack) == POINTER_INVALID || m_stack->Total() == 0)
  138 |       return "";
  139 | 
  140 |    string trace = "";
  141 |    for(int i = 0; i < m_stack->Total(); i++) {
  142 |       if(i > 0)
  143 |          trace += separator;
  144 |       trace += m_stack->At(i);
  145 |    }
  146 |    return trace;
  147 | }
  148 | 
  149 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  150 | //| Lấy kích thước hiện tại của ngăn xếp
  151 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  152 | int CFunctionStack::GetSize() const {
  153 |     if(CheckPointer(m_stack) == POINTER_INVALID) return 0;
  154 |     return m_stack->Total();
  155 | }
  156 | 
  157 | } // end namespace ApexPullback
  158 | #endif // FUNCTION_STACK_MQH_

  143 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  144 | //| Initialize All Indicators                                        |
  145 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  146 | bool CIndicatorUtils::Initialize(EAContext* pContext)
  147 | {
  148 |     m_pContext = pContext;
  149 | 
  150 |     if (m_initialized) {
  151 |         if(m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("IndicatorUtils already initialized.");
  152 |         return true;
  153 |     }
  154 | 
  155 |     if (!m_pContext || !m_pContext->pErrorHandler) {
  156 |         Print("CRITICAL: CIndicatorUtils cannot initialize without a valid context and error handler.");
  157 |         return false;
  158 |     }
  159 |     
  160 |     if(m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogDebug("Initializing IndicatorUtils service...");
  161 | 
  162 |     // Initialization is now lightweight. We just set the flag.
  163 |     // Indicators are created on-demand by other modules.
  164 |     m_initialized = true;
  165 |     if(m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogInfo("IndicatorUtils service is ready.");
  166 | 
  167 |     return true;
  168 | }
  169 | 
  170 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  171 | //| Deinitialize                                                     |
  172 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  173 | void CIndicatorUtils::Deinitialize()
  174 | {
  175 |     if (m_pContext && m_pContext->pLogger) {
  176 |         m_pContext->pLogger->LogDebug("Deinitializing CIndicatorUtils...");
  177 |     }
  178 |     ReleaseAllHandles();
  179 |     m_initialized = false;
  180 | }
  181 | 
  182 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  183 | //| ReleaseAllHandles (Private Helper)                               |
  184 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  185 | void CIndicatorUtils::ReleaseAllHandles()
  186 | {
  187 |     // Release standard indicators
  188 |     if(m_adx_handle != INVALID_HANDLE) { IndicatorRelease(m_adx_handle); m_adx_handle = INVALID_HANDLE; }
  189 |     if(m_rsi_handle != INVALID_HANDLE) { IndicatorRelease(m_rsi_handle); m_rsi_handle = INVALID_HANDLE; }
  190 |     if(m_atr_handle != INVALID_HANDLE) { IndicatorRelease(m_atr_handle); m_atr_handle = INVALID_HANDLE; }
  191 |     if(m_macd_handle != INVALID_HANDLE) { IndicatorRelease(m_macd_handle); m_macd_handle = INVALID_HANDLE; }
  192 |     if(m_bb_handle != INVALID_HANDLE) { IndicatorRelease(m_bb_handle); m_bb_handle = INVALID_HANDLE; }
  193 |     
  194 |     // Release HTF indicators
  195 |     if(m_htf_adx_handle != INVALID_HANDLE) { IndicatorRelease(m_htf_adx_handle); m_htf_adx_handle = INVALID_HANDLE; }
  196 |     if(m_htf_rsi_handle != INVALID_HANDLE) { IndicatorRelease(m_htf_rsi_handle); m_htf_rsi_handle = INVALID_HANDLE; }
  197 |     if(m_htf_atr_handle != INVALID_HANDLE) { IndicatorRelease(m_htf_atr_handle); m_htf_atr_handle = INVALID_HANDLE; }
  198 | 
  199 |     // Release all MA indicators from the dynamic array
  200 |     if (m_ma_handles) {
  201 |         for (int i = m_ma_handles->Total() - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
  202 |             MAHandleInfo* info = m_ma_handles->At(i);
  203 |             if (info) {
  204 |                 if (info->handle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  205 |                     IndicatorRelease(info->handle);
  206 |                 }
  207 |                 delete info; // Free the memory for the object itself
  208 |             }
  209 |         }
  210 |         m_ma_handles->Clear(); // Clear the array of pointers
  211 |     }
  212 | }
  213 | 
  214 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  215 | //| FindMAHandle (Private Helper)                                    |
  216 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  217 | bool CIndicatorUtils::CreateBaseIndicators()
  218 | {
  219 |     // Dependencies are checked in Initialize(), so we assume they are valid here.
  220 |     const string symbol = m_pContext->pSymbolInfo->Symbol();
  221 |     const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES main_tf = m_pContext->Inputs.MainTimeframe;
  222 | 
  223 |     if(m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->LogDebug("Creating base indicators on " + EnumToString(main_tf) + "...");
  224 | 
  225 |     // --- EMAs ---
  226 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_pContext->Inputs.MA.NumEMAs; i++) {
  227 |         int period = m_pContext->Inputs.MA.EMAPeriods[i];
  228 |         if (period > 0) {
  229 |             int handle = iMA(symbol, main_tf, period, 0, m_pContext->Inputs.MA.EMAMethod, m_pContext->Inputs.MA.EMAAppliedPrice);
  230 |             if(handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  231 |                 m_pContext->pErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_INDICATOR_CREATE, "CreateBaseIndicators - Failed to create EMA(" + (string)period + ") on " + EnumToString(main_tf));
  232 |                 return false;
  233 |             }
  234 |             MAHandleInfo* info = new MAHandleInfo(period, main_tf, handle);
  235 |             if(!m_ma_handles->Add(info)){
  236 |                  m_pContext->pErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_CREATE_OBJECT, "CreateBaseIndicators - Failed to add EMA handle to array for period " + (string)period);
  237 |                  delete info;
  238 |                  return false;
  239 |             }
  240 |         }
  241 |     }
  242 | 
  243 |     // --- Other Indicators ---
  244 |     m_adx_handle = iADX(symbol, main_tf, m_pContext->Inputs.ADX.Period);
  245 |     m_rsi_handle = iRSI(symbol, main_tf, m_pContext->Inputs.RSI.Period, m_pContext->Inputs.RSI.AppliedPrice);
  246 |     m_atr_handle = iATR(symbol, main_tf, m_pContext->Inputs.ATR.Period);
  247 |     m_macd_handle = iMACD(symbol, main_tf, m_pContext->Inputs.MACD.FastEMA, m_pContext->Inputs.MACD.SlowEMA, m_pContext->Inputs.MACD.SignalSMA, m_pContext->Inputs.MACD.AppliedPrice);
  248 |     m_bb_handle = iBands(symbol, main_tf, m_pContext->Inputs.BB.Period, m_pContext->Inputs.BB.Shift, m_pContext->Inputs.BB.Deviation, m_pContext->Inputs.BB.AppliedPrice);
  249 | 
  250 |     if (m_adx_handle == INVALID_HANDLE || m_rsi_handle == INVALID_HANDLE || m_atr_handle == INVALID_HANDLE || m_macd_handle == INVALID_HANDLE || m_bb_handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  251 |         m_pContext->pErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_INDICATOR_CREATE, "CreateBaseIndicators - Failed to create one or more base indicators on " + EnumToString(main_tf));
  252 |         return false;
  253 |     }
  254 |     return true;
  255 | }
  256 | 
  257 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  258 | //| CreateMultiTimeframeIndicators (Private Helper)                  |
  259 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  260 | bool CIndicatorUtils::CreateMultiTimeframeIndicators()
  261 | {
  262 |     if(!m_context || !m_context->Logger) return false;
  263 |     
  264 |     const SCoreStrategyConfig& strategy_config = m_context->Inputs.CoreStrategy;
  265 |     const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES htf = strategy_config.HigherTimeframe;
  266 | 
  267 |     m_context->Logger->LogInfo("Creating multi-timeframe indicators on " + EnumToString(htf) + "...", "IndicatorUtils");
  268 | 
  269 |     // --- EMAs ---
  270 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_context->Inputs.MA.NumEMAs; i++) {
  271 |         int period = m_context->Inputs.MA.EMAPeriods[i];
  272 |         if (period > 0) {
  273 |             int handle = iMA(m_context->Symbol, htf, period, 0, m_context->Inputs.MA.EMAMethod, m_context->Inputs.MA.EMAAppliedPrice);
  274 |             if (handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  275 |                 m_context->Logger->LogError("Failed to create EMA(" + (string)period + ") on " + EnumToString(htf), "IndicatorUtils");
  276 |                 return false;
  277 |             }
  278 |             MAHandleInfo* info = new MAHandleInfo(period, htf, handle);
  279 |             if(!m_ma_handles->Add(info)){
  280 |                  m_context->Logger->LogError("Failed to add HTF EMA handle to array for period " + (string)period, "IndicatorUtils");
  281 |                  delete info;
  282 |                  return false;
  283 |             }
  284 |         }
  285 |     }
  286 | 
  287 |     // --- Other Indicators ---
  288 |     m_htf_adx_handle = iADX(m_context->Symbol, htf, m_context->Inputs.ADX.Period);
  289 |     m_htf_rsi_handle = iRSI(m_context->Symbol, htf, m_context->Inputs.RSI.Period, m_context->Inputs.RSI.AppliedPrice);
  290 |     m_htf_atr_handle = iATR(m_context->Symbol, htf, m_context->Inputs.ATR.Period);
  291 | 
  292 |     if (m_htf_adx_handle == INVALID_HANDLE || m_htf_rsi_handle == INVALID_HANDLE || m_htf_atr_handle == INVALID_HANDLE) {
  293 |         m_context->Logger->LogError("Failed to create one or more HTF indicators on " + EnumToString(htf), "IndicatorUtils");
  294 |         return false;
  295 |     }
  296 |     return true;
  297 | }
  298 | 
  299 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  300 | //| GetMAHandle (Private Helper)                                     |
  301 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  302 | int CIndicatorUtils::FindMAHandle(int period, ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe)
  303 | {
  304 |     if (!m_context || !m_ma_handles) return INVALID_HANDLE;
  305 |     if (timeframe == WRONG_VALUE) timeframe = m_context->Inputs.CoreStrategy.MainTimeframe;
  306 | 
  307 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_ma_handles->Total(); i++) {
  308 |         MAHandleInfo* info = m_ma_handles->At(i);
  309 |         if (info && info->period == period && info->timeframe == timeframe) {
  310 |             return info->handle;
  311 |         }
  312 |     }
  313 |     return INVALID_HANDLE;
  314 | }
  315 | 
  316 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  317 | //| GetAdxHandle (Public)                                            |
  318 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  319 | int CIndicatorUtils::GetAdxHandle(ENUM_TIMEFRAMES tf) const
  320 | {
  321 |     if (!m_context) return INVALID_HANDLE;
  322 |     const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES main_tf = m_context->Inputs.CoreStrategy.MainTimeframe;
  323 |     const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES htf = m_context->Inputs.CoreStrategy.HigherTimeframe;
  324 | 
  325 |     if (tf == WRONG_VALUE || tf == main_tf) {
  326 |         return m_adx_handle;
  327 |     }
  328 |     if (m_context->Inputs.CoreStrategy.UseMultiTimeframe && tf == htf) {
  329 |         return m_htf_adx_handle;
  330 |     }
  331 |     return INVALID_HANDLE;
  332 | }
  333 | 
  334 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  335 | //| GetRsiHandle (Public)                                            |
  336 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  337 | int CIndicatorUtils::GetRsiHandle(ENUM_TIMEFRAMES tf) const
  338 | {
  339 |     if (!m_context) return INVALID_HANDLE;
  340 |     const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES main_tf = m_context->Inputs.CoreStrategy.MainTimeframe;
  341 |     const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES htf = m_context->Inputs.CoreStrategy.HigherTimeframe;
  342 | 
  343 |     if (tf == WRONG_VALUE || tf == main_tf) {
  344 |         return m_rsi_handle;
  345 |     }
  346 |     if (m_context->Inputs.CoreStrategy.UseMultiTimeframe && tf == htf) {
  347 |         return m_htf_rsi_handle;
  348 |     }
  349 |     return INVALID_HANDLE;
  350 | }
  351 | 
  352 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  353 | //| GetAtrHandle (Public)                                            |
  354 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  355 | int CIndicatorUtils::GetAtrHandle(ENUM_TIMEFRAMES tf) const
  356 | {
  357 |     if (!m_context) return INVALID_HANDLE;
  358 |     const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES main_tf = m_context->Inputs.CoreStrategy.MainTimeframe;
  359 |     const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES htf = m_context->Inputs.CoreStrategy.HigherTimeframe;
  360 | 
  361 |     if (tf == WRONG_VALUE || tf == main_tf) {
  362 |         return m_atr_handle;
  363 |     }
  364 |     if (m_context->Inputs.CoreStrategy.UseMultiTimeframe && tf == htf) {
  365 |         return m_htf_atr_handle;
  366 |     }
  367 |     return INVALID_HANDLE;
  368 | }
  369 | 
  370 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  371 | //| GetEmaHandle (Public)                                            |
  372 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  373 | int CIndicatorUtils::GetEmaHandle(int period, ENUM_TIMEFRAMES tf = WRONG_VALUE)
  374 | {
  375 |     return FindMAHandle(period, tf);
  376 | }
  377 | 
  378 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  379 | //| CreateMA (Public, On-Demand)                                     |
  380 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  381 | int CIndicatorUtils::CreateMA(const string symbol, const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int period, const int ma_shift, const ENUM_MA_METHOD ma_method, const ENUM_APPLIED_PRICE applied_price)
  382 | {
  383 |     if (!m_initialized) return INVALID_HANDLE;
  384 | 
  385 |     // First, check if we already have this exact handle
  386 |     int existing_handle = FindMAHandle(period, timeframe);
  387 |     if(existing_handle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  388 |         return existing_handle;
  389 |     }
  390 | 
  391 |     // If not, create it
  392 |     int handle = iMA(symbol, timeframe, period, ma_shift, ma_method, applied_price);
  393 |     
  394 |     if (handle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
  395 |         // Store it for reuse
  396 |         MAHandleInfo* info = new MAHandleInfo(period, timeframe, handle);
  397 |         if(info && m_ma_handles) {
  398 |             m_ma_handles->Add(info);
  399 |         } else {
  400 |             // Memory allocation failed, release the created handle to prevent leaks
  401 |             IndicatorRelease(handle);
  402 |             if(m_pContext->pErrorHandler) m_pContext->pErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_NOT_ENOUGH_MEMORY, "CIndicatorUtils::CreateMA", "Failed to allocate MAHandleInfo");
  403 |             return INVALID_HANDLE;
  404 |         }
  405 |     } else {
  406 |         if(m_pContext->pErrorHandler) m_pContext->pErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_INIT_INDICATOR_FAILED, "CIndicatorUtils::CreateMA", "iMA failed for period " + (string)period);
  407 |     }
  408 |     
  409 |     return handle;
  410 | }
  411 | 
  412 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  413 | //| CreateRSI (Public, On-Demand)                                    |
  414 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  415 | int CIndicatorUtils::CreateRSI(const string symbol, const ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe, const int period, const ENUM_APPLIED_PRICE applied_price)
  416 | {
  417 |     if (!m_initialized) return INVALID_HANDLE;
  418 | 
  419 |     // For simplicity, we'll manage one RSI handle per timeframe.
  420 |     // A more complex system could manage multiple RSI with different periods.
  421 |     if (timeframe == m_pContext->Inputs.Timeframe) {
  422 |         if (m_rsi_handle != INVALID_HANDLE) return m_rsi_handle;
  423 |         m_rsi_handle = iRSI(symbol, timeframe, period, applied_price);
  424 |         if(m_rsi_handle == INVALID_HANDLE && m_pContext->pErrorHandler) m_pContext->pErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_INIT_INDICATOR_FAILED, "CIndicatorUtils::CreateRSI", "iRSI failed for main timeframe");
  425 |         return m_rsi_handle;
  426 |     } else if (m_pContext->Inputs.CoreStrategy.UseMultiTimeframe && timeframe == m_pContext->Inputs.CoreStrategy.MultiTimeframe) {
  427 |         if (m_htf_rsi_handle != INVALID_HANDLE) return m_htf_rsi_handle;
  428 |         m_htf_rsi_handle = iRSI(symbol, timeframe, period, applied_price);
  429 |         if(m_htf_rsi_handle == INVALID_HANDLE && m_pContext->pErrorHandler) m_pContext->pErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_INIT_INDICATOR_FAILED, "CIndicatorUtils::CreateRSI", "iRSI failed for HTF");
  430 |         return m_htf_rsi_handle;
  431 |     }
  432 |     
  433 |     // If it's a non-standard timeframe, create a temporary handle (not recommended for frequent use)
  434 |     int handle = iRSI(symbol, timeframe, period, applied_price);
  435 |     if(handle == INVALID_HANDLE && m_pContext->pErrorHandler) m_pContext->pErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_INIT_INDICATOR_FAILED, "CIndicatorUtils::CreateRSI", "iRSI failed for ad-hoc timeframe");
  436 |     return handle;
  437 | }
  438 | 
  439 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  440 | //| GetMA (Public)                                                   |
  441 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  442 | double CIndicatorUtils::GetMA(int period, int shift = 0, ENUM_TIMEFRAMES tf = WRONG_VALUE)
  443 | {
  444 |     int handle = GetMAHandle(period, tf);
  445 |     return GetSingleData(handle, 0, shift);
  446 | }

  464 | }

  473 | }

  479 | {

  486 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+

  488 | {
  489 |     int handle = GetAtrHandle(tf);
  490 |     return GetSingleData(handle, 0, shift);
  491 | }
  492 | 
  493 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  494 | //| GetATRRatio                                                      |
  495 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  496 | double CIndicatorUtils::GetATRRatio(int lookbackPeriods = 10)
  497 | {
  498 |     if (!m_initialized || !m_context) return EMPTY_VALUE;
  499 |     double currentAtr = GetATR(0);
  500 |     double sum = 0;
  501 |     for (int i = 1; i <= lookbackPeriods; i++) {
  502 |         sum += GetATR(i);
  503 |     }
  504 |     double avgAtr = sum / lookbackPeriods;
  505 |     if (avgAtr == 0) return EMPTY_VALUE;
  506 |     return currentAtr / avgAtr;
  507 | }
  508 | 
  509 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  510 | //| GetMACDMain                                                      |
  511 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  512 | double CIndicatorUtils::GetMACDMain(int shift = 0)
  513 | {
  514 |     return GetSingleData(m_macd_handle, 0, shift);
  515 | }
  516 | 
  517 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  518 | //| GetMACDSignal                                                    |
  519 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  520 | double CIndicatorUtils::GetMACDSignal(int shift = 0)
  521 | {
  522 |     return GetSingleData(m_macd_handle, 1, shift);
  523 | }
  524 | 
  525 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  526 | //| GetMACDHistogram                                                 |
  527 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  528 | double CIndicatorUtils::GetMACDHistogram(int shift = 0)
  529 | {
  530 |     return GetMACDMain(shift) - GetMACDSignal(shift);
  531 | }
  532 | 
  533 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  534 | //| GetMACDHistogramSlope                                            |
  535 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  536 | double CIndicatorUtils::GetMACDHistogramSlope(int periods = 3)
  537 | {
  538 |     if (periods < 2) return 0.0;
  539 |     double currentHist = GetMACDHistogram(0);
  540 |     double previousHist = GetMACDHistogram(periods - 1);
  541 |     if(previousHist == EMPTY_VALUE || currentHist == EMPTY_VALUE) return 0.0;
  542 |     return (currentHist - previousHist);
  543 | }
  544 | 
  545 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  546 | //| GetBBUpper                                                       |
  547 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  548 | double CIndicatorUtils::GetBBUpper(int shift = 0)
  549 | {
  550 |     return GetSingleData(m_bb_handle, 1, shift);
  551 | }
  552 | 
  553 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  554 | //| GetBBMiddle                                                      |
  555 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  556 | double CIndicatorUtils::GetBBMiddle(int shift = 0)
  557 | {
  558 |     return GetSingleData(m_bb_handle, 0, shift);
  559 | }
  560 | 
  561 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  562 | //| GetBBLower                                                       |
  563 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  564 | double CIndicatorUtils::GetBBLower(int shift = 0)
  565 | {
  566 |     return GetSingleData(m_bb_handle, 2, shift);
  567 | }
  568 | 
  569 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  570 | //| GetBBWidth                                                       |
  571 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  572 | double CIndicatorUtils::GetBBWidth(int shift = 0)
  573 | {
  574 |     double upper = GetBBUpper(shift);
  575 |     double lower = GetBBLower(shift);
  576 |     double middle = GetBBMiddle(shift);
  577 |     if(upper == EMPTY_VALUE || lower == EMPTY_VALUE || middle == 0 || middle == EMPTY_VALUE) return EMPTY_VALUE;
  578 |     return (upper - lower) / middle;
  579 | }
  580 | 
  581 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  582 | //| GetVolume                                                        |
  583 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  584 | double CIndicatorUtils::GetVolume(int shift = 0)
  585 | {
  586 |     if(!m_context) return EMPTY_VALUE;
  587 |     MqlRates rates[];
  588 |     if(CopyRates(m_context->Symbol, m_context->Inputs.CoreStrategy.MainTimeframe, shift, 1, rates) <= 0) return EMPTY_VALUE;
  589 |     return rates[0].tick_volume;
  590 | }
  591 | 
  592 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  593 | //| GetAverageVolume                                                 |
  594 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  595 | double CIndicatorUtils::GetAverageVolume(int periods = 20)
  596 | {
  597 |     if(!m_context || periods <= 0) return EMPTY_VALUE;
  598 |     MqlRates rates[];
  599 |     if(CopyRates(m_context->Symbol, m_context->Inputs.CoreStrategy.MainTimeframe, 1, periods, rates) < periods) return EMPTY_VALUE;
  600 |     double sum = 0;
  601 |     for(int i=0; i<periods; i++){
  602 |         sum += rates[i].tick_volume;
  603 |     }
  604 |     return sum / periods;
  605 | }
  606 | 
  607 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  608 | //| GetCurrentSpread                                                 |
  609 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  610 | double CIndicatorUtils::GetCurrentSpread()
  611 | {
  612 |     if(!m_context) return EMPTY_VALUE;
  613 |     MqlTick tick;
  614 |     if(!SymbolInfoTick(m_context->Symbol, tick)) return EMPTY_VALUE;
  615 |     return (tick.ask - tick.bid);
  616 | }
  617 | 
  618 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  619 | //| GetData (Private Helper)                                         |
  620 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  621 | bool CIndicatorUtils::GetData(int handle, int buffer_num, int start_pos, int count, double &result_buffer[])
  622 | {
  623 |     if (handle == INVALID_HANDLE) return false;
  624 |     if (CopyBuffer(handle, buffer_num, start_pos, count, result_buffer) != count) {
  625 |         // m_context->Logger->LogWarning("GetData: CopyBuffer failed for handle " + (string)handle);
  626 |         return false;
  627 |     }
  628 |     return true;
  629 | }
  630 | 
  631 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  632 | //| GetSingleData (Private Helper)                                   |
  633 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  634 | double CIndicatorUtils::GetSingleData(int handle, int buffer_num, int shift)
  635 | {
  636 |     if (GetData(handle, buffer_num, shift, 1, m_SingleValueBuffer)) {
  637 |         return m_SingleValueBuffer[0];
  638 |     }
  639 |     return EMPTY_VALUE;
  640 | }
  641 | 
  642 | } // END namespace ApexPullback
  643 | #endif // INDICATORUTILS_MQH_

    4 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    5 | 
    6 | #ifndef JSONPARSER_MQH_
    7 | #define JSONPARSER_MQH_
    8 | 
    9 | #include "CommonStructs.mqh"
   10 | 
   11 | // BẮT ĐẦU NAMESPACE
   12 | namespace ApexPullback {
   13 | 
   14 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   15 | //| Enhanced JSON Parser Class                                       |
   16 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   17 | class CJSONParser {
   18 | private:
   19 |     string m_lastError;
   20 |     bool   m_strictMode;
   21 |     
   22 |     // Helper methods
   23 |     string TrimWhitespace(const string& str) const;
   24 |     bool   IsValidJSONChar(const ushort ch) const;
   25 |     string EscapeString(const string& str) const;
   26 |     string UnescapeString(const string& str) const;
   27 |     int    FindNextToken(const string& json, int startPos, const string& token) const;
   28 |     bool   ValidateJSONStructure(const string& json) const;
   29 |     
   30 | public:
   31 |     // Constructor
   32 |     CJSONParser(bool strictMode = true);
   33 |     ~CJSONParser();
   34 |     
   35 |     // Core parsing methods
   36 |     bool   ParseString(const string& json, const string& key, string& result);
   37 |     bool   ParseDouble(const string& json, const string& key, double& result);
   38 |     bool   ParseInt(const string& json, const string& key, int& result);
   39 |     bool   ParseBool(const string& json, const string& key, bool& result);
   40 |     bool   ParseDateTime(const string& json, const string& key, datetime& result);
   41 |     
   42 |     // Array parsing methods
   43 |     bool   ParseStringArray(const string& json, const string& key, string& result[]) const;
   44 |     bool   ParseDoubleArray(const string& json, const string& key, double& result[]) const;
   45 |     
   46 |     // Object validation
   47 |     bool   ValidateJSON(const string& json);
   48 |     bool   HasKey(const string& json, const string& key) const;
   49 |     
   50 |     // JSON building methods
   51 |     string BuildJSONString(const string& key, const string& value) const;
   52 |     string BuildJSONNumber(const string& key, double value, int precision = 5) const;
   53 |     string BuildJSONBool(const string& key, bool value) const;
   54 |     string BuildJSONDateTime(const string& key, datetime value) const;
   55 |     
   56 |     // Utility methods
   57 |     string GetLastError() const { return m_lastError; }
   58 |     void   ClearError() { m_lastError = ""; }
   59 |     bool   IsStrictMode() const { return m_strictMode; }
   60 |     void   SetStrictMode(bool strict) { m_strictMode = strict; }
   61 | };
   62 | 
   63 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   64 | //| Constructor                                                      |
   65 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   66 | CJSONParser::CJSONParser(bool strictMode = true) {
   67 |     m_strictMode = strictMode;
   68 |     m_lastError = "";
   69 | }
   70 |

   75 |     // Cleanup if needed

   78 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   79 | //| Parse String Value from JSON                                     |
   80 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   81 | bool CJSONParser::ParseString(const string& json, const string& key, string& result) {
   82 |     if (json == "" || key == "") {
   83 |         m_lastError = "Empty JSON or key";
   84 |         return false;
   85 |     }
   86 |     
   87 |     // Look for key pattern: "key": "value"
   88 |     string searchPattern = "\"" + key + "\":";
   89 |     int startPos = StringFind(json, searchPattern);
   90 |     
   91 |     if (startPos == -1) {
   92 |         m_lastError = "Key '" + key + "' not found";
   93 |         return false;
   94 |     }
   95 |     
   96 |     // Find start of value, skipping whitespace
   97 |     int valueStart = startPos + StringLen(searchPattern);
   98 |     while (valueStart < StringLen(json) && 
   99 |            (StringGetCharacter(json, valueStart) == ' ' || 
  100 |             StringGetCharacter(json, valueStart) == '\t' ||
  101 |             StringGetCharacter(json, valueStart) == '\n' ||
  102 |             StringGetCharacter(json, valueStart) == '\r')) {
  103 |         valueStart++;
  104 |     }
  105 |     
  106 |     // Value must start with a quote
  107 |     if (valueStart >= StringLen(json) || StringGetCharacter(json, valueStart) != '"') {
  108 |         m_lastError = "Invalid string format for key '" + key + "', expected '\"'";
  109 |         return false;
  110 |     }
  111 |     valueStart++; // Skip opening quote
  112 |     
  113 |     // Find end of value (handle escaped quotes)
  114 |     int valueEnd = valueStart;
  115 |     bool escaped = false;
  116 |     
  117 |     while (valueEnd < StringLen(json)) {
  118 |         ushort ch = StringGetCharacter(json, valueEnd);
  119 |         
  120 |         if (escaped) {
  121 |             escaped = false;
  122 |         } else if (ch == '\\') {
  123 |             escaped = true;
  124 |         } else if (ch == '"') {
  125 |             break;
  126 |         }
  127 |         valueEnd++;
  128 |     }
  129 |     
  130 |     if (valueEnd >= StringLen(json)) {
  131 |         m_lastError = "Unterminated string for key '" + key + "'";
  132 |         return false;
  133 |     }
  134 |     
  135 |     result = StringSubstr(json, valueStart, valueEnd - valueStart);
  136 |     
  137 |     // Unescape if needed
  138 |     if (StringFind(result, "\\") != -1) {
  139 |         result = UnescapeString(result);
  140 |     }
  141 |     
  142 |     return true;
  143 | }
  144 | 
  145 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  146 | //| Parse Double Value from JSON                                     |
  147 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  148 | bool CJSONParser::ParseDouble(const string& json, const string& key, double& result) {
  149 |     if (json == "" || key == "") {
  150 |         m_lastError = "Empty JSON or key";
  151 |         return false;
  152 |     }
  153 |     
  154 |     // Look for key pattern: "key": number
  155 |     string searchPattern = "\"" + key + "\":";
  156 |     int startPos = StringFind(json, searchPattern);
  157 |     
  158 |     if (startPos == -1) {
  159 |         m_lastError = "Key '" + key + "' not found";
  160 |         return false;
  161 |     }
  162 |     
  163 |     startPos += StringLen(searchPattern);
  164 |     
  165 |     // Skip whitespace
  166 |     while (startPos < StringLen(json) && 
  167 |            (StringGetCharacter(json, startPos) == ' ' || 
  168 |             StringGetCharacter(json, startPos) == '\t' ||
  169 |             StringGetCharacter(json, startPos) == '\n' ||
  170 |             StringGetCharacter(json, startPos) == '\r')) {
  171 |         startPos++;
  172 |     }
  173 |     
  174 |     // Find end of number
  175 |     int endPos = startPos;
  176 |     while (endPos < StringLen(json)) {
  177 |         ushort ch = StringGetCharacter(json, endPos);
  178 |         if (ch == ',' || ch == '}' || ch == ']' || ch == ' ' || 
  179 |             ch == '\t' || ch == '\n' || ch == '\r') {
  180 |             break;
  181 |         }
  182 |         endPos++;
  183 |     }
  184 |     
  185 |     if (endPos == startPos) {
  186 |         m_lastError = "No numeric value found for key '" + key + "'";
  187 |         return false;
  188 |     }
  189 |     
  190 |     string valueStr = StringSubstr(json, startPos, endPos - startPos);
  191 |     valueStr = TrimWhitespace(valueStr);
  192 |     
  193 |     // Validate numeric format
  194 |     bool hasDecimal = false;
  195 |     bool hasSign = false;
  196 |     
  197 |     for (int i = 0; i < StringLen(valueStr); i++) {
  198 |         ushort ch = StringGetCharacter(valueStr, i);
  199 |         
  200 |         if (ch == '+' || ch == '-') {
  201 |             if (i != 0 || hasSign) {
  202 |                 m_lastError = "Invalid numeric format for key '" + key + "'";
  203 |                 return false;
  204 |             }
  205 |             hasSign = true;
  206 |         } else if (ch == '.') {
  207 |             if (hasDecimal) {
  208 |                 m_lastError = "Multiple decimal points for key '" + key + "'";
  209 |                 return false;
  210 |             }
  211 |             hasDecimal = true;
  212 |         } else if (ch < '0' || ch > '9') {
  213 |             m_lastError = "Invalid character in number for key '" + key + "'";
  214 |             return false;
  215 |         }
  216 |     }
  217 |     
  218 |     result = StringToDouble(valueStr);
  219 |     return true;
  220 | }
  221 | 
  222 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  223 | //| Parse Integer Value from JSON                                    |
  224 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  225 | bool CJSONParser::ParseInt(const string& json, const string& key, int& result) {
  226 |     double doubleResult;
  227 |     if (!ParseDouble(json, key, doubleResult)) {
  228 |         return false;
  229 |     }
  230 |     
  231 |     // Check if it's actually an integer
  232 |     if (doubleResult != (int)doubleResult) {
  233 |         m_lastError = "Value for key '" + key + "' is not an integer";
  234 |         return false;
  235 |     }
  236 |     
  237 |     result = (int)doubleResult;
  238 |     return true;
  239 | }
  240 | 
  241 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  242 | //| Parse Boolean Value from JSON                                    |
  243 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  244 | bool CJSONParser::ParseBool(const string& json, const string& key, bool& result) {
  245 |     string stringResult;
  246 |     if (!ParseString(json, key, stringResult)) {
  247 |         // Try parsing as unquoted boolean
  248 |         string searchPattern = "\"" + key + "\":";
  249 |         int startPos = StringFind(json, searchPattern);
  250 |         
  251 |         if (startPos == -1) {
  252 |             m_lastError = "Key '" + key + "' not found";
  253 |             return false;
  254 |         }
  255 |         
  256 |         startPos += StringLen(searchPattern);
  257 |         
  258 |         // Skip whitespace
  259 |         while (startPos < StringLen(json) && 
  260 |                (StringGetCharacter(json, startPos) == ' ' || 
  261 |                 StringGetCharacter(json, startPos) == '\t')) {
  262 |             startPos++;
  263 |         }
  264 |         
  265 |         if (StringSubstr(json, startPos, 4) == "true") {
  266 |             result = true;
  267 |             return true;
  268 |         } else if (StringSubstr(json, startPos, 5) == "false") {
  269 |             result = false;
  270 |             return true;
  271 |         }
  272 |         
  273 |         return false;
  274 |     }
  275 |     
  276 |     StringToLower(stringResult);
  277 |     if (stringResult == "true" || stringResult == "1") {
  278 |         result = true;
  279 |         return true;
  280 |     } else if (stringResult == "false" || stringResult == "0") {
  281 |         result = false;
  282 |         return true;
  283 |     }
  284 |     
  285 |     m_lastError = "Invalid boolean value for key '" + key + "'";
  286 |     return false;
  287 | }
  288 | 
  289 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  290 | //| Parse DateTime Value from JSON                                   |
  291 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  292 | bool CJSONParser::ParseDateTime(const string& json, const string& key, datetime& result) {
  293 |     double timestamp;
  294 |     if (!ParseDouble(json, key, timestamp)) {
  295 |         return false;
  296 |     }
  297 |     
  298 |     result = (datetime)timestamp;
  299 |     return true;
  300 | }
  301 | 
  302 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  303 | //| Validate JSON Structure                                          |
  304 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  305 | bool CJSONParser::ValidateJSON(const string& json) {
  306 |     if (json == "") {
  307 |         m_lastError = "Empty JSON string";
  308 |         return false;
  309 |     }
  310 |     
  311 |     string trimmed = TrimWhitespace(json);
  312 |     
  313 |     if (StringLen(trimmed) < 2) {
  314 |         m_lastError = "JSON too short";
  315 |         return false;
  316 |     }
  317 |     
  318 |     // Must start with { and end with }
  319 |     if (StringGetCharacter(trimmed, 0) != '{' || 
  320 |         StringGetCharacter(trimmed, StringLen(trimmed) - 1) != '}') {
  321 |         m_lastError = "JSON must be an object (start with { and end with })";
  322 |         return false;
  323 |     }
  324 |     
  325 |     // Basic bracket matching
  326 |     int braceCount = 0;
  327 |     int bracketCount = 0;
  328 |     bool inString = false;
  329 |     bool escaped = false;
  330 |     
  331 |     for (int i = 0; i < StringLen(trimmed); i++) {
  332 |         ushort ch = StringGetCharacter(trimmed, i);
  333 |         
  334 |         if (escaped) {
  335 |             escaped = false;
  336 |             continue;
  337 |         }
  338 |         
  339 |         if (ch == '\\') {
  340 |             escaped = true;
  341 |             continue;
  342 |         }
  343 |         
  344 |         if (ch == '"') {
  345 |             inString = !inString;
  346 |             continue;
  347 |         }
  348 |         
  349 |         if (!inString) {
  350 |             if (ch == '{') braceCount++;
  351 |             else if (ch == '}') braceCount--;
  352 |             else if (ch == '[') bracketCount++;
  353 |             else if (ch == ']') bracketCount--;
  354 |             
  355 |             if (braceCount < 0 || bracketCount < 0) {
  356 |                 m_lastError = "Mismatched brackets in JSON";
  357 |                 return false;
  358 |             }
  359 |         }
  360 |     }
  361 |     
  362 |     if (braceCount != 0 || bracketCount != 0) {
  363 |         m_lastError = "Unmatched brackets in JSON";
  364 |         return false;
  365 |     }
  366 |     
  367 |     if (inString) {
  368 |         m_lastError = "Unterminated string in JSON";
  369 |         return false;
  370 |     }
  371 |     
  372 |     return true;
  373 | }
  374 | 
  375 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  376 | //| Check if Key Exists in JSON                                      |
  377 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  378 | bool CJSONParser::HasKey(const string& json, const string& key) const {
  379 |     string searchPattern = "\"" + key + "\":";
  380 |     return StringFind(json, searchPattern) != -1;
  381 | }
  382 | 
  383 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  384 | //| Build JSON String Field                                          |
  385 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  386 | string CJSONParser::BuildJSONString(const string& key, const string& value) const {
  387 |     return "\"" + key + "\": \"" + EscapeString(value) + "\"";
  388 | }
  389 | 
  390 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  391 | //| Build JSON Number Field                                          |
  392 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  393 | string CJSONParser::BuildJSONNumber(const string& key, double value, int precision = 5) const {
  394 |     return "\"" + key + "\": " + DoubleToString(value, precision);
  395 | }
  396 | 
  397 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  398 | //| Build JSON Boolean Field                                         |
  399 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  400 | string CJSONParser::BuildJSONBool(const string& key, bool value) const {
  401 |     return "\"" + key + "\": " + (value ? "true" : "false");
  402 | }
  403 | 
  404 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  405 | //| Build JSON DateTime Field                                        |
  406 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  407 | string CJSONParser::BuildJSONDateTime(const string& key, datetime value) const {
  408 |     return "\"" + key + "\": " + IntegerToString((int)value);
  409 | }
  410 | 
  411 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  412 | //| Helper: Trim Whitespace                                          |
  413 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  414 | string CJSONParser::TrimWhitespace(const string& str) const {
  415 |     if (str == "") return "";
  416 |     
  417 |     int start = 0;
  418 |     int end = StringLen(str) - 1;
  419 |     
  420 |     // Trim from start
  421 |     while (start <= end) {
  422 |         ushort ch = StringGetCharacter(str, start);
  423 |         if (ch != ' ' && ch != '\t' && ch != '\n' && ch != '\r') break;
  424 |         start++;
  425 |     }
  426 |     
  427 |     // Trim from end
  428 |     while (end >= start) {
  429 |         ushort ch = StringGetCharacter(str, end);
  430 |         if (ch != ' ' && ch != '\t' && ch != '\n' && ch != '\r') break;
  431 |         end--;
  432 |     }
  433 |     
  434 |     if (start > end) return "";
  435 |     
  436 |     return StringSubstr(str, start, end - start + 1);
  437 | }
  438 | 
  439 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  440 | //| Helper: Escape String for JSON                                   |
  441 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  442 | string CJSONParser::EscapeString(const string& str) const {
  443 |     string result = str;
  444 |     
  445 |     // Replace backslashes first
  446 |     StringReplace(result, "\\", "\\\\");
  447 |     
  448 |     // Replace quotes
  449 |     StringReplace(result, "\"", "\\\"");
  450 |     
  451 |     // Replace control characters
  452 |     StringReplace(result, "\n", "\\n");
  453 |     StringReplace(result, "\r", "\\r");
  454 |     StringReplace(result, "\t", "\\t");
  455 |     
  456 |     return result;
  457 | }
  458 | 
  459 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  460 | //| Helper: Unescape String from JSON                                |
  461 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  462 | string CJSONParser::UnescapeString(const string& str) const {
  463 |     string result = str;
  464 |     
  465 |     // Replace escaped characters
  466 |     StringReplace(result, "\\n", "\n");
  467 |     StringReplace(result, "\\r", "\r");
  468 |     StringReplace(result, "\\t", "\t");
  469 |     StringReplace(result, "\\\"", "\"");
  470 |     StringReplace(result, "\\\\", "\\");
  471 |     
  472 |     return result;
  473 | }
  474 | 
  475 | } // End namespace ApexPullback
  476 | 
  477 | #endif // JSONPARSER_MQH_
