  214 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  215 | //| Initialize                                                       |
  216 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  217 | bool CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::Initialize(EAContext* context) {
  218 |     if (context == NULL) {
  219 |         Print("[ParameterStabilityAnalyzer] ERROR: Context is NULL");
  220 |         return false;
  221 |     }
  222 |     
  223 |     m_Context = context;
  224 |     m_Logger = context->Logger;
  225 |     
  226 |     if (m_Logger != NULL) {
  227 |         m_Logger->LogInfo("ParameterStabilityAnalyzer initialized successfully");
  228 |     }
  229 |     
  230 |     return true;
  231 | }
  232 | 
  233 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  234 | //| Set Custom Thresholds                                           |
  235 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  236 | void CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::SetThresholds(double unstable, double critical, double attention) {
  237 |     m_UnstableThreshold = MathMax(0.1, MathMin(1.0, unstable));
  238 |     m_CriticalThreshold = MathMax(0.1, MathMin(1.0, critical));
  239 |     m_AttentionThreshold = MathMax(0.1, MathMin(1.0, attention));
  240 |     
  241 |     if (m_Logger != NULL) {
  242 |         string msg = StringFormat("Stability thresholds updated: Attention=%.2f, Unstable=%.2f, Critical=%.2f",
  243 |                                 m_AttentionThreshold, m_UnstableThreshold, m_CriticalThreshold);
  244 |         m_Logger->LogInfo(msg);
  245 |     }
  246 | }
  247 | 
  248 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  249 | //| Set Analysis Parameters                                          |
  250 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  251 | void CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::SetAnalysisParameters(int minSamples, int lookbackPeriod) {
  252 |     m_MinSamplesForAnalysis = MathMax(5, minSamples);
  253 |     m_AnalysisLookbackPeriod = MathMax(10, lookbackPeriod);
  254 |     
  255 |     if (m_Logger != NULL) {
  256 |         string msg = StringFormat("Analysis parameters updated: MinSamples=%d, Lookback=%d",
  257 |                                 m_MinSamplesForAnalysis, m_AnalysisLookbackPeriod);
  258 |         m_Logger->LogInfo(msg);
  259 |     }
  260 | }
  261 | 
  262 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  263 | //| Record Parameter Snapshot                                        |
  264 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  265 | void CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::RecordParameterSnapshot() {
  266 |     if (m_Context == NULL) return;
  267 |     
  268 |     ParameterSnapshot snapshot;
  269 |     CaptureCurrentParameters(snapshot);
  270 |     
  271 |     // Add to history
  272 |     int index = m_HistorySize % m_MaxHistorySize;
  273 |     m_ParameterHistory[index] = snapshot;
  274 |     
  275 |     if (m_HistorySize < m_MaxHistorySize) {
  276 |         m_HistorySize++;
  277 |     }
  278 |     
  279 |     if (m_Logger != NULL) {
  280 |         string msg = StringFormat("Parameter snapshot recorded: Risk=%.2f%%, ATR=%d, EMA=%d/%d/%d",
  281 |                                 snapshot.RiskPercent, snapshot.ATRPeriod,
  282 |                                 snapshot.EMAPeriod1, snapshot.EMAPeriod2, snapshot.EMAPeriod3);
  283 |         m_Logger->LogDebug(msg);
  284 |     }
  285 | }
  286 | 
  287 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  288 | //| Capture Current Parameters                                       |
  289 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  290 | void CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::CaptureCurrentParameters(ParameterSnapshot& snapshot) {
  291 |     snapshot.Timestamp = TimeCurrent();
  292 |     
  293 |     // Capture current parameters from context
  294 |     if (m_Context != NULL) {
  295 |         snapshot.RiskPercent = m_Context->RiskPercent;
  296 |         snapshot.ATRPeriod = m_Context->ATRPeriod;
  297 |         snapshot.ATRMultiplier = m_Context->ATRMultiplier;
  298 |         snapshot.EMAPeriod1 = m_Context->EMAPeriod1;
  299 |         snapshot.EMAPeriod2 = m_Context->EMAPeriod2;
  300 |         snapshot.EMAPeriod3 = m_Context->EMAPeriod3;
  301 |         snapshot.PullbackThreshold = m_Context->PullbackThreshold;
  302 |         snapshot.TrendStrength = m_Context->TrendStrength;
  303 |         snapshot.VolatilityFilter = m_Context->VolatilityFilter;
  304 |         snapshot.CorrelationThreshold = m_Context->CorrelationThreshold;
  305 |         
  306 |         // Capture performance metrics if PerformanceTracker is available
  307 |         if (m_Context->PerformanceTracker != NULL) {
  308 |             snapshot.WinRate = m_Context->PerformanceTracker->GetWinRate();
  309 |             snapshot.ProfitFactor = m_Context->PerformanceTracker->GetProfitFactor();
  310 |             snapshot.Expectancy = m_Context->PerformanceTracker->GetExpectancy();
  311 |             snapshot.MaxDrawdown = m_Context->PerformanceTracker->GetMaxDrawdown();
  312 |         }
  313 |     }
  314 | }
  315 | 
  316 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  317 | //| Analyze Stability                                                |
  318 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  319 | void CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::AnalyzeStability() {
  320 |     if (m_HistorySize < m_MinSamplesForAnalysis) {
  321 |         m_CurrentMetrics.InstabilityIndex = 0.0;
  322 |         return;
  323 |     }
  324 |     
  325 |     // Calculate individual components
  326 |     m_CurrentMetrics.ParameterVariance = CalculateParameterVariance();
  327 |     m_CurrentMetrics.PerformanceCorrelation = CalculatePerformanceCorrelation();
  328 |     m_CurrentMetrics.TrendStability = CalculateTrendStability();
  329 |     
  330 |     // Calculate overall instability index (weighted average)
  331 |     double weights[] = {0.4, 0.3, 0.3}; // Variance, Correlation, Trend
  332 |     double components[] = {
  333 |         m_CurrentMetrics.ParameterVariance,
  334 |         MathAbs(m_CurrentMetrics.PerformanceCorrelation), // Use absolute value
  335 |         1.0 - m_CurrentMetrics.TrendStability // Invert trend stability
  336 |     };
  337 |     
  338 |     double weightedSum = 0.0;
  339 |     for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
  340 |         weightedSum += components[i] * weights[i];
  341 |     }
  342 |     
  343 |     m_CurrentMetrics.InstabilityIndex = MathMax(0.0, MathMin(1.0, weightedSum));
  344 |     
  345 |     // Update flags
  346 |     UpdateStabilityFlags();
  347 |     
  348 |     // Update timestamp
  349 |     m_CurrentMetrics.LastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  350 |     
  351 |     // Check for alerts
  352 |     CheckAndTriggerAlerts();
  353 |     
  354 |     if (m_Logger != NULL) {
  355 |         string msg = StringFormat("Stability Analysis: Index=%.3f, Variance=%.3f, Correlation=%.3f, Trend=%.3f",
  356 |                                 m_CurrentMetrics.InstabilityIndex,
  357 |                                 m_CurrentMetrics.ParameterVariance,
  358 |                                 m_CurrentMetrics.PerformanceCorrelation,
  359 |                                 m_CurrentMetrics.TrendStability);
  360 |         m_Logger->LogInfo(msg);
  361 |     }
  362 | }
  363 | 
  364 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  365 | //| Calculate Parameter Variance                                     |
  366 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  367 | double CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::CalculateParameterVariance() {
  368 |     int lookback = MathMin(m_AnalysisLookbackPeriod, m_HistorySize);
  369 |     if (lookback < 2) return 0.0;
  370 |     
  371 |     // Extract parameter arrays for analysis
  372 |     double riskValues[];
  373 |     double atrValues[];
  374 |     double emaValues[];
  375 |     double thresholdValues[];
  376 |     
  377 |     ArrayResize(riskValues, lookback);
  378 |     ArrayResize(atrValues, lookback);
  379 |     ArrayResize(emaValues, lookback);
  380 |     ArrayResize(thresholdValues, lookback);
  381 |     
  382 |     for (int i = 0; i < lookback; i++) {
  383 |         int index = (m_HistorySize - lookback + i) % m_MaxHistorySize;
  384 |         riskValues[i] = m_ParameterHistory[index].RiskPercent;
  385 |         atrValues[i] = m_ParameterHistory[index].ATRPeriod;
  386 |         emaValues[i] = (m_ParameterHistory[index].EMAPeriod1 + 
  387 |                        m_ParameterHistory[index].EMAPeriod2 + 
  388 |                        m_ParameterHistory[index].EMAPeriod3) / 3.0;
  389 |         thresholdValues[i] = m_ParameterHistory[index].PullbackThreshold;
  390 |     }
  391 |     
  392 |     // Calculate individual instabilities
  393 |     m_CurrentMetrics.RiskInstability = CalculateIndividualInstability(riskValues, lookback, 5.0); // 5% range
  394 |     m_CurrentMetrics.ATRInstability = CalculateIndividualInstability(atrValues, lookback, 50.0); // 50 period range
  395 |     m_CurrentMetrics.EMAInstability = CalculateIndividualInstability(emaValues, lookback, 100.0); // 100 period range
  396 |     m_CurrentMetrics.ThresholdInstability = CalculateIndividualInstability(thresholdValues, lookback, 1.0); // 1.0 range
  397 |     
  398 |     // Return weighted average
  399 |     double weights[] = {0.3, 0.25, 0.25, 0.2};
  400 |     double instabilities[] = {
  401 |         m_CurrentMetrics.RiskInstability,
  402 |         m_CurrentMetrics.ATRInstability,
  403 |         m_CurrentMetrics.EMAInstability,
  404 |         m_CurrentMetrics.ThresholdInstability
  405 |     };
  406 |     
  407 |     double weightedVariance = 0.0;
  408 |     for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
  409 |         weightedVariance += instabilities[i] * weights[i];
  410 |     }
  411 |     
  412 |     return weightedVariance;
  413 | }
  414 | 
  415 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  416 | //| Calculate Individual Parameter Instability                       |
  417 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  418 | double CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::CalculateIndividualInstability(const double values[], int count, double normalizeRange) {
  419 |     if (count < 2) return 0.0;
  420 |     
  421 |     // Calculate mean
  422 |     double sum = 0.0;
  423 |     for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  424 |         sum += values[i];
  425 |     }
  426 |     double mean = sum / count;
  427 |     
  428 |     // Calculate variance
  429 |     double variance = 0.0;
  430 |     for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
  431 |         double diff = values[i] - mean;
  432 |         variance += diff * diff;
  433 |     }
  434 |     variance /= count;
  435 |     
  436 |     // Normalize by range and return as instability score (0-1)
  437 |     double normalizedVariance = MathSqrt(variance) / normalizeRange;
  438 |     return MathMin(1.0, normalizedVariance);
  439 | }
  440 | 
  441 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  442 | //| Calculate Performance Correlation                                |
  443 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  444 | double CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::CalculatePerformanceCorrelation() {
  445 |     int lookback = MathMin(m_AnalysisLookbackPeriod, m_HistorySize);
  446 |     if (lookback < 5) return 0.0;
  447 |     
  448 |     // Calculate correlation between parameter changes and performance changes
  449 |     double paramChanges[];
  450 |     double perfChanges[];
  451 |     
  452 |     ArrayResize(paramChanges, lookback - 1);
  453 |     ArrayResize(perfChanges, lookback - 1);
  454 |     
  455 |     for (int i = 1; i < lookback; i++) {
  456 |         int currentIndex = (m_HistorySize - lookback + i) % m_MaxHistorySize;
  457 |         int previousIndex = (m_HistorySize - lookback + i - 1) % m_MaxHistorySize;
  458 |         
  459 |         // Calculate parameter change magnitude
  460 |         double riskChange = MathAbs(m_ParameterHistory[currentIndex].RiskPercent - 
  461 |                                   m_ParameterHistory[previousIndex].RiskPercent);
  462 |         double atrChange = MathAbs(m_ParameterHistory[currentIndex].ATRPeriod - 
  463 |                                  m_ParameterHistory[previousIndex].ATRPeriod);
  464 |         
  465 |         paramChanges[i-1] = riskChange + atrChange / 10.0; // Normalize ATR change
  466 |         
  467 |         // Calculate performance change
  468 |         double perfChange = m_ParameterHistory[currentIndex].WinRate - 
  469 |                           m_ParameterHistory[previousIndex].WinRate;
  470 |         perfChanges[i-1] = perfChange;
  471 |     }
  472 |     
  473 |     // Calculate correlation coefficient
  474 |     double correlation = 0.0;
  475 |     if (lookback > 5) {
  476 |         // Simple correlation calculation
  477 |         double sumX = 0, sumY = 0, sumXY = 0, sumX2 = 0, sumY2 = 0;
  478 |         int n = lookback - 1;
  479 |         
  480 |         for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
  481 |             sumX += paramChanges[i];
  482 |             sumY += perfChanges[i];
  483 |             sumXY += paramChanges[i] * perfChanges[i];
  484 |             sumX2 += paramChanges[i] * paramChanges[i];
  485 |             sumY2 += perfChanges[i] * perfChanges[i];
  486 |         }
  487 |         
  488 |         double denominator = MathSqrt((n * sumX2 - sumX * sumX) * (n * sumY2 - sumY * sumY));
  489 |         if (denominator > 0) {
  490 |             correlation = (n * sumXY - sumX * sumY) / denominator;
  491 |         }
  492 |     }
  493 |     
  494 |     return correlation;
  495 | }
  496 | 
  497 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  498 | //| Calculate Trend Stability                                        |
  499 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  500 | double CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::CalculateTrendStability() {
  501 |     int lookback = MathMin(m_AnalysisLookbackPeriod, m_HistorySize);
  502 |     if (lookback < 5) return 1.0; // Assume stable if not enough data
  503 |     
  504 |     // Calculate trend consistency for key parameters
  505 |     double riskTrend = 0.0;
  506 |     double atrTrend = 0.0;
  507 |     
  508 |     // Simple trend calculation using first and last values
  509 |     int firstIndex = (m_HistorySize - lookback) % m_MaxHistorySize;
  510 |     int lastIndex = (m_HistorySize - 1) % m_MaxHistorySize;
  511 |     
  512 |     double riskChange = m_ParameterHistory[lastIndex].RiskPercent - 
  513 |                        m_ParameterHistory[firstIndex].RiskPercent;
  514 |     double atrChange = m_ParameterHistory[lastIndex].ATRPeriod - 
  515 |                       m_ParameterHistory[firstIndex].ATRPeriod;
  516 |     
  517 |     // Calculate trend consistency (how much parameters oscillate around trend)
  518 |     double riskOscillation = 0.0;
  519 |     double atrOscillation = 0.0;
  520 |     
  521 |     for (int i = 1; i < lookback - 1; i++) {
  522 |         int index = (m_HistorySize - lookback + i) % m_MaxHistorySize;
  523 |         
  524 |         // Expected value based on linear trend
  525 |         double progress = (double)i / (lookback - 1);
  526 |         double expectedRisk = m_ParameterHistory[firstIndex].RiskPercent + riskChange * progress;
  527 |         double expectedATR = m_ParameterHistory[firstIndex].ATRPeriod + atrChange * progress;
  528 |         
  529 |         // Actual oscillation from trend
  530 |         riskOscillation += MathAbs(m_ParameterHistory[index].RiskPercent - expectedRisk);
  531 |         atrOscillation += MathAbs(m_ParameterHistory[index].ATRPeriod - expectedATR);
  532 |     }
  533 |     
  534 |     // Normalize oscillations
  535 |     riskOscillation /= (lookback - 2);
  536 |     atrOscillation /= (lookback - 2);
  537 |     
  538 |     // Convert to stability score (lower oscillation = higher stability)
  539 |     double riskStability = MathMax(0.0, 1.0 - riskOscillation / 2.0); // Normalize by 2%
  540 |     double atrStability = MathMax(0.0, 1.0 - atrOscillation / 10.0); // Normalize by 10 periods
  541 |     
  542 |     return (riskStability + atrStability) / 2.0;
  543 | }
  544 | 
  545 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  546 | //| Update Stability Flags                                          |
  547 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  548 | void CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::UpdateStabilityFlags() {
  549 |     m_CurrentMetrics.RequiresAttention = (m_CurrentMetrics.InstabilityIndex >= m_AttentionThreshold);
  550 |     m_CurrentMetrics.IsUnstable = (m_CurrentMetrics.InstabilityIndex >= m_UnstableThreshold);
  551 |     m_CurrentMetrics.ShouldTriggerCircuitBreaker = (m_CurrentMetrics.InstabilityIndex >= m_CriticalThreshold);
  552 | }
  553 | 
  554 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  555 | //| Check and Trigger Alerts                                        |
  556 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  557 | void CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::CheckAndTriggerAlerts() {
  558 |     bool shouldAlert = false;
  559 |     string alertLevel = "";
  560 |     
  561 |     if (m_CurrentMetrics.ShouldTriggerCircuitBreaker) {
  562 |         shouldAlert = true;
  563 |         alertLevel = "CRITICAL";
  564 |     } else if (m_CurrentMetrics.IsUnstable) {
  565 |         shouldAlert = true;
  566 |         alertLevel = "WARNING";
  567 |     } else if (m_CurrentMetrics.RequiresAttention) {
  568 |         shouldAlert = true;
  569 |         alertLevel = "INFO";
  570 |     }
  571 |     
  572 |     // Check cooldown
  573 |     if (shouldAlert && (TimeCurrent() - m_LastAlertTime) >= (m_AlertCooldownMinutes * 60)) {
  574 |         string alertMsg = StringFormat("PARAMETER STABILITY ALERT [%s]: Instability Index=%.3f",
  575 |                                      alertLevel, m_CurrentMetrics.InstabilityIndex);
  576 |         
  577 |         if (m_Logger != NULL) {
  578 |             if (alertLevel == "CRITICAL") {
  579 |                 m_Logger->LogError(alertMsg);
  580 |             } else if (alertLevel == "WARNING") {
  581 |                 m_Logger->LogWarning(alertMsg);
  582 |             } else {
  583 |                 m_Logger->LogInfo(alertMsg);
  584 |             }
  585 |         }
  586 |         
  587 |         // Send notification for critical alerts
  588 |         if (alertLevel == "CRITICAL") {
  589 |             SendNotification(alertMsg);
  590 |         }
  591 |         
  592 |         m_LastAlertTime = TimeCurrent();
  593 |     }
  594 | }
  595 | 
  596 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  597 | //| Get Risk Reduction Factor                                        |
  598 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  599 | double CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::GetRiskReductionFactor() {
  600 |     if (m_CurrentMetrics.ShouldTriggerCircuitBreaker) {
  601 |         return 0.1; // Reduce to 10% of normal risk
  602 |     } else if (m_CurrentMetrics.IsUnstable) {
  603 |         return 0.5; // Reduce to 50% of normal risk
  604 |     } else if (m_CurrentMetrics.RequiresAttention) {
  605 |         return 0.8; // Reduce to 80% of normal risk
  606 |     }
  607 |     
  608 |     return 1.0; // No reduction
  609 | }
  610 | 
  611 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  612 | //| Should Reduce Trading                                            |
  613 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  614 | bool CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::ShouldReduceTrading() {
  615 |     return m_CurrentMetrics.IsUnstable;
  616 | }
  617 | 
  618 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  619 | //| Should Pause Optimization                                        |
  620 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  621 | bool CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::ShouldPauseOptimization() {
  622 |     return m_CurrentMetrics.ShouldTriggerCircuitBreaker;
  623 | }
  624 | 
  625 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  626 | //| Generate Stability Report                                        |
  627 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  628 | void CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::GenerateStabilityReport(string& report) {
  629 |     report = "\n=== PARAMETER STABILITY REPORT ===\n";
  630 |     report += StringFormat("Instability Index: %.3f\n", m_CurrentMetrics.InstabilityIndex);
  631 |     report += StringFormat("Parameter Variance: %.3f\n", m_CurrentMetrics.ParameterVariance);
  632 |     report += StringFormat("Performance Correlation: %.3f\n", m_CurrentMetrics.PerformanceCorrelation);
  633 |     report += StringFormat("Trend Stability: %.3f\n", m_CurrentMetrics.TrendStability);
  634 |     
  635 |     report += "\n--- Individual Parameter Instabilities ---\n";
  636 |     report += StringFormat("Risk Instability: %.3f\n", m_CurrentMetrics.RiskInstability);
  637 |     report += StringFormat("ATR Instability: %.3f\n", m_CurrentMetrics.ATRInstability);
  638 |     report += StringFormat("EMA Instability: %.3f\n", m_CurrentMetrics.EMAInstability);
  639 |     report += StringFormat("Threshold Instability: %.3f\n", m_CurrentMetrics.ThresholdInstability);
  640 |     
  641 |     report += "\n--- Status Flags ---\n";
  642 |     report += StringFormat("Requires Attention: %s\n", m_CurrentMetrics.RequiresAttention ? "YES" : "NO");
  643 |     report += StringFormat("Is Unstable: %s\n", m_CurrentMetrics.IsUnstable ? "YES" : "NO");
  644 |     report += StringFormat("Circuit Breaker: %s\n", m_CurrentMetrics.ShouldTriggerCircuitBreaker ? "YES" : "NO");
  645 |     
  646 |     report += "\n--- Risk Management ---\n";
  647 |     report += StringFormat("Risk Reduction Factor: %.2f\n", GetRiskReductionFactor());
  648 |     report += StringFormat("Should Reduce Trading: %s\n", ShouldReduceTrading() ? "YES" : "NO");
  649 |     report += StringFormat("Should Pause Optimization: %s\n", ShouldPauseOptimization() ? "YES" : "NO");
  650 |     
  651 |     report += StringFormat("\nSamples in History: %d/%d\n", m_HistorySize, m_MaxHistorySize);
  652 |     report += StringFormat("Last Update: %s\n", TimeToString(m_CurrentMetrics.LastUpdate));
  653 | }
  654 | 
  655 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  656 | //| Reset                                                            |
  657 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  658 | void CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::Reset() {
  659 |     m_CurrentMetrics = StabilityMetrics();
  660 |     m_HistorySize = 0;
  661 |     m_LastAlertTime = 0;
  662 |     
  663 |     // Clear history array
  664 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_MaxHistorySize; i++) {
  665 |         m_ParameterHistory[i] = ParameterSnapshot();
  666 |     }
  667 |     
  668 |     if (m_Logger != NULL) {
  669 |         m_Logger->LogInfo("ParameterStabilityAnalyzer reset completed");
  670 |     }
  671 | }
  672 | 
  673 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  674 | //| Get Parameter Trends                                             |
  675 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  676 | void CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::GetParameterTrends(double& riskTrend, double& atrTrend, double& emaTrend) {
  677 |     riskTrend = 0.0;
  678 |     atrTrend = 0.0;
  679 |     emaTrend = 0.0;
  680 |     
  681 |     if (m_HistorySize < 5) return;
  682 |     
  683 |     int lookback = MathMin(20, m_HistorySize);
  684 |     int firstIndex = (m_HistorySize - lookback) % m_MaxHistorySize;
  685 |     int lastIndex = (m_HistorySize - 1) % m_MaxHistorySize;
  686 |     
  687 |     // Calculate trends as percentage change
  688 |     if (m_ParameterHistory[firstIndex].RiskPercent > 0) {
  689 |         riskTrend = (m_ParameterHistory[lastIndex].RiskPercent - 
  690 |                     m_ParameterHistory[firstIndex].RiskPercent) / 
  691 |                     m_ParameterHistory[firstIndex].RiskPercent * 100.0;
  692 |     }
  693 |     
  694 |     if (m_ParameterHistory[firstIndex].ATRPeriod > 0) {
  695 |         atrTrend = (m_ParameterHistory[lastIndex].ATRPeriod - 
  696 |                    m_ParameterHistory[firstIndex].ATRPeriod) / 
  697 |                    (double)m_ParameterHistory[firstIndex].ATRPeriod * 100.0;
  698 |     }
  699 |     
  700 |     double firstEMA = (m_ParameterHistory[firstIndex].EMAPeriod1 + 
  701 |                       m_ParameterHistory[firstIndex].EMAPeriod2 + 
  702 |                       m_ParameterHistory[firstIndex].EMAPeriod3) / 3.0;
  703 |     double lastEMA = (m_ParameterHistory[lastIndex].EMAPeriod1 + 
  704 |                      m_ParameterHistory[lastIndex].EMAPeriod2 + 
  705 |                      m_ParameterHistory[lastIndex].EMAPeriod3) / 3.0;
  706 |     
  707 |     if (firstEMA > 0) {
  708 |         emaTrend = (lastEMA - firstEMA) / firstEMA * 100.0;
  709 |     }
  710 | }
  711 | 
  712 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  713 | //| Get Recent Changes                                               |
  714 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  715 | void CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::GetRecentChanges(int lookbackBars, double& avgChange, double& maxChange) {
  716 |     avgChange = 0.0;
  717 |     maxChange = 0.0;
  718 |     
  719 |     if (m_HistorySize < 2) return;
  720 |     
  721 |     int lookback = MathMin(lookbackBars, m_HistorySize - 1);
  722 |     double totalChange = 0.0;
  723 |     
  724 |     for (int i = 1; i <= lookback; i++) {
  725 |         int currentIndex = (m_HistorySize - i) % m_MaxHistorySize;
  726 |         int previousIndex = (m_HistorySize - i - 1) % m_MaxHistorySize;
  727 |         
  728 |         // Calculate total parameter change magnitude
  729 |         double riskChange = MathAbs(m_ParameterHistory[currentIndex].RiskPercent - 
  730 |                                   m_ParameterHistory[previousIndex].RiskPercent);
  731 |         double atrChange = MathAbs(m_ParameterHistory[currentIndex].ATRPeriod - 
  732 |                                  m_ParameterHistory[previousIndex].ATRPeriod) / 10.0; // Normalize
  733 |         
  734 |         double totalParamChange = riskChange + atrChange;
  735 |         totalChange += totalParamChange;
  736 |         maxChange = MathMax(maxChange, totalParamChange);
  737 |     }
  738 |     
  739 |     avgChange = totalChange / lookback;
  740 | }
  741 | 
  742 | } // namespace ApexPullback

    5 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    6 | 
    7 | #ifndef PARAMETER_STABILITY_ENHANCED_MQH_
    8 | #define PARAMETER_STABILITY_ENHANCED_MQH_
    9 | 
   10 | // Implementation cho các phương thức enhanced stability analysis
   11 | // Sử dụng công thức Normalized Change theo đề xuất kỹ thuật
   12 | 
   13 | namespace ApexPullback {
   14 | 
   15 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   16 | //| Tính toán Stability Index theo công thức Normalized Change       |
   17 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   18 | double CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::CalculateStabilityIndex()
   19 | {
   20 |     if (m_HistorySize < 2) {
   21 |         return 1.0; // Hoàn toàn ổn định nếu chưa có đủ dữ liệu
   22 |     }
   23 |     
   24 |     double totalNormalizedChange = 0.0;
   25 |     int validChanges = 0;
   26 |     
   27 |     // Định nghĩa ranges cho từng tham số (để normalize)
   28 |     struct ParameterRanges {
   29 |         double riskMin, riskMax;
   30 |         double atrMin, atrMax;
   31 |         double emaMin, emaMax;
   32 |         double pullbackMin, pullbackMax;
   33 |         double trendMin, trendMax;
   34 |         double volatilityMin, volatilityMax;
   35 |     } ranges;
   36 |     
   37 |     // Thiết lập ranges dựa trên kinh nghiệm thực tế
   38 |     ranges.riskMin = 0.1; ranges.riskMax = 5.0;           // Risk: 0.1% - 5%
   39 |     ranges.atrMin = 5; ranges.atrMax = 50;                // ATR Period: 5 - 50
   40 |     ranges.emaMin = 5; ranges.emaMax = 200;               // EMA Period: 5 - 200
   41 |     ranges.pullbackMin = 0.1; ranges.pullbackMax = 1.0;  // Pullback: 10% - 100%
   42 |     ranges.trendMin = 0.1; ranges.trendMax = 2.0;         // Trend Strength: 0.1 - 2.0
   43 |     ranges.volatilityMin = 0.5; ranges.volatilityMax = 3.0; // Volatility: 0.5 - 3.0
   44 |     
   45 |     // Tính toán normalized changes cho các chu kỳ gần nhất
   46 |     int lookback = MathMin(m_HistorySize - 1, 10); // Xem xét 10 chu kỳ gần nhất
   47 |     
   48 |     for (int i = 1; i <= lookback; i++) {
   49 |         int currentIndex = (m_HistorySize - i) % m_MaxHistorySize;
   50 |         int previousIndex = (m_HistorySize - i - 1) % m_MaxHistorySize;
   51 |         
   52 |         ParameterSnapshot current = m_ParameterHistory[currentIndex];
   53 |         ParameterSnapshot previous = m_ParameterHistory[previousIndex];
   54 |         
   55 |         // Tính normalized change cho từng tham số
   56 |         double riskChange = CalculateNormalizedChange(
   57 |             previous.RiskPercent, current.RiskPercent, 
   58 |             ranges.riskMax, ranges.riskMin
   59 |         );
   60 |         
   61 |         double atrChange = CalculateNormalizedChange(
   62 |             previous.ATRPeriod, current.ATRPeriod,
   63 |             ranges.atrMax, ranges.atrMin
   64 |         );
   65 |         
   66 |         double ema1Change = CalculateNormalizedChange(
   67 |             previous.EMAPeriod1, current.EMAPeriod1,
   68 |             ranges.emaMax, ranges.emaMin
   69 |         );
   70 |         
   71 |         double ema2Change = CalculateNormalizedChange(
   72 |             previous.EMAPeriod2, current.EMAPeriod2,
   73 |             ranges.emaMax, ranges.emaMin
   74 |         );
   75 |         
   76 |         double ema3Change = CalculateNormalizedChange(
   77 |             previous.EMAPeriod3, current.EMAPeriod3,
   78 |             ranges.emaMax, ranges.emaMin
   79 |         );
   80 |         
   81 |         double pullbackChange = CalculateNormalizedChange(
   82 |             previous.PullbackThreshold, current.PullbackThreshold,
   83 |             ranges.pullbackMax, ranges.pullbackMin
   84 |         );
   85 |         
   86 |         double trendChange = CalculateNormalizedChange(
   87 |             previous.TrendStrength, current.TrendStrength,
   88 |             ranges.trendMax, ranges.trendMin
   89 |         );
   90 |         
   91 |         double volatilityChange = CalculateNormalizedChange(
   92 |             previous.VolatilityFilter, current.VolatilityFilter,
   93 |             ranges.volatilityMax, ranges.volatilityMin
   94 |         );
   95 |         
   96 |         // Tính trung bình weighted của tất cả changes
   97 |         // Trọng số dựa trên tầm quan trọng của tham số
   98 |         double weightedChange = 
   99 |             (riskChange * 0.25) +        // Risk quan trọng nhất
  100 |             (atrChange * 0.15) +         // ATR quan trọng
  101 |             (ema1Change * 0.12) +        // EMA periods
  102 |             (ema2Change * 0.12) +
  103 |             (ema3Change * 0.12) +
  104 |             (pullbackChange * 0.12) +    // Pullback threshold
  105 |             (trendChange * 0.07) +       // Trend strength
  106 |             (volatilityChange * 0.05);   // Volatility filter
  107 |         
  108 |         totalNormalizedChange += weightedChange;
  109 |         validChanges++;
  110 |     }
  111 |     
  112 |     if (validChanges == 0) {
  113 |         return 1.0; // Hoàn toàn ổn định
  114 |     }
  115 |     
  116 |     // Tính InstabilityIndex = Average(NormalizedChange)
  117 |     double instabilityIndex = totalNormalizedChange / validChanges;
  118 |     
  119 |     // Tính phương sai của các normalized changes để đánh giá độ biến động
  120 |     double variance = 0.0;
  121 |     if (validChanges > 1) {
  122 |         double mean = totalNormalizedChange / validChanges;
  123 |         double sumSquaredDiff = 0.0;
  124 |         
  125 |         // Tính lại để có variance
  126 |         for (int i = 1; i <= lookback; i++) {
  127 |             int currentIndex = (m_HistorySize - i) % m_MaxHistorySize;
  128 |             int previousIndex = (m_HistorySize - i - 1) % m_MaxHistorySize;
  129 |             
  130 |             ParameterSnapshot current = m_ParameterHistory[currentIndex];
  131 |             ParameterSnapshot previous = m_ParameterHistory[previousIndex];
  132 |             
  133 |             // Tính lại weighted change cho variance
  134 |             double riskChange = CalculateNormalizedChange(
  135 |                 previous.RiskPercent, current.RiskPercent, 
  136 |                 ranges.riskMax, ranges.riskMin
  137 |             );
  138 |             double weightedChange = riskChange * 0.25; // Simplified for variance calc
  139 |             
  140 |             double diff = weightedChange - mean;
  141 |             sumSquaredDiff += diff * diff;
  142 |         }
  143 |         
  144 |         variance = sumSquaredDiff / validChanges;
  145 |     }
  146 |     
  147 |     // StabilityIndex = 1.0 - AverageVariance (theo đề xuất kỹ thuật)
  148 |     double stabilityIndex = 1.0 - MathMin(1.0, variance);
  149 |     
  150 |     // Cập nhật vào EAContext
  151 |     if (m_Context != NULL) {
  152 |         m_Context->ParameterStabilityIndex = stabilityIndex;
  153 |     }
  154 |     
  155 |     // Log chi tiết nếu cần
  156 |     if (m_Logger && m_Context && m_Context->EnableDetailedLogs) {
  157 |         string logMsg = StringFormat(
  158 |             "[STABILITY] Index: %.3f (Variance: %.3f), Valid changes: %d, Lookback: %d",
  159 |             stabilityIndex, variance, validChanges, lookback
  160 |         );
  161 |         m_Logger->LogDebug(logMsg);
  162 |     }
  163 |     
  164 |     return stabilityIndex;
  165 | }
  166 | 
  167 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  168 | //| Tính toán Normalized Change cho một tham số                      |
  169 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  170 | double CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::CalculateNormalizedChange(double oldValue, double newValue, double maxRange, double minRange)
  171 | {
  172 |     if (maxRange <= minRange) {
  173 |         return 0.0; // Tránh chia cho 0
  174 |     }
  175 |     
  176 |     double absoluteChange = MathAbs(newValue - oldValue);
  177 |     double normalizedChange = absoluteChange / (maxRange - minRange);
  178 |     
  179 |     return MathMin(1.0, normalizedChange); // Giới hạn tối đa là 1.0
  180 | }
  181 | 
  182 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  183 | //| Cập nhật Parameter Instability Index vào EAContext              |
  184 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  185 | void CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::UpdateParameterInstabilityIndex()
  186 | {
  187 |     if (!m_Context) return;
  188 |     
  189 |     double stabilityIndex = CalculateStabilityIndex();
  190 |     double instabilityIndex = 1.0 - stabilityIndex;
  191 |     
  192 |     // Cập nhật vào context
  193 |     m_Context->CurrentParameterInstabilityIndex = instabilityIndex;
  194 |     
  195 |     // Đánh giá trạng thái
  196 |     if (instabilityIndex > 0.7) {
  197 |         m_Context->IsParameterStabilityDegraded = true;
  198 |         
  199 |         if (m_Logger) {
  200 |             string alertMsg = StringFormat(
  201 |                 "[PARAMETER ALERT] High instability detected: %.1f%% (Threshold: %.1f%%)",
  202 |                 instabilityIndex * 100, 70.0
  203 |             );
  204 |             m_Logger->LogWarning(alertMsg);
  205 |         }
  206 |     } else if (instabilityIndex < 0.4) {
  207 |         m_Context->IsParameterStabilityDegraded = false;
  208 |         
  209 |         // Log recovery nếu trước đó có cảnh báo
  210 |         static bool wasUnstable = false;
  211 |         if (wasUnstable) {
  212 |             if (m_Logger) {
  213 |                 m_Logger->LogInfo("[PARAMETER RECOVERY] Stability restored");
  214 |             }
  215 |             wasUnstable = false;
  216 |         }
  217 |         if (m_Context->IsParameterStabilityDegraded) wasUnstable = true;
  218 |     }
  219 |     
  220 |     m_Context->LastStabilityCheck = TimeCurrent();
  221 |     
  222 |     // Cập nhật metrics trong class
  223 |     m_CurrentMetrics.InstabilityIndex = instabilityIndex;
  224 |     m_CurrentMetrics.IsUnstable = (instabilityIndex > m_UnstableThreshold);
  225 |     m_CurrentMetrics.RequiresAttention = (instabilityIndex > m_AttentionThreshold);
  226 |     m_CurrentMetrics.ShouldTriggerCircuitBreaker = (instabilityIndex > m_CriticalThreshold);
  227 |     m_CurrentMetrics.LastUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  228 | }
  229 | 
  230 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  231 | //| Kiểm tra xem chiến lược có ổn định không - V14.0 Enhancement     |
  232 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  233 | bool CParameterStabilityAnalyzer::IsStrategyStable(double threshold = 0.6)
  234 | {
  235 |     if (m_Context == NULL) return true; // Mặc định ổn định nếu không có context
  236 |     
  237 |     double currentStability = m_Context->ParameterStabilityIndex;
  238 |     bool isStable = (currentStability >= threshold);
  239 |     
  240 |     // Cập nhật trạng thái vào EAContext
  241 |     m_Context->IsStrategyUnstable = !isStable;
  242 |     
  243 |     // Log cảnh báo nếu không ổn định
  244 |     if (!isStable && m_Logger != NULL) {
  245 |         string alertMsg = StringFormat(
  246 |             "[STRATEGY INSTABILITY] Current stability: %.1f%%, Threshold: %.1f%% - Strategy marked as UNSTABLE",
  247 |             currentStability * 100, threshold * 100
  248 |         );
  249 |         m_Logger->LogWarning(alertMsg);
  250 |     }
  251 |     
  252 |     return isStable;
  253 | }
  254 | 
  255 | } // End namespace ApexPullback
  256 | 
  257 | #endif // PARAMETER_STABILITY_ENHANCED_MQH_
