  338 |     m_EquityCurve.Clear();
  339 |     m_DailyReturns.Clear();
  340 |     m_DrawdownCurve.Clear();
  341 | }
  342 | 
  343 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  344 | //| Khởi tạo tracker với context                                    |
  345 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  346 | bool CPerformanceTracker::Initialize(CLogger* logger, EAContext* context) {
  347 |     if (logger == NULL || context == NULL) {
  348 |         Print("[PerformanceTracker] ERROR: Logger or Context is NULL");
  349 |         return false;
  350 |     }
  351 |     
  352 |     m_Logger = logger;
  353 |     m_Context = context;
  354 |     Reset();
  355 |     
  356 |     // Initialize arrays
  357 |     m_EquityCurve.Clear();
  358 |     m_DailyReturns.Clear();
  359 |     m_DrawdownCurve.Clear();
  360 |     
  361 |     m_LastUpdateTime = TimeCurrent();
  362 |     m_LastEquityValue = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  363 |     m_PeakEquity = m_LastEquityValue;
  364 |     
  365 |     m_Logger->LogInfo("PerformanceTracker initialized successfully with advanced metrics");
  366 |     return true;
  367 | }
  368 | 
  369 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  370 | //| Thêm giao dịch mới với thông tin đầy đủ                        |
  371 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  372 | void CPerformanceTracker::AddTrade(long ticket, double profit, double volume, int type,
  373 |                                    datetime openTime, datetime closeTime, double openPrice,
  374 |                                    double closePrice, double commission, double swap, string symbol) {
  375 |     // Resize array if needed
  376 |     if (m_TradeCount >= ArraySize(m_TradeHistory)) {
  377 |         ArrayResize(m_TradeHistory, m_TradeCount + 100);
  378 |     }
  379 |     
  380 |     // Store trade data
  381 |     m_TradeHistory[m_TradeCount].ticket = ticket;
  382 |     m_TradeHistory[m_TradeCount].openTime = openTime;
  383 |     m_TradeHistory[m_TradeCount].closeTime = closeTime;
  384 |     m_TradeHistory[m_TradeCount].profit = profit + commission + swap;
  385 |     m_TradeHistory[m_TradeCount].volume = volume;
  386 |     m_TradeHistory[m_TradeCount].type = type;
  387 |     m_TradeHistory[m_TradeCount].openPrice = openPrice;
  388 |     m_TradeHistory[m_TradeCount].closePrice = closePrice;
  389 |     m_TradeHistory[m_TradeCount].commission = commission;
  390 |     m_TradeHistory[m_TradeCount].swap = swap;
  391 |     m_TradeHistory[m_TradeCount].symbol = symbol;
  392 |     
  393 |     m_TradeCount++;
  394 |     m_TotalTrades++;
  395 |     
  396 |     double totalProfit = profit + commission + swap;
  397 |     
  398 |     if (totalProfit > 0.01) {
  399 |         m_WinningTrades++;
  400 |         m_GrossProfit += totalProfit;
  401 |         m_ConsecutiveWins++;
  402 |         m_ConsecutiveLosses = 0;
  403 |         
  404 |         if (m_ConsecutiveWins > m_MaxConsecutiveWins)
  405 |             m_MaxConsecutiveWins = m_ConsecutiveWins;
  406 |             
  407 |         if (totalProfit > m_LargestWin)
  408 |             m_LargestWin = totalProfit;
  409 |     }
  410 |     else if (totalProfit < -0.01) {
  411 |         m_LosingTrades++;
  412 |         m_GrossLoss += MathAbs(totalProfit);
  413 |         m_ConsecutiveLosses++;
  414 |         m_ConsecutiveWins = 0;
  415 |         
  416 |         if (m_ConsecutiveLosses > m_MaxConsecutiveLosses)
  417 |             m_MaxConsecutiveLosses = m_ConsecutiveLosses;
  418 |             
  419 |         if (MathAbs(totalProfit) > m_LargestLoss)
  420 |             m_LargestLoss = MathAbs(totalProfit);
  421 |     }
  422 |     else {
  423 |         m_BreakEvenTrades++;
  424 |     }
  425 |     
  426 |     m_NetProfit = m_GrossProfit - m_GrossLoss;
  427 |     
  428 |     // Update time-based statistics
  429 |     MqlDateTime dt;
  430 |     TimeToStruct(closeTime, dt);
  431 |     
  432 |     m_TradesByHour[dt.hour]++;
  433 |     m_ProfitByHour[dt.hour] += totalProfit;
  434 |     
  435 |     m_TradesByDay[dt.day_of_week]++;
  436 |     m_ProfitByDay[dt.day_of_week] += totalProfit;
  437 |     
  438 |     // Update equity curve
  439 |     UpdateEquityCurve(AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY));
  440 |     
  441 |     if (m_Logger != NULL)
  442 |         m_Logger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Trade added: #%d, P/L=%.2f, Total=%d", 
  443 |                          ticket, totalProfit, m_TotalTrades));
  444 | }
  445 | 
  446 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  447 | //| Thêm giao dịch với execution quality metrics - Nâng cấp mới    |
  448 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  449 | void CPerformanceTracker::AddTradeWithExecutionMetrics(long ticket, double profit, double volume, int type,
  450 |                                                        datetime openTime, datetime closeTime, double openPrice,
  451 |                                                        double closePrice, double commission, double swap, string symbol,
  452 |                                                        double requestedPrice, double executedPrice, ulong latency,
  453 |                                                        datetime requestTime, datetime executionTime, int requotes, int attempts) {
  454 |     // Gọi phương thức AddTrade cơ bản trước
  455 |     AddTrade(ticket, profit, volume, type, openTime, closeTime, openPrice, closePrice, commission, swap, symbol);
  456 |     
  457 |     // Cập nhật execution quality metrics cho trade vừa thêm
  458 |     TradeData& lastTrade = m_TradeHistory[m_TradeCount - 1];
  459 |     lastTrade.requestedPrice = requestedPrice;
  460 |     lastTrade.executedPrice = executedPrice;
  461 |     lastTrade.requestTime = requestTime;
  462 |     lastTrade.executionTime = executionTime;
  463 |     lastTrade.executionLatency = latency;
  464 |     lastTrade.requotes = requotes;
  465 |     lastTrade.executionAttempts = attempts;
  466 |     
  467 |     // Tính toán slippage (độ trượt giá)
  468 |     double pointValue = SymbolInfoDouble(symbol, SYMBOL_POINT);
  469 |     if (pointValue > 0) {
  470 |         lastTrade.slippage = MathAbs(executedPrice - requestedPrice) / pointValue;
  471 |     } else {
  472 |         lastTrade.slippage = 0.0;
  473 |     }
  474 |     
  475 |     // Cập nhật execution quality statistics
  476 |     RecordExecutionMetrics(requestedPrice, executedPrice, latency, requotes, attempts);
  477 |     
  478 |     if (m_Logger != NULL) {
  479 |         m_Logger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Trade with execution metrics added: #%d, Slippage=%.1f pips, Latency=%d ms, Requotes=%d",
  480 |                          ticket, lastTrade.slippage, latency, requotes));
  481 |     }
  482 | }
  483 | 
  484 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  485 | //| Ghi lại execution metrics - Phương thức mới                     |
  486 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  487 | void CPerformanceTracker::RecordExecutionMetrics(double requestedPrice, double executedPrice, ulong latency, int requotes, int attempts) {
  488 |     // Tính toán slippage
  489 |     double slippage = MathAbs(executedPrice - requestedPrice);
  490 |     
  491 |     // Cập nhật slippage statistics
  492 |     UpdateSlippageStatistics(slippage);
  493 |     
  494 |     // Cập nhật latency statistics
  495 |     UpdateLatencyStatistics(latency);
  496 |     
  497 |     // Cập nhật requotes và execution attempts
  498 |     m_TotalRequotes += requotes;
  499 |     m_TotalExecutionAttempts += attempts;
  500 |     
  501 |     // Tính toán execution success rate
  502 |     if (m_TotalExecutionAttempts > 0) {
  503 |         int successfulExecutions = m_TotalTrades; // Số trades thành công
  504 |         m_ExecutionSuccessRate = (double)successfulExecutions / m_TotalExecutionAttempts * 100.0;
  505 |     }
  506 |     
  507 |     // Cập nhật time-based metrics
  508 |     MqlDateTime dt;
  509 |     TimeToStruct(TimeCurrent(), dt);
  510 |     int hour = dt.hour;
  511 |     
  512 |     if (hour >= 0 && hour < 24) {
  513 |         m_SlippageByHour[hour] = (m_SlippageByHour[hour] + slippage) / 2.0; // Moving average
  514 |         m_LatencyByHour[hour] = (m_LatencyByHour[hour] + latency) / 2; // Moving average
  515 |         m_RequotesByHour[hour] += requotes;
  516 |     }
  517 | }
  518 | 
  519 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  520 | //| Cập nhật slippage statistics - Phương thức mới                  |
  521 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  522 | void CPerformanceTracker::UpdateSlippageStatistics(double slippage) {
  523 |     m_TotalSlippage += slippage;
  524 |     
  525 |     if (m_TotalTrades > 0) {
  526 |         m_AverageSlippage = m_TotalSlippage / m_TotalTrades;
  527 |     }
  528 |     
  529 |     if (slippage > m_MaxSlippage || m_TotalTrades == 1) {
  530 |         m_MaxSlippage = slippage;
  531 |     }
  532 |     
  533 |     if (slippage < m_MinSlippage || m_TotalTrades == 1) {
  534 |         m_MinSlippage = slippage;
  535 |     }
  536 | }
  537 | 
  538 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  539 | //| Cập nhật latency statistics - Phương thức mới                   |
  540 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  541 | void CPerformanceTracker::UpdateLatencyStatistics(ulong latency) {
  542 |     m_TotalLatency += latency;
  543 |     
  544 |     if (m_TotalTrades > 0) {
  545 |         m_AverageLatency = m_TotalLatency / m_TotalTrades;
  546 |     }
  547 |     
  548 |     if (latency > m_MaxLatency || m_TotalTrades == 1) {
  549 |         m_MaxLatency = latency;
  550 |     }
  551 |     
  552 |     if (latency < m_MinLatency || m_TotalTrades == 1) {
  553 |         m_MinLatency = latency;
  554 |     }
  555 | }
  556 | 
  557 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  558 | //| Tính toán execution quality metrics - Phương thức mới           |
  559 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  560 | void CPerformanceTracker::CalculateExecutionQualityMetrics() {
  561 |     if (m_TotalTrades == 0) return;
  562 |     
  563 |     // Reset các giá trị
  564 |     m_TotalSlippage = 0.0;
  565 |     m_TotalLatency = 0;
  566 |     m_TotalRequotes = 0;
  567 |     m_TotalExecutionAttempts = 0;
  568 |     
  569 |     double maxSlip = 0.0, minSlip = DBL_MAX;
  570 |     ulong maxLat = 0, minLat = ULONG_MAX;
  571 |     
  572 |     // Duyệt qua tất cả trades để tính toán
  573 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_TradeCount; i++) {
  574 |         TradeData& trade = m_TradeHistory[i];
  575 |         
  576 |         m_TotalSlippage += trade.slippage;
  577 |         m_TotalLatency += trade.executionLatency;
  578 |         m_TotalRequotes += trade.requotes;
  579 |         m_TotalExecutionAttempts += trade.executionAttempts;
  580 |         
  581 |         if (trade.slippage > maxSlip) maxSlip = trade.slippage;
  582 |         if (trade.slippage < minSlip) minSlip = trade.slippage;
  583 |         
  584 |         if (trade.executionLatency > maxLat) maxLat = trade.executionLatency;
  585 |         if (trade.executionLatency < minLat) minLat = trade.executionLatency;
  586 |     }
  587 |     
  588 |     // Cập nhật các metrics
  589 |     m_AverageSlippage = m_TotalSlippage / m_TotalTrades;
  590 |     m_MaxSlippage = maxSlip;
  591 |     m_MinSlippage = (minSlip == DBL_MAX) ? 0.0 : minSlip;
  592 |     
  593 |     m_AverageLatency = m_TotalLatency / m_TotalTrades;
  594 |     m_MaxLatency = maxLat;
  595 |     m_MinLatency = (minLat == ULONG_MAX) ? 0 : minLat;
  596 |     
  597 |     // Tính execution success rate
  598 |     if (m_TotalExecutionAttempts > 0) {
  599 |         m_ExecutionSuccessRate = (double)m_TotalTrades / m_TotalExecutionAttempts * 100.0;
  600 |     }
  601 |     
  602 |     if (m_Logger != NULL) {
  603 |         m_Logger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Execution Quality Metrics calculated: Avg Slippage=%.2f, Avg Latency=%d ms, Success Rate=%.1f%%",
  604 |                          m_AverageSlippage, m_AverageLatency, m_ExecutionSuccessRate));
  605 |     }
  606 | }
  607 | 
  608 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  609 | //| Cập nhật equity curve                                           |
  610 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  611 | void CPerformanceTracker::UpdateEquityCurve(double newEquity) {
  612 |     m_EquityCurve.Add(newEquity);
  613 |     
  614 |     if (newEquity > m_PeakEquity) {
  615 |         m_PeakEquity = newEquity;
  616 |     }
  617 |     
  618 |     // Calculate current drawdown
  619 |     m_CurrentDrawdown = m_PeakEquity - newEquity;
  620 |     double currentDrawdownPercent = (m_PeakEquity > 0) ? (m_CurrentDrawdown / m_PeakEquity) * 100 : 0;
  621 |     
  622 |     // Update max drawdown
  623 |     if (m_CurrentDrawdown > m_MaxDrawdown) {
  624 |         m_MaxDrawdown = m_CurrentDrawdown;
  625 |         m_MaxDrawdownPercent = currentDrawdownPercent;
  626 |     }
  627 |     
  628 |     m_DrawdownCurve.Add(m_CurrentDrawdown);
  629 |     
  630 |     // Update daily returns if new day
  631 |     if (IsNewDay(TimeCurrent())) {
  632 |         UpdateDailyReturns();
  633 |     }
  634 |     
  635 |     m_LastEquityValue = newEquity;
  636 | }
  637 | 
  638 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  639 | //| Cập nhật daily returns                                          |
  640 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  641 | void CPerformanceTracker::UpdateDailyReturns() {
  642 |     if (m_EquityCurve.Total() < 2) return;
  643 |     
  644 |     double previousEquity = m_EquityCurve.At(m_EquityCurve.Total() - 2);
  645 |     double currentEquity = m_EquityCurve.At(m_EquityCurve.Total() - 1);
  646 |     
  647 |     if (previousEquity > 0) {
  648 |         double dailyReturn = (currentEquity - previousEquity) / previousEquity;
  649 |         m_DailyReturns.Add(dailyReturn);
  650 |     }
  651 | }
  652 | 
  653 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  654 | //| Kiểm tra ngày mới                                               |
  655 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  656 | bool CPerformanceTracker::IsNewDay(datetime currentTime) {
  657 |     if (m_LastUpdateTime == 0) {
  658 |         m_LastUpdateTime = currentTime;
  659 |         return false;
  660 |     }
  661 |     
  662 |     MqlDateTime current, last;
  663 |     TimeToStruct(currentTime, current);
  664 |     TimeToStruct(m_LastUpdateTime, last);
  665 |     
  666 |     bool newDay = (current.day != last.day || current.mon != last.mon || current.year != last.year);
  667 |     
  668 |     if (newDay) {
  669 |         m_LastUpdateTime = currentTime;
  670 |     }
  671 |     
  672 |     return newDay;
  673 | }
  674 | 
  675 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  676 | //| Real-time update                                                |
  677 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  678 | void CPerformanceTracker::OnTick() {
  679 |     double currentEquity = AccountInfoDouble(ACCOUNT_EQUITY);
  680 |     UpdateEquity(currentEquity);
  681 | }
  682 | 
  683 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  684 | //| Cập nhật equity                                                 |
  685 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  686 | void CPerformanceTracker::UpdateEquity(double currentEquity) {
  687 |     UpdateEquityCurve(currentEquity);
  688 | }
  689 | 
  690 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  691 | //| Cập nhật drawdown                                               |
  692 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  693 | void CPerformanceTracker::UpdateDrawdown(double currentEquity) {
  694 |     UpdateEquityCurve(currentEquity);
  695 | }
  696 | 
  697 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  698 | //| Tính toán các thống kê                                          |
  699 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  700 | void CPerformanceTracker::CalculateStatistics() {
  701 |     if (m_TotalTrades == 0) return;
  702 |     
  703 |     // Tỷ lệ thắng
  704 |     m_Metrics.winRate = (double)m_WinningTrades / m_TotalTrades * 100;
  705 |     
  706 |     // Hệ số lợi nhuận
  707 |     m_Metrics.profitFactor = (m_GrossLoss > 0) ? m_GrossProfit / m_GrossLoss : 0;
  708 |     
  709 |     // Kỳ vọng trung bình
  710 |     m_Metrics.expectancy = m_NetProfit / m_TotalTrades;
  711 |     
  712 |     // Thắng/thua trung bình
  713 |     m_Metrics.averageWin = (m_WinningTrades > 0) ? m_GrossProfit / m_WinningTrades : 0;
  714 |     m_Metrics.averageLoss = (m_LosingTrades > 0) ? m_GrossLoss / m_LosingTrades : 0;
  715 |     
  716 |     // Update metrics structure
  717 |     m_Metrics.maxDrawdown = m_MaxDrawdown;
  718 |     m_Metrics.maxDrawdownPercent = m_MaxDrawdownPercent;
  719 |     
  720 |     if (m_Logger != NULL)
  721 |         m_Logger->LogInfo("Performance statistics calculated");
  722 | }
  723 | 
  724 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  725 | //| Tính toán advanced metrics                                      |
  726 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  727 | void CPerformanceTracker::CalculateAdvancedMetrics() {
  728 |     m_Metrics.sharpeRatio = CalculateSharpeRatio();
  729 |     m_Metrics.sortinoRatio = CalculateSortinoRatio();
  730 |     m_Metrics.calmarRatio = CalculateCalmarRatio();
  731 |     m_Metrics.recoveryFactor = CalculateRecoveryFactor();
  732 |     m_Metrics.ulcerIndex = CalculateUlcerIndex();
  733 |     m_Metrics.sterlingRatio = CalculateSterlingRatio();
  734 |     m_Metrics.burkeRatio = CalculateBurkeRatio();
  735 |     m_Metrics.kRatio = CalculateKRatio();
  736 | }
  737 | 
  738 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  739 | //| Tính toán Sharpe Ratio                                          |
  740 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  741 | double CPerformanceTracker::CalculateSharpeRatio() {
  742 |     if (m_DailyReturns.Total() < 2) return 0.0;
  743 |     
  744 |     // Convert daily returns to array
  745 |     double returns[];
  746 |     ArrayResize(returns, m_DailyReturns.Total());
  747 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_DailyReturns.Total(); i++) {
  748 |         returns[i] = m_DailyReturns.At(i);
  749 |     }
  750 |     
  751 |     // Calculate mean return
  752 |     double meanReturn = 0;
  753 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(returns); i++) {
  754 |         meanReturn += returns[i];
  755 |     }
  756 |     meanReturn /= ArraySize(returns);
  757 |     
  758 |     // Calculate standard deviation
  759 |     double stdDev = CalculateStandardDeviation(returns);
  760 |     
  761 |     if (stdDev == 0) return 0.0;
  762 |     
  763 |     // Daily risk-free rate
  764 |     double dailyRiskFreeRate = m_RiskFreeRate / 365.0;
  765 |     
  766 |     // Sharpe ratio
  767 |     double sharpeRatio = (meanReturn - dailyRiskFreeRate) / stdDev;
  768 |     
  769 |     // Annualize
  770 |     return sharpeRatio * MathSqrt(252); // 252 trading days per year
  771 | }
  772 | 
  773 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  774 | //| Tính toán Sortino Ratio                                         |
  775 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  776 | double CPerformanceTracker::CalculateSortinoRatio() {
  777 |     if (m_DailyReturns.Total() < 2) return 0.0;
  778 |     
  779 |     // Convert daily returns to array
  780 |     double returns[];
  781 |     ArrayResize(returns, m_DailyReturns.Total());
  782 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_DailyReturns.Total(); i++) {
  783 |         returns[i] = m_DailyReturns.At(i);
  784 |     }
  785 |     
  786 |     // Calculate mean return
  787 |     double meanReturn = 0;
  788 |     for (int i = 0; i < ArraySize(returns); i++) {
  789 |         meanReturn += returns[i];
  790 |     }
  791 |     meanReturn /= ArraySize(returns);
  792 |     
  793 |     // Calculate downside deviation
  794 |     double downsideDeviation = CalculateDownsideDeviation(returns, 0.0);
  795 |     
  796 |     if (downsideDeviation == 0) return 0.0;
  797 |     
  798 |     // Daily risk-free rate
  799 |     double dailyRiskFreeRate = m_RiskFreeRate / 365.0;
  800 |     
  801 |     // Sortino ratio
  802 |     double sortinoRatio = (meanReturn - dailyRiskFreeRate) / downsideDeviation;
  803 |     
  804 |     // Annualize
  805 |     return sortinoRatio * MathSqrt(252);
  806 | }
  807 | 
  808 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  809 | //| Tính toán Calmar Ratio                                          |
  810 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  811 | double CPerformanceTracker::CalculateCalmarRatio() {
  812 |     if (m_MaxDrawdownPercent == 0 || m_DailyReturns.Total() < 2) return 0.0;
  813 |     
  814 |     // Calculate annualized return
  815 |     double totalReturn = 0;
  816 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_DailyReturns.Total(); i++) {
  817 |         totalReturn += m_DailyReturns.At(i);
  818 |     }
  819 |     
  820 |     double annualizedReturn = totalReturn * 252 / m_DailyReturns.Total();
  821 |     
  822 |     // Calmar ratio = Annualized Return / Max Drawdown
  823 |     return annualizedReturn / (m_MaxDrawdownPercent / 100.0);
  824 | }
  825 | 
  826 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  827 | //| Tính toán Recovery Factor                                        |
  828 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  829 | double CPerformanceTracker::CalculateRecoveryFactor() {
  830 |     if (m_MaxDrawdown == 0) return 0.0;
  831 |     return m_NetProfit / m_MaxDrawdown;
  832 | }
  833 | 
  834 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  835 | //| Tính toán Ulcer Index                                           |
  836 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  837 | double CPerformanceTracker::CalculateUlcerIndex() {
  838 |     if (m_DrawdownCurve.Total() < 2) return 0.0;
  839 |     
  840 |     double sumSquaredDrawdowns = 0;
  841 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_DrawdownCurve.Total(); i++) {
  842 |         double drawdownPercent = 0;
  843 |         if (m_PeakEquity > 0) {
  844 |             drawdownPercent = (m_DrawdownCurve.At(i) / m_PeakEquity) * 100;
  845 |         }
  846 |         sumSquaredDrawdowns += drawdownPercent * drawdownPercent;
  847 |     }
  848 |     
  849 |     return MathSqrt(sumSquaredDrawdowns / m_DrawdownCurve.Total());
  850 | }
  851 | 
  852 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  853 | //| Tính toán Sterling Ratio                                        |
  854 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  855 | double CPerformanceTracker::CalculateSterlingRatio() {
  856 |     if (m_MaxDrawdownPercent == 0 || m_DailyReturns.Total() < 2) return 0.0;
  857 |     
  858 |     // Calculate annualized return
  859 |     double totalReturn = 0;
  860 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_DailyReturns.Total(); i++) {
  861 |         totalReturn += m_DailyReturns.At(i);
  862 |     }
  863 |     
  864 |     double annualizedReturn = totalReturn * 252 / m_DailyReturns.Total();
  865 |     
  866 |     // Sterling ratio = (Annualized Return - Risk Free Rate) / Max Drawdown
  867 |     return (annualizedReturn - m_RiskFreeRate) / (m_MaxDrawdownPercent / 100.0);
  868 | }
  869 | 
  870 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  871 | //| Tính toán Burke Ratio                                           |
  872 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  873 | double CPerformanceTracker::CalculateBurkeRatio() {
  874 |     if (m_DailyReturns.Total() < 2) return 0.0;
  875 |     
  876 |     // Calculate annualized return
  877 |     double totalReturn = 0;
  878 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_DailyReturns.Total(); i++) {
  879 |         totalReturn += m_DailyReturns.At(i);
  880 |     }
  881 |     
  882 |     double annualizedReturn = totalReturn * 252 / m_DailyReturns.Total();
  883 |     
  884 |     // Calculate square root of sum of squared drawdowns
  885 |     double sumSquaredDrawdowns = 0;
  886 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_DrawdownCurve.Total(); i++) {
  887 |         double drawdownPercent = 0;
  888 |         if (m_PeakEquity > 0) {
  889 |             drawdownPercent = (m_DrawdownCurve.At(i) / m_PeakEquity) * 100;
  890 |         }
  891 |         sumSquaredDrawdowns += drawdownPercent * drawdownPercent;
  892 |     }
  893 |     
  894 |     double burkeDrawdown = MathSqrt(sumSquaredDrawdowns);
  895 |     
  896 |     if (burkeDrawdown == 0) return 0.0;
  897 |     
  898 |     return (annualizedReturn - m_RiskFreeRate) / burkeDrawdown;
  899 | }
  900 | 
  901 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  902 | //| Tính toán K-Ratio                                               |
  903 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  904 | double CPerformanceTracker::CalculateKRatio() {
  905 |     if (m_EquityCurve.Total() < 10) return 0.0;
  906 |     
  907 |     // Linear regression of equity curve
  908 |     int n = m_EquityCurve.Total();
  909 |     double sumX = 0, sumY = 0, sumXY = 0, sumX2 = 0;
  910 |     
  911 |     for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
  912 |         double x = i + 1; // Time index
  913 |         double y = m_EquityCurve.At(i); // Equity value
  914 |         
  915 |         sumX += x;
  916 |         sumY += y;
  917 |         sumXY += x * y;
  918 |         sumX2 += x * x;
  919 |     }
  920 |     
  921 |     // Calculate slope (trend)
  922 |     double slope = (n * sumXY - sumX * sumY) / (n * sumX2 - sumX * sumX);
  923 |     
  924 |     // Calculate standard error of slope
  925 |     double meanX = sumX / n;
  926 |     double meanY = sumY / n;
  927 |     
  928 |     double sumSquaredErrors = 0;
  929 |     for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
  930 |         double x = i + 1;
  931 |         double y = m_EquityCurve.At(i);
  932 |         double predictedY = slope * x + (meanY - slope * meanX);
  933 |         sumSquaredErrors += (y - predictedY) * (y - predictedY);
  934 |     }
  935 |     
  936 |     double standardError = MathSqrt(sumSquaredErrors / (n - 2));
  937 |     double slopeStandardError = standardError / MathSqrt(sumX2 - sumX * sumX / n);
  938 |     
  939 |     if (slopeStandardError == 0) return 0.0;
  940 |     
  941 |     // K-Ratio = slope / standard error of slope
  942 |     return slope / slopeStandardError;
  943 | }
  944 | 
  945 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  946 | //| Tính toán Standard Deviation                                    |
  947 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  948 | double CPerformanceTracker::CalculateStandardDeviation(const double& returns[]) {
  949 |     int size = ArraySize(returns);
  950 |     if (size < 2) return 0.0;
  951 |     
  952 |     // Calculate mean
  953 |     double mean = 0;
  954 |     for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
  955 |         mean += returns[i];
  956 |     }
  957 |     mean /= size;
  958 |     
  959 |     // Calculate variance
  960 |     double variance = 0;
  961 |     for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
  962 |         variance += (returns[i] - mean) * (returns[i] - mean);
  963 |     }
  964 |     variance /= (size - 1);
  965 |     
  966 |     return MathSqrt(variance);
  967 | }
  968 | 
  969 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  970 | //| Tính toán Downside Deviation                                    |
  971 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  972 | double CPerformanceTracker::CalculateDownsideDeviation(const double& returns[], double threshold = 0.0) {
  973 |     int size = ArraySize(returns);
  974 |     if (size < 2) return 0.0;
  975 |     
  976 |     double sumSquaredDownsideDeviations = 0;
  977 |     int downsideCount = 0;
  978 |     
  979 |     for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {
  980 |         if (returns[i] < threshold) {
  981 |             double deviation = returns[i] - threshold;
  982 |             sumSquaredDownsideDeviations += deviation * deviation;
  983 |             downsideCount++;
  984 |         }
  985 |     }
  986 |     
  987 |     if (downsideCount == 0) return 0.0;
  988 |     
  989 |     return MathSqrt(sumSquaredDownsideDeviations / downsideCount);
  990 | }
  991 | 
  992 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  993 | //| Tính toán Max Drawdown từ Equity Curve                         |
  994 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  995 | double CPerformanceTracker::CalculateMaxDrawdownFromEquity() {
  996 |     if (m_EquityCurve.Total() < 2) return 0.0;
  997 |     
  998 |     double maxDrawdown = 0;
  999 |     double peak = m_EquityCurve.At(0);
 1000 |     
 1001 |     for (int i = 1; i < m_EquityCurve.Total(); i++) {
 1002 |         double current = m_EquityCurve.At(i);
 1003 |         
 1004 |         if (current > peak) {
 1005 |             peak = current;
 1006 |         }
 1007 |         
 1008 |         double drawdown = peak - current;
 1009 |         if (drawdown > maxDrawdown) {
 1010 |             maxDrawdown = drawdown;
 1011 |         }
 1012 |     }
 1013 |     
 1014 |     return maxDrawdown;
 1015 | }

 1023 |         m_Logger->LogInfo("Time-based performance analysis completed");
 1024 | }

 1061 | string CPerformanceTracker::GetSummaryReport() {
 1062 |     CalculateStatistics();
 1063 |     
 1064 |     string report = "\n=== PERFORMANCE SUMMARY ===\n";
 1065 |     report += StringFormat("Total Trades: %d\n", m_TotalTrades);

 1067 |     report += StringFormat("Losing Trades: %d\n", m_LosingTrades);
 1068 |     report += StringFormat("Break-even Trades: %d\n", m_BreakEvenTrades);

 1070 |     report += StringFormat("Gross Profit: %.2f\n", m_GrossProfit);
 1071 |     report += StringFormat("Gross Loss: %.2f\n", m_GrossLoss);
 1072 |     report += StringFormat("Profit Factor: %.2f\n", m_Metrics.profitFactor);
 1073 |     report += StringFormat("Expectancy: %.2f\n", m_Metrics.expectancy);
 1074 |     report += StringFormat("Max Drawdown: %.2f (%.2f%%)\n", m_MaxDrawdown, m_MaxDrawdownPercent);
 1075 |     report += StringFormat("Largest Win: %.2f\n", m_LargestWin);
 1076 |     report += StringFormat("Largest Loss: %.2f\n", m_LargestLoss);
 1077 |     report += StringFormat("Average Win: %.2f\n", m_Metrics.averageWin);
 1078 |     report += StringFormat("Average Loss: %.2f\n", m_Metrics.averageLoss);
 1079 |     report += StringFormat("Max Consecutive Wins: %d\n", m_MaxConsecutiveWins);
 1080 |     report += StringFormat("Max Consecutive Losses: %d\n", m_MaxConsecutiveLosses);
 1081 |     
 1082 |     // Execution Quality Metrics - Nâng cấp mới
 1083 |     report += "\n=== EXECUTION QUALITY METRICS ===\n";
 1084 |     report += StringFormat("Average Slippage: %.2f pips\n", m_AverageSlippage);
 1085 |     report += StringFormat("Max Slippage: %.2f pips\n", m_MaxSlippage);
 1086 |     report += StringFormat("Min Slippage: %.2f pips\n", (m_MinSlippage == DBL_MAX) ? 0.0 : m_MinSlippage);
 1087 |     report += StringFormat("Average Latency: %d ms\n", m_AverageLatency);
 1088 |     report += StringFormat("Max Latency: %d ms\n", m_MaxLatency);
 1089 |     report += StringFormat("Min Latency: %d ms\n", (m_MinLatency == ULONG_MAX) ? 0 : m_MinLatency);
 1090 |     report += StringFormat("Total Requotes: %d\n", m_TotalRequotes);
 1091 |     report += StringFormat("Execution Success Rate: %.1f%%\n", m_ExecutionSuccessRate);
 1092 |     report += StringFormat("Total Execution Attempts: %d\n", m_TotalExecutionAttempts);
 1093 |

 1100 | string CPerformanceTracker::GetDetailedReport() {
 1101 |     string report = GetSummaryReport();
 1102 |     
 1103 |     report += "\n=== TIME-BASED ANALYSIS ===\n";
 1104 |     report += "Trades by Hour:\n";
 1105 |     for (int i = 0; i < 24; i++) {
 1106 |         if (m_TradesByHour[i] > 0) {
 1107 |             report += StringFormat("%02d:00 - Trades: %d, Profit: %.2f\n", 
 1108 |                                  i, m_TradesByHour[i], m_ProfitByHour[i]);
 1109 |         }
 1110 |     }
 1111 |     
 1112 |     report += "\nTrades by Day of Week:\n";
 1113 |     string dayNames[] = {"Sunday", "Monday", "Tuesday", "Wednesday", "Thursday", "Friday", "Saturday"};
 1114 |     for (int i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
 1115 |         if (m_TradesByDay[i] > 0) {
 1116 |             report += StringFormat("%s - Trades: %d, Profit: %.2f\n", 
 1117 |                                  dayNames[i], m_TradesByDay[i], m_ProfitByDay[i]);
 1118 |         }
 1119 |     }
 1120 |     
 1121 |     return report;
 1122 | }

 1209 |     m_LargestLoss = 0;

 1212 |     ArrayInitialize(m_TradesByHour, 0);
 1213 |     ArrayInitialize(m_ProfitByHour, 0);
 1214 |     ArrayInitialize(m_TradesByDay, 0);
 1215 |     ArrayInitialize(m_ProfitByDay, 0);

 1218 |     m_TotalSlippage = 0.0;
 1219 |     m_AverageSlippage = 0.0;
 1220 |     m_MaxSlippage = 0.0;
 1221 |     m_MinSlippage = DBL_MAX;
 1222 |

 1224 |     m_AverageLatency = 0;
 1225 |     m_MaxLatency = 0;
 1226 |     m_MinLatency = ULONG_MAX;
 1227 |     
 1228 |     m_TotalRequotes = 0;
 1229 |     m_TotalExecutionAttempts = 0;
 1230 |     m_ExecutionSuccessRate = 0.0;
 1231 |     
 1232 |     // Reset time-based execution quality arrays
 1233 |     ArrayInitialize(m_SlippageByHour, 0.0);
 1234 |     ArrayInitialize(m_LatencyByHour, 0);
 1235 |     ArrayInitialize(m_RequotesByHour, 0);
 1236 |     
 1237 |     // Reset metrics
 1238 |     ResetMetrics();
 1239 |     
 1240 |     // Clear dynamic arrays
 1241 |     m_EquityCurve.Clear();
 1242 |     m_DailyReturns.Clear();
 1243 |     m_DrawdownCurve.Clear();
 1244 |     
 1245 |     if (m_Logger != NULL)
 1246 |         m_Logger->LogInfo("PerformanceTracker reset completed");
 1247 | }

 1253 |     m_Metrics.sharpeRatio = 0.0;
 1254 |     m_Metrics.sortinoRatio = 0.0;
 1255 |     m_Metrics.calmarRatio = 0.0;
 1256 |     m_Metrics.maxDrawdown = 0.0;

 1269 | 
 1270 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1271 | //| Validate data                                                   |
 1272 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1273 | bool CPerformanceTracker::ValidateData() {
 1274 |     // Basic validation checks
 1275 |     if (m_TotalTrades < 0) return false;
 1276 |     if (m_WinningTrades < 0 || m_LosingTrades < 0 || m_BreakEvenTrades < 0) return false;
 1277 |     if (m_WinningTrades + m_LosingTrades + m_BreakEvenTrades != m_TotalTrades) return false;
 1278 |     if (m_GrossProfit < 0 || m_GrossLoss < 0) return false;
 1279 |     
 1280 |     return true;
 1281 | }
 1282 | 
 1283 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1284 | //| Get data quality score                                          |
 1285 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 1286 | double CPerformanceTracker::GetDataQualityScore() {
 1287 |     double score = 100.0;
 1288 |     
 1289 |     // Deduct points for various issues
 1290 |     if (!ValidateData()) score -= 50.0;
 1291 |     if (m_TotalTrades < 10) score -= 20.0;
 1292 |     if (m_EquityCurve.Total() < 10) score -= 15.0;
 1293 |     if (m_DailyReturns.Total() < 5) score -= 15.0;
 1294 |     
 1295 |     return MathMax(0.0, score);
 1296 | }

  126 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  127 | //| LoadProposals                                                    |
  128 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  129 | // Method to load trade proposals from Global Variables
  130 | void CPortfolioManager::LoadProposals()
  131 | {
  132 |     if(m_Logger == NULL) {
  133 |         printf("CPortfolioManager Error: Logger is NULL in LoadProposals.");
  134 |         return;
  135 |     }
  136 |     m_Logger.LogInfo("CPortfolioManager: Loading trade proposals from GVs...");
  137 |     m_TradeProposals.Clear(); // Clear previous proposals
  138 | 
  139 |     // Iterate through GVs looking for proposals. 
  140 |     // Proposal GVs are expected to be named like: EAContext.GVProposalPrefix + Symbol + EAContext.GVProposalSuffix
  141 |     // e.g., "PM_Proposal_EURUSD_12345" where 12345 is the chart ID or magic number for uniqueness.
  142 |     // For simplicity, we'll scan for GVs starting with a known prefix.
  143 |     // A more robust system might involve slaves registering their proposal GV names.
  144 | 
  145 |     long chart_id = ChartID(); // Or some other unique identifier for this EA instance if needed.
  146 |     string base_gv_prefix = m_EAContext.Input.PortfolioManagement.GVProposalPrefix; // e.g., "PM_Proposal_"
  147 | 
  148 |     int total = GlobalVariablesTotal();
  149 |     int checked = 0;
  150 |     datetime last_cleanup_time = 0;
  151 |     string gv_name;
  152 | 
  153 |     for(int i = total - 1; i >= 0; i--) // Iterate backwards for safe deletion
  154 |     {
  155 |         gv_name = GlobalVariableName(i);
  156 |         if(StringFind(gv_name, base_gv_prefix, 0) == 0) // Check if GV name starts with our prefix
  157 |         {
  158 |             // Further check if it's a proposal GV and not a decision GV
  159 |             // Assuming proposal GVs don't contain the decision suffix, or have a specific format
  160 |             if(StringFind(gv_name, m_EAContext.Input.PortfolioManagement.GVDecisionSuffix, 0) == -1)
  161 |             {
  162 |                 string gv_value_str = GlobalVariableGet(gv_name);
  163 |                 datetime gv_set_time = GlobalVariableTime(gv_name);
  164 | 
  165 |                 // Basic check for stale GVs (e.g., older than 5 minutes)
  166 |                 if(gv_set_time > 0 && (TimeCurrent() - gv_set_time) > m_EAContext.Input.PortfolioManagement.GVProposalTimeoutSeconds) 
  167 |                 {
  168 |                     m_Logger.LogWarningFormat("CPortfolioManager: Stale proposal GV '%s' found (age %d sec). Deleting.", 
  169 |                                             gv_name, TimeCurrent() - gv_set_time);
  170 |                     GlobalVariableDel(gv_name);
  171 |                     continue;
  172 |                 }
  173 | 
  174 |                 if(gv_value_str != "" && gv_value_str != "PROCESSING" && gv_value_str != "DELETING")
  175 |                 {
  176 |                     // Mark as being processed to prevent other instances (if any) or quick re-reads
  177 |                     if(!GlobalVariableSet(gv_name, "PROCESSING"))
  178 |                     {
  179 |                         m_Logger.LogWarningFormat("CPortfolioManager: Failed to set GV '%s' to PROCESSING. Skipping.", gv_name);
  180 |                         continue;
  181 |                     }
  182 | 
  183 |                     TradeProposal* proposal = new TradeProposal(); // Create on heap for CArrayObj
  184 |                     if(proposal.FromString(gv_value_str))
  185 |                     {
  186 |                         // proposal.GVProposalName should be set by FromString if it's part of the string
  187 |                         // or we can set it here if it's not.
  188 |                         if(proposal.GVProposalName == "") proposal.GVProposalName = gv_name; 
  189 |                         // Construct decision GV name based on proposal's details
  190 |                         proposal.GVDecisionName = m_EAContext.Input.PortfolioManagement.GVDecisionPrefix + 
  191 |                                                   proposal.Symbol + "_" + 
  192 |                                                   IntegerToString(proposal.MagicNumber) + 
  193 |                                                   m_EAContext.Input.PortfolioManagement.GVDecisionSuffix;
  194 | 
  195 |                         m_TradeProposals.Add(proposal);
  196 |                         m_Logger.LogInfoFormat("CPortfolioManager: Loaded proposal from %s: [Symbol: %s, Type: %s, Risk: %.2f%%, Magic: %d, DecisionGV: %s]",
  197 |                                                gv_name, proposal.Symbol, EnumToString(proposal.OrderType), proposal.RiskPercent, proposal.MagicNumber, proposal.GVDecisionName);
  198 |                         
  199 |                         // Now that it's loaded and marked PROCESSING, we can delete the original proposal GV.
  200 |                         // The decision will be written to a *new* GV (proposal.GVDecisionName).
  201 |                         if(GlobalVariableDel(gv_name))
  202 |                         {
  203 |                             m_Logger.LogInfoFormat("CPortfolioManager: Cleared proposal GV %s after loading.", gv_name);
  204 |                         }
  205 |                         else
  206 |                         {
  207 |                             m_Logger.LogErrorFormat("CPortfolioManager: FAILED to clear proposal GV %s after loading. Error: %d", gv_name, GetLastError());
  208 |                         }
  209 |                     }
  210 |                     else
  211 |                     {
  212 |                         delete proposal; // Clean up if FromString failed
  213 |                         m_Logger.LogWarningFormat("CPortfolioManager: Failed to parse proposal from %s: %s. Deleting GV.", gv_name, gv_value_str);
  214 |                         GlobalVariableDel(gv_name); // Delete unparseable GV
  215 |                     }
  216 |                 }
  217 |                 else if (gv_value_str == "PROCESSING" || gv_value_str == "DELETING")
  218 |                 {
  219 |                     // Potentially another master instance is handling it, or it's marked for deletion by slave.
  220 |                     // Add a timeout for these states as well to prevent stuck GVs.
  221 |                     if(gv_set_time > 0 && (TimeCurrent() - gv_set_time) > m_EAContext.Input.PortfolioManagement.GVProposalTimeoutSeconds * 2) // Longer timeout for processing/deleting states
  222 |                     {
  223 |                          m_Logger.LogWarningFormat("CPortfolioManager: Stale proposal GV '%s' in state '%s' (age %d sec). Deleting.", 
  224 |                                             gv_name, gv_value_str, TimeCurrent() - gv_set_time);
  225 |                         GlobalVariableDel(gv_name);
  226 |                     }
  227 |                 }
  228 |             }
  229 |         }
  230 |         checked++;
  231 |         if(checked % 100 == 0) Sleep(1); // Small pause during large GV scan
  232 |     }
  233 |     m_Logger.LogInfoFormat("CPortfolioManager: Loaded %d proposals after scanning GVs.", m_TradeProposals.Total());
  234 | }
  235 | 
  236 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  237 | //| InitializeCorrelationMatrix                                      |
  238 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  239 | void CPortfolioManager::InitializeCorrelationMatrix(string filePath)
  240 | {
  241 |     if(m_Logger == NULL) {
  242 |         printf("CPortfolioManager Error: Logger is NULL in InitializeCorrelationMatrix.");
  243 |         return;
  244 |     }
  245 |     m_Logger.LogInfoFormat("CPortfolioManager: Initializing correlation matrix from '%s'...", filePath);
  246 | 
  247 |     m_SymbolIndexMap.Clear();
  248 |     m_CorrelationMatrix.Clear(); // Clear existing matrix data
  249 | 
  250 |     // TODO: Implement robust CSV loading for the correlation matrix.
  251 |     // The CSV should have symbols as headers for rows and columns.
  252 |     // Example CSV format:
  253 |     // Symbol,EURUSD,GBPUSD,USDJPY
  254 |     // EURUSD,1.0,0.7,-0.5
  255 |     // GBPUSD,0.7,1.0,-0.3
  256 |     // USDJPY,-0.5,-0.3,1.0
  257 | 
  258 |     if(filePath == "" || !FileIsExist(filePath, FILE_COMMON | FILE_READ)){
  259 |         m_Logger.LogWarningFormat("CPortfolioManager: Correlation matrix file '%s' not found or path is empty. Using placeholder data.", filePath);
  260 |         // Fallback to placeholder data if file not found
  261 |         string symbols[] = {"EURUSD", "GBPUSD", "USDJPY", "AUDUSD", "USDCAD", "NZDUSD", "EURJPY", "GBPJPY", "XAUUSD"};
  262 |         m_CorrelationMatrix.Resize(ArraySize(symbols), ArraySize(symbols));
  263 |         for(int i = 0; i < ArraySize(symbols); i++)
  264 |         {
  265 |             m_SymbolIndexMap.Set(symbols[i], i);
  266 |             for(int j = 0; j < ArraySize(symbols); j++)
  267 |             {
  268 |                 if(i == j) m_CorrelationMatrix.Set(i, j, 1.0);
  269 |                 else m_CorrelationMatrix.Set(i, j, 0.0); // Default to no correlation
  270 |             }
  271 |         }
  272 |         int idx_eurusd = GetSymbolIndex("EURUSD");
  273 |         int idx_gbpusd = GetSymbolIndex("GBPUSD");
  274 |         if(idx_eurusd != -1 && idx_gbpusd != -1) { m_CorrelationMatrix.Set(idx_eurusd, idx_gbpusd, 0.7); m_CorrelationMatrix.Set(idx_gbpusd, idx_eurusd, 0.7); }
  275 |         int idx_usdjpy = GetSymbolIndex("USDJPY");
  276 |         if(idx_eurusd != -1 && idx_usdjpy != -1) { m_CorrelationMatrix.Set(idx_eurusd, idx_usdjpy, -0.5); m_CorrelationMatrix.Set(idx_usdjpy, idx_eurusd, -0.5); }
  277 |         m_Logger.LogInfoFormat("CPortfolioManager: Correlation matrix initialized for %d symbols (placeholder data).", ArraySize(symbols));
  278 |         return;
  279 |     }
  280 | 
  281 |     // Actual CSV Loading Logic (Simplified example, needs robust error handling and parsing)
  282 |     int fileHandle = FileOpen(filePath, FILE_READ|FILE_CSV|FILE_ANSI, ',');
  283 |     if(fileHandle == INVALID_HANDLE)
  284 |     {
  285 |         m_Logger.LogErrorFormat("CPortfolioManager: Failed to open correlation matrix file '%s'. Error: %d", filePath, GetLastError());
  286 |         // Potentially fall back to placeholder or stop initialization
  287 |         return;
  288 |     }
  289 | 
  290 |     // Read header to get symbols
  291 |     CArrayString *headerSymbols = new CArrayString();
  292 |     string firstCell = FileReadString(fileHandle); // Skip first cell (e.g., "Symbol")
  293 |     while(!FileIsEnding(fileHandle) && !FileIsLineEnding(fileHandle))
  294 |     {
  295 |         headerSymbols.Add(FileReadString(fileHandle));
  296 |     }
  297 |     FileReadString(fileHandle); // Consume rest of the line ending
  298 | 
  299 |     if(headerSymbols.Total() == 0)
  300 |     {
  301 |         m_Logger.LogErrorFormat("CPortfolioManager: No symbols found in header of correlation matrix file '%s'.", filePath);
  302 |         FileClose(fileHandle);
  303 |         delete headerSymbols;
  304 |         return;
  305 |     }
  306 | 
  307 |     m_CorrelationMatrix.Resize(headerSymbols.Total(), headerSymbols.Total());
  308 |     for(int i=0; i<headerSymbols.Total(); i++)
  309 |     {
  310 |         m_SymbolIndexMap.Set(headerSymbols.At(i), i);
  311 |     }
  312 | 
  313 |     int row = 0;
  314 |     while(!FileIsEnding(fileHandle) && row < headerSymbols.Total())
  315 |     {
  316 |         string rowSymbol = FileReadString(fileHandle); // Read the symbol for the current row
  317 |         int rowIndex = GetSymbolIndex(rowSymbol);
  318 |         if(rowIndex == -1)
  319 |         {
  320 |             m_Logger.LogWarningFormat("CPortfolioManager: Symbol '%s' from matrix file not in header map. Skipping row.", rowSymbol);
  321 |             // Skip rest of the line
  322 |             while(!FileIsEnding(fileHandle) && !FileIsLineEnding(fileHandle)) FileReadString(fileHandle);
  323 |             FileReadString(fileHandle); // Consume line ending
  324 |             row++;
  325 |             continue;
  326 |         }
  327 | 
  328 |         for(int col = 0; col < headerSymbols.Total(); col++)
  329 |         {
  330 |             if(FileIsLineEnding(fileHandle) || FileIsEnding(fileHandle))
  331 |             {
  332 |                 m_Logger.LogWarningFormat("CPortfolioManager: Unexpected end of line/file while reading correlations for %s. Row %d, Col %d", rowSymbol, row, col);
  333 |                 break;
  334 |             }
  335 |             double val = FileReadDouble(fileHandle);
  336 |             m_CorrelationMatrix.Set(rowIndex, col, val); // Assuming columns in CSV match headerSymbols order
  337 |         }
  338 |         FileReadString(fileHandle); // Consume rest of the line ending if any
  339 |         row++;
  340 |     }
  341 | 
  342 |     FileClose(fileHandle);
  343 |     delete headerSymbols;
  344 |     m_Logger.LogInfoFormat("CPortfolioManager: Correlation matrix successfully loaded for %d symbols from '%s'.", m_SymbolIndexMap.Size(), filePath);
  345 | }
  346 | 
  347 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  348 | //| GetSymbolIndex (Helper)                                          |
  349 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  350 | int CPortfolioManager::GetSymbolIndex(const string symbol_name)
  351 | {
  352 |     for(int i=0; i < ArraySize(m_SymbolIndexMap); i++)
  353 |     {
  354 |         if(m_SymbolIndexMap[i] == symbol_name) return i;
  355 |     }
  356 |     return -1; // Không tìm thấy
  357 | }

  362 | // Placeholder for more complex analysis if needed (e.g., ranking, prioritizing)
  363 | void CPortfolioManager::AnalyzeProposals()
  364 | {
  365 |     if(m_Logger == NULL) {
  366 |         printf("CPortfolioManager Error: Logger is NULL in AnalyzeProposals.");
  367 |         return;
  368 |     }
  369 |     m_Logger.LogInfo("CPortfolioManager: Analyzing proposals (currently a placeholder)...");
  370 |     // TODO: Implement if complex inter-proposal analysis is needed before individual decisions.
  371 |     // For example, if there are multiple competing proposals for limited capital/risk.
  372 |     // This could involve sorting m_TradeProposals by quality score, potential reward/risk, etc.
  373 |     // And then potentially rejecting lower quality proposals if higher quality ones consume available risk budget.
  374 |     // For now, proposals are processed independently by DecideOnProposal.

  377 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  378 | //| DecideOnProposal                                                 |
  379 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  380 | ENUM_PORTFOLIO_DECISION CPortfolioManager::DecideOnProposal(TradeProposal &proposal) // Nhận bằng tham chiếu để có thể cập nhật
  381 | {
  382 |     if(m_Logger != NULL) m_Logger.LogInfoFormat("CPortfolioManager: ==> Entering DecideOnProposal for %s %s...", proposal.Symbol, EnumToString(proposal.OrderType)); // Added log
  383 |     if(m_Logger == NULL || m_NewsFilter == NULL || m_RiskManager == NULL || m_PositionManager == NULL)
  384 |     {
  385 |         if(m_Logger != NULL) m_Logger.LogError("CPortfolioManager: Critical module (Logger, NewsFilter, RiskManager, or PositionManager) is NULL in DecideOnProposal.");
  386 |         return DECISION_REJECT; // Không thể ra quyết định nếu thiếu module quan trọng
  387 |     }
  388 | 
  389 |     if(m_Logger != NULL) m_Logger.LogInfoFormat("CPortfolioManager: Deciding on proposal for %s %s, Quality: %.2f, Risk: %.2f%%", 
  390 |                                                 proposal.Symbol, EnumToString(proposal.OrderType), proposal.SignalQuality, proposal.RiskPercent * 100);
  391 | 
  392 |     // 1. Kiểm tra Sự kiện Vĩ mô
  393 |     // TODO: Cần xác định time frame cho IsInNewsWindow (ví dụ: trong 30 phút tới)
  394 |     datetime checkTime = TimeCurrent() + 30 * 60; // Kiểm tra tin trong 30 phút tới
  395 |     if(m_NewsFilter.IsInNewsWindow(proposal.Symbol, checkTime, checkTime)) // Giả sử IsInNewsWindow kiểm tra một khoảng thời gian
  396 |     {
  397 |         if(m_Logger != NULL) m_Logger.LogInfoFormat("CPortfolioManager: Proposal for %s REJECTED/POSTPONED due to upcoming news.", proposal.Symbol);
  398 |         // return DECISION_POSTPONE; // Hoặc REJECT tùy chiến lược
  399 |         return DECISION_REJECT;
  400 |     }
  401 | 
  402 |     // 2. Kiểm tra Rủi ro Tổng thể
  403 |     double currentTotalRisk = m_RiskManager.GetTotalOpenRiskPercent(); // Hàm này cần được implement trong CRiskManager
  404 |     if(m_Logger != NULL) m_Logger.LogDebugFormat("CPortfolioManager: Current total open risk: %.2f%%. Proposal risk: %.2f%%. Max total risk: %.2f%%", 
  405 |                                                 currentTotalRisk * 100, proposal.RiskPercent * 100, m_MaxTotalRisk * 100);
  406 |     if((currentTotalRisk + proposal.RiskPercent) > m_MaxTotalRisk)
  407 |     {
  408 |         if(m_Logger != NULL) m_Logger.LogInfoFormat("CPortfolioManager: Proposal for %s REJECTED due to exceeding max total risk (%.2f%% + %.2f%% > %.2f%%).", 
  409 |                                                     proposal.Symbol, currentTotalRisk*100, proposal.RiskPercent*100, m_MaxTotalRisk*100);
  410 |         // TODO: Có thể xem xét DECISION_ADJUST_LOT ở đây nếu rủi ro vượt không quá nhiều
  411 |         return DECISION_REJECT;
  412 |     }
  413 | 
  414 |     // 3. Kiểm tra Tương quan (Correlation)
  415 |     int proposalSymbolIndex = GetSymbolIndex(proposal.Symbol);
  416 |     if(proposalSymbolIndex != -1)
  417 |     {
  418 |         for(int i = 0; i < m_PositionManager.GetOpenPositionsCount(); i++) // Hàm GetOpenPositionsCount() cần có trong CPositionManager
  419 |         {
  420 |             string openPositionSymbol = m_PositionManager.GetOpenPositionSymbol(i); // Hàm GetOpenPositionSymbol(index) cần có
  421 |             ENUM_POSITION_TYPE openPositionDirection = m_PositionManager.GetOpenPositionDirection(i); // Hàm GetOpenPositionDirection(index) cần có
  422 |             int openSymbolIndex = GetSymbolIndex(openPositionSymbol);
  423 | 
  424 |             if(openSymbolIndex != -1)
  425 |             {
  426 |                 double correlation = m_CorrelationMatrix[proposalSymbolIndex][openSymbolIndex];
  427 |                 // Chỉ xem xét nếu cả hai cùng hướng (BUY-BUY hoặc SELL-SELL) hoặc ngược hướng (BUY-SELL) tùy vào dấu của correlation
  428 |                 // Ví dụ đơn giản: nếu tương quan dương mạnh và cùng hướng, hoặc tương quan âm mạnh và ngược hướng -> có thể tăng rủi ro
  429 |                 bool sameDirection = (proposal.OrderType == ORDER_TYPE_BUY && openPositionDirection == POSITION_TYPE_BUY) || 
  430 |                                      (proposal.OrderType == ORDER_TYPE_SELL && openPositionDirection == POSITION_TYPE_SELL);
  431 |                 
  432 |                 if(m_Logger != NULL) m_Logger.LogDebugFormat("CPortfolioManager: Checking correlation for %s vs open %s. Corr: %.2f. Same direction: %s", 
  433 |                                                             proposal.Symbol, openPositionSymbol, correlation, sameDirection ? "true" : "false");
  434 | 
  435 |                 // Nếu tương quan dương mạnh và cùng hướng
  436 |                 if(correlation > m_MaxCorrelationAllowed && sameDirection)
  437 |                 {
  438 |                     if(m_Logger != NULL) m_Logger.LogInfoFormat("CPortfolioManager: Proposal for %s REJECTED due to high positive correlation (%.2f > %.2f) with open %s (same direction).", 
  439 |                                                                 proposal.Symbol, correlation, m_MaxCorrelationAllowed, openPositionSymbol);
  440 |                     return DECISION_REJECT;
  441 |                 }
  442 |                 // Nếu tương quan âm mạnh và ngược hướng (ví dụ: Mua EURUSD, Bán USDCHF, corr(EURUSD,USDCHF) ~ -0.9)
  443 |                 // Điều này cũng làm tăng rủi ro theo một hướng (ví dụ: Long USD exposure)
  444 |                 // Logic này cần được xem xét cẩn thận hơn dựa trên ma trận tương quan và cách nó được xây dựng.
  445 |                 // Ví dụ: nếu corr(A,B) = -0.8, Mua A và Bán B -> cùng chiều rủi ro.
  446 |                 // if(correlation < -m_MaxCorrelationAllowed && !sameDirection) // Logic này cần kiểm tra kỹ
  447 |                 // {
  448 |                 //     if(m_Logger != NULL) m_Logger.LogInfoFormat("CPortfolioManager: Proposal for %s REJECTED due to high negative correlation (%.2f < %.2f) with open %s (opposite direction, implies same underlying risk direction).", 
  449 |                 //                                                 proposal.Symbol, correlation, -m_MaxCorrelationAllowed, openPositionSymbol);
  450 |                 //     return DECISION_REJECT;
  451 |                 // }
  452 |             }
  453 |         }
  454 |     }
  455 |     else
  456 |     {
  457 |         if(m_Logger != NULL) m_Logger.LogWarningFormat("CPortfolioManager: Symbol %s not found in correlation matrix map. Skipping correlation check.", proposal.Symbol);
  458 |     }
  459 | 
  460 |     // 4. Kiểm tra Tập trung Rủi ro (Risk Concentration)
  461 |     double riskConcentrationLimit = 0.60; // 60% tổng rủi ro cho một đồng tiền
  462 |     if (IsRiskConcentrated(proposal, riskConcentrationLimit)) {
  463 |         if(m_Logger != NULL) m_Logger.LogInfoFormat("CPortfolioManager: Proposal for %s REJECTED due to risk concentration.", proposal.Symbol);
  464 |         return DECISION_REJECT;
  465 |     }
  466 |     if(m_Logger != NULL) m_Logger.LogDebug("CPortfolioManager: Risk concentration check - PASSED.");
  467 | 
  468 | 
  469 |     // 5. Ra quyết định Cuối cùng
  470 |     if(m_Logger != NULL) m_Logger.LogInfoFormat("CPortfolioManager: Proposal for %s %s APPROVED.", proposal.Symbol, EnumToString(proposal.OrderType));
  471 |     return DECISION_APPROVE;
  472 | }
  473 | 
  474 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  475 | //| WriteDecisionToGVs                                               |
  476 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  477 | void CPortfolioManager::WriteDecisionToGVs(const TradeProposal &proposal_const, ENUM_PORTFOLIO_DECISION decision_val, double adjustedLotFactor = 1.0) // Ghi quyết định vào Global Variables
  478 | {
  479 |     if(m_Logger == NULL) {
  480 |         printf("CPortfolioManager Error: Logger is NULL in WriteDecisionToGVs.");
  481 |         return;
  482 |     }
  483 | 
  484 |     TradeProposal proposal_to_write = proposal_const; // Create a mutable copy
  485 |     proposal_to_write.decision = decision_val;        // Set the decision in the mutable copy
  486 |     // If 'adjustedLotFactor' needs to be part of the JSON, add a field to TradeProposal struct and set it here.
  487 |     // proposal_to_write.adjustedLotFactor = adjustedLotFactor; // Example if field exists
  488 | 
  489 |     if(proposal_to_write.GVDecisionName == "")
  490 |     {
  491 |         m_Logger.LogErrorFormat("CPortfolioManager: Cannot write decision for proposal on %s, GVDecisionName is empty.", proposal_to_write.Symbol);
  492 |         return;
  493 |     }
  494 | 
  495 |     string decision_json_str = proposal_to_write.ToString(); // This now serializes the proposal (including decision) to JSON
  496 | 
  497 |     if(GlobalVariableSet(proposal_to_write.GVDecisionName, decision_json_str))
  498 |     {
  499 |         m_Logger.LogInfoFormat("CPortfolioManager: JSON Decision '%s' for %s (Magic: %d) written to GV '%s'. AdjustedLotFactor: %.2f. JSON: %s", 
  500 |                                 EnumToString(decision_val), proposal_to_write.Symbol, proposal_to_write.MagicNumber, proposal_to_write.GVDecisionName, adjustedLotFactor, decision_json_str);
  501 |     }
  502 |     else
  503 |     {                            
  504 |         m_Logger.LogErrorFormat("CPortfolioManager: Failed to write JSON decision to GV '%s' for proposal on %s. Error: %d", proposal_to_write.GVDecisionName, proposal_to_write.Symbol, GetLastError());
  505 |     }
  506 | 
  507 |     // The original proposal GV (proposal_to_write.GVProposalName) is deleted in LoadProposals after successful parsing.
  508 |     // However, to be absolutely sure it's cleaned up after a decision is made, we can add a deletion here too.
  509 |     // This also handles cases where a proposal might not be fully processed by LoadProposals but a decision is still made (less likely).
  510 |     if(GlobalVariableCheck(proposal_to_write.GVProposalName)) {
  511 |         GlobalVariableDel(proposal_to_write.GVProposalName);
  512 |         if(m_Logger != NULL) m_Logger.LogDebugFormat("CPortfolioManager: Cleaned up proposal GV: %s after writing decision.", proposal_to_write.GVProposalName);
  513 |     }
  514 |     // If there's a specific need to clean up proposal_to_write.GVProposalName here, the logic would need careful review
  515 |     // to ensure it doesn't conflict with LoadProposals.
  516 | }
  517 | 
  518 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  519 | //| ProcessTradeProposals                                            |
  520 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  521 | void CPortfolioManager::ProcessTradeProposals()
  522 | {
  523 |     if(m_Logger == NULL) {
  524 |         printf("CPortfolioManager Error: Logger is NULL in ProcessTradeProposals.");
  525 |         return;
  526 |     }
  527 |     m_Logger.LogInfo("CPortfolioManager: Starting to process trade proposals.");
  528 | 
  529 |     LoadProposals();    // Tải các đề xuất mới
  530 |     AnalyzeProposals(); // Phân tích chung (nếu có)
  531 | 
  532 |     for(int i = 0; i < m_TradeProposals.Total(); i++)
  533 |     {
  534 |         TradeProposal* proposal = m_TradeProposals.At(i);
  535 |         if(proposal == NULL) continue;
  536 | 
  537 |         ENUM_PORTFOLIO_DECISION raw_decision = DecideOnProposal(*proposal); // Ra quyết định cho từng proposal
  538 |         proposal.Decision = raw_decision; // Store the raw decision
  539 |         
  540 |         double adjustedLotFactor = 1.0; // Default lot factor
  541 |         ENUM_PORTFOLIO_DECISION final_decision_for_gv = raw_decision;
  542 | 
  543 |         if(raw_decision == DECISION_ADJUST_LOT)
  544 |         {
  545 |             // TODO: Implement sophisticated lot adjustment logic in DecideOnProposal or a separate helper.
  546 |             // This logic should determine the appropriate adjustedLotFactor.
  547 |             // For example, it could be based on available margin, overall portfolio risk, specific rules for the symbol, etc.
  548 |             // DecideOnProposal might populate a field like 'proposal.RecommendedLotFactor' or return it somehow.
  549 |             // For now, using a placeholder value if DECISION_ADJUST_LOT is returned.
  550 |             adjustedLotFactor = m_EAContext.Input.PortfolioManagement.DefaultLotAdjustmentFactor; // e.g., 0.5 from inputs
  551 |             final_decision_for_gv = DECISION_APPROVED; // Convert ADJUST_LOT to APPROVE with the new factor for GV communication
  552 |             if(m_Logger != NULL) m_Logger.LogInfoFormat("CPortfolioManager: Proposal for %s resulted in ADJUST_LOT. Applying factor %.2f and sending as APPROVE.", proposal.Symbol, adjustedLotFactor);
  553 |         }
  554 |         else if(raw_decision == DECISION_APPROVED)
  555 |         {
  556 |             // Standard approval, full requested lot (factor 1.0) unless proposal itself has a different suggestion
  557 |             // adjustedLotFactor = proposal.SuggestedFactor; // if proposal carries this
  558 |         }
  559 | 
  560 |         WriteDecisionToGVs(*proposal, final_decision_for_gv, adjustedLotFactor);
  561 |     }
  562 |     // Clear proposals after processing. Important to do this on the heap objects from CArrayObj
  563 |     // m_TradeProposals.Clear(); // This would just clear pointers, not delete objects.
  564 |     while(m_TradeProposals.Total() > 0)
  565 |     {
  566 |         TradeProposal* p = m_TradeProposals.Detach(); // Detach from end
  567 |         if(p != NULL) delete p;
  568 |     }
  569 | 
  570 |     m_Logger.LogInfo("CPortfolioManager: Finished processing trade proposals.");
  571 | }
  572 | 
  573 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  574 | //| CalculateTotalRisk                                               |
  575 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  576 | double CPortfolioManager::CalculateTotalRisk()
  577 | {
  578 |     if(m_RiskManager == NULL)
  579 |     {
  580 |         if(m_Logger != NULL) m_Logger.LogError("CPortfolioManager: RiskManager is NULL in CalculateTotalRisk.");
  581 |         return 0.0;
  582 |     }
  583 |     // This should ideally use a more sophisticated way to get total risk from RiskManager
  584 |     // or sum up risks from m_PositionManager if RiskManager doesn't provide a direct portfolio-wide risk.
  585 |     return m_RiskManager.GetTotalOpenRiskPercent(); // Assuming this function exists and gives current total risk
  586 | }
  587 | 
  588 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  589 | //| IsRiskConcentrated                                               |
  590 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  591 | bool CPortfolioManager::IsRiskConcentrated(const TradeProposal &proposal, double maxConcentration)
  592 | {
  593 |     if(m_PositionManager == NULL || m_RiskManager == NULL)
  594 |     {
  595 |         if(m_Logger != NULL) m_Logger.LogError("CPortfolioManager: PositionManager or RiskManager is NULL in IsRiskConcentrated.");
  596 |         return true; // Fail safe: assume concentrated if modules are missing
  597 |     }
  598 | 
  599 |     string baseCurrency, quoteCurrency;
  600 |     StringSplit(proposal.Symbol, '/', baseCurrency, quoteCurrency); // Basic split, assumes XXX/YYY format
  601 |     if(quoteCurrency == "") { // For symbols like XAUUSD, EURJPY etc.
  602 |         if(StringLen(proposal.Symbol) == 6) {
  603 |              baseCurrency = StringSubstr(proposal.Symbol, 0, 3);
  604 |              quoteCurrency = StringSubstr(proposal.Symbol, 3, 3);
  605 |         } else {
  606 |             if(m_Logger != NULL) m_Logger.LogWarningFormat("CPortfolioManager: Could not parse currencies from symbol '%s' in IsRiskConcentrated.", proposal.Symbol);
  607 |             return false; // Cannot determine, so assume not concentrated for now
  608 |         }
  609 |     }
  610 | 
  611 |     double baseCurrencyExposure = GetCurrencyRiskExposure(baseCurrency);
  612 |     double quoteCurrencyExposure = GetCurrencyRiskExposure(quoteCurrency);
  613 | 
  614 |     // Estimate risk added by this proposal to each currency
  615 |     // This is a simplification. True exposure depends on whether it's a buy or sell.
  616 |     // For a BUY of Base/Quote, exposure increases for Base, decreases for Quote (if selling Quote to buy Base)
  617 |     // For a SELL of Base/Quote, exposure decreases for Base, increases for Quote
  618 |     double proposalRisk = proposal.RiskPercent;
  619 |     double newBaseExposure, newQuoteExposure;
  620 | 
  621 |     if(proposal.OrderType == ORDER_TYPE_BUY) // Buying Base, Selling Quote
  622 |     {
  623 |         newBaseExposure = baseCurrencyExposure + proposalRisk;
  624 |         // For quote currency, if we are selling it, its 'long' exposure effectively decreases or 'short' exposure increases.
  625 |         // This logic needs to be very careful about how exposure is defined (e.g., net long/short).
  626 |         // Simplification: consider absolute exposure change for now.
  627 |         newQuoteExposure = quoteCurrencyExposure + proposalRisk; // Simplified: adding risk to both involved currencies' exposure pool
  628 |     }
  629 |     else // Selling Base, Buying Quote
  630 |     {
  631 |         newBaseExposure = baseCurrencyExposure + proposalRisk; // Simplified
  632 |         newQuoteExposure = quoteCurrencyExposure + proposalRisk;
  633 |     }
  634 |     
  635 |     double totalPortfolioRisk = CalculateTotalRisk() + proposalRisk;
  636 |     if (totalPortfolioRisk == 0) return false; // Avoid division by zero
  637 | 
  638 |     if ((newBaseExposure / totalPortfolioRisk) > maxConcentration) {
  639 |         if(m_Logger != NULL) m_Logger.LogInfoFormat("CPortfolioManager: Risk concentration for %s (%.2f%% of total risk %.2f%%) would exceed limit %.2f%% on %s proposal.", 
  640 |             baseCurrency, (newBaseExposure/totalPortfolioRisk)*100, totalPortfolioRisk*100, maxConcentration*100, proposal.Symbol);
  641 |         return true;
  642 |     }
  643 |     if ((newQuoteExposure / totalPortfolioRisk) > maxConcentration) {
  644 |         if(m_Logger != NULL) m_Logger.LogInfoFormat("CPortfolioManager: Risk concentration for %s (%.2f%% of total risk %.2f%%) would exceed limit %.2f%% on %s proposal.", 
  645 |             quoteCurrency, (newQuoteExposure/totalPortfolioRisk)*100, totalPortfolioRisk*100, maxConcentration*100, proposal.Symbol);
  646 |         return true;
  647 |     }
  648 | 
  649 |     return false;
  650 | }
  651 | 
  652 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  653 | //| GetCurrencyRiskExposure                                          |
  654 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  655 | double CPortfolioManager::GetCurrencyRiskExposure(const string currency)
  656 | {
  657 |     if(m_PositionManager == NULL || m_RiskManager == NULL)
  658 |     {
  659 |         if(m_Logger != NULL) m_Logger.LogError("CPortfolioManager: PositionManager or RiskManager is NULL in GetCurrencyRiskExposure.");
  660 |         return 0.0;
  661 |     }
  662 | 
  663 |     double totalExposure = 0.0;
  664 |     for(int i = 0; i < m_PositionManager.GetOpenPositionsCount(); i++)
  665 |     {
  666 |         string symbol = m_PositionManager.GetOpenPositionSymbol(i);
  667 |         double positionRisk = m_RiskManager.GetPositionRiskPercent(m_PositionManager.GetOpenPositionTicket(i)); // Needs GetPositionRiskPercent(ticket) in RiskManager
  668 |         
  669 |         string base, quote;
  670 |         StringSplit(symbol, '/', base, quote);
  671 |         if(quote == "") { // For symbols like XAUUSD, EURJPY etc.
  672 |             if(StringLen(symbol) == 6) {
  673 |                  base = StringSubstr(symbol, 0, 3);
  674 |                  quote = StringSubstr(symbol, 3, 3);
  675 |             } else continue; // Skip if symbol format is unexpected
  676 |         }
  677 | 
  678 |         if(StringCompare(base, currency, false) == 0)
  679 |         {
  680 |             // If it's BaseCurrency/XXX and we are BUYING, exposure to BaseCurrency increases.
  681 |             // If it's BaseCurrency/XXX and we are SELLING, exposure to BaseCurrency decreases (or short exposure increases).
  682 |             // This needs careful handling of long/short exposure. For simplicity, sum absolute risks involving the currency.
  683 |             totalExposure += positionRisk;
  684 |         }
  685 |         if(StringCompare(quote, currency, false) == 0)
  686 |         {
  687 |             // If it's XXX/QuoteCurrency and we are BUYING XXX, we are selling QuoteCurrency, exposure to QuoteCurrency decreases.
  688 |             // If it's XXX/QuoteCurrency and we are SELLING XXX, we are buying QuoteCurrency, exposure to QuoteCurrency increases.
  689 |             totalExposure += positionRisk;
  690 |         }
  691 |     }
  692 |     return totalExposure;
  693 | }
  694 | 
  695 | } // namespace ApexPullback
  696 | 
  697 | #endif // PORTFOLIO_MANAGER_MQH

   35 |         strategyID = "";

  133 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  134 | //| Initialize                                                       |
  135 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  136 | bool CPositionManager::Initialize(EAContext* context)
  137 | {
  138 |     if (!context || !context->pLogger || !context->pSymbolInfo)
  139 |     {
  140 |         printf("FATAL: CPositionManager received NULL context, logger, or symbol info.");
  141 |         return false;
  142 |     }
  143 |     m_context = context;
  144 | 
  145 |     m_symbol = m_context->pSymbolInfo->Symbol();
  146 |     m_magicNumber = m_context->Inputs.MagicNumber;
  147 |     
  148 |     // Load parameters from the centralized parameter store
  149 |     m_maxTotalRisk = m_context->Inputs.RiskManagement.MaxTotalRisk;
  150 |     m_maxPositions = m_context->Inputs.RiskManagement.MaxPositions;
  151 | 
  152 |     UpdateAllPositions();
  153 |     m_context->pLogger->LogInfo("PositionManager initialized for " + m_symbol, "CPositionManager::Initialize");
  154 |     return true;
  155 | }
  156 | 
  157 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  158 | //| UpdateAllPositions                                               |
  159 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  160 | void CPositionManager::UpdateAllPositions()
  161 | {
  162 |     if(!m_positionsInfo || !m_context) return;
  163 | 
  164 |     for (int i = 0; i < m_positionsInfo->Total(); i++)
  165 |     {
  166 |         PositionInfoExt* pos = (PositionInfoExt*)m_positionsInfo->At(i);
  167 |         if (pos) pos->isFoundInTerminal = false;
  168 |     }
  169 | 
  170 |     for (int i = PositionsTotal() - 1; i >= 0; i--)
  171 |     {
  172 |         ulong ticket = PositionGetTicket(i);
  173 |         if (PositionGetString(POSITION_SYMBOL) == m_symbol && (int)PositionGetInteger(POSITION_MAGIC) == m_magicNumber)
  174 |         {
  175 |             PositionInfoExt* pos = FindPositionByTicket(ticket);
  176 |             if (pos)
  177 |             {
  178 |                 UpdateSinglePositionInfo(pos);
  179 |                 pos->isFoundInTerminal = true;
  180 |             }
  181 |             // Note: We are not auto-adding positions found in terminal but not in our list.
  182 |             // They must be added explicitly via AddPosition().
  183 |         }
  184 |     }
  185 | 
  186 |     RemoveClosedPositions();
  187 |     EvaluatePortfolio();
  188 | }
  189 | 
  190 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  191 | //| AddPosition                                                      |
  192 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  193 | bool CPositionManager::AddPosition(ulong ticket, const string strategyID, ENUM_TRADE_SCENARIO scenario)
  194 | {
  195 |     if (!m_positionsInfo || !m_context || !m_context->pLogger) return false;
  196 |     if (FindPositionByTicket(ticket) != NULL) 
  197 |     {
  198 |         m_context->pLogger->LogWarning(StringFormat("Attempted to re-add existing position #%d", ticket), "AddPosition");
  199 |         return false;
  200 |     }
  201 | 
  202 |     PositionInfoExt* newPos = CreatePositionInfo(ticket, strategyID, scenario);
  203 |     if (!newPos) 
  204 |     {
  205 |         m_context->pLogger->LogError(StringFormat("Failed to create info for position #%d", ticket), "AddPosition");
  206 |         return false;
  207 |     }
  208 | 
  209 |     if (!m_positionsInfo->Add(newPos)) 
  210 |     {
  211 |         m_context->pLogger->LogError(StringFormat("Failed to add position #%d to tracking array", ticket), "AddPosition");
  212 |         delete newPos;
  213 |         return false;
  214 |     }
  215 |     
  216 |     m_context->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Added new position #%d to manager.", ticket), "AddPosition");
  217 |     EvaluatePortfolio();
  218 |     return true;
  219 | }
  220 | 
  221 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  222 | //| CanOpenNewPosition                                               |
  223 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  224 | bool CPositionManager::CanOpenNewPosition(double newRisk)
  225 | {
  226 |     if (m_portfolioStatus.totalPositions >= m_maxPositions) 
  227 |     {
  228 |         // Optional: Log reason
  229 |         return false;
  230 |     }
  231 |     if ((m_portfolioStatus.totalRiskPercent + newRisk) > m_maxTotalRisk)
  232 |     {
  233 |         // Optional: Log reason
  234 |         return false;
  235 |     }
  236 |     return true;
  237 | }

  240 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  241 | //| FindPositionByTicket (Internal)                                  |
  242 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  243 | PositionInfoExt* CPositionManager::FindPositionByTicket(ulong ticket)
  244 | {
  245 |     if(!m_positionsInfo) return NULL;
  246 |     for(int i = 0; i < m_positionsInfo->Total(); i++)
  247 |     {
  248 |         PositionInfoExt* pos = (PositionInfoExt*)m_positionsInfo->At(i);
  249 |         if(pos && pos->Ticket() == ticket)
  250 |         {
  251 |             return pos;
  252 |         }
  253 |     }
  254 |     return NULL;
  255 | }
  256 | 
  257 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  258 | //| RemoveClosedPositions (Internal)                                 |
  259 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  260 | void CPositionManager::RemoveClosedPositions()
  261 | {
  262 |     if(!m_positionsInfo || !m_context || !m_context->pLogger) return;
  263 |     for(int i = m_positionsInfo->Total() - 1; i >= 0; i--)
  264 |     {
  265 |         PositionInfoExt* pos = (PositionInfoExt*)m_positionsInfo->At(i);
  266 |         if(pos && !pos->isFoundInTerminal)
  267 |         {
  268 |             m_context->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Position #%d closed. Removing from manager.", pos->Ticket()), "RemoveClosedPositions");
  269 |             m_positionsInfo->Delete(i);
  270 |         }
  271 |     }
  272 | }
  273 | 
  274 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  275 | //| UpdateSinglePositionInfo (Internal)                              |
  276 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  277 | bool CPositionManager::UpdateSinglePositionInfo(PositionInfoExt* posInfo)
  278 | {
  279 |     if (!posInfo) return false;
  280 |     // This just re-selects the position to update its dynamic properties
  281 |     // like profit, swap, etc.
  282 |     return posInfo->Select();
  283 | }
