 2744 | 
 2745 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2746 | //| Kiểm tra breakout có cấu trúc không                               |
 2747 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2748 | bool CSwingPointDetector::HasStructuralBreakout(bool isLong)
 2749 | {
 2750 |    if(m_SwingPointCount < 3) return false;
 2751 |    
 2752 |    // Giá hiện tại
 2753 |    double currentPrice = isLong ? SymbolInfoDouble(m_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK) : SymbolInfoDouble(m_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
 2754 |    
 2755 |    // Đếm số lượng swing points bị break
 2756 |    int brokenSwings = 0;
 2757 |    
 2758 |    for(int i = 0; i < MathMin(5, m_SwingPointCount); i++) {
 2759 |       if(isLong) {
 2760 |          // Trong xu hướng tăng, kiểm tra xem giá đã vượt qua swing high chưa
 2761 |          if(m_SwingPoints[i].type == SWING_HIGH && currentPrice > m_SwingPoints[i].price) {
 2762 |             // Nếu là major hoặc critical, có ý nghĩa lớn hơn
 2763 |             if(m_SwingPoints[i].importance >= SWING_MAJOR) {
 2764 |                brokenSwings += 2;
 2765 |             } else {
 2766 |                brokenSwings++;
 2767 |             }
 2768 |          }
 2769 |       } else {
 2770 |          // Trong xu hướng giảm, kiểm tra xem giá đã giảm xuống dướ
 2771 |          if(m_SwingPoints[i].type == SWING_LOW && currentPrice < m_SwingPoints[i].price) {
 2772 |             // Nếu là major hoặc critical, có ý nghĩa lớn hơn
 2773 |             if(m_SwingPoints[i].importance >= SWING_MAJOR) {
 2774 |                brokenSwings += 2;
 2775 |             } else {
 2776 |                brokenSwings++;
 2777 |             }
 2778 |          }
 2779 |       }
 2780 |    }
 2781 |    
 2782 |    return brokenSwings >= 3; // Cần ít nhất 3 swing bị break để xác nhận breakout có cấu trúc
 2783 | }
 2784 | 
 2785 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2786 | //| Kiểm tra có swing failure không                                 |
 2787 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2788 | bool CSwingPointDetector::IsSwingFailure(bool isLong)
 2789 | {
 2790 |    if(m_SwingPointCount < 2) return false;
 2791 |    
 2792 |    // Giá hiện tại
 2793 |    double currentPrice = isLong ? SymbolInfoDouble(m_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK) : SymbolInfoDouble(m_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
 2794 |    
 2795 |    // Tìm swing gần nhất
 2796 |    SwingPoint lastSwing;
 2797 |    bool foundSwing = false;
 2798 |    
 2799 |    for(int i = 0; i < m_SwingPointCount; i++) {
 2800 |       if((isLong && m_SwingPoints[i].type == SWING_HIGH) || 
 2801 |          (!isLong && m_SwingPoints[i].type == SWING_LOW)) {
 2802 |          
 2803 |          lastSwing = m_SwingPoints[i];
 2804 |          foundSwing = true;
 2805 |          break;
 2806 |       }
 2807 |    }
 2808 |    
 2809 |    if(!foundSwing) return false;
 2810 |    
 2811 |    // Lấy ATR hiện tại
 2812 |    double atr = GetValidATR();
 2813 |    if(atr <= 0) return false;
 2814 |    
 2815 |    // Kiểm tra xem có swing failure không
 2816 |    if(isLong) {
 2817 |       // Trong xu hướng tăng, swing failure là khi giá không thể vượt qua swing high
 2818 |       if(lastSwing.type == SWING_HIGH) {
 2819 |          // Giá gần với swing high (trong khoảng 0.5 ATR) nhưng không vượt qua
 2820 |          double distance = lastSwing.price - currentPrice;
 2821 |          return (distance > 0 && distance < atr * 0.5);
 2822 |       }
 2823 |    } else {
 2824 |       // Trong xu hướng giảm, swing failure là khi giá không thể giảm dưới swing low
 2825 |       if(lastSwing.type == SWING_LOW) {
 2826 |          // Giá gần với swing low (trong khoảng 0.5 ATR) nhưng không vượt qua
 2827 |          double distance = currentPrice - lastSwing.price;
 2828 |          return (distance > 0 && distance < atr * 0.5);
 2829 |       }
 2830 |    }
 2831 |    
 2832 |    return false;
 2833 | }
 2834 | 
 2835 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2836 | //| Kiểm tra có liquidity grab không                                |
 2837 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2838 | bool CSwingPointDetector::IsLiquidityGrab(bool isLong)
 2839 | {
 2840 |    if(m_SwingPointCount < 3) return false;
 2841 |    
 2842 |    // Giá hiện tại
 2843 |    double currentPrice = isLong ? SymbolInfoDouble(m_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK) : SymbolInfoDouble(m_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
 2844 |    
 2845 |    // Tìm swing gần nhất và swing quan trọng gần nhất
 2846 |    SwingPoint lastSwing, majorSwing;
 2847 |    bool foundLastSwing = false, foundMajorSwing = false;
 2848 |    
 2849 |    for(int i = 0; i < m_SwingPointCount; i++) {
 2850 |       if(!foundLastSwing && 
 2851 |          ((isLong && m_SwingPoints[i].type == SWING_LOW) || 
 2852 |           (!isLong && m_SwingPoints[i].type == SWING_HIGH))) {
 2853 |          
 2854 |          lastSwing = m_SwingPoints[i];
 2855 |          foundLastSwing = true;
 2856 |       }
 2857 |       
 2858 |       if(!foundMajorSwing && 
 2859 |          ((isLong && m_SwingPoints[i].type == SWING_LOW && m_SwingPoints[i].importance >= SWING_MAJOR) || 
 2860 |           (!isLong && m_SwingPoints[i].type == SWING_HIGH && m_SwingPoints[i].importance >= SWING_MAJOR))) {
 2861 |          
 2862 |          majorSwing = m_SwingPoints[i];
 2863 |          foundMajorSwing = true;
 2864 |       }
 2865 |       
 2866 |       if(foundLastSwing && foundMajorSwing) break;
 2867 |    }
 2868 |    
 2869 |    if(!foundLastSwing || !foundMajorSwing) return false;
 2870 |    
 2871 |    // Lấy ATR hiện tại
 2872 |    double atr = GetValidATR();
 2873 |    if(atr <= 0) return false;
 2874 |    
 2875 |    // Kiểm tra liquidity grab
 2876 |    if(isLong) {
 2877 |       // Trong xu hướng tăng, liquidity grab là khi giá giảm dưới swing low sau đó tăng lại
 2878 |       // Swing low này thường là swing low quan trọng (major hoặc critical)
 2879 |       
 2880 |       if(lastSwing.price < majorSwing.price && currentPrice > lastSwing.price) {
 2881 |          // Giá đã giảm dưới swing low quan trọng gần đây, sau đó tăng lại
 2882 |          return true;
 2883 |       }
 2884 |    } else {
 2885 |       // Trong xu hướng giảm, liquidity grab là khi giá tăng trên swing high sau đó giảm lại
 2886 |       
 2887 |       if(lastSwing.price > majorSwing.price && currentPrice < lastSwing.price) {
 2888 |          // Giá đã tăng trên swing high quan trọng gần đây, sau đó giảm lại
 2889 |          return true;
 2890 |       }
 2891 |    }
 2892 |    
 2893 |    return false;
 2894 | }
 2895 | 
 2896 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2897 | //| Kiểm tra có fakeout không                                        |
 2898 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2899 | bool CSwingPointDetector::IsFakeout(bool isLong)
 2900 | {
 2901 |    if(m_SwingPointCount < 2) return false;
 2902 |    
 2903 |    // Giá hiện tại
 2904 |    double currentPrice = isLong ? SymbolInfoDouble(m_Symbol, SYMBOL_ASK) : SymbolInfoDouble(m_Symbol, SYMBOL_BID);
 2905 |    
 2906 |    // Tìm swing gần nhất
 2907 |    SwingPoint lastSwing;
 2908 |    bool foundSwing = false;
 2909 |    
 2910 |    for(int i = 0; i < m_SwingPointCount; i++) {
 2911 |       if((isLong && m_SwingPoints[i].type == SWING_HIGH) || 
 2912 |          (!isLong && m_SwingPoints[i].type == SWING_LOW)) {
 2913 |          
 2914 |          lastSwing = m_SwingPoints[i];
 2915 |          foundSwing = true;
 2916 |          break;
 2917 |       }
 2918 |    }
 2919 |    
 2920 |    if(!foundSwing) return false;
 2921 |    
 2922 |    // Lấy ATR hiện tại
 2923 |    double atr = GetValidATR();
 2924 |    if(atr <= 0) return false;
 2925 |    
 2926 |    // Kiểm tra fakeout
 2927 |    if(isLong) {
 2928 |       // Trong xu hướng tăng, fakeout là khi giá vượt qua swing high một chút, sau đó giảm lại
 2929 |       if(lastSwing.type == SWING_HIGH) {
 2930 |          // Nếu giá đã vượt qua swing high, nhưng mức vượt qua nhỏ (< 0.5 ATR)
 2931 |          double extension = currentPrice - lastSwing.price;
 2932 |          return (extension > 0 && extension < atr * 0.5);
 2933 |       }
 2934 |    } else {
 2935 |       // Trong xu hướng giảm, fakeout là khi giá giảm dưới swing low một chút, sau đó tăng lại
 2936 |       if(lastSwing.type == SWING_LOW) {
 2937 |          // Nếu giá đã giảm dưới swing low, nhưng mức giảm nhỏ (< 0.5 ATR)
 2938 |          double extension = lastSwing.price - currentPrice;
 2939 |          return (extension > 0 && extension < atr * 0.5);
 2940 |       }
 2941 |    }
 2942 |    
 2943 |    return false;
 2944 | }
 2945 | 
 2946 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2947 | //| Kiểm tra giá nằm ngoài vùng giá trị không                       |
 2948 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2949 | bool CSwingPointDetector::IsPriceOutsideValueArea(double price, bool checkHigh = true)
 2950 | {
 2951 |    // Triển khai trực tiếp trong lớp này thay vì gọi qua m_AssetProfiler
 2952 |    double valueAreaHigh = 0.0;
 2953 |    double valueAreaLow = 0.0;
 2954 |    
 2955 |    // Xác định vùng giá trị dựa trên các EMA
 2956 |    double ema50 = 0.0, ema200 = 0.0;
 2957 |    int ema50Handle = iMA(m_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 50, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
 2958 |    int ema200Handle = iMA(m_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 200, 0, MODE_EMA, PRICE_CLOSE);
 2959 |    
 2960 |    if(ema50Handle != INVALID_HANDLE && ema200Handle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
 2961 |       double buffer50[], buffer200[];
 2962 |       if(CopyBuffer(ema50Handle, 0, 0, 1, buffer50) > 0) {
 2963 |          ema50 = buffer50[0];
 2964 |       }
 2965 |       if(CopyBuffer(ema200Handle, 0, 0, 1, buffer200) > 0) {
 2966 |          ema200 = buffer200[0];
 2967 |       }
 2968 |       IndicatorRelease(ema50Handle);
 2969 |       IndicatorRelease(ema200Handle);
 2970 |    }
 2971 |    
 2972 |    // Tính toán vùng giá trị dựa trên khoảng cách giữa các EMA và ATR
 2973 |    double atr = 0.0;
 2974 |    int atrHandle = iATR(m_Symbol, PERIOD_CURRENT, 14);
 2975 |    if(atrHandle != INVALID_HANDLE) {
 2976 |       double buffer[];
 2977 |       if(CopyBuffer(atrHandle, 0, 0, 1, buffer) > 0) {
 2978 |          atr = buffer[0];
 2979 |       }
 2980 |       IndicatorRelease(atrHandle);
 2981 |    }
 2982 |    
 2983 |    // Xác định vùng giá trị dựa trên EMA và ATR
 2984 |    valueAreaHigh = MathMax(ema50, ema200) + atr * 1.5;
 2985 |    valueAreaLow = MathMin(ema50, ema200) - atr * 1.5;
 2986 |    
 2987 |    // Kiểm tra xem giá có nằm ngoài vùng giá trị không
 2988 |    if(checkHigh) {
 2989 |       return price > valueAreaHigh;
 2990 |    } else {
 2991 |       return price < valueAreaLow;
 2992 |    }
 2993 | }
 2994 | 
 2995 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2996 | //| Lấy kích thước vị thế đề xuất                                   |
 2997 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 2998 | double CSwingPointDetector::GetRecommendedPositionSize(double accountEquity, double riskPercent, bool isLong, double entryPrice, double stopLoss)
 2999 | {
 3000 |    // Tính khoảng cách SL theo points
 3001 |    double slDistance = MathAbs(entryPrice - stopLoss);
 3002 |    double slPoints = slDistance / _Point;
 3003 |    
 3004 |    // Tính risk amount
 3005 |    double riskAmount = accountEquity * riskPercent / 100.0;
 3006 |    
 3007 |    // Tính lot size
 3008 |    double tickValue = SymbolInfoDouble(m_Symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_VALUE);
 3009 |    double tickSize = SymbolInfoDouble(m_Symbol, SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_SIZE);
 3010 |    double pointValue = tickValue * (_Point / tickSize);
 3011 |    
 3012 |    double lotSize = riskAmount / (slPoints * pointValue);
 3013 |    
 3014 |    // Làm tròn lot size theo lotStep
 3015 |    double lotStep = SymbolInfoDouble(m_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_STEP);
 3016 |    lotSize = NormalizeDouble(MathFloor(lotSize / lotStep) * lotStep, 2);
 3017 |    
 3018 |    // Kiểm tra giới hạn lot size
 3019 |    double minLot = SymbolInfoDouble(m_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MIN);
 3020 |    double maxLot = SymbolInfoDouble(m_Symbol, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MAX);
 3021 |    
 3022 |    lotSize = MathMax(minLot, MathMin(maxLot, lotSize));
 3023 |    
 3024 |    return lotSize;
 3025 | }
 3026 | 
 3027 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 3028 | //| Tính kích thước vị thế dựa trên ATR                              |
 3029 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 3030 | double CSwingPointDetector::CalculatePositionSizeByATR(double accountEquity, double riskAmount, bool isLong, double entryPrice)
 3031 | {
 3032 |    // Lấy ATR
 3033 |    double atr = GetValidATR();
 3034 |    if(atr <= 0) return 0.0;
 3035 |    
 3036 |    // Tính khoảng cách SL dựa trên ATR
 3037 |    double atrMultiplier = GetDynamicAtrMultiplier(m_RegimeInfo.regime);
 3038 |    double slDistance = atr * atrMultiplier;
 3039 |    
 3040 |    // Tính SL price
 3041 |    double stopLoss = isLong ? entryPrice - slDistance : entryPrice + slDistance;
 3042 |    
 3043 |    // Tính lot size
 3044 |    return GetRecommendedPositionSize(accountEquity, riskAmount, isLong, entryPrice, stopLoss);
 3045 | }
 3046 | 
 3047 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 3048 | //| Lấy tỷ lệ R:R đề xuất                                           |
 3049 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 3050 | double CSwingPointDetector::GetSuggestedRRRatio()
 3051 | {
 3052 |    // Lấy tỷ lệ R:R tối ưu dựa trên chế độ thị trường
 3053 |    return GetOptimalRiskRewardRatio(m_RegimeInfo.regime);
 3054 | }
 3055 | 
 3056 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 3057 | //| Lấy giá High cao nhất trong khoảng                              |
 3058 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 3059 | double CSwingPointDetector::GetMaxSwingHighInRange(int bars)
 3060 | {
 3061 |    double maxHigh = 0.0;
 3062 |    
 3063 |    for(int i = 0; i < MathMin(bars, m_SwingPointCount); i++) {
 3064 |       if(m_SwingPoints[i].type == SWING_HIGH && m_SwingPoints[i].price > maxHigh) {
 3065 |          maxHigh = m_SwingPoints[i].price;
 3066 |       }
 3067 |    }
 3068 |    
 3069 |    return maxHigh;
 3070 | }
 3071 | 
 3072 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 3073 | //| Lấy giá Low thấp nhất trong khoảng                              |
 3074 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 3075 | double CSwingPointDetector::GetMinSwingLowInRange(int bars)
 3076 | {
 3077 |    double minLow = DBL_MAX;
 3078 |    
 3079 |    for(int i = 0; i < MathMin(bars, m_SwingPointCount); i++) {
 3080 |       if(m_SwingPoints[i].type == SWING_LOW && m_SwingPoints[i].price < minLow) {
 3081 |          minLow = m_SwingPoints[i].price;
 3082 |       }
 3083 |    }
 3084 |    
 3085 |    if(minLow == DBL_MAX) return 0.0;
 3086 |    
 3087 |    return minLow;
 3088 | }
 3089 | 
 3090 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 3091 | //| Kiểm tra xu hướng dựa trên các đỉnh/đáy cao hơn/thấp hơn         |
 3092 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 3093 | bool CSwingPointDetector::HasHigherHighsAndHigherLows(int minSwings = 2)
 3094 | {
 3095 |    if(m_SwingPointCount < minSwings * 2) return false; // Cần ít nhất minSwings đỉnh và minSwings đáy
 3096 | 
 3097 |    int hhCount = 0; // Higher Highs
 3098 |    int hlCount = 0; // Higher Lows
 3099 |    double lastHigh = 0, prevHigh = 0;
 3100 |    double lastLow = 0, prevLow = 0;
 3101 |    int highSwingsFound = 0;
 3102 |    int lowSwingsFound = 0;
 3103 | 
 3104 |    for(int i = m_SwingPointCount - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
 3105 |       if(m_SwingPoints[i].type == SWING_HIGH) {
 3106 |          highSwingsFound++;
 3107 |          if(highSwingsFound == 1) lastHigh = m_SwingPoints[i].price;
 3108 |          else if(highSwingsFound == 2) {
 3109 |             prevHigh = lastHigh;
 3110 |             lastHigh = m_SwingPoints[i].price;
 3111 |             if(lastHigh > prevHigh) hhCount++;
 3112 |          }
 3113 |          else if(highSwingsFound > 2) {
 3114 |              prevHigh = lastHigh;
 3115 |              lastHigh = m_SwingPoints[i].price;
 3116 |              if(lastHigh > prevHigh) hhCount++;
 3117 |          }
 3118 |       }
 3119 |       if(m_SwingPoints[i].type == SWING_LOW) {
 3120 |          lowSwingsFound++;
 3121 |          if(lowSwingsFound == 1) lastLow = m_SwingPoints[i].price;
 3122 |          else if(lowSwingsFound == 2) {
 3123 |             prevLow = lastLow;
 3124 |             lastLow = m_SwingPoints[i].price;
 3125 |             if(lastLow > prevLow) hlCount++;
 3126 |          }
 3127 |          else if(lowSwingsFound > 2) {
 3128 |              prevLow = lastLow;
 3129 |              lastLow = m_SwingPoints[i].price;
 3130 |              if(lastLow > prevLow) hlCount++;
 3131 |          }
 3132 |       }
 3133 |       if(hhCount >= minSwings && hlCount >= minSwings) return true;
 3134 |    }
 3135 |    return (hhCount >= minSwings && hlCount >= minSwings);
 3136 | }
 3137 | 
 3138 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 3139 | //| Kiểm tra xu hướng dựa trên các đỉnh/đáy thấp hơn/thấp hơn         |
 3140 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 3141 | bool CSwingPointDetector::HasLowerHighsAndLowerLows(int minSwings = 2)
 3142 | {
 3143 |    if(m_SwingPointCount < minSwings * 2) return false;
 3144 | 
 3145 |    int lhCount = 0; // Lower Highs
 3146 |    int llCount = 0; // Lower Lows
 3147 |    double lastHigh = 0, prevHigh = 0;
 3148 |    double lastLow = 0, prevLow = 0;
 3149 |    int highSwingsFound = 0;
 3150 |    int lowSwingsFound = 0;
 3151 | 
 3152 |    for(int i = m_SwingPointCount - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
 3153 |       if(m_SwingPoints[i].type == SWING_HIGH) {
 3154 |          highSwingsFound++;
 3155 |          if(highSwingsFound == 1) lastHigh = m_SwingPoints[i].price;
 3156 |          else if(highSwingsFound == 2) {
 3157 |             prevHigh = lastHigh;
 3158 |             lastHigh = m_SwingPoints[i].price;
 3159 |             if(lastHigh < prevHigh) lhCount++;
 3160 |          }
 3161 |          else if(highSwingsFound > 2) {
 3162 |              prevHigh = lastHigh;
 3163 |              lastHigh = m_SwingPoints[i].price;
 3164 |              if(lastHigh < prevHigh) lhCount++;
 3165 |          }
 3166 |       }
 3167 |       if(m_SwingPoints[i].type == SWING_LOW) {
 3168 |          lowSwingsFound++;
 3169 |          if(lowSwingsFound == 1) lastLow = m_SwingPoints[i].price;
 3170 |          else if(lowSwingsFound == 2) {
 3171 |             prevLow = lastLow;
 3172 |             lastLow = m_SwingPoints[i].price;
 3173 |             if(lastLow < prevLow) llCount++;
 3174 |          }
 3175 |          else if(lowSwingsFound > 2) {
 3176 |              prevLow = lastLow;
 3177 |              lastLow = m_SwingPoints[i].price;
 3178 |              if(lastLow < prevLow) llCount++;
 3179 |          }
 3180 |       }
 3181 |       if(lhCount >= minSwings && llCount >= minSwings) return true;
 3182 |    }
 3183 |    return (lhCount >= minSwings && llCount >= minSwings);
 3184 | }
 3185 | 
 3186 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 3187 | //| Kiểm tra cấu trúc thị trường hợp lệ cho giao dịch                 |
 3188 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
 3189 | bool CSwingPointDetector::HasValidMarketStructure(bool isLong, int minMajorSwings = 1)
 3190 | {
 3191 |    if(m_SwingPointCount < minMajorSwings * 2) return false;
 3192 | 
 3193 |    int majorHighCount = 0;
 3194 |    int majorLowCount = 0;
 3195 |    for(int i = 0; i < m_SwingPointCount; i++) {
 3196 |       if(m_SwingPoints[i].importance >= SWING_MAJOR) {
 3197 |          if(m_SwingPoints[i].type == SWING_HIGH) majorHighCount++;
 3198 |          else if(m_SwingPoints[i].type == SWING_LOW) majorLowCount++;
 3199 |       }
 3200 |    }
 3201 | 
 3202 |    if(isLong) {
 3203 |       // Cần ít nhất một đỉnh major và một đáy major, và xu hướng tăng được xác nhận bởi các swing points
 3204 |       return (majorHighCount >= minMajorSwings && majorLowCount >= minMajorSwings && HasHigherHighsAndHigherLows());
 3205 |    } else {
 3206 |       // Cần ít nhất một đỉnh major và một đáy major, và xu hướng giảm được xác nhận bởi các swing points
 3207 |       return (majorHighCount >= minMajorSwings && majorLowCount >= minMajorSwings && HasLowerHighsAndLowerLows());
 3208 |    }
 3209 | }
 3210 | 
 3211 | } // đóng namespace ApexPullback
 3212 | 
 3213 | #endif // SWINGPOINTDETECTOR_MQH_

    8 | class CSymbolInfo 
    9 | {
   10 | private:
   11 |     EAContext*   m_pContext;      // Pointer to the global context
   12 |     bool         m_IsInitialized;
   13 |     string       m_symbol_name;
   14 |     MqlTick      m_latest_tick;
   15 |     MqlRates     m_rates[1];      // For fetching latest price
   16 | 
   17 | public:

   19 |     ~CSymbolInfo() {}
   20 |

   22 |     bool IsInitialized() const { return m_IsInitialized; }

   39 |     double   Ask() const { return m_latest_tick.ask; }

   44 | 
   45 | bool CSymbolInfo::Initialize(EAContext* pContext) 
   46 | {
   47 |     m_pContext = pContext;
   48 |     if (m_pContext == NULL)
   49 |     {
   50 |         Print("FATAL: CSymbolInfo received a NULL context during initialization.");
   51 |         return false;
   52 |     }
   53 | 
   54 |     m_symbol_name = m_pContext->Inputs.Symbol; 
   55 |     if (m_symbol_name == "" || m_symbol_name == "_current_") 
   56 |     {
   57 |         m_symbol_name = ::Symbol();
   58 |     }
   59 | 
   60 |     if (!::SymbolSelect(m_symbol_name, true)) 
   61 |     {
   62 |         string msg = "Failed to select symbol: " + m_symbol_name;
   63 |         if(m_pContext->pErrorHandler) m_pContext->pErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_MARKET_UNKNOWN_SYMBOL, "CSymbolInfo::Initialize", msg);
   64 |         else Print(msg);
   65 |         return false;
   66 |     }
   67 |     
   68 |     OnTick(); // Initial refresh
   69 |     
   70 |     if (m_pContext->pLogger) m_pContext->pLogger->Log(LOG_INFO, "CSymbolInfo initialized for symbol: " + m_symbol_name);
   71 |     m_IsInitialized = true;
   72 |     return true;
   73 | }
   74 | 
   75 | void CSymbolInfo::OnTick() 
   76 | {
   77 |     if(!m_IsInitialized) return;
   78 |     ::SymbolInfoTick(m_symbol_name, m_latest_tick);
   79 | }
   80 | 
   81 | double CSymbolInfo::PipSize() const 
   82 | {
   83 |     // A pip is 10 points for most symbols.
   84 |     // For 3 and 5 digit brokers, Point() is 0.001 and 0.00001 respectively.
   85 |     // PipSize would be 0.01 and 0.0001.
   86 |     int digits = Digits();
   87 |     if (digits == 3 || digits == 5)
   88 |         return 10 * Point();
   89 |     // For 2 and 4 digit brokers, Point() is 0.01 and 0.0001, which is the pip size.
   90 |     return Point();
   91 | }
   92 | 
   93 | double CSymbolInfo::TickValue() const {
   94 |     return ::SymbolInfoDouble(m_symbol_name, SYMBOL_TRADE_TICK_VALUE);
   95 | }
   96 | 
   97 | int CSymbolInfo::Digits() const {
   98 |     return (int)::SymbolInfoInteger(m_symbol_name, SYMBOL_DIGITS);
   99 | }
  100 | 
  101 | double CSymbolInfo::Point() const {
  102 |     return ::SymbolInfoDouble(m_symbol_name, SYMBOL_POINT);
  103 | }
  104 | 
  105 | double CSymbolInfo::Spread() const {
  106 |     return ::SymbolInfoInteger(m_symbol_name, SYMBOL_SPREAD) * Point();
  107 | }
  108 | 
  109 | double CSymbolInfo::StopLevel() const {
  110 |     return ::SymbolInfoInteger(m_symbol_name, SYMBOL_TRADE_STOPS_LEVEL) * Point();
  111 | }
  112 | 
  113 | double CSymbolInfo::LotSizeMin() const {
  114 |     return ::SymbolInfoDouble(m_symbol_name, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MIN);
  115 | }
  116 | 
  117 | double CSymbolInfo::LotSizeMax() const {
  118 |     return ::SymbolInfoDouble(m_symbol_name, SYMBOL_VOLUME_MAX);
  119 | }
  120 | 
  121 | double CSymbolInfo::LotStep() const {
  122 |     return ::SymbolInfoDouble(m_symbol_name, SYMBOL_VOLUME_STEP);
  123 | }

    1 | #ifndef TIMEMANAGER_MQH_
    2 | #define TIMEMANAGER_MQH_
    3 | 
    4 | #include "CommonStructs.mqh"
    5 | 
    6 | namespace ApexPullback {
    7 | 
    8 | class CTimeManager {
    9 | private:
   10 |     EAContext*      m_pContext;         // Pointer to the global EA context
   11 |     bool            m_IsInitialized;    // Flag to indicate if the manager is initialized
   12 |     datetime        m_last_bar_time;    // Time of the last known bar
   13 |     ENUM_TIMEFRAMES m_main_timeframe;   // The primary timeframe the EA operates on
   14 | 
   15 | public:
   16 |     CTimeManager() : m_pContext(NULL),
   17 |                      m_IsInitialized(false),
   18 |                      m_last_bar_time(0),
   19 |                      m_main_timeframe(PERIOD_CURRENT) {
   20 |     }
   21 | 
   22 |     ~CTimeManager() {}
   23 | 
   24 |     bool Initialize(EAContext* pContext) {
   25 |         m_pContext = pContext;
   26 |         if (m_pContext == NULL) {
   27 |             // This is a critical failure, but ErrorHandler might not be available yet.
   28 |             // We rely on the caller (CCore) to log this.
   29 |             return false;
   30 |         }
   31 | 
   32 |         if (m_pContext->pSymbolInfo == NULL || !m_pContext->pSymbolInfo->IsInitialized()) {
   33 |             if(m_pContext->pErrorHandler) m_pContext->pErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_CRITICAL_STATE, "TimeManager::Initialize - SymbolInfo is not initialized.");
   34 |             return false;
   35 |         }
   36 | 
   37 |         m_main_timeframe = m_pContext->Inputs.MainTimeframe;
   38 | 
   39 |         // Initialize with the current bar time to avoid a false new bar on the first tick
   40 |         m_last_bar_time = (datetime)SeriesInfoInteger(m_pContext->pSymbolInfo->Symbol(), m_main_timeframe, SERIES_LASTBAR_DATE);
   41 |         if (m_last_bar_time == 0) {
   42 |             if(m_pContext->pErrorHandler) m_pContext->pErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_HISTORY_NOT_FOUND, "TimeManager::Initialize - Could not retrieve last bar date for " + m_pContext->pSymbolInfo->Symbol() + ". Is chart history available?");
   43 |             return false;
   44 |         }
   45 | 
   46 |         m_IsInitialized = true;
   47 |         return true;
   48 |     }
   49 | 
   50 |     void OnTick() {
   51 |         if (!m_IsInitialized || m_pContext == NULL) return;
   52 | 
   53 |         // Default to resetting the flag each tick
   54 |         m_pContext->IsNewBarEvent = false;
   55 | 
   56 |         datetime current_bar_time = (datetime)SeriesInfoInteger(m_pContext->pSymbolInfo->Symbol(), m_main_timeframe, SERIES_LASTBAR_DATE);
   57 |         
   58 |         if (current_bar_time > m_last_bar_time) {
   59 |             m_last_bar_time = current_bar_time;
   60 |             m_pContext->IsNewBarEvent = true; // Set the flag for the entire system
   61 |             
   62 |             if (m_pContext->pLogger != NULL && m_pContext->Inputs.LoggerConfig.LogLevel >= LOG_LEVEL_DEBUG) {
   63 |                 m_pContext->pLogger->LogDebug("New bar detected on timeframe: " + EnumToString(m_main_timeframe));
   64 |             }
   65 |         }
   66 |     }
   67 | 
   68 |     // This function is deprecated for primary logic, as OnTick now manages the state.
   69 |     // It can be kept for specific, ad-hoc checks if necessary, but its use is discouraged.
   70 |     bool IsNewBar(ENUM_TIMEFRAMES timeframe) {
   71 |         if (!m_IsInitialized || m_pContext == NULL) return false;
   72 |         
   73 |         // This check is independent of the main new bar event flag.
   74 |         static datetime last_check_time[100]; // Static array to track different timeframes, assuming timeframe enum values are within range
   75 |         if(timeframe >= 100) return false; // Safety check
   76 | 
   77 |         datetime current_bar_time = (datetime)SeriesInfoInteger(m_pContext->pSymbolInfo->Symbol(), timeframe, SERIES_LASTBAR_DATE);
   78 |         if (current_bar_time > last_check_time[timeframe]) {
   79 |             last_check_time[timeframe] = current_bar_time;
   80 |             return true;
   81 |         }
   82 |         return false;
   83 |     }
   84 | 
   85 |     datetime GetCurrentServerTime() const { return ::TimeCurrent(); }
   86 |     datetime GetCurrentLocalTime() const { return ::TimeLocal(); }
   87 |     datetime GetCurrentGMTTime() const { return ::TimeGMT(); }
   88 | 
   89 |     ENUM_TIMEFRAMES GetMainTimeframe() const { return m_main_timeframe; }
   90 | 
   91 |     // Basic session detection placeholders
   92 |     bool IsLondonSession() const { return false; } // To be implemented
   93 |     bool IsNewYorkSession() const { return false; } // To be implemented
   94 |     bool IsTokyoSession() const { return false; }   // To be implemented
   95 | };
   96 | 
   97 | } // namespace ApexPullback
   98 | 
   99 | #endif // TIMEMANAGER_MQH_
================================================================================

  166 |     
  167 |     if (m_CacheResults && IsCacheValid()) {
  168 |         LoadStatsFromCache();
  169 |     }
  170 |     return true;

  177 |     if (m_CacheResults && ArraySize(m_RecentTrades) > 0) {
  178 |         SaveStatsToCache();
  179 |     }
  180 |     ArrayFree(m_RecentTrades);
  181 |     if (m_context.Logger) {
  182 |         m_context.Logger->LogInfo("TradeHistoryOptimizer cleanup completed");
  183 |     }
  184 | }

  186 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  187 | //| Phân tích hiệu suất dựa trên bối cảnh                           |
  188 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  189 | bool CTradeHistoryOptimizer::AnalyzePerformanceByContext(PerformanceMatrix &matrix) {
  190 |     if (!m_context.Logger) return false;
  191 | 
  192 |     m_context.Logger->LogInfo("Starting performance analysis by context...");
  193 |     matrix.Initialize();
  194 | 
  195 |     if (!HistorySelect(0, TimeCurrent())) {
  196 |         m_context.Logger->LogError("Failed to select trade history!");
  197 |         return false;
  198 |     }
  199 | 
  200 |     int totalDeals = HistoryDealsTotal();
  201 |     for (int i = 0; i < totalDeals; i++) {
  202 |         long deal_ticket = HistoryDealGetTicket(i);
  203 |         if (deal_ticket <= 0) continue;
  204 | 
  205 |         if (HistoryDealGetInteger(deal_ticket, DEAL_MAGIC) != m_context->MagicNumber) continue;
  206 |         if (HistoryDealGetInteger(deal_ticket, DEAL_ENTRY) != DEAL_ENTRY_OUT) continue;
  207 | 
  208 |         datetime closeTime = (datetime)HistoryDealGetInteger(deal_ticket, DEAL_TIME);
  209 |         double profit = HistoryDealGetDouble(deal_ticket, DEAL_PROFIT);
  210 |         
  211 |         ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY strategy = STRATEGY_PULLBACK_TREND; // Placeholder
  212 |         ENUM_MARKET_REGIME regime = GetMarketRegimeAtTime(m_context, closeTime);
  213 | 
  214 |         if (strategy == STRATEGY_UNDEFINED || regime == REGIME_UNDEFINED) continue;
  215 | 
  216 |         TradeStatsSummary &stats = matrix.stats[strategy][regime];
  217 |         stats.totalTrades++;
  218 |         if (profit > 0) {
  219 |             stats.winningTrades++;
  220 |             stats.totalProfit += profit;
  221 |             if(profit > stats.maxWin) stats.maxWin = profit;
  222 |         } else if (profit < 0) {
  223 |             stats.losingTrades++;
  224 |             stats.totalLoss += profit;
  225 |             if(profit < stats.maxLoss) stats.maxLoss = profit;
  226 |         }
  227 |     }
  228 | 
  229 |     for (int i = 0; i < ENUM_TRADING_STRATEGY_COUNT; i++) {
  230 |         for (int j = 0; j < ENUM_MARKET_REGIME_COUNT; j++) {
  231 |             TradeStatsSummary &stats = matrix.stats[i][j];
  232 |             if (stats.totalTrades > 0) {
  233 |                 stats.winRate = (double)stats.winningTrades / stats.totalTrades * 100.0;
  234 |                 double totalLossAbs = MathAbs(stats.totalLoss);
  235 |                 stats.profitFactor = (totalLossAbs > 0) ? stats.totalProfit / totalLossAbs : 0;
  236 |                 stats.averageWin = (stats.winningTrades > 0) ? stats.totalProfit / stats.winningTrades : 0;
  237 |                 stats.averageLoss = (stats.losingTrades > 0) ? stats.totalLoss / stats.losingTrades : 0;
  238 |             }
  239 |         }
  240 |     }
  241 | 
  242 |     m_context->Logger->LogInfo("Performance analysis by context finished.");
  243 |     return true;
  244 | }
  245 | 
  246 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  247 | //| Tải lịch sử giao dịch                                           |
  248 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  249 | bool CTradeHistoryOptimizer::LoadTradesFromHistory(datetime fromDate, datetime toDate, int maxTrades) {
  250 |     if (!HistorySelect(fromDate, toDate)) {
  251 |         if (m_context && m_context->Logger) m_context->Logger->LogError("Failed to select history");
  252 |         return false;
  253 |     }
  254 | 
  255 |     ArrayFree(m_RecentTrades);
  256 |     int totalDeals = HistoryDealsTotal();
  257 |     int tradesLoaded = 0;
  258 | 
  259 |     for (int i = totalDeals - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
  260 |         long deal_ticket = HistoryDealGetTicket(i);
  261 |         if (deal_ticket <= 0) continue;
  262 |         if (HistoryDealGetInteger(deal_ticket, DEAL_MAGIC) != m_context->MagicNumber) continue;
  263 |         if (HistoryDealGetInteger(deal_ticket, DEAL_ENTRY) != DEAL_ENTRY_OUT) continue;
  264 | 
  265 |         SimpleTrade trade;
  266 |         trade.ticket = (ulong)deal_ticket;
  267 |         trade.closeTime = (datetime)HistoryDealGetInteger(deal_ticket, DEAL_TIME);
  268 |         trade.profit = HistoryDealGetDouble(deal_ticket, DEAL_PROFIT);
  269 |         trade.symbol = HistoryDealGetString(deal_ticket, DEAL_SYMBOL);
  270 |         trade.volume = HistoryDealGetDouble(deal_ticket, DEAL_VOLUME);
  271 |         trade.type = (int)HistoryDealGetInteger(deal_ticket, DEAL_TYPE);
  272 | 
  273 |         ArrayInsert(m_RecentTrades, trade, 0);
  274 |         tradesLoaded++;
  275 | 
  276 |         if (maxTrades > 0 && tradesLoaded >= maxTrades) break;
  277 |     }
  278 |     return true;
  279 | }
  280 | 
  281 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  282 | //| Tính toán thống kê                                              |
  283 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  284 | void CTradeHistoryOptimizer::CalculateStatistics() {
  285 |     int totalTrades = ArraySize(m_RecentTrades);
  286 |     if (totalTrades == 0) return;
  287 | 
  288 |     m_CachedStats = TradeStatsSummary();
  289 |     double balance = 0, peak = 0;
  290 | 
  291 |     for (int i = 0; i < totalTrades; i++) {
  292 |         SimpleTrade &trade = m_RecentTrades[i];
  293 |         m_CachedStats.totalTrades++;
  294 |         if (trade.profit > 0) {
  295 |             m_CachedStats.winningTrades++;
  296 |             m_CachedStats.totalProfit += trade.profit;
  297 |         } else {
  298 |             m_CachedStats.losingTrades++;
  299 |             m_CachedStats.totalLoss += trade.profit;
  300 |         }
  301 |         balance += trade.profit;
  302 |         if (balance > peak) peak = balance;
  303 |         double drawdown = peak - balance;
  304 |         if (drawdown > m_CachedStats.maxDrawdown) {
  305 |             m_CachedStats.maxDrawdown = drawdown;
  306 |         }
  307 |     }
  308 | 
  309 |     if (m_CachedStats.totalTrades > 0) {
  310 |         m_CachedStats.winRate = (double)m_CachedStats.winningTrades / m_CachedStats.totalTrades * 100.0;
  311 |         double totalLossAbs = MathAbs(m_CachedStats.totalLoss);
  312 |         m_CachedStats.profitFactor = (totalLossAbs > 0) ? m_CachedStats.totalProfit / totalLossAbs : 0;
  313 |     }
  314 | }
  315 | 
  316 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  317 | //| Lấy tên file cache                                              |
  318 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  319 | string CTradeHistoryOptimizer::GetCacheFileName() {
  320 |     return StringFormat("%s_%d.cache", m_context->Symbol, m_context->MagicNumber);
  321 | }
  322 | 
  323 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  324 | //| Kiểm tra cache có hợp lệ không                                  |
  325 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  326 | bool CTradeHistoryOptimizer::IsCacheValid(int maxAgeMinutes = 60) {
  327 |     if (m_LastCacheUpdate == 0) return false;
  328 |     return (TimeCurrent() - m_LastCacheUpdate) < (maxAgeMinutes * 60);
  329 | }
  330 | 
  331 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  332 | //| Lưu thống kê vào cache                                          |
  333 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  334 | bool CTradeHistoryOptimizer::SaveStatsToCache() {
  335 |     string filename = GetCacheFileName();
  336 |     int handle = FileOpen(filename, FILE_WRITE | FILE_BIN | FILE_COMMON);
  337 |     if (handle == INVALID_HANDLE) return false;
  338 | 
  339 |     FileWriteLong(handle, TimeCurrent());
  340 |     FileWriteStruct(handle, m_CachedStats);
  341 |     FileClose(handle);
  342 |     m_LastCacheUpdate = TimeCurrent();
  343 |     return true;
  344 | }
  345 | 
  346 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  347 | //| Tải thống kê từ cache                                           |
  348 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  349 | bool CTradeHistoryOptimizer::LoadStatsFromCache() {
  350 |     string filename = GetCacheFileName();
  351 |     if (!FileIsExist(filename, FILE_COMMON)) return false;
  352 | 
  353 |     int handle = FileOpen(filename, FILE_READ | FILE_BIN | FILE_COMMON);
  354 |     if (handle == INVALID_HANDLE) return false;
  355 | 
  356 |     m_LastCacheUpdate = (datetime)FileReadLong(handle);
  357 |     if (!IsCacheValid()) {
  358 |         FileClose(handle);
  359 |         return false;
  360 |     }
  361 |     FileReadStruct(handle, m_CachedStats);
  362 |     FileClose(handle);
  363 |     
  364 |     if (m_context && m_context->Logger) {
  365 |         m_context->Logger->LogInfo("Loaded trade statistics from cache.");
  366 |     }
  367 |     return true;
  368 | }
  369 | 
  370 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  371 | //| Xóa cache                                                        |
  372 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  373 | void CTradeHistoryOptimizer::ClearCache() {
  374 |     string filename = GetCacheFileName();
  375 |     if (FileIsExist(filename, FILE_COMMON)) {
  376 |         FileDelete(filename, FILE_COMMON);
  377 |     }
  378 |     m_LastCacheUpdate = 0;
  379 | }
  380 | 
  381 | } // end namespace ApexPullback
  382 | 
  383 | #endif // TRADEHISTORYOPTIMIZER_MQH_

    2 | //|                 TradeManager.mqh - APEX Pullback EA v14.0        |

    4 | //|      Description: Quản lý việc thực thi giao dịch, bao gồm       |
    5 | //|        mở, đóng, và sửa đổi lệnh, sử dụng lớp CTrade của MQL5.    |
    6 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
    7 | #ifndef APEX_TRADEMANAGER_MQH_
    8 | #define APEX_TRADEMANAGER_MQH_
    9 | 
   10 | #include <Trade\Trade.mqh>   // For CTrade class
   11 | #include "CommonStructs.mqh" // For EAContext access
   12 | 
   13 | namespace ApexPullback
   14 | {
   15 | 
   16 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   17 | //| Manages all trading EXECUTION.                                   |
   18 | //| This class does not make decisions. It only executes them.       |
   19 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   20 | class CTradeManager
   21 | {
   22 | private:
   23 |     // --- State --- 
   24 |     bool                m_initialized;      // Initialization flag
   25 | private:
   26 |     // --- Core Components ---
   27 |     EAContext*          m_context;          // Pointer to the global context
   28 | 
   29 |     // --- MQL5 Trading Object ---
   30 |     CTrade              m_trade;            // MQL5's trading class
   31 | 
   32 |     // --- Basic Parameters ---
   33 |     string              m_symbol;           // The symbol for trading
   34 |     long                m_magic_number;     // The magic number for trades
   35 |     int                 m_slippage;         // Allowed slippage in points
   36 |     int                 m_max_spread_points; // Maximum allowed spread in points
   37 | 
   38 | public:
   39 |     // --- Constructor & Destructor ---
   40 |                         CTradeManager(void);
   41 |                        ~CTradeManager(void);
   42 | 
   43 |     // --- Initialization & Deinitialization ---
   44 |     bool                Initialize(EAContext* pContext);
   45 |     void                Deinitialize(void);
   46 | 
   47 |     // --- Core Trading Actions ---
   48 |     bool                OpenPosition(ENUM_ORDER_TYPE order_type, double volume, double sl_price, double tp_price, const string comment);
   49 |     bool                ClosePosition(long ticket, const string reason, double volume_to_close = 0); // volume=0 means full close
   50 |     bool                CloseAllPositions(const string reason);
   51 |     bool                ModifyPosition(long ticket, double new_sl_price, double new_tp_price);
   52 |     bool                DeletePendingOrder(long ticket, const string reason);
   53 | 
   54 |     // --- Event Handling ---
   55 |     void                OnTradeTransaction(const MqlTradeTransaction& trans, const MqlTradeRequest& request, const MqlTradeResult& result);
   56 | 
   57 | private:
   58 |     // --- Pre-flight Checks ---
   59 |     bool                IsTradeContextValid(const string calling_function);
   60 | 
   61 |     // --- Calculation & Query Helpers ---
   62 |     double              NormalizeLots(double lots);
   63 |     double              NormalizePrice(double price);
   64 |     int                 GetOpenPositionsCount(ENUM_ORDER_TYPE order_type = WRONG_VALUE);
   65 |     double              CalculateStopLossPrice(ENUM_ORDER_TYPE order_type, double entry_price, double sl_pips);
   66 |     double              CalculateTakeProfitPrice(ENUM_ORDER_TYPE order_type, double entry_price, double tp_pips);
   67 | };
   68 | 
   69 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   70 | //| Constructor                                                      |
   71 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   72 | CTradeManager::CTradeManager(void) : m_initialized(false),
   73 |                                      m_context(NULL),
   74 |                                      m_symbol(""),
   75 |                                      m_magic_number(0),
   76 |                                      m_slippage(10),
   77 |                                      m_max_spread_points(0)
   78 | {
   79 |     // Constructor is light. Initialization in Initialize().
   80 | }
   81 | 
   82 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   83 | //| Destructor                                                       |
   84 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   85 | CTradeManager::~CTradeManager(void)
   86 | {
   87 |     Deinitialize();
   88 | }
   89 | 
   90 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   91 | //| Deinitialize                                                     |
   92 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
   93 | void CTradeManager::Deinitialize(void)
   94 | {
   95 |     if (!m_initialized) return;
   96 | 
   97 |     if(m_context && m_context->pLogger)
   98 |     {
   99 |         m_context->pLogger->LogInfo("TradeManager deinitialized.", __FUNCTION__);
  100 |     }
  101 |     m_context = NULL;
  102 |     m_initialized = false;
  103 | }
  104 | 
  105 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  106 | //| Initialize the trade manager                                     |
  107 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  108 | bool CTradeManager::Initialize(EAContext* pContext)
  109 | {
  110 |     m_context = pContext;
  111 | 
  112 |     if (!m_context || !m_context->pLogger || !m_context->pErrorHandler || !m_context->pSymbolInfo)
  113 |     {
  114 |         printf("FATAL: CTradeManager received NULL or incomplete context during initialization.");
  115 |         return false;
  116 |     }
  117 | 
  118 |     m_symbol = m_context->pSymbolInfo->Symbol();
  119 |     m_magic_number = m_context->Inputs.MagicNumber;
  120 |     m_slippage = m_context->Inputs.Slippage;
  121 |     m_max_spread_points = (int)m_context->Inputs.MarketFilters.MaxSpreadPoints;
  122 | 
  123 |     m_trade.SetExpertMagicNumber(m_magic_number);
  124 |     m_trade.SetMarginMode(); // Use account's default margin mode
  125 |     m_trade.SetTypeFillingBySymbol(m_symbol);
  126 | 
  127 |     m_context->pLogger->LogInfo("TradeManager initialized for symbol " + m_symbol + " with Magic Number " + (string)m_magic_number, __FUNCTION__);
  128 |     m_initialized = true;
  129 |     return true;
  130 | }
  131 | 
  132 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  133 | //| Open a new market position                                       |
  134 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  135 | bool CTradeManager::OpenPosition(ENUM_ORDER_TYPE order_type, double volume, double sl_price, double tp_price, const string comment)
  136 | {
  137 |     if (!m_initialized || !IsTradeContextValid(__FUNCTION__)) return false;
  138 | 
  139 |     // --- Pre-flight checks ---
  140 |     m_context->pSymbolInfo->RefreshRates();
  141 |     int current_spread = m_context->pSymbolInfo->Spread();
  142 |     if (current_spread > m_max_spread_points)
  143 |     {
  144 |         if(m_context->pErrorHandler) m_context->pErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_TRADE_HIGH_SPREAD, "OpenPosition", StringFormat("Spread (%d) exceeds max allowed (%d)", current_spread, m_max_spread_points));
  145 |         return false;
  146 |     }
  147 | 
  148 |     double normalized_volume = NormalizeLots(volume);
  149 |     if (normalized_volume <= 0)
  150 |     {
  151 |         if(m_context->pErrorHandler) m_context->pErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_TRADE_INVALID_VOLUME, "OpenPosition", "Invalid trade volume: " + DoubleToString(volume));
  152 |         return false;
  153 |     }
  154 | 
  155 |     double price = (order_type == ORDER_TYPE_BUY) ? m_context->pSymbolInfo->Ask() : m_context->pSymbolInfo->Bid();
  156 | 
  157 |     m_context->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Attempting to open %s position for %s, Vol: %.2f, Price: %.5f, SL: %.5f, TP: %.5f, Comment: %s",
  158 |         EnumToString(order_type), m_symbol, normalized_volume, price, sl_price, tp_price, comment), "OpenPosition");
  159 | 
  160 |     // --- Execute Trade --- 
  161 |     // We set slippage here specifically for the request
  162 |     m_trade.SetDeviationInPoints(m_slippage);
  163 |     bool result = m_trade.PositionOpen(m_symbol, order_type, normalized_volume, price, sl_price, tp_price, comment);
  164 | 
  165 |     // --- Post-flight analysis --- 
  166 |     // The result is now handled by OnTradeTransaction, which will receive the deal details.
  167 |     // We only log the immediate synchronous result here.
  168 |     if (result)
  169 |     {
  170 |         m_context->pLogger->LogInfo("Position open request sent successfully. Awaiting transaction confirmation. Result Deal: #" + (string)m_trade.ResultDeal(), "OpenPosition");
  171 |     }
  172 |     else
  173 |     {
  174 |         if(m_context->pErrorHandler) m_context->pErrorHandler->HandleError(m_trade.ResultRetcode(), "OpenPosition", "Failed to send position open request: " + m_trade.ResultRetcodeDescription());
  175 |     }
  176 | 
  177 |     return result;
  178 | }
  179 | 
  180 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  181 | //| Close an existing position (fully or partially)                  |
  182 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  183 | bool CTradeManager::ClosePosition(long ticket, const string reason, double volume_to_close = 0)
  184 | {
  185 |     if (!m_initialized || !IsTradeContextValid(__FUNCTION__)) return false;
  186 | 
  187 |     if (!PositionSelect(ticket))
  188 |     {
  189 |         // PositionSelect already logged the error if it failed to find the position
  190 |         return false;
  191 |     }
  192 | 
  193 |     // Double-check if it's our position
  194 |     if (m_trade.PositionGetInteger(POSITION_MAGIC) != m_magic_number)
  195 |     {
  196 |         if(m_context->pLogger) m_context->pLogger->LogWarning("Attempted to close position #" + (string)ticket + " which has a different magic number.", "ClosePosition");
  197 |         return false;
  198 |     }
  199 | 
  200 |     double position_volume = m_trade.PositionGetDouble(POSITION_VOLUME);
  201 |     double volume_to_close_normalized = (volume_to_close > 0) ? NormalizeLots(volume_to_close) : position_volume;
  202 | 
  203 |     if (volume_to_close_normalized > position_volume)
  204 |     {
  205 |         if(m_context->pLogger) m_context->pLogger->LogWarning("Volume to close (" + (string)volume_to_close_normalized + ") is greater than position volume (" + (string)position_volume + "). Adjusting to full close.", "ClosePosition");
  206 |         volume_to_close_normalized = position_volume;
  207 |     }
  208 | 
  209 |     if(m_context->pLogger) m_context->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Attempting to close %.2f lots of position #%d. Reason: %s", volume_to_close_normalized, ticket, reason), "ClosePosition");
  210 | 
  211 |     m_trade.SetDeviationInPoints(m_slippage);
  212 |     bool result = m_trade.PositionClose(ticket, volume_to_close_normalized);
  213 | 
  214 |     if (result)
  215 |     {
  216 |         if(m_context->pLogger) m_context->pLogger->LogInfo("Position #" + (string)ticket + " close request sent successfully. Awaiting transaction confirmation. Deal: #" + (string)m_trade.ResultDeal(), "ClosePosition");
  217 |     }
  218 |     else
  219 |     {
  220 |         if(m_context->pErrorHandler) m_context->pErrorHandler->HandleError(m_trade.ResultRetcode(), "ClosePosition", "Failed to send close request for position #" + (string)ticket + ": " + m_trade.ResultRetcodeDescription());
  221 |     }
  222 | 
  223 |     return result;
  224 | }
  225 | 
  226 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  227 | //| Close all open positions managed by this EA instance             |
  228 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  229 | bool CTradeManager::CloseAllPositions(const string reason)
  230 | {
  231 |     if (!m_initialized || !IsTradeContextValid(__FUNCTION__)) return false;
  232 | 
  233 |     int total_positions = PositionsTotal();
  234 |     bool all_closed_successfully = true;
  235 | 
  236 |     if(m_context->pLogger) m_context->pLogger->LogInfo("Attempting to close all positions. Reason: " + reason, "CloseAllPositions");
  237 | 
  238 |     // Iterate backwards because closing positions can change the collection
  239 |     for (int i = total_positions - 1; i >= 0; i--)
  240 |     {
  241 |         ulong ticket = PositionGetTicket(i);
  242 |         if (PositionSelectByTicket(ticket))
  243 |         {
  244 |             if (PositionGetInteger(POSITION_MAGIC) == m_magic_number && PositionGetString(POSITION_SYMBOL) == m_symbol)
  245 |             {
  246 |                 if (!ClosePosition(ticket, reason))
  247 |                 {
  248 |                     all_closed_successfully = false;
  249 |                     // Error is already logged by ClosePosition
  250 |                 }
  251 |             }
  252 |         }
  253 |     }
  254 |     return all_closed_successfully;
  255 | }
  256 | 
  257 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  258 | //| Modify SL/TP for an open position                                |
  259 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  260 | bool CTradeManager::ModifyPosition(long ticket, double new_sl_price, double new_tp_price)
  261 | {
  262 |     if (!m_initialized || !IsTradeContextValid(__FUNCTION__)) return false;
  263 | 
  264 |     if (!m_trade.PositionSelectByTicket(ticket))
  265 |     {
  266 |         if(m_context && m_context->pLogger) m_context->pLogger->LogError("Failed to select position #" + (string)ticket + " for modification.", "ModifyPosition");
  267 |         return false;
  268 |     }
  269 | 
  270 |     if (m_trade.PositionGetInteger(POSITION_MAGIC) != m_magic_number)
  271 |     {
  272 |         return false; // Silently ignore positions from other EAs
  273 |     }
  274 | 
  275 |     double current_sl = m_trade.PositionGetDouble(POSITION_SL);
  276 |     double current_tp = m_trade.PositionGetDouble(POSITION_TP);
  277 | 
  278 |     // Check if modification is actually needed to avoid unnecessary server calls
  279 |     if (m_context && m_context->pSymbolInfo && 
  280 |         MathAbs(new_sl_price - current_sl) < m_context->pSymbolInfo->TickSize() &&
  281 |         MathAbs(new_tp_price - current_tp) < m_context->pSymbolInfo->TickSize())
  282 |     {
  283 |         return true; // No significant change needed
  284 |     }
  285 | 
  286 |     if(m_context && m_context->pLogger) m_context->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("Attempting to modify position #%d: SL from %.5f to %.5f, TP from %.5f to %.5f",
  287 |         ticket, current_sl, new_sl_price, current_tp, new_tp_price), "ModifyPosition");
  288 | 
  289 |     bool result = m_trade.PositionModify(ticket, new_sl_price, new_tp_price);
  290 | 
  291 |     if (result)
  292 |     {
  293 |         if(m_context && m_context->pLogger) m_context->pLogger->LogInfo("Position #" + (string)ticket + " modified successfully.", "ModifyPosition");
  294 |     }
  295 |     else
  296 |     {
  297 |         if(m_context && m_context->pLogger) m_context->pLogger->LogError("Failed to modify position #" + (string)ticket + ". Error: " + (string)m_trade.ResultRetcode() + " - " + m_trade.ResultRetcodeDescription(), "ModifyPosition");
  298 |     }
  299 | 
  300 |     return result;
  301 | }
  302 | 
  303 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  304 | //| Delete a pending order                                           |
  305 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  306 | bool CTradeManager::DeletePendingOrder(long ticket, const string reason)
  307 | {
  308 |     if (!m_initialized || !IsTradeContextValid(__FUNCTION__)) return false;
  309 | 
  310 |     if(m_context && m_context->pLogger) m_context->pLogger->LogInfo("Attempting to delete pending order #" + (string)ticket + ". Reason: " + reason, "DeletePendingOrder");
  311 | 
  312 |     bool result = m_trade.OrderDelete(ticket);
  313 | 
  314 |     if (result)
  315 |     {
  316 |         if(m_context && m_context->pLogger) m_context->pLogger->LogInfo("Pending order #" + (string)ticket + " deleted successfully.", "DeletePendingOrder");
  317 |     }
  318 |     else
  319 |     {
  320 |         if(m_context && m_context->pLogger) m_context->pLogger->LogError("Failed to delete pending order #" + (string)ticket + ". Error: " + (string)m_trade.ResultRetcode() + " - " + m_trade.ResultRetcodeDescription(), "DeletePendingOrder");
  321 |     }
  322 | 
  323 |     return result;
  324 | }
  325 | 
  326 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  327 | //| Check if the trading context is valid                            |
  328 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  329 | bool CTradeManager::IsTradeContextValid(const string calling_function)
  330 | {
  331 |     if (!m_context || !m_context->pLogger || !m_context->pErrorHandler || !m_context->pSymbolInfo)
  332 |     {
  333 |         // This is a catastrophic failure. We can't even use the logger/error handler.
  334 |         printf("FATAL: CTradeManager has NULL context or critical components in %s. EA cannot continue.", calling_function);
  335 |         return false;
  336 |     }
  337 | 
  338 |     // 1. Check Server Connection & Trade Permissions
  339 |     if (!TerminalInfoInteger(TERMINAL_TRADE_ALLOWED) || !MQLInfoInteger(MQL_TRADE_ALLOWED))
  340 |     {
  341 |         // Use ErrorHandler for critical errors
  342 |         m_context->pErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_TRADE_CONTEXT_INVALID, calling_function, "Trading is not allowed by terminal or MQL settings.");
  343 |         return false;
  344 |     }
  345 | 
  346 |     // 2. Check for valid prices (moved before spread check)
  347 |     m_context->pSymbolInfo->RefreshRates();
  348 |     if (m_context->pSymbolInfo->Bid() <= 0 || m_context->pSymbolInfo->Ask() <= 0)
  349 |     {
  350 |         m_context->pErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_TRADE_CONTEXT_INVALID, calling_function, "Market prices are zero or negative.");
  351 |         return false;
  352 |     }
  353 | 
  354 |     // 3. Spread check is now done inside OpenPosition to be more contextual
  355 | 
  356 |     return true;
  357 | }
  358 | 
  359 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  360 | //| Normalize lot size to be compliant with symbol specification     |
  361 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  362 | double CTradeManager::NormalizeLots(double lots)
  363 | {
  364 |     if (!m_context || !m_context->pSymbolInfo) return 0.0;
  365 | 
  366 |     double volume_step = m_context->pSymbolInfo->VolumeStep();
  367 |     double min_volume = m_context->pSymbolInfo->VolumeMin();
  368 |     double max_volume = m_context->pSymbolInfo->VolumeMax();
  369 | 
  370 |     // Ensure volume_step is not zero to prevent division by zero error
  371 |     if (volume_step <= 0)
  372 |     {
  373 |         if(m_context->pLogger) m_context->pLogger->LogError("Invalid volume_step: " + (string)volume_step + ". Cannot normalize lots.", "NormalizeLots");
  374 |         return 0.0;
  375 |     }
  376 | 
  377 |     double normalized_lots = MathRound(lots / volume_step) * volume_step;
  378 | 
  379 |     // Clamp the value within the min/max limits
  380 |     if (normalized_lots < min_volume && lots > 0) normalized_lots = min_volume;
  381 |     if (normalized_lots > max_volume) normalized_lots = max_volume;
  382 | 
  383 |     return normalized_lots;
  384 | }
  385 | 
  386 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  387 | //| Lấy số lượng vị thế đang mở theo loại                             |
  388 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  389 | int CTradeManager::GetOpenPositionsCount(ENUM_ORDER_TYPE order_type = WRONG_VALUE)
  390 | {
  391 |     if (!m_context) return 0;
  392 |     int count = 0;
  393 |     for(int i = (int)PositionsTotal() - 1; i >= 0; i--)
  394 |     {
  395 |         if(m_trade.PositionSelectByIndex(i)) // Select by index
  396 |         {
  397 |             if(m_trade.PositionGetInteger(POSITION_MAGIC) == m_magic_number && m_trade.PositionGetString(POSITION_SYMBOL) == m_symbol)
  398 |             {
  399 |                 if(order_type == WRONG_VALUE || (ENUM_ORDER_TYPE)m_trade.PositionGetInteger(POSITION_TYPE) == order_type)
  400 |                 {
  401 |                     count++;
  402 |                 }
  403 |             }
  404 |         }
  405 |     }
  406 |     return count;
  407 | }
  408 | 
  409 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  410 | //| Tính toán giá Stop Loss                                          |
  411 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  412 | double CTradeManager::CalculateStopLossPrice(ENUM_ORDER_TYPE order_type, double entry_price, double sl_pips)
  413 | {
  414 |     if (sl_pips <= 0 || !m_context || !m_context->pSymbolInfo) return 0.0;
  415 |     double pips_value = sl_pips * m_context->pSymbolInfo->Point();
  416 |     double sl_price = (order_type == ORDER_TYPE_BUY) ? entry_price - pips_value : entry_price + pips_value;
  417 |     return NormalizePrice(sl_price);
  418 | }
  419 | 
  420 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  421 | //| Tính toán giá Take Profit                                        |
  422 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  423 | double CTradeManager::CalculateTakeProfitPrice(ENUM_ORDER_TYPE order_type, double entry_price, double tp_pips)
  424 | {
  425 |     if (tp_pips <= 0 || !m_context || !m_context->pSymbolInfo) return 0.0;
  426 |     double pips_value = tp_pips * m_context->pSymbolInfo->Point();
  427 |     double tp_price = (order_type == ORDER_TYPE_BUY) ? entry_price + pips_value : entry_price - pips_value;
  428 |     return NormalizePrice(tp_price);
  429 | }
  430 | 
  431 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  432 | //| Event Handler for Trade Transactions                             |
  433 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  434 | void CTradeManager::OnTradeTransaction(const MqlTradeTransaction& trans, const MqlTradeRequest& request, const MqlTradeResult& result)
  435 | {
  436 |     if (!m_initialized || !IsTradeContextValid(__FUNCTION__)) return;
  437 | 
  438 |     // We are only interested in transactions for our magic number
  439 |     if (trans.magic != m_magic_number)
  440 |     {
  441 |         return;
  442 |     }
  443 | 
  444 |     // We only care about completed deals (additions to history)
  445 |     if (trans.type != TRADE_TRANSACTION_DEAL_ADD)
  446 |     {
  447 |         return;
  448 |     }
  449 | 
  450 |     long deal_ticket = trans.deal;
  451 |     if (!HistoryDealSelect(deal_ticket))
  452 |     {
  453 |         m_context->pErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_HISTORY_DEAL_NOT_FOUND, "OnTradeTransaction", "Could not select deal #" + (string)deal_ticket);
  454 |         return;
  455 |     }
  456 | 
  457 |     // --- Gather Deal Information ---
  458 |     long order_ticket = HistoryDealGetInteger(deal_ticket, DEAL_ORDER);
  459 |     long position_ticket = HistoryDealGetInteger(deal_ticket, DEAL_POSITION_ID);
  460 |     ENUM_DEAL_TYPE deal_type = (ENUM_DEAL_TYPE)HistoryDealGetInteger(deal_ticket, DEAL_TYPE);
  461 |     double deal_price = HistoryDealGetDouble(deal_ticket, DEAL_PRICE);
  462 |     double deal_volume = HistoryDealGetDouble(deal_ticket, DEAL_VOLUME);
  463 |     long deal_time_msc = HistoryDealGetInteger(deal_ticket, DEAL_TIME_MSC);
  464 | 
  465 |     // --- Gather Order Information for Slippage/Latency Calculation ---
  466 |     if (!HistoryOrderSelect(order_ticket))
  467 |     {
  468 |         m_context->pErrorHandler->HandleError(ERR_HISTORY_ORDER_NOT_FOUND, "OnTradeTransaction", "Could not select parent order #" + (string)order_ticket + " for deal #" + (string)deal_ticket);
  469 |         return;
  470 |     }
  471 | 
  472 |     double order_price = HistoryOrderGetDouble(order_ticket, ORDER_PRICE_OPEN);
  473 |     long order_time_msc = HistoryOrderGetInteger(order_ticket, ORDER_TIME_SETUP_MSC);
  474 | 
  475 |     // --- Calculate Slippage and Latency ---
  476 |     double slippage_points = 0;
  477 |     if (deal_type == DEAL_TYPE_BUY)
  478 |     {
  479 |         slippage_points = (deal_price - order_price) / m_context->pSymbolInfo->Point();
  480 |     }
  481 |     else if (deal_type == DEAL_TYPE_SELL)
  482 |     {
  483 |         slippage_points = (order_price - deal_price) / m_context->pSymbolInfo->Point();
  484 |     }
  485 | 
  486 |     double slippage_pips = slippage_points / m_context->pSymbolInfo->PipToPointRatio();
  487 |     long execution_time_ms = (long)(deal_time_msc - order_time_msc);
  488 | 
  489 |     // --- Log and Update Monitors ---
  490 |     m_context->pLogger->LogInfo(StringFormat("DEAL CONFIRMED: #%d for Pos #%d. Type: %s, Vol: %.2f, Price: %.5f, Slippage: %.2f pips, Latency: %d ms",
  491 |         deal_ticket, position_ticket, EnumToString(deal_type), deal_volume, deal_price, slippage_pips, execution_time_ms), "OnTradeTransaction");
  492 | 
  493 |     // Feed the data to the Broker Health Monitor
  494 |     if(m_context->pBrokerHealthMonitor)
  495 |     {
  496 |         m_context->pBrokerHealthMonitor->UpdateWithNewDataPoint(slippage_pips, (double)execution_time_ms);
  497 |     }
  498 | 
  499 |     // Notify RiskManager about the confirmed deal for statistical updates
  500 |     if(m_context->pRiskManager)
  501 |     {
  502 |         m_context->pRiskManager->OnDealExecuted(deal_ticket);
  503 |     }
  504 | }
  505 | 
  506 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  507 | //| Normalize price to be compliant with symbol digits               |
  508 | //+------------------------------------------------------------------+
  509 | double CTradeManager::NormalizePrice(double price)
  510 | {
  511 |     if (!m_context || !m_context->pSymbolInfo) return price;
  512 |     return NormalizeDouble(price, (int)m_context->pSymbolInfo->Digits());
  513 | }
  514 | 
  515 | } // END NAMESPACE ApexPullback
  516 | #endif // TRADEMANAGER_MQH_
